Exactly! Now do you believe that my content isn't clickbait?
Maybe it was just a false alarm?
有这个可能。但我和素裳很快就被判官们赶走了，而在临走前，我留意到那些判官似乎正打算在绥园里布置些什么。
Possibly... but the judges kicked me and Sushang out of there straight away. It looked like they were setting something up in the garden before we left.
这其中一定有阴谋…呃，我是说，有鬼！
There has to be a conspiracy... Uh, I mean — ghosts!
说起来，{F#小姐}{M#小哥}你有没有时间？要不要，一起去探探绥园，就咱俩？我保证这次一定能挖出其中的真相。
Actually, do you have some free time? Do you wanna explore Fyxestroll Garden together, just the two of us? I guarantee you we're gonna reveal the truth this time.
嘿嘿，我从见到您那一刻就知道，您是干这个的。走吧走吧！
Hee-hee, I knew it! This is what people like us live for. Let's go!
高风险，高回报，高流量。我是说，在成长的道路上，每个人对未知事物的好奇心会被渐渐磨去，而我，我不能接受自己变成如此乏味的成年人。
High risk, high reward, high view count. As we grow up, our curiosity for the unknown gradually fades... I'm not gonna let myself become a boring grown-up.
幽灵出没，是因为怨念不散，还是灾难又要降临的预兆？你就不感到好奇吗？
Why are the ghosts haunting the garden? A lingering grudge, perhaps... or maybe they're an omen of some impending disaster? Aren't you curious?
不必害怕，到时候，只要躲在我身后就好。
Don't be scared. When the time comes, just hide behind me.
我明白了，你怕了。我能理解，我也很害怕，不过我相信勇气迟早会回到你身上的。家人，我会一直在这儿等你！
I get it — you're scared. I'm scared too. I'm sure you'll find your courage sooner or later. I'll be here waiting for you when you do!
我有点怕，让我再考虑一下…
I'm a little scared. Let me think it over...
我能理解，我也很害怕，不过我相信勇气迟早会回到你身上的。我在这儿等你！
I understand — I'm scared too! I'm sure you'll find your courage sooner or later. I'll be here waiting for you when you do!
喂喂，这不是拥有超强第六感的{NICKNAME}嘛？
Yo, how's that super strong sixth sense of yours?
要和我一起再探绥园吗？我保证这次咱们俩一定能挖出其中的真相。
Wanna explore Fyxestroll Garden with me? I KNOW we're gonna get to the truth this time.
嘿嘿，我从见到您那一刻就知道，您是干这个的。走吧走吧！
Hee-hee, I knew it! This is what people like us live for. Let's go!
我有点怕，让我再考虑一下…
I'm a little scared. Let me think it over...
家人啊，这还有什么要考虑的？不过我能理解，我会在这儿等你的！
What? What's there to think about? I get it. I'll be waiting for you here when you're ready!
唔，四周黑黢黢的，总感觉好像有人在暗处盯着咱们……
It's so dark in here... It feels like we're being watched...
不知道家人之前听说过这绥园闹鬼的传闻吗？
Did anyone ever tell you the scary stories about Fyxestroll Garden?
问得好！作为探景主播我可是做足了功课。等我找一下视频文案……
Then allow me! As a streamer, I've done my fair share of research. Let me find my script...
「绥绥仙狐，颀尾庞庞」，绥园本是一位狐人巧匠打造的园林洞天，供同胞们休憩闲游、赋诗宴饮的地方…以下五百字省略。

"Wandering Fox Spirits and Ghostly Tails..." Fyxestroll Garden was originally a garden delve constructed by a foxian craftmaster. It was a place for their kin to rest, write poems, and feast... et cetera et cetera.
据说在三十年前丰饶民战争中，狐族飞行士精锐尽出，死伤甚众。人们自发到绥园里的狐眠冢处吊唁故人…这让绥园游人稀疏，少有欢声。

It's said the elite pilots of the foxians were almost wiped out in the Denizens of Abundance Wars thirty years ago. People went to the Foxsomn Tomb in Fyxestroll Garden to grieve for the departed... Because of this, Fyxestroll Garden rarely saw visitors and was bereft of joy.
久而久之，绥园幽幽鬼火忽明忽暗，悲泣幽咽之声凭空回荡，「绥园闹鬼」的消息在罗浮仙舟居民间不胫而走。

Over time, Fyxestroll Garden became full of flickering ghostly flames, and weeping lamentations echoed through the air. The rumor that the garden was haunted spread like wildfire among Xianzhou Luofu residents.
看来绥园闹鬼一事有理有据？
Sounds like the hauntings in Fyxestroll Garden could be true after all?
没错，我来绥园取材，有过充分的调查。
I know, right? I did a lot of research before I decided to film here...
你这么了解仙舟风土人情啊？
家人啊，看破不说破。这条视频文案是花钱请西衍先生帮我写的，能不专业吗？
Ugh, man, is it that obvious? I paid Mr. Xiyan to write it up for me. Sounded a little too professional, huh?
嗯，眼下确实也不适合长篇大论。放心，我用一句话将来龙去脉给你整明白。
Sure, I guess now's not really a good time for stories... Don't worry — I can sum it up in a single sentence.
这绥园是一处园林洞天，不过后来有人在狐眠冢吊唁阵亡的狐族将士，这里便渐渐传出了「绥园闹鬼」的传闻。
Fyxestroll Garden used to be a garden delve, but people started coming here to mourn fallen foxian fighters at the Foxsomn Tomb, and rumors spread that the garden was haunted.
闹鬼传闻虽然听起来荒诞，但这次十王司来人可是真的。
I know it's easy to cast doubt, but the Ten-Lords Commission actually showed up this time.
说到这个，要是前面有什么风吹草动，咱俩可千万要绕开走。不说撞见鬼，万一遇见了判官，咱俩肯定会被赶出来，这一趟就算是白来了。
Speaking of which, we have to avoid running into the judges. If we get kicked out, it'll all be for nothing.
好了，该嘱咐的都嘱咐完了，咱接着走，当心脚下。
Anyway, that's the background. Let's keep moving, and watch your step...
…那有十王司的冥差巡逻，咱们换条路走吧——先走狐眠冢那边，绕进谈狐林好了。
...There are Ten-Lords Commission spiritfarers on patrol. Let's go the other way — we'll head to the Foxsomn Tomb first, then cut through the Locufox Forest.
哇，没想到{F#姐妹}{M#兄弟}你这么强。但这些人毕竟是公职人员，要是咱俩被盘问起来，得有个说辞……
Wow, I didn't know you were so strong, bro! But these are Luofu officials... if we're interrogated, we need to get our story straight...
就说冥差们被恶灵附身了…
We could say evil spirits possessed the spiritfarers...
妙哇，就说咱们是出于自卫，迫不得已。
Perfect! Let's just say it was self-defense. We had no choice.
就说咱们被恶灵附身了…
We could say that evil spirits possessed us...
有道理，狂性大发，失去行为责任能力…还是你懂的多。
Makes sense. We went crazy and couldn't control ourselves... I like the way you think.
哇噢，确实。没有目击证人就是没有喽。咱们快走吧。
Whoa! Nice! There were no witnesses, so this never happened, alright?
你们是什么人，为什么会来到这里？立刻逮捕！
State your name and your business! Arrest them immediately!
{NICKNAME}，瞧见了没？这个姐姐肤色惨白，眼神飘忽…她到底是人是鬼啊？
{NICKNAME}, look how pale she is! And it seems like her eyes aren't even focusing... Is she a ghost?
入得十王司，你们尽可以把我当成已死之人了。小女子代号「寒鸦」，身为判官，执掌拘、锁、刑、问四部职责之末。故而，我对你们二位并非一无所知。

As a member of the Ten-Lords Commission, you may as well consider me a member of the dead. I am a judge, alias "Hanya." Of the four duties of detention, incarceration, interrogation, and punishment, I'm responsible for interrogation. Therefore, I know a thing or two about you.
桂乃芬，化外民，无业…于前日和云骑士卒素裳进入绥园。
Guinaifen, an Outworlder, unemployed... You entered Fyxestroll Garden with Sushang, a Cloud Knight, the day before yesterday.
欸，无业？是{RUBY_B#杂耍}街头行为艺术家{RUBY_E#}和寻找时事热点的主播啦！主播！好歹是个正经的营生！
Huh? Unemployed? I'm a {RUBY_B#juggler}street performer{RUBY_E#} and a streamer who reports on current events! A streamer! It's a legit operation!
…星穹列车乘员，神策府的客人，帮助云骑平息了建木灾厄，是联盟的朋友。
...A passenger on the Astral Express and a guest of the Seat of Divine Foresight. You assisted the Cloud Knights in resolving the Ambrosial Arbor calamity and are a friend of the Alliance.
你、你好…我是十王司判官，我叫藿藿。
H—Hello... I'm a Judge of the Ten-Lords Commission. My name is Huohuo.
藿藿，你已是十王司判官了，说话要再有底气一些。
As a Judge of the Ten-Lords Commission, you should speak with more confidence, Huohuo.
大人，都是桂乃芬的主意！
Your Honor, it was all Guinaifen's idea!
这、这么快就把我出卖了吗？好吧，一人做事一人当，确实是我劝{F#她}{M#他}一起来的。
A—Are you really selling me out that fast? Whatever, I'll take the hit... It's true, I persuaded {M#him}{F#her} to come along.
不管是谁的主意…两位，这儿已被划为禁区，无干人等不得入内。
Regardless whose idea it was... This place has been designated as a restricted area. No one is allowed to enter.
你想必听过…银河球棒侠。
You must have heard of... the Galactic Baseballer.
{NICKNAME}，星穹列车乘员，神策府的客人，帮助云骑平息了建木灾厄，是联盟的朋友。
You are a passenger on the Astral Express and a guest of the Seat of Divine Foresight. You assisted the Cloud Knights in resolving the Ambrosial Arbor calamity and are a friend of the Alliance.
…{F#她}{M#他}就是星穹列车上的无名客？
说说吧，桂乃芬，去而复返，所为何事？
Tell me, Guinaifen. Why did you return here?
呃，也没什么，就是好久没有更新了，想拍些有关幽灵鬼怪的影像，当作视频素材…嘿嘿。
Uh, no reason. I haven't posted anything for ages, so I wanted to film some ghosts for my videos... hehe.
吾已说过，仙舟之上并无鬼魂。这是荒诞迷信，身为仙舟住民，理当不信谣不传谣。
We have already told you there are no ghosts on the Xianzhou — it is a ridiculous superstition. As a resident of the Xianzhou, you should refrain from believing or spreading rumors.
但我明明看见了，那些家伙冒着吱吱鬼火，发出桀桀怪笑，再说了，素裳也瞧见了——
But I saw them! They had ghostly flames coming out of their body, and they were cackling! And Sushang saw them too—
桂乃芬小姐，虽然一时半会儿很难解释清楚，但那些东西并不是你以为的幽灵鬼怪，请不要把家乡的传说套在仙舟的事情上……
Miss Guinaifen, it's hard to explain, but those things aren't ghosts. Please don't bring legends from your home world onto the Xianzhou...
那些溜出来作祟的东西，是非常危险的能量寄生物「岁阳」。
The roaming entities you saw are extremely dangerous energy parasites... We call them "heliobi."
真的吗？我不信。岁阳？那是什么？我明白啦，在仙舟上，岁阳就是幽灵的别称，对吧？一定是这么回事。
...I... Really? I don't believe it. "Heliobi"? What's that? Ohh, I get it — "heliobi" is just another word for "ghost" on the Xianzhou, right? That's gotta be it.
看来还是得让尾巴大爷出来一趟…尾、尾巴大爷？
Maybe we should let Mr. Tail out for a bit... M—Mr. Tail?
听到了听到了！吵死了…本大爷又不是伺候人类的珍禽异兽。
I heard you, I heard you! Tsk, unbelievable... What am I, her pet?
老子就是岁阳，就是你以为的幽灵鬼怪，看明白了吗？看明白了就滚！
I'm a heliobus! We're not ghosts. Got it? Now scram!
哎呀，真是个奇怪的小姑娘，明明就是为了拍摄灵异鬼怪而来的嘛，怎么真见到了反而大呼小叫起来了……
What a strange girl. Here to film ghosts, yet terrified when she lays eyes on one...
深呼吸！小桂子，冷静！深呼吸！欸，能不能让我和这、这个尾巴大爷再聊两句？
Deep breaths, Little Gui, deep breaths...! Ahem, c—can I have a small chat with this... "Mr. Tail?"
滚，老子没空跟你吹牛放屁。
I said scram. I have no time to talk nonsense with you.
说了好几遍老子不是幽灵，再啰嗦就把你们都吃了！
I told you, I'm not a ghost! If I have to repeat myself again I'll be eating every one of you!
两位别怕，它只是说说的，尾巴大爷它吃素呢。
Please don't be afraid, he's only kidding. Mr. Tail is a vegetarian.
Let's go. He doesn't want to talk to us.
这{F#小姑娘}{M#小子}挺有眼力见。
不能撤，这可是个千载难逢的取材机会！
N—No way! This is a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to get something for my vids!
判官大人，冒昧问下，这火焰团子到底是个什么东西？该如何防范它暴起伤人？还有还有…为什么判官大人会随身带着这么个东西……
Your Honor, if I may ask, what exactly is this... fire thing? How can we prevent it from hurting people? ...And why is a judge carrying one around with her...?
该见的都见了，判官还有要事处理。藿藿，送客。
I believe we're done here. We have important matters to attend to. Huohuo, please see them off.
姐姐别生气，您平时外出执行任务，少有待人接物的经验，这件事不妨交给寒鸦处置，只要我能说明原因，他们自会离开。
Sister, don't be angry. Most of your time is spent in the field — you're not accustomed to dealing with others. Leave this to me. If I explain the reasoning, they will leave.
眼下绥园的异状不可避免地会引来关注，防不胜防。今天粗暴打发了不明就里的二人，他们心有不甘，万一再来，却不一定能有再遇上我们的好运。

As things stand, the situation in Fyxestroll Garden is sure to keep drawing attention. If we forcibly dismiss these two today, their curiosity will remain — who knows what might happen if they decide to come back. They might not be lucky enough to run into us next time.
二位想必听说过工造司「造化洪炉」破损一事。其中封锁的「岁阳」妖物走脱，盘踞此处，十王司正受命抓捕。劝你们速速离开，也是为了安全着想。

I assume the two of you heard about the damage done to the Artisanship Commission's Creation Furnace? The "heliobi" sealed within escaped and have been haunting this place. The Ten-Lords Commission has orders to capture them. I am strongly advising you to leave — for your own safety.
你们有疑惑，可以提问，寒鸦会尽力满足你们的好奇心。但问完之后，还希望两位保守秘密，乖乖离开绥园，别再回来。

If you have any questions, raise them now — I will do my best to satisfy your curiosity. But I hope you will keep any information you hear in strict confidence... and then leave Fyxestroll Garden — never to return.
这位判官大人真是通情达理，谢谢啦。我发誓，问完就走。
Th—That's very reasonable, Your Honor! Thank you. I promise we'll leave after asking our questions.
寒鸦身为因果殿录事者，虽然谈不上无所不知，但会尽量满足你们的好奇心，问吧。
As a clerk at the Hall of Karma, my knowledge on these matters is somewhat limited, but I will try my best to satisfy your curiosity. Please proceed.
若按太卜司的分类，它们是来自天外的能量寄生物，以妖异火焰形象出现的「星火之精」。
According to the Divination Commission's classification, they are energy parasites from the cosmos itself. They are "Starfire Essence" that materialize in the form of strange fire.
若用比喻来说，它们就像喜爱追逐热源的飞蛾。只不过这「热源」不是别的，而是有情生灵的思想。
Metaphorically speaking, they are like moths to a flame... but that flame is the thoughts of sentient beings.
嗯。它们喜爱寄生在有智慧的生命身上，汲取他们的体验，品尝他们的情绪。
Yes. They attach themselves to sentient beings, feeding off their host's experiences and emotions.
渐渐地，岁阳会扎根宿主的神经系统，利用其内心的欲望和弱点，让他产生种种颠倒妄想，如同操纵棋子傀儡般摆弄宿主。宿主则会对岁阳言听计从，我们称之为「夺舍」。

A heliobus will slowly take root in its host's nervous system, using their deepest desires and weaknesses to create wild delusions. They manipulate their host like a chess piece. The host has no choice but to obey the heliobus, so we refer to it as "possession."
到了这一步，被寄生者脑袋里装的已经不再是过去的自己了，而是一个与自己相似却截然不同的岁阳。宿主的身躯很快会被岁阳耗干殆尽，就像被焚烧燃尽的柴薪。

By that point, the host is no longer who they once were, but a heliobus both similar to and completely different from their past self. The host's body will soon be exhausted by the heliobus — like burnt firewood.
{F#小姑娘}{M#臭小子}怎么说话的！什么叫「也很危险」？老子就是最危险的那一挂！
Dangerous!? You don't know the half of it! The other heliobi are nothing compared to me!
尾巴…已被寒鸦大人镇伏在我尾巴上了，不会危害别人的。
Tail... was subdued and sealed in my tail by Madam Hanya. He won't harm others.
令人头疼的是，岁阳并非血肉凡物，难以灭去。所以在修复「造化洪炉」前，十王司打算在这座废园里立起「束形却邪阵」，囚缚这些妖物。

Regrettably, heliobi are not flesh-and-blood, and so they are difficult to destroy. Before the restoration of the Creation Furnace, the Ten-Lords Commission plans to set up an "Evil Binding Matrix" in this abandoned garden to imprison these abominations.
I don't have any other questions.
如各位所见，这「束形却邪阵」尚未完成，逃逸的岁阳尚未全部收复，这里依旧凶险，我会让判官藿藿送你们离开园子。

As you can see, the Evil Binding Matrix has not yet been completed, and not all the escaped heliobi have been recovered. This area is still very dangerous. I will ask Judge Huohuo to escort you out of the garden.
「岁阳尚未全部收复」…也就是说仙舟上别处的灵异事件也有可能和岁阳有关？大人，我消息灵通得很，也许可以帮到你们！

"Not all the escaped heliobi have been recovered..." So that means the other supernatural stuff that's been happening on the Luofu might be related? Your Honor! I have loads of info sources! Maybe I can help you!
不需要！无关人等即刻离开，送客。
Unnecessary. Those not involved should leave now. Go.
Um... Excuse me... We should go.
此地不宜久留，请即刻离开。
This place is dangerous. You should leave at once.
这绥园中异象频出，十王司也无法保护你们周全，我劝二位趁早离开。
Fyxestroll Garden is full of abnormalities — even the Ten-Lords Commission cannot guarantee your safety. I suggest you leave immediately.
闹鬼、岁阳、夺舍…？我感觉自己的脑袋像是被人插了一杆子，然后用力搅和了一下。
Ghosts? Heliobi? Possession...? That was a big info dump, my brain is still loading...
不过仔细想想，这和都市传说里的幽灵作祟也没区别嘛。「能量寄生物」什么的，听起来就像是某种病虫害一样…一点也不神秘、不恐怖了？
...It all sounds more like an urban myth than a ghost story. "Energy parasite" sounds more cool than scary... don't you think?
传说就是因为不了解产生的。
Myths are born out of ignorance.
很有道理。不过观众不了解底细，岁阳和幽灵也没什么区别。
Yeah, I guess so... I still feel like my audience will see them as ghosts, to be honest.
去除神秘感，也就镇伏了鬼怪。
…我从没往这个角度想过。崇拜你，家人。
...Mm, I never thought about it like that. Nice take!
但观众喜欢神秘感，喜欢捉摸不透的秘密和阴谋。咱们这些主播也只能看人上菜了。
My audience likes getting to the bottom of mysteries, secrets, and conspiracies... We streamers have to cater to that, you know?
唔，好奇心得到满足了，虽然产生了更多的问题，但既然答应了判官们要走，咱就不能食言了。
*sigh* I've got loads more questions, but my curiosity is satisfied for now. We better leave before the judges decide to arrest us.
…不过要是路上能拍下几段关于尾巴大爷的视频，起个「绥园惊现灵异鬼火，附身无辜狐人女孩」的标题，应该还挺抓眼球的？

...I'm gonna see if I can get a video of Mr. Tail on the way back — I've already got the title: "Demonic Fire Suddenly Appears in Fyxestroll Garden! Innocent Foxian Girl Possessed!" What do you think? That'd get so many views...
家人，到时候你配合我一下呗？
What are we gonna do with you...
不帮就不帮嘛，这么凶啊。
Okay, fine! No need to be so blunt about it.
惹毛判官小心吃几百年牢饭。
You'll be handed a few centuries of jail time if you irritate the judges.
嗯，说的在理。不过我上限也就能坐几十年牢，嘿嘿。
Mm, true, but I'd probably only do a few decades, hehe.
家人，记得配合我一下，咱们走吧。
Yo, remember, I'll need your help. Let's go.
两位，咱们可以上路了吗？
嗯…他被封印在我的尾巴上……
Yes... he's trapped in my tail, so...
封印、封印、封印…呸，我早晚得让你撕了那封印。
Bah — trapped for now... Sooner or later I'll find a way to make you break the seal...
你以为我愿意跟你呆一块呀？
You think I like spending time with you?
我听说岁阳逃逸到处作乱，心里有点害怕。但是我、我会负责把你们送出绥园的，这点小事…我还是做得到的……
I—I'm just a bit scared about the heliobi reports... b—but I'll carry out my duties and escort you out of the garden. I should be able to do that, at least...
要是连这点事都办不好，趁早辞了职支个小摊卖点心吧。
Tsk... If you can't then you better give up the day job and start peddling desserts...
要不是…要不是因为被你缠上，我早就…早就能支个小摊过上安安稳稳的小日子了。
Hmph, i—if it weren't for you, I would've opened a dessert stall ages ago!
I still have something to do.
I still have something to do.
呜哇啊啊～怎、怎怎怎么了吗？
没没没有在怕啊，我、我我只是站不稳而已……
I—I—I'm not scared! I just can't stop my legs shaking...
Is it the same kind of thing as Mr. Tail?
是个屁，大爷我什么都没瞧见，你个小怂包。
It's nothing. You scaredy-cat, I didn't see a single thing.
没什么事，我们继续走吧。
We're all good. Let's keep going.
…哦、哦。刚才听见桂乃芬小姐大喊起来，所以慌了神……
...Oh... I heard Miss Guinaifen yell, so I got scared...
…对了，桂乃芬小姐呢？桂乃芬小姐——
...Wait a minute... where did Miss Guinaifen go? Miss Guinaifen...!
这周围的气氛是不是不太对…我好害怕，你离我近一些，我怕你也不见了……
Is it me or is this place starting to feel weirder and weirder...? I'm scared... Can you stay close to me? I don't want to lose you, too...
先找到桂乃芬小姐再出去吧…别离我太远了，求求你了……
We need to find Miss Guinaifen, first... Stay close to me — please...!
我还以为你也走丢了，我好怕啊…不要把我一个人留在这里……
I thought I'd lost you, too. I'm so scared... Please don't leave me here all on my own...
桂乃芬？你在哪儿？藿藿，跟紧脚步——
Guinaifen? Where are you? Huohuo, stay close...
人呢？糟了，藿藿也不见了……
Huohuo? Oh no. Where did she go...?
这是…镜子？看着怪瘆人的。
Is this... a mirror? It looks a little creepy...
（我这是在哪儿？绥园里？似乎又有些不一样？）
(Is this... Fyxestroll Garden? But it looks different somehow...)
嘶，你身上有股特别的味道，你是……
Hmm, you have a strange scent on you. You must be...
我听闻绥园的落叶低语，火苗哭泣，它们向我倾诉，有一具强大的肉身靠近了…
I have heard the whispers of the leaves that fall in Fyxestroll Garden. The flames weep and profess to me that a powerful mortal approaches...
它们说那人身上有和「幻胧」战斗过的气息……
They carry the scent of a great battle... with none other than Phantylia...
你就是…那个驱走「幻胧」的人……
You... You are the one who drove Phantylia away...
好…好强大，光是感受你的存在，就美味到令人发抖！
...What power... Your presence alone is delicious enough to make one tremble!
让我尝尝你？一口，就一小口，我迫不及待想品一品你的滋味！
Let me taste you, please! One bite! Just one bite! I can't wait to savor you!
嘻嘻，打得不错。不过刚才那一场酣战，你的求生欲被激发起来咯。
Hehe, you fought well... you were fighting for your survival, after all...
我就把这当成是个请柬，暂时依附在你的身体里喽？
I'll take that as my invitation to inhabit you for a while...
Who are you? What do you want?
美味的宿主，你尝起来很特别。你和我依附过的所有人都不一样。你的身体深处…那是什么东西？一颗太阳？噢噢，它好烫！
Oh, my delicious host, you taste so special... different from anyone else I've ever possessed. But what is this at your core? A Sun? Agh! It burns!
你可以叫我「浮烟」，至于我的目的嘛，大可放心，我只想离开这儿，不想伤害你。
You can call me Cirrus. As for what I want... rest assured — I only want to leave this place... I have no desire to harm you.
噢噢噢，你在抗拒我，好疼！好过瘾！真是个意志力强大的宿主。
Argh, resisting are we...? Impressive willpower! How painful, how delectable!
你和我依附过的所有人都不一样。你的身体深处有什么东西？一颗太阳？它好烫！
You're different from anyone else I've ever possessed... but what is this at your core? A Sun? Agh! It burns!
放心吧，我对霸占你的肉体没那么大的兴趣，我在里面呆不了多久。所以咱们暂时好好合作，可以吗？
Worry not, I have no interest in making you my home — I'll be gone before you know it. Let's get along while it lasts, shall we?
你可以叫我「浮烟」，我只想离开这儿，不想伤害你。
You can call me Cirrus. I only want to leave this place... I have no desire to harm you.
Fine. Just stay put and don't cause trouble.
…哇哦，你的情绪很放松，就像一块蓬松轻盈的糕点。就像…这具身体不是你的一样？{F#姐妹}{M#兄弟}，是什么让你这么豁达？
...Incredible, such a relaxed specimen — a soft cake of a host... It's almost as if... as if this body doesn't even belong to you? What makes you so detached, young {M#man}{F#lady}?
还有，你的身体深处有什么东西？一颗太阳？它好烫！
And what is this at your core? A Sun? Agh! It burns!
算啦，我在这儿呆不了多久。所以咱们暂时好好合作，可以吗？
Never mind. I won't be staying for long, so let's get along while it lasts, shall we?
你可以叫我「浮烟」，我只想离开这儿，不想伤害你。
You can call me Cirrus. I only want to leave this place... I have no desire to harm you.
说说现状吧，仙舟人管你的遭遇叫「鬼打墙」，继续没头脑地走下去也无济于事。
Allow me to explain what's happening... The Xianzhou natives call it a "ghost lock." You're walking in a circle, and no amount of walking will get you out of it.
所以，我会帮你离开「恚炎」设下的幻障迷境；而你，要帮我逃离十王司判官的追捕。我们互惠互利，谁也不欠着谁，如何？
So, I'm going to help you break free of the circle that Furynox created, and you're going to help me evade the judges of the Ten-Lords Commission. It's a win-win... How does that sound?
What did you just say? Who's "Furynox?"
正如你所见，我并非这里的主人，是另一只岁阳「恚炎」设下了这处迷境。
You must have figured out that I'm not the master of this place... It was created by another heliobus named Furynox.
很遗憾，能帮你的只有我了。
Unfortunately, I'm the only one who can help you escape from here.
我已经找到离开这里的线索了…
I've already found clues that can get me out of here...
那个迷路的狐狸判官留下的纸符？它帮不了你。
You mean the talismans left behind by "little lost fox judge"? Those won't help you.
既然你被我附身，我能让你看到原本看不到的东西。
Now that I'm possessing you, I can make you see things that you couldn't see before.
Fine. This is just a strategic partnership.
不错，你果然是有些见识。
Good. I'm glad we understand each other.
I refuse to work with you.
真是顽固的家伙，没有我你压根没法离开这儿。何况我也不是在征询你的意见。
What a stubborn fool — you won't ever get out of here without my help. Anyway, I'm not here to ask your opinion.
出于尊重，我不会随意折腾你的肉体。只要达成目的，我会离开。
As a courtesy, I shall leave you intact, for the time being... As soon as I get what I want, I'll be gone.
现在你再去瞧那些纸符小人吧，你会知道如何继续前进的。
Now, go and look at those talismans again — the paper dolls. You'll know where to go.
站住，记得我们的交易吗？你要帮我逃离十王司判官的追捕。
Stop. Do you remember our deal? You need to help me evade capture.
前面就有一个判官，你怕了！
There's a judge up ahead. What, are you scared?
呵呵，那个判官？隔着老远我就品尝到了她咸咸的恐惧了，那样的胆小鬼也能做判官？
Ha! THAT judge? I can taste her fear from miles away! That coward has no right calling herself a judge.
呃…棘手的是她身上依附的那个东西，那家伙，我不想和它打照面。
But... that thing attached to her is the tricky part. That's something I don't wish to face.
我要带那姑娘一起离开。
I'm getting her out of here, too.
真麻烦，这就是所谓的同情心吗？尝起来酸酸的，哕……
Ugh... Is this what humans call "sympathy"? How acerbic. Yuck...
嗯，我能感受到你信守承诺的笃定。这份念头沉沉的，不太好消化。
Mm, I can taste your integrity — such a rich flavor. A little hard to digest...
I did NOT make a deal with you.
小嘴还挺硬的嘛。不打紧，等你在这儿多转悠几圈，你会服软的。
Aren't you a stubborn one? But that's okay. You'll come around once you've walked a few more circles in this place.
别管那个判官小姑娘，咱们俩离开这儿就行。
Forget about the judge — just get us both out of here.
算是我求你了，能再靠近一些吗？我好害怕……
Please, I'm begging you! Can you please come closer? I'm so scared...
…那个，你见到桂乃芬小姐没有？我还没能找到她，她不会出什么事了吧……
...Um, have you seen Miss Guinaifen? I still haven't found her. Is she gonna be okay...?
她应该也被困在某个角落里。
She's probably trapped somewhere around here.
别说这个了，我被岁阳附体了！
Forget about her — I got possessed by a heliobus!
别找了。桂乃芬这会儿多半已经被岁阳吃了吧？
Give it up. Guinaifen was probably eaten by the heliobi already.
怎怎怎、怎么会这样？ 连阳气旺盛的桂乃芬也···那我岂不更容易被盯上了......
H—H—How can that be!? If that could happen to someone as lively as Miss Guinaifen... that means I'm in even more danger...
（嘻嘻，声带可是人类身上最容易操纵的肌肉。）
(Hehe... Did you know that the larynx is the easiest muscle to control in the human body?)
(Did Guinaifen really get eaten by heliobi?)
{NICKNAME}你肯定能找到出去的路吧！请务必带上我一起走……
{NICKNAME}, you can find the way out, right? Please take me with you...
本大爷就是受不了你这怂包样儿，身为十王司判官，怎么总想着向别人求助啊？
Ugh, not this again! You're a Judge of the Ten-Lords Commission — why are you always begging others for help?
你知道我根本不是当判官的料啊。以前我以为在十王司当差久了，会培养出勇气，现在发现…不行就是不行啊。
You know I'm not cut out to be a judge. I thought maybe if I worked long enough in the Ten-Lords Commission, I'd get braver. But now... I know it's impossible.
嘁，没用的东西，老子怎么就被封印在你身上了？
Tsk, useless brat. Why was I sealed in with someone like you?
成天只会耀武扬威，一不留神咱们就一块儿掉进别人的陷阱里了…到底是谁没用啊！
You talk tough all day long, then let both of us get stuck in a trap... Who's the useless brat now!?
Calm down! I'll get you out of here!
我也找不到出路，全靠你了。
I can't find the way out either. It's all up to you.
救命啊，我被岁阳附体了！
HELP! I got possessed by a heliobus!
你跟着我也没用啊，我要走了，把你一个人留在这里。再见！
There's no point in following me. I'm leaving, and you're not coming with me. Goodbye!
啊啊啊，别走别走，等等我……
Ah! No! P—Please don't leave. Wait, please...
刚才那些话都不是我说的！
（真的吗？你敢说在心底没有一丝把她抛下的念头？）
(Oh, but you did... and can you swear that you don't want to leave her behind? Not even a little?)
（哈？从生命分类的角度来看，你更接近这个词呢~）
(Beast? From a taxonomic perspective, I believe you're closer to that definition...)
（哎哟，学乖了，不说话？那么，我来编几句台词，你乖乖照着念就好。）
(Oh, you're not gonna fight back anymore? Then let me make up some lines. Just be good and say it with me.)
十王司真是不挑不拣，连你这样的废物都能成为判官，真是让人笑掉大牙。
The Ten-Lords Commission needs to overhaul their hiring criteria. How did someone as useless as you ever become a judge?
喂喂，差不多得了，能够数落这家伙的只有老子…和那几个判官，明白吗！
Hey, cut it out. I'm the only one around here who gets to tell this kid off... Me and those other judges. Got that!?
…啧，不对劲，我闻到了同类的味道。
...Wait. Hold on. I smell something familiar...
是你啊，浮烟。躲在傀儡的身体里玩腹语，还真符合你这杂碎一贯的操行。
Cirrus... it's you. Still a fan of your pathetic ventriloquist act, I see.
哈…哈哈哈哈哈哈！可笑可笑可笑，真是可笑极了！我原以为你逃脱了在洪炉里受苦的命运呢？
Haha... Hahahaha! Oh, this is funny! This is just too funny! I thought you'd already escaped the Furnace's destiny of torture!?
谁能想到，大岁阳「燎原」最好斗的碎片，竟然被封印在一个哭哭唧唧的小姑娘身体里充当看门狗——
Who would have thought that a piece of Ignamar the Great — the fragment with the most fight in it — would become a guard dog sealed inside a crybaby...
啊，不对，不对不对不对，现在的你，连看门狗都算不上！你只是一条…「尾巴」～对吧，尾巴尾巴尾巴！
Oh! Forgive me! Did I say guard dog? No, no, no, that won't do... You're just a guard dog's "tail," right? Just a tail, a tail, a tail!
蹬鼻子上脸了是吧？从那个{F#女孩}{M#小子}身体里滚出来，老子这就把你吞了！
Laugh while you can, coward! I'm gonna swallow you whole the second you leave that {M#boy's}{F#girl's} body!
好、好害怕啊——嘿嘿，我装的！
H—How t—t—terrifying, ahahaha...! The joke's on you!
现在的你，连离开那个判官的身体都办不到了吧？既没有办法彻底吞掉她，也没法逃离。嘿嘿，尾巴大爷，现在的你，好可怜呀~
You couldn't leave that judge's body if you tried! You can't eat her, let alone escape from her. Ahahaha, "Mr. Tail." You're pathetic~
...Darn it! Think of something, you wimp!
{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}，请拿好这张符纸，贴在身上。岁阳短时间内还不能完全支配人的身体，用这纸符可以暂时压住它对你的影响。
{M#M—Mr.}{F#M—Miss} {NICKNAME}, take this talisman and stick it to your body — it'll temporarily suppress the heliobus's influence...
喂，{F#小姑娘}{M#小子}，你去，安慰安慰藿藿，这家伙的哭声真是比断断续续的蚊子叫声还招人烦。
Hey! {M#Boy}{F#Girl}! Say something nice to Huohuo. Her crying is like a mosquito in my ear.
{NICKNAME}, it's you! I—I finally found another living soul!
太好了，呜呜，还以为我会被困在这里逃不出去了…看到你真是太好了！
I'm so happy! I thought I was gonna be stuck here forever... I'm so happy to see you!
嗨呀，真是过瘾，人类的情绪就像一桌美餐。嘿嘿，品尝悲伤的泪水就像痛饮一瓮美酒~
Ahhhh, what a feast! Human emotions are simply delicious. Your sorrowful tears are like bottles of potent wine~
别再用我的身体自说自话了。
Don't you ever talk through me like that again.
关了许久，难得放松一下嘛。你不都把符纸贴上了吗？我现在乖乖的呢。
Hehe, I'm simply enjoying my freedom. Didn't you use the talisman already? I'm tame as a kitten...
你把小姑娘惹哭了，有意思吗？
Does it amuse you to make a little girl cry?
要是我在你进餐时问「吃下一堆蛋白质和碳水化合物有意思吗」，你会怎么想？
Does the Xianzhou sail through the cosmos?
对喜好刺激人类情绪的岁阳来说，这可太有意思了。
For a heliobus that enjoys provoking your weak human sentiments, I can assure you there is nothing more amusing.
别忘了我们之间的交易，只有我达成了目的，才会从你的身体里离开。
Now, don't forget about our deal. I will leave only once I've got what I wanted.
我很好奇，附身还没有解除吗？
Say, are you still possessing me?
当然了，你不会以为你能看见我在这里，就没有附身于你了吧？天真！
Of course. Surely you don't think I've left you just because you can see me? So naive!
虽然浮烟说的那些垃圾话夸大其词，但总归伤到她的玻璃心了，你，去安慰她两句吧。
Cirrus talks nothing but nonsense... but even so, Huohuo has a sensitive heart. You. Go say something nice to the girl.
Aren't you looking down on her all the time?
没错，所以她需要你这样的同类抱团取暖，明白？快去！
Yes, which is why she needs other organic beings like you to support her! Get it? Go!
要不你也去安慰她两句吧？
Why don't you go say something nice to her?
要本大爷开金口安慰人？想屁吃。
Keep dreaming. I have nothing nice to say to anyone.
你能自由移动，也算被封印着？
You can roam free even though you're sealed?
自由个屁！老子的活动半径就这么点大，你不会管这叫「自由移动」吧？
Roam free!? Is that what you call this? This is as far as I can get from her.
再说了，老子要是没有被封印在尾巴上，会在这里陪你们过家家？
You think I'd be here playing house with you numbskulls if I could fly away?
I'm sorry, Huohuo... Are you okay?
不怪你，都是那个坏家伙在挑拨离间。呜呜呜……
It's not your fault... It was that bad heliobus making us fight...
Stay strong, Huohuo — you're a judge.
…也许在这里的是其他判官你就得救了，怎么会是我呢？
...If I were any other judge, you'd already be saved...
虽然明白像{NICKNAME}这样的善良人不会说出这么刻薄的话来，肯定是被那邪魅附身之后才会口无遮拦…但、但那家伙说的每一句话我都没法反驳……
Someone as nice as you wouldn't say such mean things — only a possession would make you act like that. Still, what the heliobus said was true...
我打小就胆子小脸皮薄…从被尾巴附身起，这辈子就像掉进噩梦里一样…
I've always been shy and scared... My life's been a nightmare ever since Tail possessed me...
上学时，总是有人会问我「你尾巴怎么被人点着了」…走在人群里，也像在聚光灯下一样显眼。
When I was at school, people were always asking why my tail was on fire... Everywhere I went, people would notice.
哟，怪老子咯？当年你要是乖乖地让本大爷吃了，还用得着烦恼成这样？
Oh, so it's all my fault? If you'd just let me devour you at the start, I could've spared you the trouble!
呜呜，后来…后来进了十王司，大家都怪怪的，我以为自己找到了归宿。但十王司的工作…实在太危险了！成天要和各式各样的妖孽鬼怪、不赦恶徒战斗……

Th—Then I got into the Ten-Lords Commission. Everyone there is weird, so I thought I'd found somewhere I belonged. But the job... the job is too dangerous! I have to fight demons and ghosts and bad guys every day...
我…我真的不适合干这份工作。要是能活着回去，我还是向十王司递交辞呈吧。
I... I'm just not cut out for it. If I make it back alive... I'm handing in my resignation.
让怕岁阳的人用岁阳来收服岁阳，怎么想都不对劲…实在抱歉，我帮不上忙。
Who thought making a heliophobe with a heliobus in her tail hunt heliobi was a good idea... I'm sorry, I've been so useless...
你已经做得很好了，藿藿。
You're doing very well already, Huohuo.
是藿藿留下了纸人，谢谢你。
You're the one who left the paper dolls for me. Thank you.
听到了吗？别哭了，你有用，你留下的纸人也很有用。
You hear that? Stop crying. You're useful. And your paper dolls are useful too.
真受不了啊！要是我能重获自由，老子第一时间先吞了浮烟那杂碎，再把你这个成天哭哭啼啼的小怂包啊呜一口也吃了。
Ugh, I've had enough of this! As soon I swallow that coward Cirrus, I'm gonna devour this little crybaby too!
可惜啊，尾巴大爷今非昔比了。要是咱们还拥有当年的力量，别说突破这「鬼打墙」的迷障幻境…就连把创造它的「恚炎」一口吞了也不在话下。
What a pity that "Mr. Tail" is nothing like he used to be. If we still had our old power, we could forget about this maze and devour its creator, Furynox.
尾巴大爷，她对你的来历一无所知呢…小妹妹，岁阳本该寻人类聚集的地方盘踞，眼下却要在这荒无人烟的绥园里聚首，你知道是为何吗？
Well, "Mr. Tail," seems she knows nothing about your past... Little missy, do you know why the heliobi are gathered in this abandoned garden instead of seizing human habitations?
因为在一千多年以前，这片绥园曾是大岁阳「燎原」与罗浮某位将军激斗的战场！
Because over a thousand years ago, this very garden was the site of an epic battle between the general of the Luofu and the great heliobus Ignamar.
洪炉破碎，岁阳出逃。曾经构成「燎原」的岁阳碎片们，全都是为了与将军再次交手的夙愿归来。
Now that the furnace is broken and the heliobi have escaped, fragments like us, who once constituted Ignamar the whole, have returned here — with the desire to challenge the general again.
说起当年那场大战，可谓是惊天地，泣鬼神！燎原幻化无穷，水淹火灼，山崩雷劈，与那位将军斗到难分难解，五五对开！

The battle between the general and Ignamar was an earth-shaking contest of devastating proportions! Ignamar underwent countless transformations, causing floods, fires, and thunderous landslides... They were locked in a standoff — an evenly matched fight!
I didn't know Jing Yuan had such a history.
那位代表罗浮出战岁阳的将军名唤「腾骁」。
The general who fought for the Luofu against the heliobus was named "Teng Xiao."
根据十王司的记录，燎原应该是…惨败于那位名叫腾骁的将军手下？
...The Ten-Lords Commission records say that Ignamar was soundly defeated by General Teng Xiao...
人类的记载中，当然只会吹嘘将军的战功了！
Of course the human records would flatter their general!
可惜呀，大岁阳燎原虽然吸收了无数岁阳同胞的力量，却还是低估了人类的奸诈，惜败于那位将军。
The great Ignamar absorbed the power of countless fellow heliobi, but ultimately underestimated human deceit... They were narrowly defeated by the general.
决战之后，燎原再也不能融聚成形，散成不同的「分灵碎片」，被封进了造化洪炉之中。
We heliobi could never condense into physical form after that battle. We scattered into fragments and were sealed into the Creation Furnace...
不过，凡事总有例外。我本以为尾巴大爷你逃出生天，逍遥自在去了…却没想到，你竟然被这个小小的狐狸姑娘给制伏了，真是笑死人了。
...but there's an exception to everything. "Mr. Tail," I thought you'd escaped to freedom... Who could've guessed you'd be sealed in this tiny foxian girl? Humiliating...
制伏个屁！老子虎落平阳，遇上了这只小狐狸，真是倒了血霉！
Sealed my foot! My power was weak when I ran into this fox child. It was bad luck, nothing more!
我还小的时候，曾在罗浮的某个角落里看到了奄奄一息的一团火……
When I was littler, I saw a ball of fire that looked like it was about to turn to embers...
我一时心软，就把它放到了我的尾巴上…结果…结果没想到尾巴大爷竟然想吃掉我！得亏判官们及时出现，我才逃过了一劫。
I felt sorry for it, so I picked it up and put it on my tail... and then... Mr. Tail tried to eat me! If the judges hadn't arrived, it would've been over...
不过是一口塞不满牙缝的小点心，说吃掉也显得太用力过猛了吧？
Bah, I did no such thing — you're barely big enough to be an appetizer.
我…我这些年后悔时抹下的眼泪，一定是当年做决定时脑子里进的水…
All the pain I've suffered since I met you must be retribution for my stupidity back then...
真有趣啊。可惜尾巴大爷没能得逞，不然借着这小姑娘的身体，它说不定能东山再起，像「燎原」那般，把仙舟闹个地覆天翻呢！
Hilarious! It's a pity "Mr. Tail" didn't devour you... He might've recovered his power and turned the Xianzhou upside down... just like Ignamar did!
为什么岁阳要挑战将军？
Why did the heliobi challenge the general?
理由？一定需要什么理由吗？
Why? Does there have to be a reason?
如果你想要冠冕堂皇的——仙舟将岁阳之祖囚禁在牢笼中，为仙舟提供动力，这理由够不够？想要简单直白的——咱们就是想斗一斗将军，看看仙舟人的斤两。

The official answer is that the Xianzhou is sealing heliobi in a cage and forcing them to supply energy to the ship... In reality, however, we just want to fight the general... and see what the Xianzhou is truly made of!
你们和仙舟有什么仇怨吗？
Do you have a grudge against the Xianzhou?
仇怨？真是肤浅。如果非要为我们的行事加上一些动机……
Grudge? How shallow. If you must know the forces behind our actions...
一点点嫉妒，嫉妒有形之物浓烈的情感；一点点好斗，想看看火焰和血肉孰强孰弱；还有一丝丝渴望，渴望拥有你们的肉身，去吃，去杀，去爱，去恨。

...there's a pinch of envy — envy towards the potent emotions you corporeal beings have. Then there's a dash of aggression — the desire to see whether the heliobi or bodies of flesh and blood are stronger. Lastly, there's a drizzle of desire. We desire to possess your physical bodies, so we can eat, kill, love, and hate.
我们岁阳一族本来是无忧无虑的生命，就因为接触了人类才感染上了「人性之病」——都怪人类，拥有如此浓烈的情绪和欲望，害得我们再也回不到过去纯洁无染的心境。

We heliobi were carefree lifeforms, but were tainted with the illness of humanity once we came into contact with it. It's humanity's fault for having such intense emotions and desires — now, we can never, never return to the purity of our past.
所以，我想要恢复自由！我想重新去到天外，尾巴大爷，你不想和碎片们重聚，也不想做一辈子的尾巴，不如跟我一起回归天外如何？

I want to be free again! I want to return to the cosmos! Mr. Tail, you don't want to regroup with the fragments, and you don't want to be her tail forever — why don't you return with me to the great beyond?
坏家伙，你休想动什么歪心思。尾巴大爷被十王司判官封印着，是逃不掉的…你也别想溜走。
That's impossible. Mr. Tail was sealed by the judges of the Ten-Lords Commission. He can't escape... and neither can you...
呜哇啊啊啊啊！那边的门自己打开了。
Wahhhh! That door just opened on its own!
你们看，门后…有一面镜子。
Look! Th—There's a mirror behind the door...
（被拉进来的时候，好像也有同样的镜子。）
(Didn't I see a similar mirror when I was dragged in?)
怎么回事…镜子、镜子里好像有声音？
What's going on...? Th—There's a voice in the mirror?
藿藿，汝在镜中？可算定位到了！
Huohuo, are you in the mirror? I finally found you!
绥园被一股不知来源的力量吞没了…务必小心！
Fyxestroll Garden has been enveloped by an unknown power... You must be careful!
我们还没有找到桂乃芬小姐，不知道她到哪里去了……
We still haven't found Miss Guinaifen... I don't know where she went...
当务之急是先解救汝等脱离迷障。来吧，穿过镜子，到这边来。
The task at hand is to save you from this illusion. Come. Pass through the mirror and come to our side.
我们…似乎回到了绥园里？
Are we... back in Fyxestroll Garden?
汝等平安归来，看来十王司今日的运气不算太糟。
You have returned safely. It seems the Ten-Lords Commission is not down on our luck today.
雪衣大人，你没事真是太好了！
Madam Xueyi, I'm so happy to see you're alright!
你们这一路没遇到什么特殊情况吧？
Did you encounter anything strange on your way here?
浮烟，还不快滚出我的身体？
Cirrus, get out of my body. Now.
嘻嘻，真不愧是判官啊，警惕的很哪。
Hehehe, no wonder she's a judge. Very perceptive...
藿藿向雪衣详细解释了此前的经历……
Huohuo informs Xueyi of what you have experienced so far...
情况吾已明了，不过眼下暂时不是操心浮烟的时候。绥园已被某个更强大的岁阳拖入了幻境，前去镇伏的冥差们也都已失去音信。

I understand. This isn't the time to deal with Cirrus. Fyxestroll Garden has been dragged into a powerful illusion by an even mightier heliobus, and the spiritfarers who went to suppress it have lost contact with me.
藿藿，若吾与寒鸦上阵依然无法制住那妖物，对付它的重担就落到汝身上了。
Huohuo, if both Hanya and I are unable to suppress that demon, then you will have to defeat it.
哎？我…我不行的。我不像两位大人那样有本事…我只会在战斗时躲在一边瑟瑟发抖。
Huh? I—I won't be able to do it! I'm not as powerful as you two... I always run and hide before a battle...
不要妄自菲薄。岁阳无法占夺由另一只岁阳依附的肉身——这便是汝身为判官的绝对优势。
Do not underestimate yourself. A heliobus cannot possess a body that is already possessed by another heliobus — such is your absolute advantage as a judge.
我被附身了，这也是我的优势？
I'm possessed too — do I also get an advantage?
说的不错。不过藿藿饱经训练，论对抗岁阳更有心得。
Correct. However, Huohuo has had many more years of training and is more experienced in fighting heliobi than you.
所以，汝等能在此时平安归来，十王司的运气不算太糟。
That is why the Ten-Lords Commission is not down on our luck today. We're lucky that you have all returned at this opportune time.
听懂了吗，怂包？打醒精神，眼前这队十王司的人马里，没一个能强过你！
You hear that, scaredy-cat? You're the ace of the Ten-Lords Commission.
是啊，再弱小的人也有他的长处。
Indeed. Even the weakest person has their strengths.
虽然知道{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}是想安慰我…但，这话听着高兴不起来啊。
I know you're trying to comfort me... but that sounded a little weird.
啰嗦，挑后半段爱听的听就好了！
You need to start filtering out the stuff you don't wanna hear. That's what I do.
岁阳虽然凶悍，却始终不能摆脱对血肉凡身的渴望。但汝却能时刻降服妖物保持常性，为十王效力三十八载。汝已是一名合格的判官，应当再自信一些。

The heliobi are aggressive beings, but they cannot shake their desire for a flesh and blood body. And yet, during the <unbreak>38</unbreak> years you have worked for the Ten Lords, you have been constantly able to suppress the monster within your tail and maintain your personality. You are already a fitting judge. Be confident.
吾等判官，谁也无法在这一点上强过你。
On that point, none of the other judges can surpass you.
降服妖物…我似乎也降不住尾巴啊？我和尾巴，其实算是…朋友？
Suppress the monster... B—But I don't think I've ever had to suppress Tail! I guess we're more like... friends?
呸呸呸，老子才不和口粮交朋友！
Friends!? Bah! I don't make friends with food.
嘻嘻，尾巴大爷，像咱们这等小小碎片，早已没有「燎原」的力量了，就算是小姑娘也能轻松制伏，你就别嘴硬了。
Hehe, "Mr. Tail," puny fragments like us were deprived of Ignamar's power long ago... If a little girl can subdue us, then perhaps it's time for some humility.
恚炎固然神通广大，要是能想办法将之分裂为数个碎片，便有希望镇伏。
Though Furynox is powerful, we have a chance of suppressing them if we can break them into multiple fragments.
判官大人真是打的一手好算盘，既然气氛都烘托到这了，我愿贡献一计。咱们先去个开阔的地方吧…比如那边的燕乐亭。
You have a sound plan, Your Honor... and since the stage is set, allow me to offer my assistance. Let's find somewhere more open first... like Swallowsong Pavilion, over there.
等等，我再仔细考虑一下。
Wait, let me think about it.
浮烟在迷障里帮了我们，说不定…也许…可以暂时相信它？
Cirrus already helped us in the illusion maze. Maybe... we can trust them for now?
信不信由你，我只是想离开这里，我能有什么坏心思呢？
You can believe whatever you like. I just want to get out of here. That's all I want.
你和雪衣大人在，它跑不了。
Both you and Madam Xueyi are here. They can't escape.
对对对，你说的对，我跑不了，这下可以信我了吧？
Yes, yes, you're right. I can't escape. Do you trust me now?
我、我认为我们还是可以听听浮烟的计划，毕竟现在也没有什么别的办法，哎……
I—I guess we can go with Cirrus's plan. It's not like we have any of our own...
Have you made up your mind?
等等，我再仔细考虑一下。
Wait, let me think about it.
各位都知道大岁阳「燎原」激战将军的故事，它是众多岁阳融聚一体的结果。
You've heard the story of Ignamar and the great heliobus's glorious fight against the general. They were an entity born of many heliobi fusing together...
不过，咱们岁阳各自沾染着附身宿主时获得的情绪和欲望，彼此互相嫌弃，没有谁愿意和谁融在一起——就像一个人脑袋里有「多重人格」，时不时得打架。

...but heliobi are gradually tainted by the emotions and desires of those we possess. We tend to spite each other and don't like to fuse together — it's like having multiple personalities inside a single head. It leads to "infighting..."
强大的岁阳也许能吞下弱小的岁阳，让它们暂时屈从成为一体——比如「燎原」，或者咱们要对付的这个「恚炎」。
A powerful heliobus like Ignamar or Furynox might be able to swallow a lesser heliobus and placate them for a while...
不过一遇外力刺激，这种平衡也很容易崩溃。这不，「燎原」就在与将军大战后成了咱们。
...but this internal balance is easily broken when exposed to external forces — just like how we were torn apart and reborn after Ignamar fought the general.
所以，诱使恚炎崩溃…这个方法也许可行。趁着恚炎分裂，力量削弱，十王司可以用法器将它的碎片挨个封印起来。

Therefore... this might be the way to defeat Furynox. We can cause them to break apart and reduce their power, then the Ten-Lords Commission can use their sacred vessels to seal up all of Furynox's fragments.
但是，汝为什么要背叛同族？为什么要帮助镇伏汝等的仙舟？
I have a question. Why are you betraying your own kin? Why would you help the Xianzhou when we have sealed you for so long?
理由？岁阳行事一定需要什么理由吗？也许是因为我不想让恚炎吞掉自己，也许是我瞧不上这个只会使用蛮力的傻大个，也许是我想和将军一斗……

Why? Must heliobi always have a reason for their behavior? Perhaps I don't want Furynox to devour me. Perhaps I dislike idiots who use force and nothing else. Perhaps I wish to fight the general myself...
又也许，我想和十王司交换一个「放我离开」的承诺？
...or maybe I just want to do a favor for the Ten-Lords Commission that will ensure I can leave here in one piece?
We should allow Cirrus to go ahead with their plan.
十王司的判官绝不空许承诺。若能化解眼前危机，吾可以上禀十王，还汝自由。但结果，吾不保证。

Judges of the Ten-Lords Commission always keep our promises. If you can truly deal with the problem at hand, I will ask for your freedom from the Ten Lords. However, I cannot guarantee the outcome of the appeal.
哎哟，真是个死脑筋。那么今天就只好吃亏一点，做一趟货到付款的买卖了。偃偶，要守信喔。
How conventional. Fine, I accept... but you better keep your promise, puppet.
呵呵，我与恚炎同为关在洪炉中的狱友，彼此知根知底。它力量虽强，但心思却比孩子还幼稚，一味执着于「胜负」。我只需要三句话，管教它不攻自破。
Hehe, me and Furynox were "furnacemates..." I know them well. They are powerful, but as naive as a child and obsessed with victory. I only need to say three things to incite them.
{NICKNAME}, I'll need your body for a while longer.
*There is a vague sound from far away. A response, possibly.*
与将军的决斗还早，你我先一决胜负如何？
Before you duel the general, why don't you fight me?
你是…浮烟？小玩意，你凭什么与我争胜？
...Cirrus? What makes you worth my time, weakling?
我已将园林化为阵地，教十王司的走狗成了傀儡！只等将军一来，便可重开当年那一战。为什么要在此时和同族对垒？

I've turned this garden into my territory and made the dogs of the Ten Lords my puppets! As soon as the general arrives, the heliobi will have our rematch. Why should I fight my own at this crucial moment?
你操使那些乌合之众又算什么能耐，不过是些臭鱼烂虾，不堪一击。
That group of amateurs you've put together? Hah. They're nothing compared to me.
我却不同，机缘巧合下我已夺舍了一枚绝好的棋子——一枚曾驱走过幻胧的绝好棋子！
I have already obtained the most wonderful pawn for myself — a piece that once expelled Phantylia!
…幻胧？…幻胧！我记起来啦！我记起来啦！这么好的棋子，我也想要！
...Phantylia? Phantylia! I remember! What a wonderful host... I want it!
你尽可以差遣手中的冥差来找我，若能击败我所占据的这位无名客，我就心甘情愿被你吞下，为你大战将军贡献一臂之力。你意下如何？

Then send the spiritfarers under your control to find me. If you can defeat this Nameless I'm possessing, then you can swallow me up and let my strength aid you in your fight against the general. What do you say?
一言为定！我和我的棋子们，这就来找你！
Deal! My pawns and I will show you no mercy!
啧啧，按恚炎的说法，外面的冥差们岂不是全军覆没了？真没用！
Tsk, does that mean all the spiritfarers out there have fallen? What a useless army.
也就是说，咱们接下来岂不是要和同袍战斗？
...Does that mean we'll be fighting our friends...?
偃偶也保留着同情心吗？看起来各位是不想打败恚炎喽？在岁阳看来，这事儿简单地就像一笔买卖。管它是同族，还是同僚，只要能赢得胜利，有什么不能下手的？

Oh, do puppets feel empathy? Or do you not wish to defeat Furynox anymore? We heliobi think of such matters as business transactions. As long as something can bring us victory, we will destroy everything — even allies and kin.
那么，接下来有劳各位狠狠下定决心，迎战恚炎的傀儡——也就是各位的同僚啦。
Make the decision. Furynox's pawns — your companions — must be destroyed.
{NICKNAME}，藿藿，在同恚炎交战前，先拿上这个。
You two, take this before we fight Furynox.
这是工造司制造的法器「藏月瓠」，十王司对它做了些改动，本想用它来困住岁阳。汝等和恚炎控制的傀儡交战后，切记要将那些分裂的岁阳锁入其中。

This is the Lunaumbra Gourd, a sacred vessel made by the Artisanship Commission. The Ten-Lords Commission has made some changes to it to better suppress heliobi. After you fight the puppets controlled by Furynox, make sure you seal their heliobi fragments in here.
她成为判官未久，仍需历练。除此之外，那些落入恚炎掌控的冥差，也请手下留情。
Her time as a judge has been brief — she is still inexperienced. Apart from that, please also have mercy on the spiritfarers that have fallen under Furynox's control.
我会对那些冥差手下留情的。
I'll go easy on the spiritfarers.
今日善举，十王定当感念。拜托了。
The Ten Lords will not forget your acts of kindness. Thank you.
尾巴大爷，接下来咱们要一起面对很危险的敌人，请你也助我一臂之力吧。
Mr. Tail, we're gonna fight some really dangerous enemies now. Please lend me your strength, too.
哦～没想到你说起狠话的样子还挺有模有样的嘛。
Oh-ho? Sounds like someone finally learned to talk tough.
要是两条腿没有抖得这么厉害，我就信了！
I would've believed you if your legs weren't shaking so much!
请、请不要揭穿我！我也是…好不容易才鼓起这一点点勇气的！身为判官，这一路上没帮上什么忙，净躲在{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}的背后了……
Don't point that out! It took me a lot of effort to be this brave! All this time I've just been hiding behind {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}. I'm such a bad judge...
雪衣大人说，被岁阳占据的人不会被夺舍第二次。眼下也只有我能帮到大家了！
Madam Xueyi said those possessed by a heliobus can't get possessed again... I'm the only person who can help everyone!
啊呀呀，大爷我感觉自己像是个被充上气的气球，被这小怂包给吹胀了啊！还等什么呢，走吧？
Exactly! You're welcome, by the way... So, what are we waiting for? Let's go!
藿藿，虽是机巧身躯，吾心里也曾闪过一丝畏惧。
Huohuo, though I am of ingenium body, I too am feeling a sliver of fear.
面对能信手操纵生命的妖物，吾害怕…再也无法与妹妹共事。
Faced with a demon that can manipulate life at will, of course I'm afraid... Afraid that I won't ever work with my sister again.
连你们两位都说自己会害怕，我…我心里居然松了一口气。
...I—I guess if even you two are afraid, then... I—I feel a little better now.
Afraid or not, we're still gonna beat the heck out of it!
走吧！接下来吾要和各位分头行动，击破被恚炎附身的傀儡。在这蠢笨岁阳回过神来之前，将「藏月瓠」中岁阳尽数镇压。

Let's go! I will find my own way to defeat the pawns possessed by Furynox... and before that foolish heliobus has realized what's happening, I will suppress all of their fragments within the Lunaumbra Gourd.
…也就是说，要启用「束形却邪阵」？

这个葫芦，好漂亮哇，这就是仙舟上的法宝吗？

一场意料之外的「岁阳之祸」，化作了漫天火雨。浮烟趁乱附身于冥差，被十王司及时控制。但是尾巴的下落，已经是无处可寻……

所幸十王司已备妥了镇伏岁阳的法器，届时将以此处废园结成阵法，囚缚岁阳。今日的仙舟，算是渡过一劫了。

As for the reward, you don't have to worry... I'll pay whatever it takes. Money has no meaning to me anymore.
I'll help you get it back.
But you must first drink the special drink.
…好，如果这样能让您放心的话——请把它给我吧。
...Okay, if it will make you happy. Please give it to me.
You should drink the special drink first.
…好，如果这样能让您放心的话——请把它给我吧。
...Okay, if it will make you happy. Please give it to me.
您看——我已经把特调喝了。现在，请您放心去吧。
Look, I've drank it all. Now, please rest easy and go.
我有一样东西遗失在了梦境酒店——是一张唱片。您可以帮我拿回来吗？您看上去…有股强大的气场，肯定不怕酒店里的那些诡谲异常。

I lost something at the hotel in the Dreamscape: It was a record. Could you help me bring it back? You look like... you have a mighty air about you — you definitely won't be intimidated by those strange incidents going on in the hotel.
报酬方面，您不必担心…多少我都可以支付。毕竟金钱对我来说已经没有意义了。
As for the reward, you don't have to worry... I'll pay whatever it takes. Money has no meaning to me anymore.
（柯柯娜小姐说的地方应该就在这附近了……）
(The place that Miss Cocona mentioned should be around here...)
（危险的情绪会使梦境发生变异，看来那张唱片所承载的情感相当强烈……）
(Intense emotions will cause anomalies in the Dreamscape. It appears that the emotions contained in that record are quite strong...)
（把那些奇形怪状的家伙消灭掉，应该就能拿到唱片了吧？那我就不客气了——）
(I should be able to get the record after eliminating those misshapen creatures. Time to fire on all cylinders then!)
（一张满是灰尘和裂痕的唱片带，好像已经没法再播放了。）
(A record laden with dust and scratches — looks like it can't be played any longer.)
（上面只录了一首歌，名字是…「想象一朵未来的玫瑰」。）
(There's only one song recorded on it, and its name is... "Envision a Rose Forthcoming.")
(In any case, I'd better bring this back to her first.)
什么「心灵慰藉特调」…令人恶心……
This so-called Soulheal Special Mix... It's disgusting...
不过是为了让我乖乖留下罢了…不过是为了让我忘记自己究竟是谁……
It's just to make me stay obediently here... To make me forget who exactly I am...
那种东西…我再也不需要了…再也……
That thing... I don't need it ever again... Never again...
啊，是您啊。您看，这回我没有忘记…欸，您已经拿到那张唱片了？真好。
Ah, it's you. Look, I didn't forget this time... Huh? You've already retrieved the record? Wonderful.
Is it very important to you?
…只是上面承载的时光，还让我有些怀念。
...I'm just somewhat nostalgic of the moments it holds.
它是你喜欢的歌手唱的吗？
It was sung by a singer you liked?
噢，不是…不过，也可以说是。
Oh, no... Well, I guess you could say that.
柯柯娜接过唱片，徒劳地拂去唱片上的污渍，却怎么也擦不干净。
Cocona takes the record and fruitlessly tries to clean up the grime on the record, but to no avail.
原来已经那么破旧了啊…那天我把它弄丢之后，就再也没想过能找回来。
To think it is really this worn-out... After I lost it on that day, I had never thought I would ever get it back.
感谢您…今晚，我想听着它睡去…最好就这样一睡不醒。
Thank you... Tonight, I will fall asleep while listening to it... Even better if I don't ever wake up.
对于一个已经千疮百孔的灵魂来说，这大概就是最好的结局了。
To a scarred and battered soul, this is probably the best ending.
（柯柯娜的语气…有些不大对劲……）
我有话要和你说，非常着急！快过来！
I have something to tell you. It's urgent! Get over here!
Tick-tock, {NICKNAME}, I think something's very wrong!
柯柯娜的转变太突兀了。
真的很让人担心她在想什么。
I'm really worried about what she's thinking.
我们补上了柯柯娜缺失的情绪，让她的记忆变得清楚了些…但没想到，这下她变得更悲伤了！我有种感觉，她好像是在被某种可怕的东西折磨！
We patched up Cocona's lost emotion and made her memories somewhat more lucid... But it just made her sadder! I've got a feeling she's being tortured by something horrific!
我有很不好的预感，要是我们留她一个人在这里的话，会有很不好的事情发生——咱们不能丢下她不管！
I've got a bad feeling that if we leave her alone here, something very bad will happen. We can't leave her alone!
Yes, we can't leave Cocona alone.
虽然有些冒犯，但现在也只能去她的内心看看了！必要的时候，我们得拉她一把！
It may be a bit intrusive, but the only thing we can do is to take a look inside her heart! We have to give her a hand if necessary!
她那么看重那张唱片，应该可以用它打开她的心锁吧？快去试试！
That record she values so much could be used to break the locks over her heart. Go try it now!
我有很不好的预感，如果我们留她一个人在这里的话，会有很不好的事情发生——咱们不能丢下她不管！
I've got a bad feeling that if we leave her alone here, something very bad will happen. We can't leave her alone!
Yes, we can't leave Cocona alone.
虽然有些冒犯，但现在也只能去她的内心看看了！必要的时候，我们得拉她一把！
It may be a bit intrusive, but the only thing we can do is to take a look inside her heart! We have to give her a hand if necessary!
她那么看中那张唱片，应该可以用它打开她的心锁吧？快去试试！
That record she values so much could be used to unlock the locks over her heart. Go try it now!
柯柯娜的目光盯着那张唱片，她对周围的一切都没有反应。她似乎彻底陷入了沮丧。
Cocona's eyes stare at the record, oblivious to everything around her. It's as if she's been completely devoured by her dejection.
（这里就是柯柯娜的内心世界吗？摇摇欲坠的大楼，令人眩晕的高度……）
(This is the world of Cocona's heart? Swaying buildings on the verge of collapse, and such dizzying heights...)
（柯柯娜就在前面，得快点赶上她。）
(Cocona is up ahead. Gotta catch up to her.)
少女的歌声轻轻地回荡在这片区域。它久久不散，仿佛在留恋着什么…然后，一段回忆从甜美的尾声中轻轻升起。
A young girl's singing faintly echoes across the area. It lingers for a long while as if longing for something... And then, a memory rises from the sweet epilogue.
柯柯娜，太棒了！无论是音准、律动还是情感，你的演唱水准都远超同龄人。你对音乐的理解力尤其高，能够迅速捕捉到歌曲想传达的精神…真是难得！

Cocona, that's amazing! Be it pitch, rhythm, or emotion, your vocal performance far surpasses those in your age group. You have a superb understanding of music, and can quickly capture the spirit that's being conveyed in a song... You are a rare talent!
还有你的音色——如丝缎般柔和，从低音到高音都一直保持着相当程度的音色统一，真是罕见的天赋……
And your timbre — It is smooth as satin, and from low to high pitches, you've managed to keep your timbres steady to a considerable degree. You have a rare and precious gift...
非常感谢您的教导，老师！我从来都没想过，从我的嗓子里能冒出那么美妙的歌声……
I truly appreciate your guidance, sir! I've never dreamed that such beautiful songs could be produced from my voice...
不用谢我，还是多感谢你自己的天赋和努力吧。要想成为万里挑一的歌者…你需要去找更好的老师、进行更刻苦的训练。
Don't thank me. Thank your own talent and hard work. If you wish to become a one-in-a-million singer... You must find a better teacher and embark on even more arduous training.
这个行业的竞争非常残酷，能在聚光灯下享受掌声的永远只有寥寥几人。
The competition in this industry is brutal. Only a fair few can stand under the limelight and bask in applause.
我…没想过那么远的事情。现在，我只是单纯喜欢唱歌而已。
I... haven't thought that far yet. For now, I just simply love to sing.
还没有做好准备吗？我能理解…但你总有一天要做出选择。
Are you not ready yet? I understand... But you will have to make a choice one day.
我和你一般大的时候，错失了许多宝贵的机会…听老师一句劝，柯柯娜——珍惜你的天赋，不要做出会让自己后悔的决定。
I missed many golden opportunities when I was your age... Listen to your teacher this once, Cocona. Treasure your talent, and don't make a choice you will regret.
拥有梦想更是一件残酷的事——一旦求而不得，梦想破碎的痛感可能会彻底摧毁一个人。
Having a dream is a childish, cruel thing — If it is not attained, the pain from a shattered dream may utterly destroy a person.
努力向前吧，孩子…不要回头。你属于更广阔、更美好的舞台。
Work hard and walk forth, child... and don't look back. You belong to a grander, more magnificent stage.
我…我明白了，老师！我一定会努力的。
I... I understand, sir! I will do my best.
这是最后一堂课了，柯柯娜——我会把我知道的一切都教给你…绝不保留。
This is your final lesson, Cocona. I will teach you everything I know... I will hold nothing back.
记忆的潮水向你涌来。浪头穿过了你…回过神来时，你已经变成了柯柯娜的倒影。
The tide of memories surges towards you, and the waves pass through you... When you come to your senses, you have become Cocona's reflection.
这架钢琴就像我的朋友。无论喜悲，它总能和我一同分享，带给我安慰。
This piano is like my friend. Joy or sorrow, it will always share them with me and bring me comfort.
每次琴声响起的时候，我总会感觉自己身处另一个世界——老朋友，这次你也会陪我一起歌唱吧？
Each time the piano plays, I will feel myself transported to another world. Old friend, will you sing with me this time as well?
欸…突然想到一个不错的动机。略加发展的话，也许能写出一首好听的歌曲？
Hmm... I've suddenly thought of a good motif. If we expand on it just a little, perhaps we can even pen a nice melody?
该给它取个什么名字呢……
What name should I give it...
欸…突然想到一个不错的动机。略加发展的话，也许能写出一首好听的歌曲？
Hmm... I've suddenly thought of a good motif. If we expand on it just a little, perhaps we can even pen a nice melody?
该给它取个什么名字呢……
What name should I give it...
娜娜，眼看快要毕业了，你想好未来要做什么了吗？
Cocona, you're about to graduate soon. Have you decided on what you want to do in the future?
对呀…这里不就我们两个人吗？
Yeah... There are only the two of us here, aren't there?
别害羞嘛。这样，我先告诉你我想做什么，然后我们交换好不好？
Don't be shy. How about I tell you what I want to do first, then you tell me?
别害羞嘛。这样，我先告诉你我想做什么，然后我们交换好不好？
Don't be shy. How about I tell you what I want to do first, then you tell me?
我也没有什么雄心壮志，不奢望能成为什么金融精英，只希望能去「烫金的时刻」找一份体面的工作，舒舒服服过完这一生就好啦。
I've no grand ambition, no desire to become some financial elite — I only hope to get a decent job at the Gilded Hour and live out a comfy life.
但我们神秘的娜娜、美丽的娜娜、聪明的娜娜肯定和我不一样…让我来猜猜，娜娜是不是想成为一名歌手？
But our mysterious Cocona, beautiful Cocona, smart Cocona, she's definitely different from me... Let me guess, you want to become a singer?
嗯，想从事音乐相关的工作。
Yes, I'd like to work in something related to music.
我就知道娜娜与众不同！等娜娜在匹诺康尼歌剧院举办演出的时候，我就要和别人炫耀：「看！那是我最好的朋友！」。
I knew you were different, Cocona! When you hold a concert at the Penacony Theater, I'm going to show off to everyone: "Look, that's my best friend!"
娜娜那么聪明，无论干什么都会很出色的。好期待以后有一天能摇着荧光棒，为舞台上的你加油呀…我能想象出那时你的样子，一定美极了。
You're so smart, and you'll succeed in anything you do. I can't wait for the day I'll be able to wave glowsticks and cheer for you on stage... I bet you'll be so gorgeous when that time comes.
我会努力变成你想象中的样子。
I'll work hard to become that image in your mind.
娜娜最近就在努力吧？上课的时候老是走神，肯定又在写新歌吧？
Cocona, have you been working hard recently? You're always in a daze in class — you must be writing a new song again, aren't you?
I've only written an opening so far...
给我看看嘛…哪怕就透露一下名字也行。
Come on. Let me take a peek... Even just a name will do fine.
名字来自我最喜欢的诗人——
The name is from my favorite poet...
好有诗意的名字啊…光看歌名就知道是首好歌！写完的时候一定要给我看哦！
A wonderfully poetic name... I'm certain it'll be a great song, judging just from its name! You have to show it to me when you're done!
等你上台演绎这首歌的那天，你的梦想一定会和匹诺康尼的十二时分交相辉映…想想就觉得了不起！
Wait till you're performing this song on the stage. Your dream will shine as bright as Penacony's Twelve Hours... I'm impressed just thinking about it!
我就知道我的娜娜与众不同！等娜娜在匹诺康尼歌剧院举办演出的时候，我就要和别人炫耀：「看！那是我最好的朋友！」。
I knew my Cocona is incredible! When you organize a concert at the Penacony Theater, I'm going to show off to everyone: "Look, that's my best friend!"
等你上台演绎这首歌的那天，你的梦想一定会和匹诺康尼的十二时分交相辉映…想想就觉得了不起！
Wait till you're performing this song on the stage. Your dream will shine as bright as Penacony's Twelve Hours... I'm impressed just thinking about it!
娜娜，你已经长大了，想好以后要怎么生活了吗？
Cocona, you're all grown up now. Have you thought about how you want to live your life yet?
娜娜，你为什么总是不肯告诉我们你的未来规划？听说你们的同学都有着落了，我们也很着急啊……
Cocona, why do you keep refusing to tell us your plans for the future? I hear your classmates have all found their places in life, and we're getting antsy too...
哎，这孩子…从小就古怪，不知道遗传了谁的脾气。
*sigh* This girl... She's always been an odd one since young. I wonder who she takes after.
你有什么资格说这话？你管过她哪怕一天吗？没本事的家伙！
And what gives you the right to say that? Have you ever cared about her one bit? Useless bum!
还不是因为你，让我们操碎了心……
It's all because of you! We're worried to death...
你啊你…和你爸一模一样，只会惹我生气！我不知道为这个家操了多少心……
You... you're just like your father, always making me mad! You have no idea how much I've worried for this family...
行了，别在一边大呼小叫了。娜娜，和我们说说吧——你以后是怎么打算的？
All right. Stop it! Stop screaming! Cocona, tell us. What are your plans for the future?
我想从事音乐相关的工作。
I'd like to work in something related to music.
…什么？你再说一遍，我怕我没听清楚。
...What? Say that again. I don't think I heard you right.
我就知道…就不该让她参加那什么学生合唱团！
I knew it... We shouldn't have let her join that student choir!
我想从事和音乐相关的工作。
I'd like to work in something related to music.
音乐…唱歌…小娜，你是不是最近太累了，才会有这种天真的想法？
Music... singing... Cocona, is it because you've been so tired recently that you're having such naive thoughts?
你又没受过正规训练，长得又不算漂亮，声线也只能说普通…小娜，我们还是想点实际的出路吧，好吗？
You're not even classically trained, and you're not exactly pretty, and your voice is ordinary at best... Cocona, let's think of something more practical, shall we?
老师说我可以走这条路……
My teacher said I could walk this path...
别人说什么你就信什么？你都多大了，别整天像个小孩子那么天真……
And you believe what anyone tells you? You're not young anymore. Stop acting like a naive child...
我想出去学习，努力拿奖学金……
I want to go out and learn, and work hard for a scholarship...
学习…你还想学几年呐？你都多大了，别整天像个小孩子那么天真……
Learn... How many more years do you want to study? You're not young anymore. Stop acting like a naive child...
你是不是又被那个声乐老师给忽悠了，所以才会冒出这些奇怪的想法？他就是看你单纯好骗，想靠话术再多捞点学费！
Have you been misled by that music teacher again? Is that why you're having such strange thoughts? He just thinks you're naive and easy to fool, and is trying to scam you into paying more tuition!
娜娜，你要记得，我们和家族还有那些有钱的逐梦客不一样…我们是匹诺康尼本地人，跟那些有钱人相比，我们没有那么多好选择。
Cocona, you must remember that we're different from The Family and those wealthy Dreamchasers... We're Penaconian natives — compared to those rich folk, we don't have many choices laid out for us.
听爸妈的吧，我们在酒店工作那么久，也算跟家族建立了点关系。之前听说「黄金的时刻」有家奢侈品商店在招店员，你不如去试试。

Listen to your parents. We've worked a long time at the hotel, and have some connections with The Family. I heard that there's a luxury goods store at the Golden Hour that's hiring. Why not give that a try?
你这孩子，怎么这么执拗？在匹诺康尼聊「梦想」，你自己不觉得奇怪吗？
Kid, why are you so stubborn? Mouthing off the word "dream" in Penacony... do you not think yourself strange?
等接受了这份工作，你每天都能泡在梦里，想从里面出来都难——还有什么可抱怨的？
When you accept this job, you'll be so immersed in dreams all day that you won't ever want to wake up. What's there to gripe about?
娜娜…妈妈知道你喜欢唱歌，但很多时候爱好就是爱好，爱好是没法变成饭碗的。你该认清楚现实，然后好好下决定。
Cocona... Mom knows that you love singing, but hobbies are just that — hobbies. They aren't meant to be a means of living. You should face reality and then make a proper decision.
这次，我同意你妈妈的看法。你可要好好选，千万别让我们失望。
For once, I agree with your mother. You should choose carefully. Do not disappoint us.
Work at the luxury goods store.
不，从事音乐相关的工作。
No, I wish to work in something related to music.
Work at the luxury goods store.
不，从事音乐相关的工作。
No, I wish to work in something related to music.
你只能进奢侈品商店工作。
Your only choice is to work at the luxury goods store.
这样才对，这才是我们的乖娜娜。等你正式开始工作，工资什么的我们先来替你保管——等以后你成家了再还给你。
Right. That's our girl. When you officially start work, we'll help save up your wages for you first. When you're ready to get married, we'll return them to you.
你也不懂理财，放在我们这里更好。
You don't know the first thing about managing your expenses. It's better that you safekeep your wages with us.
当然了，爸爸妈妈…不管你们说什么，做什么……
Of course, Father, Mother... No matter what you say or do...
那只外表精美雅致的礼盒，封装着我已经朽烂的未来。
That beautiful and intricate gift box holds my already-rotten future.
（柯柯娜就在前面…这次又会遇到什么样的记忆？）
(Cocona is just up ahead... What memories will I encounter this time?)
（也许要等经历完这一切，才能抵达她的内心深处。）
(Maybe I have to see this through to the end to reach the depths of her heart.)
身着华贵服饰的老妇人站在奢侈品商店中，似乎在等待什么人过来。
An old lady who is dressed to the nines stands outside the luxury store, as if waiting for someone to arrive.
格尔温太太，您来了。今天想看看什么？
Mrs. Gerwin, you're here. What would you like to look at today?
柯柯娜，你终于来了，我等你等了好久。
Cocona, you're finally here. I've waited for you for so long.
抱歉，刚刚在…清点货物。上次的那件大衣，您还满意吗？
My apologies, I was... taking stock. Were you satisfied with the long coat the other time?
别说了，穿出去之后，别人都说合适呢，好像一下子年轻了好多岁。
Of course! Everyone complimented me when I wore it out, as if I looked ten years younger.
找到一件适合自己的衣服和找到知己一样难——所幸有你介绍，我最近找到了不少「知己」。
Finding clothing that suits you is as difficult as finding a soulmate — it's all thanks to your recommendation that I've been able to find quite a few "soulmates."
那太好了…您尤其适合稍稍偏冷的颜色，和您的肤色和体态都非常相称。
That's great... You're especially suited for cooler tones — it matches your skin tone and body shape.
你的声音还是那么好听。我没记错的话，你喜欢唱歌对吧？我儿子也是学声乐的，你们有空可以一起聊聊。
Your voice is ever so melodious. If I recall correctly, you love to sing, right? My son studies music too, and you two should talk when you're free.
我…恐怕是您记错了，我没有怎么学过声乐。
I... I'm afraid you've recalled wrongly. I've never studied music before.
嗐，我开玩笑的，年纪一大就喜欢唠叨…先陪我一起逛逛吧，我太久没听过你的声音了，多少有点惦记呢。
Ha, I was just joking. You know how people ramble on at my age... Accompany me around the store. I haven't heard your voice in a while, and I do miss it.
那天，格尔温太太满载而归。
That day, Mrs. Gerwin had a fruitful haul.
能力出众、踏实肯干的柯柯娜，在很短的时间内就成为了店里的明星销售。
The capable and down-to-earth Cocona did not take long to become the store's star employee.
继续深入记忆之海，亲历柯柯娜的过去……
Continue into the sea of memories to experience Cocona's past first-hand...
恭喜你啊柯柯娜。我听说格尔温太太和那个里尔克先生都是出了名的难缠，挑剔又刻薄。
Congrats, Cocona. I've heard that Mrs. Gerwin and Mr. Rilke are both infamously tough customers, picky and rude.
要是我也能有你那么漂亮的声音就好了…那样我保准也能把人弄得五迷三道的，乖乖把口袋里的钱掏出来。
If only I had a beautiful voice like yours... I'd surely mesmerize those fat cats into emptying their pockets on their own.
你才来了多久，就知道他们是什么样的人了？
You've only been here for a little while. How would you know what kind of people they are?
我只是在真诚地对待客人。
I'm only being sincere to the guests.
你是说我们工作的态度不够真诚？
Are you saying our attitude isn't sincere?
我们都懂…上次，还有人碰见你和格尔温太太的儿子一起吃饭呢。听说你们亲密得很，现在进展到哪一步了？小心那些有钱人，他们最擅长欺骗感情了。

We all know... Someone even ran into you having a meal with Mrs. Gerwin's son the other time. I heard you two were getting quite cozy too. So how far into the relationship are you? Beware of those rich folk. They're all masters at manipulating people's feelings.
噢，还有一次，你待在老板办公室那么久，有说有笑的…想必又拿到不少优质的客户源吧？
Oh, there was another time when you were in the boss' office for a long time, chatting and laughing... I bet you got quite the windfall in customer leads, didn't you?
哎呀，没关系的…你还这么年轻，做事张扬点也很正常。你以为这里的前辈不想走捷径吗？条件不允许而已……

C'mon, it's fine... You're still young, and it's perfectly normal to be showy about these things. You think the more senior staff don't think about using relationships to skip ahead? They just don't have the means for it...
你们这些匹诺康尼本地人真拼啊，为了上位什么手段都能用上——哦，对了，听说你的工作也是走后门找的？
You Penacony natives sure put everything on the line, willing to go the whole length just to rise through the ranks... Oh right, I hear you also got this job through connections?
给你一句过来人的忠告：这些小把戏足够让你找到一份体面的工作，但想凭这些手段敲开上流社会的门？还是趁早死了这条心吧……

A word of advice from someone who's been around the block: These parlor tricks are enough for you to find a decent job, but to knock on the door of the elite with such moves? You're better off giving up right now...
唉？你别哭啊——都是我不好，我不该当着大家的面说这些的。
Huh? Oh don't cry... It's all my fault. I shouldn't have said all this in front of everyone.
时间不早，我先下班了。下个系统时的轮班安排，还有那份报表，就拜托你啦。
It's getting late. I'm clocking out. I'll leave the next system hour's shift schedule and that report to you. Thanks.
在窃窃的笑声和嫉妒的眼光中，柯柯娜回到了现实，并开始惧怕第二天的到来。
Amidst low snickers and jealous stares, Cocona returns to reality, dreading the next day's arrival.
哎呀，没关系的…你还这么年轻，做事张扬点也很正常。你以为这里的前辈不想走捷径吗？条件不允许而已……

C'mon, it's fine... You're still young, and it's perfectly normal to be showy about these things. You think the more senior staff don't think about using relationships to skip ahead? They just don't have the means for it...
时间不早，我先下班了。下个系统时的轮班安排，还有那份报表，就拜托你啦。
It's getting late. I'm clocking out. I'll leave the next system hour's shift schedule and that report to you. Thanks.
柯柯娜——最近你是怎么回事？这样下去，我怀疑还有没有必要和你续劳务合同。
Cocona... What's wrong with you recently? If you keep this up, I'm going to start wondering whether I should renew your work contract.
There's a problem with this recent batch of goods...
I can't scam our loyal customers...
谁告诉你这批货有问题了？柯柯娜，你记住——在「黄金的时刻」，那些有钱的客户看重的不是商品的质量，而是品牌效应！
Who told you there was a problem with these? Cocona, you best remember — In the Golden Hour, those wealthy customers don't care about product quality, but branding!
只要有品牌、有故事，哪怕是一只破麻布袋他们也会欣然买下！有钱人压根不会在意买来的鞋子容不容易坏，因为他们从来都不用靠自己的脚走路——懂了吗？

As long as there's a brand and a story, they'll gladly buy even a torn hemp pouch! The rich care not if a purchased pair of shoes is easily worn, because they've never had to rely on their own feet to walk. Do you get it now?
如果说谎就会遭惩罚，你猜那些游手好闲的富人能活到现在吗？
If lying is cause for punishment, you think those indolent rich folk would still be alive now?
This is unfair to the customer...
如果这个世界是公平的，那些游手好闲的富人根本就不该出现！
If this world was fair, those indolent rich folk should never have existed in the first place!
要说撒谎，这整片梦境不就是一个家族建造出来的美丽谎言吗？醒醒吧，没人在乎你说的是不是实话，只要能吸引人买单就够了。
Speaking of lies, isn't this entire Dreamscape a beautiful lie spun by The Family? Wake up. No one cares if what you say is truth, as long as you can get people to foot the bill.
还有，我这几天已经听到不止一个人反映，你恶意抢走他们的老客户，破坏了同事间的合作氛围。实话说，我对你相当失望……

Also, I've already received more than one complaint these past few days from other employees that you maliciously stole away their loyal customers and damaged our work culture. To be honest, I'm quite disappointed in you...
你家里应该也不富裕吧？那就少摆出一副清高的样子。你真的以为匹诺康尼是什么美梦？告诉你吧，它能烧得如此耀眼，靠的完全是我们这些「燃料」！

Your family's not wealthy, right? Then stop posing like you can afford to maintain so-called virtues. You really think Penacony is some beautiful dream? Let me tell you — the reason it burns so bright is because of "fuel" like us!
给你五个系统时的期限——业绩再上不去，你就回家吧。
I'll give you a deadline of five system hours — if you can't get your performance up to par by the end of it, just go home.
But I'm not in the wrong...
那错的是谁？难道是我吗？
这是我需要思考的问题吗？自己慢慢悟吧。
That's not a problem for me, is it? You should think about it yourself.
你该彻彻底底地改掉自己的毛病，平时多向你的同事学习。
You should absolutely rid yourself of your bad habits and learn from your coworkers.
要说撒谎，这整片梦境不就是一个家族建造出来的美丽谎言吗？醒醒吧，没人在乎你说的不是不是实话，只要能吸引人买单就够了。
Speaking of lies, isn't this entire Dreamscape a beautiful lie spun by The Family? Wake up. No one cares if what you say is true, as long as you can get people to foot the bill.
还有，我这几天已经听到不止一个人反映，你恶意抢走他们的老客户，破坏了同事间的合作氛围。实话说，我对你相当失望……

Also, I've already received more than one complaint these past few days from other employees that you maliciously stole away their loyal customers and damaged the work culture. To be honest, I'm quite disappointed in you...
给你五个系统时的期限——业绩再上不去，你就回家吧。
I'll give you a deadline of five system hours — if you can't get your performance up to par by the end of it, just go home.
（也许我真的永远无法在梦境世界中立足……）
(I may never be able to hold my own in the Dreamscape...)
（我从出生起就是一只囚鸟，我早该明白的…可是…可是……）
(I've been a caged bird since birth. I should've realized that... But... But...)
（狠心点…柯柯娜，你还背负着很多人的期待呢…这也许就是成人的游戏规则吧。）
(Be more strict on yourself... Cocona, you carry the wishes of so many people on your shoulders... Perhaps these are the rules of the game in the adult world.)
你是谁？你和我长得很像，但我认不出你了。
Who are you? You look just like me, but I don't recognize you.
你想取代我…但你并不是我。
You wish to replace me... But you're not me.
I don't know who I am either.
不怪你，这世上的人大多都是如此。
I don't blame you — many are the same in this world.
柯柯娜…你能欺骗所有人，但骗不过自己。
Cocona... You can lie to everyone, but you can't lie to yourself.
你已经很久没来找过我了…此时此刻，你出现在这里…你想要什么？你在渴求什么？
You haven't come to find me for a long time... And yet, you're here now.... What do you want? What do you desire?
还记得吗？少女时期，你曾对自己许下承诺——无论未来发生什么，你都要一直微笑下去。可现在呢？你已经把它忘得一干二净……
Do you remember? When you were young, you once made yourself a promise — no matter what happened, you would always smile. But now? You've entirely forgotten...
你会用怎样的酷刑对付我？你会<color=#dbc291ff>用何种手段毁掉自己的纯真、善良、诚实、还有原则？</color>是痛快地一刀两断…还是通过经年累月的折磨？

What cruel punishment will you mete upon me? You will <color=#dbc291ff>use any and all means to destroy your own innocence, kindness, honesty, and principles?</color> Will you sever it in two in a heartbeat... or tortuously grind it down with time?
杀死了我之后…你能得到什么？你还能给自己留下些什么？
After you kill me... what will you have gained? What else can you leave for yourself?
I'm sorry. I had no choice.
我自知我不是你的对手。在无法逃避的丑陋现实面前，一切美德都不堪一击。
I already know I am not your match. All virtues are shattered with a single touch before the inescapable and ugly truth.
但我会尽我所能对抗你，因为我是你的纯真、善良、诚实、还有原则。
But I will give my all to resist you — because I am your innocence, kindness, honesty, and principles.
无论如何，我还是希望能为自己留下一颗种子，留下一朵…未来的玫瑰。
No matter what, I still hope to leave behind a seed, a bloom... of a future's rose.
柯柯娜…消灭你的纯真、善良、诚实和原则——然后迎接你的成功。
Cocona... vanquish your innocence, kindness, honesty and principles, and then embrace your victory.
继续吧，柯柯娜…抛弃那些无用之物，去满足他人对你的期望吧。
Continue forth, Cocona... Abandon all meaningless material objects, and fulfill the expectations others have for you.
记住…给自己留下一颗种子…留下一朵…未来的玫瑰……
Remember... to leave a seed for yourself... to leave a blooming... of a future's rose...
那份甜蜜的冰激凌，仿佛在记忆中永不会融化……
That sweet ice-cream looks unmeltable in memories...
（最后一段回忆，又会是什么样的呢？）
(What will the final memory have in store?)
我想清楚了。我不想再继续这样生活下去了。
I've thought it through. I do not wish to continue living like this.
赢下这场比赛之后，我们就能赚到足够的钱，离开匹诺康尼。
After winning this match, we will earn enough money to leave Penacony.
还记得我们聊过的那个星球吗？那里被蓝色的海水覆盖，有分明的四季，有真实的生活。我们会彼此陪伴，也能追求各自的梦想。
Still remember that planet we talked about? Blanketed in azure seas, it has distinct seasons and is a place where we can truly live. We would be with each other, and we could pursue our own dreams.
太危险了…非得参加那个比赛吗？
It's too dangerous... Do you have to compete?
娜娜…靠着你的收入，我们短期内确实可以衣食无忧…但你我都清楚，这不是我们想要的生活。我们都是渴望飞翔的鸟…这困于尘土的生活不属于我们。

Cocona... We'll have no problem supporting ourselves temporarily with your income... But you and I know that this isn't the life we want. We clamor to be birds soaring through the skies... This life shackled in dust does not belong to us.
开心点嘛，娜娜——我可是很擅长机动球的！你瞧——
Cheer up, Cocona... I'm a pro at Roboball! Look...
柯柯娜的恋人摆出滑稽的姿势，让她笑出了声。他们又重新依偎在一起。
Cocona's lover poses comically, eliciting a laugh from her. They embrace and cuddle up against each other yet again.
我头一次发现…原来现实中的匹诺康尼也那么美。梦境里的那些霓虹灯光…总是让我想起深海。我经常会感到迷失。
I'm noticing for the first time... that Penacony looks quite pretty in reality as well. The neon lights of the Dreamscape... makes me think of the unfathomable sea. I feel lost all the time.
当初建设匹诺康尼的人，又是怀着怎样的初衷呢…他们会不会想到有这么一天，居然会有人会傻到想要逃离他们建造的这座乐园？
The people who built Penacony, what intentions did they bear... Did they think that, one day, there'd be someone foolish enough to flee this haven that they built?
外人眼里的匹诺康尼是一个美妙的幻梦——但只有我们知道它的本质，柯柯娜。
Penacony is a wondrous dreamy illusion to outsiders' eyes, but only we know its true nature, Cocona.
嗯…你说得对。在「黄金的时刻」之下，埋葬了太多人美梦的残骸。
Mm... You're right. Buried are the numerous remnants of people's dreams beneath the Golden Hour.
Ah... Inspiration has suddenly struck me.
对——我知道该怎么给这首歌结尾了。
Yes... I know how to end this song.
I've also made up my mind.
结尾就是，十天之后，我们登上驶离匹诺康尼的飞船——「从梦中醒来」，拥抱真实的生活。
The ending is, in ten days, we will board the spaceship departing Penacony and wake up from the dream, embracing our real lives.
在那之前，我要努力训练，争取以最好的状态给你带回奖杯。柯柯娜…你真的不来看吗？
Before that, I have to train hard and reach my best state to bring back the trophy for you. Cocona... Are you really not coming to see me?
庞德，我太容易紧张了。而且，有我在旁边看着…你也不会安心的…趁这段时间，我也处理一下工作方面的交接。
Pound, I get nervous too easily. And you won't feel relaxed either if I'm watching the match... I should also take this time to hand over my work.
好，那就这么决定了——等着看我凯旋吧，娜娜！到时候，我们老地方见……
All right. It's decided then. Await my triumphant return, Cocona! When the time comes, we will meet at our old haunt...
在黑暗和阴冷中生活的柯柯娜…曾经也拥有过一束暖光。
Cocona, who lived in cold darkness... used to possess a single ray of light.
在离开匹诺康尼之前，还需要收集一些东西……
Before leaving Penacony, there are still some things to collect...
你感到了柔软光滑的硬质材料滑入手心，上面还带着另一个人淡淡的体温。
You feel something made from a soft, smooth, and solid material sliding into your palm, the warmth of another person lingering on its surface.
哇，这么简单的问题，娜娜怎么都猜不中啊！
Woah, such a simple question, and you still didn't get it right!
谜底揭晓——是船票！十天之后的船票，特别买了靠窗的座位…这样我们就可以一起欣赏银河的美景了。
The answer is: A ship ticket! A ticket departing in ten days. I even bought two window seats... We can enjoy the stars together that way.
…娜娜？你怎么哭了，娜娜…我们应该高兴才是啊……
...Cocona? Why are you crying, Cocona... We should be happy...
躺在掌心中的小小车票那么轻，又那么沉重，仿佛拥有拽动未来的力量。
The palm-sized ticket rests in her hands — so light, yet so heavy, as if it possesses a power to drag the future along with it.
娜娜，我马上就要去泰科铵参加比赛了——等比赛一结束我就回来找你，我们老地方见。
Cocona, I'm going to Taikiyan and joining the competition. I'll come back and look for you when it's over — we'll meet at our old haunt.
到时候怕忘记了，我的档案证件什么的，都放在你那里好了。
In case I forget, I'm leaving my file and papers with you.
You can count on me to keep them safe.
哪有什么压力？放心吧，能打败我的只有我自己！
Me, stressed? Don't worry. I'm the only one who can beat me!
别担心，我会第一时间赶回来。话说回来，娜娜…你是不是还有什么东西没给我？
Don't worry. I'll hurry back first thing. Speaking of which, Cocona... Is there something you're forgetting to give me?
…有了这个吻，我绝对无往不胜！别忘了「想象一朵未来的玫瑰」——我要成为第一个听到它的人！
...With this kiss, I'll never ever lose! Don't forget "Envision a Rose Forthcoming" — I will be the first person to hear it!
柯柯娜踮起脚尖，轻轻地吻了吻庞德的脸颊……
Cocona tiptoes and gently kisses Pound's face...
庞德，我来了！你提前到了吗…担心死我了，比赛结束我也没有得到你的消息……
Pound, I'm here! Did you have to wait long...? I was worried sick, since you didn't contact me after the competition ended...
啊…很高兴认识您。我是庞德的朋友，是来替他传话的。
Ah... A pleasure. I'm Pound's friend. I'm here to deliver a message in his stead.
传话…为什么？他和我约好了要在这里见面，然后我们一起离开……
In his stead... Why? He promised to meet me here, and then we would leave together...
…情况恐怕有变，柯柯娜小姐。我猜，庞德之所以让我来给您传话，是因为…咳，是因为他大概不会再回匹诺康尼了。

...I'm afraid circumstances have changed, Miss Cocona. I'm guessing that the reason Pound had me deliver his message to you, is because... Ahem, it's because he probably won't be returning to Penacony.
我理解…我很遗憾。但庞德希望我能把事情的所有真相都一五一十地告诉您，他相信这样能让您好受一些。
I understand... It's just regretful. But Pound hoped that I would tell you the whole truth. He believed that it would make you feel better.
为了能够达成和您的承诺，庞德他…向家族借了一笔钱，数额很大的一笔钱。
In order to achieve his promise to you, Pound... borrowed a sum of money from The Family — an inordinate amount.
他把这笔钱全部用在了押注上——他赌自己能获得这次业余组机动球比赛的冠军。
He used all this money on a bet — he bet that he would become champion in the amateur bracket of the Roboball competition.
很遗憾…虽然庞德的技术精湛，但竞技比赛永远有它难以预料的部分。庞德最后以微弱的差距拿到了亚军，但这也意味着……
Alas... Pound's technique was superb, but competition always has its unpredictability. Pound only lost the championship by a hair's breadth, but that also means...
…呃，我想您知道这意味着什么，柯柯娜小姐。
...Err, I think you know what it means, Miss Cocona.
老实说，柯柯娜小姐，我不知道…也最好不要知道。
Truthfully, Miss Cocona, I don't know... And I don't think I want to know.
这一时肯定很难消化，我明白。但您应该能理解…庞德他真的非常在乎您，也希望能兑现自己许下的承诺。否则他绝对不会冒那么大的险……

This news may be hard to swallow, I understand. But you should understand... Pound really cared for you greatly, and hoped that he could trade himself to fulfill your wishes. Otherwise, he would not have undertaken such a great risk...
…对了，庞德希望我能把这样东西交给您——是两张机动球比赛的旧门票，我猜那应该是你们一起看过的比赛。
...Oh right, Pound wanted me to give you this — it's two expired tickets for the Roboball competition. I'm guessing it was a match you both watched back then.
Receive the tickets with trembling fingers.
那…我要代为传达的就是这些，柯柯娜小姐。希望您往后的生活愉快……
Then... that's all I have to deliver, Miss Cocona. I wish you a happier life down the road...
柯柯娜直直地盯着眼前的植物，仿佛她的灵魂已经被埋进那片黑暗的土壤。
Cocona stares blankly at the plant before her, as if her soul had been buried in that blackened soil.
两张门票消失在茂盛的叶片之下，没有发出任何声响。
The tickets disappear among verdant leaves, making nary a sound.
正如她的心灵在沉默中珠残玉碎。
Just like her heart shattering mutely among splintered pearls and jade.
她把唱片丢进花坛，磕碰到边缘时发出一声闷响。
She hurls the record into the flowerbed, and it emits a dull echo as it hits the edge.
以那声响动为界，她再也无法逃脱悲伤之网。
As if that sound marks the end of a sentence, she is also a prisoner in this web of tragedy.

She hurls the record into the flowerbed, and it emits a dull echo as it hits the edge.

两张门票消失在茂盛的叶片之下，没有发出任何声响。
The tickets disappear among verdant leaves, making nary a sound.
正如她的心灵在沉默中珠残玉碎。
Just like her heart shattering mutely among splintered pearls and jade.

一滴泪珠顺着风的方向飞来，划过你的脸颊——依旧滚烫。

Please let me leave... I've heard it all by now. It's all pointless no matter how much effort I put in.
柯柯娜，还记得你的歌吗？
Cocona, do you remember your song?
那首歌…呵，或许都称不上一首完整的歌…不过是件残次品。
That song... Hah, it probably can't be called a complete song... It's nothing but a third-rate defective piece of work.
…就和现在的我一样。为了能在这个世界里生存，我不断地把自己的灵魂切片、丢弃…直到最后，剩下的只有一具令人生厌的躯壳。
...Just like what I am now. To survive in this world, I have kept cutting off pieces of my own soul and discarding them... Until finally, there's nothing left but an empty shell that detests life.
成为店长的这一路，我学会了很多令自己厌恶的品质。我不断地背叛自我…以交换他人眼中的成功。
On the path to becoming a shop owner, I discovered many inner qualities that made me hate myself. I betrayed myself time and again... in exchange for what is so-called success in the eyes of others.
但我做不到彻底的改变。愧疚总能追上我，发自内心的拷问总会到来。我太扭曲，太痛苦，这片美梦里没有我的容身之地。
But I was unable to change totally. Guilt always caught up to me, inevitably interrogating my conscience. I was too twisted, and it was too painful — this dream had no place for me.
只要还有生命，一切都能补救。
As long as there's life left, everything is worth saving.
…补救？您不理解…这就是我补救的办法，我的解脱。

Thank you for your compassion, but I'm afraid you won't understand... For someone like me, this choice isn't up to me. The voice within guides me — I have no freedom, and I am only to be led by them.
顺应它一回也好。它答应了…只要跟着它，所有的不幸都会消失。
It's all right to respond to it, even just once. It agrees... As long as I follow it, all bad things will disappear.
您的生活，大概过得很充实、很热闹吧？
Your life, I bet it was fulfilling and lively, no?
所以您才会觉得，一切困境都能靠着朋友间的亲密沟通来化解。
That's why you think that all hardships can be overcome through talking. Talking to your closest friends about your most innermost truths.
生活总会触底反弹，柯柯娜。
Life has its ups and downs, Cocona.
您真是一位乐观的人…我很羡慕。
You really are an optimistic person... I truly envy you.
我猜您的身边大概围绕着不少可以带来欢笑的人吧？所以您才能如此积极、阳光。

…您听，它来了——它终于要带我离开这片悲伤之地了。
...Listen, it's here — it's finally taking me away from this place of sorrow.

Cocona turns her head, giving you one last glance. Her eyes are brimming with sorrow, loneliness, and... gratitude.

…这是我生命里最幸福的一天。

她冰冷的肌肤表面似乎长出了倒钩…火辣辣的痛感刺激着你的手掌。

I've had enough... I've had enough! All of you keep showing up in my life one after another, giving me false hope time and again...
——然后半途而弃，把烂摊子留给我…任由它们在我身上寄生、腐烂、毒发……
...And then abandoning me halfway, leaving me to pick up the pieces... Leaving them to grow on me like parasites, decaying, spreading...

I can't bear it any longer... I've had enough of playing the tragic support role in all these stories. All that suffering... Please, let it end...
I don't want to... struggle any longer.

我会仔细听着的，每个字。

只要不会伤害到你就好。

A smile breaks out on Cocona's face — you are certain the smile is coming from the bottom of her heart, unmarred by emotional complications.
可以请您…把手松开一些吗？还挺疼的。

梦的细节…我有些记不清了。但我隐约感觉……

其实不用搞得那么清楚…

谢谢您…至于其它的事，我还是不去多想了吧。

报、抱歉，普莱佐先生——我这就换一张唱片……
M—My apologies, Mr. Prezzo. I'll swap out a record right away...
