不需要了——我全都不需要了。

「那缤纷的世界会是什么模样？」
"What would that vibrant world look like?"
在人群的鼓励下，柯柯娜忘我地歌唱。她的歌声变得愈发动听、自信……
With the crowd's encouragement, Cocona loses herself in her song. Her voice becomes more euphonious and confident...
Could she be some famous star?
It's really him... I'm going to faint!
Haha... Miss, please watch your step.
Of course, where shall I sign?
I knew you hadn't left us!
I have been with you the whole time, Miss...
Someone is calling for help? Let's go and take a look.
I will not allow anyone to slander his name!
This is love. This is love.
I would give up everything for him!
眼前的男人没有注意到你的存在。这不怪他——你的眼神不由自主地顺着他雕塑般分明的下颌线漫游，而后浸溺在他如涓流般温润的眉目余光中。你差一点也忘记了自我。

The man before you has not noticed your presence. You do not blame him — You find your eyes tracing his chiseled jawline and becoming immersed in the glow of his residual radiance. You almost lose yourself.
…啊，这位{F#女士}{M#先生}…抱歉，我刚才在忙别的事，没有注意到您。
...Ah! My apologies... I was preoccupied and did not notice you there.
您也是来要签名的吗？请稍等……
Are you here for an autograph, too? Just a moment...
I don't know who you are.
不认识？！怎么会有人不认识莱斯利•迪恩，艾普瑟隆的银河巨星？看你的形象还挺成熟，现实里不会还是个未成年吧！
You don't know him!? How could someone not know Lesley Dean, a galactic superstar of Epsilon? You look pretty grown up to me. You're not still a kid, are you?
…眼熟？看你的形象还挺成熟，现实里不会是个未成年吧…莱斯利•迪恩，艾普瑟隆的银河巨星，你居然只是「眼熟」？
...Familiar? You look pretty grown up to me. You're not still a minor, are you? This is Lesley Dean, a galactic superstar of Epsilon. How could you say he just "seems familiar"?
您不必激动——银河如此广阔，每个人的生活环境不尽相同，所能接触到的事物也有极大差异；我只是一位普通的演员，远非能够普照世间的巨星……

There is no need to get carried away... The cosmos is vast, and we all come from different environments. We will all be exposed to different things in life. I am merely a regular actor, far from the level of a superstar that can illuminate the entire universe...
他好会说话…他好谦逊！啊…为什么我眼前发黑……
He's so eloquent... He's so modest! Ah... Why is everything going dark...
抱歉，{F#女士}{M#先生}。这糟糕的惯性思维，它让我默认您是来索要签名的——我并非想在人前显得傲慢，还望您谅解。
Please excuse this terrible force of habit. I simply assumed that you were here for an autograph. I would not wish to seem arrogant. Please accept my apologies.
You're too polite to be famous...
听听，你这说的是什么话！你看这签名的字迹，假如不是莱斯利本人，怎么可能模仿得出来？
What are you even saying! Look at this autograph. How could someone forge this? This must be the real Lesley!
How can I be sure that you're really Lesley Dean?
太没礼貌了，你！你看这签名的字迹——假如不是莱斯利本人，怎么可能模仿得出来？
How disrespectful! Look at this autograph. How could someone forge this? This must be the real Lesley!
姐妹说的是。我起初也有怀疑，但自从看到这潇洒的签名…我就知道！我就知道星间众神不可能那么有眼无珠，眼睁睁地看着一颗冉冉升起的新星殒落。

The young lady is right! I was suspicious at first, but when I saw this elegant signature... I was sure! I knew the Aeons would not be so blind as to allow a rising star to come crashing down so soon!
呃…看来你真的对时事一无所知。我正好留着当时的头条剪报，你自己看吧。
Uhh... I see you really don't know anything about this. I happen to have a newspaper cutting from the incident. Read for yourself.
哇，你居然在梦里还随身带着？！没想到你才是我们中间最狂热的那个……
Woah, you carry it on you even in a dream!? I didn't realize you were that kind of crazy fan...
你、你就别揶揄我了…剪报在这里，你自己看吧。
D—Don't tease me... The snippet is here. Take a look for yourself.
现在明白了吧？他们说莱斯利已经不在了…但他们错了！真正的莱斯利•迪恩就在我们眼前，活生生地站在这里！
Do you understand now? They said that Lesley was gone... But they were wrong! The true Lesley Dean is right here, standing right before our eyes!
这种事故一般很难有生还者。
Survivors aren't common in incidents like this.
这么说来…迪恩先生，这问题可能不大礼貌——您是怎么从那场事故中生还的？抱歉，我真的止不住自己的好奇心。
Now that you mention it... Mr. Dean, this may be a rude question, but how did you escape the accident? I'm sorry. I can't help my curiosity.
这没什么不礼貌的，女士，我在梦中不止一次被人问及此事。
There is nothing rude about this, miss. This is not my first time being asked this in a dream.
我乘坐的「星云之末」号旅行舰的引擎在毫无预兆的情况下发生了故障，随后引发了爆炸——依常理推断，我的生还概率无限趋近于零。
The engine of the "Nebula's End" cruise ship that I was aboard malfunctioned completely without warning, causing an explosion. Logically, my chances of survival were almost zero.
我当时也的确失去了意识…很久之后才再次睁开了眼睛。有那么一个瞬间，我真的以为自己身在天国。
At that moment, I did lose consciousness... It was a long time before I opened my eyes again. For a split second, I really thought I had ascended to heaven.
直到身边一位善良的护士小姐告知，我从那场可怕的事故中幸存下来——我这才得以确认周遭世界的真实性。
That was until a kind young nurse by my side informed me that I had survived a terrible accident... This was the moment that I realized that the world around me was in fact, real.
据说爆炸发生时，恰好有一艘「纯美骑士团」的飞船掠过「星云之末」号。一位高尚勇敢的骑士义无反顾地冲入了灾难现场，搜索残留的生命迹象。

I was told that when the explosion occurred, there was a spaceship named the Knights of Beauty that happened to be passing by Nebula's End. At that moment, a heroic knight boldly charged into the scene of the disaster without concern for his own safety and searched for signs of remaining life.
最后，他找到了我——可惜也只找到了我。「星云之末」上有许多值得被拯救的灵魂…愿他们安息。
Finally, he found me... Unfortunately, I was the only one that he found. As for the many souls that deserved to be rescued aboard Nebula's End... May they rest in peace.
果然，像迪恩先生这么完美的人，连「纯美」都舍不得让他轻易离开吧？
I would expect no less, even the Beauty could not allow someone as perfect as Mr. Dean to just leave us that easily?
后来呢，你没打算复出吗？
What happened after that? Did you not plan to make a comeback?
很遗憾，尽管有幸生还，但事故对我的身心都造成了不可逆的伤害。我已经无法再继续演艺事业了。
Regrettably, though I survived, the accident has caused irreparable damage to my body. I am unable to continue with my acting career.
何况聚光灯下的生活如此劳碌，早已令我身心俱疲…所以我索性恳请外界帮忙隐瞒消息，从此作为一个常人生活。

What's more, my life under the stage lights has long since exhausted me both mentally and physically... So, I simply requested that information be concealed from the outside world, so that I may continue living a regular life.
后来有人提醒了我，银河间还有匹诺康尼这方天地——在梦境世界里，我能做回曾经的那个莱斯利•迪恩，忘记那场灾难给我带来的伤痛。

That was when someone reminded me of the existence of Penacony... In this dream world, I am able to return to my life as the Lesley Dean I once was and forget the pain that this tragedy inflicted on me.
能在这里遇到依然支持着我的各位，我发自内心地感到幸福……
Being able to meet you all here, who continue to support me as ever... My heart feels truly joyous and blessed.
莱斯利•迪恩抬起他纤长的手指，轻轻拂去自眼角泛起的一颗珍珠泪。你听到他身旁的几位粉丝——包括那位智械——同时倒吸了一口气。
Lesley Dean raises his slender finger to gently wipe a pearlescent teardrop from his eye. To your side, you hear a number of his fans, including the Intellitron, gasp in unison.
他举手投足间散发出来的魅力摄人心魄…迷离、慵懒、洒脱。你开始理解莱斯利•迪恩的名声为什么能响彻星系了。

The charisma and charm that he emanates with his every move are captivating... Filled with emotion yet unaffected and unrestrained. You start to understand how the name "Lesley Dean" has come to resonate across the galaxy.
当然可以，您叫什么名字？
Of course. What is your name?
「{NICKNAME}，愿星光撒遍你的道路。你忠实的——莱斯利•迪恩。」
"{NICKNAME}, may the stars shine to light your path. Yours faithfully, Lesley Dean."
好了。祝您往后的日子里每天都有好心情，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}。
There we are. I wish that you be in good spirits from this day forth, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}.
我有个朋友想要你的签名。
I have a friend that would really like your autograph.
当然可以，您的朋友叫什么名字？
Of course. What is your friend's name?
「{NICKNAME}，愿星光撒遍你的道路。你忠实的——莱斯利•迪恩。」
"{NICKNAME}, may the stars shine to light your path. Yours faithfully, Lesley Dean."
好了。祝您和您的朋友往后的日子里每天都有好心情，{F#小姐}{M#先生}。
There we are. I wish that you and your friend be in good spirits from this day forth, {F#miss}{M#mister}.
你拿到了银河巨星莱斯利•迪恩的亲笔签名。你不知道在梦境中获得一张签了名的明信片意味着什么…但你还是倍感激动。
You obtained the autograph of the galactic superstar Lesley Dean! You are unsure of what receiving an autograph in a dream actually means... But you are still extremely excited.
嘀嗒！刚才那个人，感觉很不对劲！
Tick tock! There was something off about that person!
你说那几个围着他的人？
You mean the people crowding that man?
说什么呢，我指的当然是给你签名的那个人！
What are you talking about? I clearly mean the one that gave you an autograph!
我的直觉可是敏锐得很！那家伙身上缺了某样东西——一旦缺了东西，就不能被称作完整的人了！嘀嗒！
My instincts are razor-sharp! That person is missing something... As soon as someone is missing something, they can no longer be called a complete person! Tick tock!
不完整的人，非常可怜！{NICKNAME}，我们得想办法帮他一把！
An incomplete person, how terrible! {NICKNAME}, we have to think of a way to help him!
身体不舒服吗？不对呀，在梦境里应该不会发生这种事……
Do you feel unwell? No, things like that shouldn't happen inside a dream...
很抱歉，各位。我现在突然感觉…说不上来…有些糟糕。
My apologies, everyone. I suddenly feel... I do not know how to put it into words, but... I feel terrible.
我实在不想扫大家的兴，但现在我恐怕需要一些…空间。
I do not wish to rain on your parade, but I think I may need a little... space.
是不是累着了…要不今天就到这儿吧？我们已经缠着莱斯利先生够久了。
Are you tired...? Shall we leave it here for today? We have pestered you enough already.
同意。实在不好意思，莱斯利先生。希望您能快点好起来。
I agree. I'm so sorry, Mr. Lesley. I hope that you feel better soon!
莱斯利•迪恩的眉眼纠缠在一起，开始轻微地抽搐。你的行为似乎让他陷入了无名的悲伤和痛楚。他好像感受到了你的存在，然后勉强睁开了眼睛。

Lesley Dean's brow scrunched up, and he began to twitch gently. Your actions seemed to have cast him into some unknown pain and sadness. Seeming to have sensed your presence, he forced himself to open his eyes.
…您还在啊，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}…抱歉，我不知道为什么会这样……
...You're still here, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}... My apologies. I don't know what is happening to me...
形容一下感觉，我来帮你。
Describe how you feel to me. Let me help you.
就在刚刚，毫无征兆的一瞬之间——我感觉自己的胸口被一枚炮弹击穿了，留下了一个无形的窟窿。
Just now, suddenly and without warning, it felt like... Like I'd been struck with a bullet that tunneled through my chest, leaving an invisible hole.
被击穿的一瞬间，我对自己的存在失去了实感，我感觉自己好像从未活过。
When it went through my chest, my existence seemed to lose all sense of reality. I started to feel like I'd never even been alive.
我脑海里的那些记忆都变得十分虚假…像是被什么人强行灌进去的，它们并不真正属于我。
All the memories in my mind suddenly seemed completely false... It was as if someone had forcibly implanted them inside me, like they didn't belong to me at all.
该怎么形容这种感觉？就好像…就好像我被丢进了一间画廊，墙上挂着许多画作，画中记录的都是我过去的人生经历——
How should I explain this feeling? It was like... Like I had been cast into a corridor of paintings, all of these paintings recording my past experiences...
——但不管呈现出来的画面多么惟妙惟肖，我依然觉得自己像是个局外人，一个擅自闯入这间画廊的旁观者。
...But no matter how vivid the scenery was in the picture, I still felt like a complete outsider... Like an onlooker trespassing in this gallery.
被记录下来的画面或许都确确实实的发生过，但无论如何我都无法把当下的自我和那些记忆联系起来。
Perhaps all of those images that were recorded did actually happen, but I just cannot seem to connect these memories to the person that I am now.
可能是我在这黄金的时刻滞留了太久，现实和梦境的边界开始变得模糊不清了……
Perhaps I have spent so long reveling in Golden Hour that the boundaries between dreams and reality are starting to blur...
也许是…可我不知道该向谁求助。
It may well be... But I don't know who I can ask for help.
我…我知道这听上去有些可怕，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}——但我好像忘记该怎么「醒来」了。
I... I know this may sound a little scary {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}... But I fear I may have forgotten how to "wake up."
就是…字面意思。我被困在了这里，不知道该如何出梦。
It's... well, I'm literally stuck in this place and totally clueless about how to leave this dream.
I'll try talking with The Family.
也许是个办法。真是奇怪，我之前居然从来都没有过自救的念头……
That could work. How strange! Never before had I had the idea of saving myself...
「现实，如此脆弱缥缈，像一株蒲公英，一吹即散。 」
"Reality, it is so frail and fleeting that a single breeze can scatter it like a dandelion in the wind."
这是我在《远星旧梦》那部电影里的台词，它非常贴合我当下的感受。
This was one of my lines in the movie Ancient Dreams of Distant Stars. It feels very appropriate in my current situation.
{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}！如果您能自由地在现实与梦境间往返，能否帮我咨询一下家族在现实世界的代理人？
{F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}! If you can move freely between dreams and reality, would you be able to consult with a Family representative in the real world?
我不想一直沉浸在梦里，卖力地扮演一个他人的影子…这未免太可悲了。
I do not wish to spend the rest of my days submerged in a dream, giving my all to play the part of someone else's shadow... I can imagine nothing more tragic.
{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}，我想自救。你会帮助我吗？
{F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}, I wish to save myself. Will you help me?
咦？莱斯利•迪恩？这个名字……
Huh? Lesley Dean? I know that name...
我想起来了，这名字不是那位已故的大明星吗？您说他需要帮助的意思是……
I remember! Isn't that the name of that superstar that passed away? When you say he needs help, you mean...
将莱斯利的情况转述给艾丽。
你将莱斯利•迪恩的情况转述给了艾丽…当然，除去了一些对你不利的「细节」。
You explained Lesley Dean's situation to Alley... Naturally, you excluded a few "details," for your own sake.
这可不妙…客人在梦中明确地感知到了异常，甚至做出了「忘记如何醒来」这种表述……
This is not good... A client clearly experienced an irregularity, to the point that they would describe it as "forgetting how to wake up..."
我会将情况转告给猎…啊，转告给家族的工作人员——相信他们后续会对此事进行妥善处理的。
I shall inform the Blood... Ah, I shall inform a member of The Family's staff. I'm sure they will handle this situation appropriately.
十分感谢您提供的信息，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}。
Thank you very much for providing this information, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}.
（艾丽刚才，是不是想说「猎犬家系」来着……）
(Was Alley about to say "the Bloodhound Family"?)
（有种不好的预感。最好回梦境里看看莱斯利的情况。）
(I have a bad feeling about this. I should return to the dream and check in on Lesley.)
莱斯利——有人想胁迫莱斯利先生！
It's Lesley — Someone is trying to take Mr. Lesley away!
有几个粗野的家伙突然从街边冲了出来，二话不说就要把他带走…他们往那个方向跑了！
These thugs came out of nowhere and came rushing down the street. They just took him away without saying a word... They ran that way!
I'm begging you. You have to help him!
你们是谁？你们想要什么？这里…这里可是梦境，在梦里抢走的东西是带不回现实世界的。
Who are you? What do you want? This... This is a dream. You can't take things you steal in a dream back to reality with you!
确认这就是梦境中的异常个体？
Are you certain this is the anomaly?
确认，他的存在已经违反了入梦协议上的多个条款。
I am certain. His existence here has already violated multiple conditions in the Dream Agreement.
明白——那就启动清除流程吧。
(This is bad... I have to stop them!)
不管是谁，阻挠家族执法活动的行为已经违反了入梦协议——和异常个体一并清除便是。
It does not matter. Interfering with Family enforcement is a breach of the Dream Agreement. They must be removed along with the anomaly.
感恩赞美您，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}！要不是您出手相救，我不知道那几个人会对我做些什么。
I am in your debt, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}! If you had not rescued me, I don't know what they would have done to me.
正好，您来之前，我听到那几个人提及一个房号——<color=#dbc291ff><unbreak>1007</unbreak></color>。会不会…会不会那就是我入梦的酒店客房？
Before you arrived, I overheard them mention a room number — <color=#dbc291ff>Room <unbreak>1007</unbreak></color>. Could that... Could that be the hotel room that I entered the dream from?
还有…还有他们口口声声念叨着的「梦境中的异常个体」，到底是怎么回事？
Also... Also they kept saying something about a "dream anomaly." What on earth could that mean?
我不知道该如何醒来，也记不起自己当时入住的房间号了。莫非在我身上真的发生了什么异变……
I don't know how to wake up and can't remember the room number I entered the dream from. Maybe there is something wrong with me...
也许那些人就是来唤醒你的。
Maybe they were here to wake you up?
真的吗？我不敢肯定…如果真相如此，他们为何要表现得如此粗暴？家族平日里可不是这么对待宾客的。
Really? I wouldn't be so certain... If that were the case, why would they have been so violent? The Family would not normally treat guests in such a way.
我…向您坦白，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}——我很害怕。我惧怕醒来后将要面对万分可怕的现实，也惧怕丢弃自己现在拥有的这簇意识。

I... I must confess to you, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}... I am very scared. I am scared that I will be faced with a terrifying reality when I awaken. I am also afraid to lose the consciousness that I have now.
至少现在，我还能看、能听、能感知到周身的事物…谁又知道在现实中我的身体经受了什么样的异变呢？
At least now, I can see, hear and sense the world around me... Who knows what kind of changes my body has undergone in reality?
就算知道了这只是一场梦…那又如何？这个梦境世界足够真实，足以让大多数人沉浸其中、找到活着的感觉，不是吗？
Even if I know that this is a dream... So what? This dream world is realistic enough for many people to become immersed and feel alive, is it not?
With every dream comes an awakening.
你不好奇现实里的状况吗？
Are you not curious about what's happening in reality?
莱斯利陷入一阵沉默。他微微低下头，细长的眉眼也随之耷拉下来；他绽露着奕奕神采的眼眸被悄悄藏起，英俊的面庞被青蓝色的阴影吞噬了一半。

Lesley falls silent for a moment. He lowers his head slightly, as his slender eyebrows droop. His eyes that radiate warmth and greatness become hidden from sight as his handsome face becomes half-devoured by the blue shadows.
…说我丝毫不关心自己在现实中的境况，那是在撒谎。
...It would be a lie to say that I was not concerned with my real self in the slightest.
我还记得，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}——上次在梦中和您见面时，我说过我想「自救」。
I still remember that last time I met you in the dream, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}... I said I wanted to "save myself."
您离开后，我稍微冷静了下来，然后展开了思考…我开始质疑这场幻梦是否真的需要被打破。
However, after you left, I calmed down and began to think in greater depth... I began to question whether or not this fantasy of mine really needed to be shattered.
我在这里能够拥有一切。所有我在现实当中失去的，梦境又再次馈赠予我。
I have everything that I could need here. Everything that I lost in the real world has been given to me once more in this dream.
梦境和现实；真实和虚假——应当分得那么清吗？我宁愿相信当下呈现在您眼前的才是我真实的模样…我不愿相信真实的自己已然变成一副疤痕满身的皮囊。

Dreams and reality, truth and falsehoods... Must we separate them so clearly? I am willing to believe that the person you see before you is my true form... I don't wish to believe that in reality. I am nothing but a deformed body, covered in scars.
我们终有一日要回归现实。
We all have to face reality eventually.
It is your life, your decision.
感谢您…您真的如同我的知己。
Thank you... You really are a dear friend.
莱斯利抬起头来。你从他涣散的目光中捕捉到一丝笃定。
Lesley raises his head. Inside his lax gaze, you catch a glimpse of determination.
<color=#dbc291ff><unbreak>1007</unbreak></color>号房…或许您能抽空去看看，那间客房里发生了什么？
<color=#dbc291ff>Room <unbreak>1007</unbreak></color>... Perhaps you could find time to take a look at what happened in there?
如果您恰巧获知了真相…是否要向我传达那个真相，就由您来决定吧。
If you happen to learn of the truth... I shall leave it up to you whether to share it with me or not.
眼下我正被漫无边际的焦虑纠缠着，无法冷静地思考未来。您是我的恩人，我愿意相信您的判断。
Right now, I find myself wracked with incessant anxiety. I cannot bring myself to calm down and carefully consider my future. You are my savior, so I trust your judgment.
现在，我最好先找个僻静的角落避避风头，避免再惹麻烦上身……
For now, I should find a discreet corner and lay low. I don't want to find myself in trouble again...
你找到它了——<unbreak>1007</unbreak>号客房，莱斯利•迪恩口中的房间。
You've found it... Room <unbreak>1007</unbreak>, the room that Lesley Dean mentioned.
房门背后可能就藏着那位「银河之星」的真相，他也许就是在这里陷入了无法苏醒的沉眠。
It is possible that the truth behind the Cosmic Star lies behind this door. Perhaps, he has fallen into a deep sleep from which he cannot wake.
你感到事情有些不对劲。如果在莱斯利•迪恩这样的大人物身上发生了什么变故，家族不可能置之不理。
You sense that something is not right. If something were to happen to a great man like Lesley Dean, The Family would not likely just ignore it.
Go and search for an attendant...
等等…事情有些不对劲。如果在莱斯利•迪恩这样的大人物身上发生了什么变故，家族不可能置之不理。
Wait... Something isn't right. If something had happened to a great man like Lesley Dean, The Family would not likely just ignore it.
结合家族在梦境中对待莱斯利•迪恩的态度，让他们掺和进来或许不是什么好事——前提是他们还没有采取行动。
Considering the way The Family treated Lesley Dean inside the dream, getting them involved may not be a good idea... That's if they haven't already taken action.
你尝试着转动门把手，实则心中没抱多少希望。
You try turning the door handle, with only a paltry amount of hope in your heart.
门没有上锁——但房间里也没有正在熟睡的客人。
The door is unlocked... But there is no guest to be found sleeping inside.
还是进房间里一探究竟吧……
电视上正在播放一部电影，快速的交叉剪辑和炫目的特效迅速侵占了你的视觉神经。
There is a movie playing on the television. Quick cuts and dazzling special effects quickly overwhelm your senses.
一艘艘太空战舰轰然炸裂的震撼镜头过后，莱斯利•迪恩英俊的脸庞以大特写的形式跳入画中。
After a series of shocking scenes featuring exploding warships, a close-up of Lesley Dean's handsome face takes the screen.
他扮演的似乎是一名战舰飞行员——大概是某位大部分人都记得其名字的、在那场旷日持久的星际能源战争中起到了重大作用的英雄人物。
It seems that he's playing a warship pilot... Likely a heroic figure that played a critical role in the long-drawn-out Interstellar Energy War, someone whose name people remember well.
你在台词中看到了他的名字，「克伦威尔舰长」。在这场剑拔弩张的对手戏中，他与某位狡黠的公司精英展开了言语上的交锋。
You see his name in the subtitles — "Captain Cromwell." In this tense showdown, he seems to be engaged in a war of words with a sly IPC elite.
「…这和公司开出的价码无关。第六舰队不会因为一份报价就改变立场，这违反我们的原则。」
"...This has nothing to do with the price IPC have offered. The Sixth Fleet's position on this matter cannot be changed by price, for it goes against our values."
「你看重契约和荣誉，我完全理解。但请再仔细考虑一下…你确信这艘战舰上的人都和你一样信仰坚定吗，舰长？」
"I understand that you value your contracts and your honor. But I implore you to think carefully about this... Are you sure that the people on your ship share your firm beliefs, Captain?"
「你没有家人，没有子女，没有牵挂——所以你可以为了自己的信念战斗，甚至战死。但他们呢？他们也都这么想吗？」
"You have no family, no children, no one to be concerned for... So, you battle for your beliefs. You would even take them to your grave. But what about them? Do they feel the same?"
「你大可把自己想象成一个烈士、英雄，但别忘了，归根结底你们只是一群雇佣兵，是拿钱办事的战争贩子。不要以为天堂给你们留了位置，舰长。」

"You imagine yourself a martyr and a hero, but do not forget... When it comes down to it, you are no more than just a group of mercenaries, warmongers that settle matters for credits. Do not think the afterlife has a place for you, captain."
「我不相信什么死后世界，汤普森先生，我也不认为你真的相信自己脱口而出的那个概念。」
"I have never believed in life after death, Mr. Thompson. Nor do I think that you believe in these ideas that you spout."
「你不了解我，更不了解我身边的人。你早该弄明白一件事——」
"You do not understand me, let alone the men by my side. There is one thing that you should have understood by now..."
「——坐在这里与你谈判的人之所以是我，并不是因为我是所谓的舰长；而是因为只有我能忍受你身上的铜臭味。实话告诉你，我现在得强忍着不啐在你的脸上。」

"...The reason that I am the person sitting here in discussion with you is not because I am the so-called captain, but because I am the only person that can withstand your obsession with money. Honestly, it's taking all of my strength not to spit in your face."
「我给你五分钟时间，带着你的废纸滚下我的船。告诉公司的董事，第六舰队总有一天会光顾庇尔波因特……」
"I will give you five minutes to take your paper scraps and get lost back to your ship. Tell the IPC directors, the Sixth Fleet shall visit Pier Point one day..."
There are more important things to do.
客房的地板上散落着一叠莱斯利•迪恩的照片写真，其中有几张还附着他的亲笔签名。
There is a stack of pictures of Lesley Dean on the hotel room floor, and some of them have his personal autograph on them.
真的有人会随身携带这么多自己的照片吗？你不由得在心里发问。莫非那位「银河之星」还是个自恋狂？
Would someone really carry this many pictures on their person? You can't help but ask yourself. Maybe this Cosmic Star is just self-obsessed?
起初，你很难理解为何在匹诺康尼这样的世界依然有纸质账单的存在。
At first, you could not understand why paper checks would still exist in a world like Penacony.
但在阅读了纸条上的内容后，你明白了：特地将那一串数字打印到纸上的行为，背后谕示着家族消磨殆尽的耐心。
But, having read what was written on the paper, you understood: Having this string of numbers printed on each note especially was a sign of The Family's dwindling patience.
住在这里的访客已经拖欠了接近两周的房款——看来家族对待赊账宾客的态度比你想象中更加宽容。
The guest staying in this room is already nearly two weeks behind on payments... It seems that The Family's attitude in treating overdue guests is more lenient than you imagined.
莱斯利•迪恩已经落魄到付不起房费了吗？你并不意外，毕竟过气明星破产的新闻几乎每天都会在星际和平播报中出现……

Is Lesley Dean's situation already so dire that he can no longer afford the room fee? This would not be surprising, as news about stars going bankrupt pops up in the Interastral Peace Broadcast almost daily...
在入梦装置底部躺着一个信封，信封上没有任何署名或标识。
There is an envelope lying in the bottom of the dream device, with no signatures or markings on it.
你将手指探入已经被划开的封口，随手抽出了一张泛黄的信纸。
You slide your fingers inside the already torn open envelope and pull out a yellow-tinged letter.
信纸上遍布密密麻麻的潦草字迹——过了好一会儿，联觉信标才成功地将它翻译出来。
The letter is covered in dense, scribbled writing... It took a while for the Synesthesia Beacon to be able to translate it.
(There is a lot of information in here. Let's summarize the main points...)
（住在这里的并不是莱斯利•迪恩。真正的莱斯利•迪恩早已死去——但他的记忆被以忆质的形式保存了起来。）
(The person that lives here is not Lesley Dean. The real Lesley Dean died long ago... However, his memories have been preserved as memoria.)
（一群莱斯利的影迷设法众筹买下了他的记忆，然后结伴来到了匹诺康尼。）
(A group of Lesley's fans had found a way to pool their funds and purchase his memories, taking it with them into Penacony.)
（然后他们集体入梦，打通了彼此之间的意识网络，通过联觉梦境重新塑造了莱斯利•迪恩的形象。）
(Then, they entered the dream as a group and connected their individual consciousness networks to recreate the image of Lesley Dean through the Synesthesia Dreamscape.)
（我在梦中遇到的莱斯利，虽说的确拥有属于那位银河之星的记忆，但终究只是一个被捏造出来的幻象而已……）
(The Lesley that I met in the dream, though infused with the memories of that Cosmic Star, was nothing more than just a fabricated fantasy...)
（那么，这个房间的主人大概也是……）
(So, the owner of this room must be...)
您、您是哪位？！住在这里的那位先生应该已经被…已经退房了才对啊？
Who... who are you!? The gentleman living in this room should have been... Ahem, he should have already checked out of this room?
难道是…难道是我刚才打扫的时候忘记锁门了？
Did... Did I forget to lock it after I finished cleaning?
糟、糟了——您、您看上去是位通情达理的{F#小姐}{M#先生}，求您别把这件事告诉家族的人！
Oh—Oh no! Pl—Please... you seem like a reasonable person... Please do not tell The Family about this!
不然的话，不然的话…他们肯定会判我工作失职、禁止我再入梦的！
Or else, or else... I know that they will deem me negligent of my duties and forbid me from ever dreaming again!
这个房间的客人去哪了？
Where did the guest in this room go?
那位先生已经离开匹诺康尼了，他……
This gentleman has already left Penacony. He...
说吧，我不会告诉别人的。
Tell me, I will not tell anyone.
…我、我知道了，我相信您不会把这件事说出去。
...I, okay. I believe that you will not tell anyone about this.
我听说那位客人是因为赊欠房费被强行赶走的。他好像已经在匹诺康尼住了很久了…但他看上去实在不像什么有钱人。
I heard that this client was forced to leave as he was behind on his room fees. He had been in Penacony for a very long time... But he didn't look like a rich man to me.
这个房间的客人去哪了？
Where did the guest in this room go?
那位先生已经离开匹诺康尼了，他……
This gentleman has already left Penacony. He...
说吧，我不会告诉别人的。
Tell me, I will not tell anyone.
…我、我知道了，恳请您不要把这件事说出去！不然的话，家族的人肯定会断定我工作失职、禁止我再入梦的！
...Okay. I beg that you please do not tell anyone about this! Or else I know that The Family will deem me negligent of my duties and forbid me from ever dreaming again!
我听说那位客人是因为赊欠房费被强行赶走的。他好像已经在匹诺康尼住了很久了…但他看上去实在不像什么有钱人。
I heard that this client was forced to leave as he was behind on his room fees. He had been in Penacony for a very long time... But he didn't look like a rich man to me.
有很多人为了体验「梦境乐园」不惜付出一切代价，哪怕闹得倾家荡产也要来到匹诺康尼……
Many people are willing to pay any price to experience the "Dreamscape." They go as far as to spend every penny to their name just to be in Penacony...
实话说，像他这样的客人我也不是第一次见，何况我在这里工作的时间还不算长。
Honestly, this is not my first time seeing a client like this, and I have not been here overly long.
那个，能说的我都已经告诉您了…不介意的话，能请您尽快离开吗？我要抓紧把这个房间收拾出来，后面还有客人要入住……
Um, I have told you everything I can... If you don't mind, could you please leave this place? I need to hurry up and tidy this room. There are other guests that wish to move in.
（这个房间的住客因为花光了积蓄，被强制退房了。）
(The client in this room was forced to leave having exhausted all of their savings.)
（结合之前看到的信件，他大概也是协助构建了莱斯利梦中形象的影迷之一吧？）
(With the letter I read before, I could assume that they were one of the fans that assisted in reconstructing the image of Lesley Dean inside the dream.)
（不知道这会不会对莱斯利造成影响…回梦境里看看吧。）
(I wonder if this will affect Lesley in any way... I should return to the dream and check on him.)

Um, I have told you everything I can... If you don't mind, could you please leave this place? I need to hurry up and tidy this room. There are other guests that wish to move in.
（这个房间的住客因为花光了积蓄，被强制退房了。）
(The client in this room was forced to leave having exhausted all of their savings.)
（结合之前看到的信件，他大概也是协助构建了莱斯利梦中形象的影迷之一吧？）
(With the letter I read before, I could assume that they were one of the fans that assisted in reconstructing the image of Lesley Dean inside the dream.)
（不知道这会不会对莱斯利造成影响…回梦境里看看吧。）
(I wonder if this will affect Lesley in any way... I should return to the dream and check on him.)
那双原本澈亮的眼眸失去了光彩，贴合他肌肤的小麦色泽也开始褪祛——先是黯淡，接着渐变至苍白。
Lesley's once glistening eyes suddenly lose their brilliance, as his face fades from the color of golden wheat to pale, then to pure white.
在他轮廓清晰的脖颈两侧，皮下血管的脉络开始凸显，跃动清晰可见。你好像突然理解了：于刹那间溃堤的绝望，抵得上百十载的星霜流年。

Veins on either side of his graceful neck begin to protrude as his pulse becomes visible to the naked eye. You suddenly realize that this moment of despair weighs on him as heavy as a century of suffering.
但沧桑之态并未持续太久。在最后一丝光芒溜走前，一团火苗重新点燃了他的瞳孔。
But his downtrodden demeanor does not last long. Just as the last glint of light is about to fade from his eyes, a new flame kindles in his pupils.
谢谢您，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}，真相对我来说非常重要。
Thank you, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}. The truth was extremely important to me.
我理解了…为什么那些本应属于我的记忆，看上去却那么遥远、陌生，我现在终于明白了。
I understand now... why those memories that were supposed to belong to me felt so distant and strange. I finally understand.
我是活在人们理想中的莱斯利•迪恩，但又和他本人相差甚远。我存在的目的就是取代他的位置，但我不可能真正成为他。
I am the Lesley Dean that exists inside other people's ideals, yet I am far from being the man himself. The reason for my existence is to take his place, but I could never become him.
为了维系这幅躯壳的存在，很多人都在持续地付出代价。那代价包括财力、时光、生命…甚至「自我」。
Many people are still paying a price to maintain the existence of this body of mine. They are paying with their finances, their time, their lives... and even their "selves."
但是，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}——我想知道…一个逝者的念想，值得让还活着的人付出如此高昂的代价吗？
However, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}, I wish to know... Do you think that treasuring the memories of someone who has already passed is worth such a lofty price to the living?
It is not, not at all.
果然，我和您的看法一致。
I knew you would feel the same as I do.
所以我不想袖手旁观。我会出现在这里，并非出自我个人的意愿…何时「来」，我决定不了；何时「去」，我想自己做主。
So, I do not wish to sit idly by. It was not my personal will that I would appear in this place... Though I could not decide when I "came," I would like to make my own decision on when I "go."
That is up to them to decide.
您说的没错，这是他们自己的选择。但…但我不想袖手旁观。
You are correct. This is their own decision. But... But I do not wish to sit idly by.
我会出现在这里，并非出自个人的意愿——何时「来」，我决定不了；何时「去」，我想自己做主。
It was not my personal will that I would appear in this place... Though I could not decide when I "came," I would like to make my own decision on when I "go."
{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}，您愿意再帮我一次吗？我想<color=#dbc291ff>唤醒那些创造出我的人们</color>。
{NICKNAME}, would you help me once more? I wish to <color=#dbc291ff>summon the people that created me</color>.
I need some time to think...
当然，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}。您不必给自己压力，毕竟这件事与您并无干系。
Of course, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}. Please do not put any pressure on yourself, as this matter has nothing to do with you, after all.
可惜只凭我自己无法改变任何事…我会在这里等您回心转意。
It is just a shame that I cannot change anything with my power alone... I shall wait here for your change of heart.
无论梦境多么甘甜，沉溺其中也只会带来窒息的结局。该帮他们回归现实了。
No matter how sweet the dream, delving in too deep will only lead to suffocation. I should help them face their realities.
我本想表现得更热情些，但不知为何…从刚才起我便感到一阵眩晕恶心，打不起十分的精神。希望您能理解……

I was hoping that I could muster more of a friendly attitude, but I don't know why... I have been feeling dazed and nauseous since what happened before. I just cannot seem to muster any energy. I hope you can understand...
在我的家乡，他们认为善解人意的品质是来自神祇的馈赠——我敢打赌，您生来就拥有了这份礼物。
In my hometown, we believe that the ability to be empathetic to others is a gift bestowed by the gods... I would wager that this is a gift you have had since birth?
您会回来找我，这是不是意味着…您对我在现实中的境遇已经有所了解了？
The fact that you have come back to see me, does this mean... That you have come to some understanding of my situation in reality?
您会回来找我，这是不是意味着…您对我在现实中的境遇已经有所了解了？
The fact that you have come back to see me, does this mean... That you have come to some understanding of my situation in reality?
请您告诉我实情吧，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}。
我…我想我已经做好心理准备了——不管真相有多令人难以接受。

I... I don't have any money at all. My mom cut off my allowance ever since she caught me secretly renting tapes last time...

罗伯特…刚才那一瞬间，我和他的感官似乎被连接在了一起。
Robert... I feel like our senses were linked for a moment then...
他的母星是个贫瘠的地方，自星际能源战争之后就一直受到公司的制裁。他们观看外星电影的唯一手段，就是从走私商手里高价租赁录像带。

His home planet is an impoverished land that has been under IPC sanctions ever since the Interstellar Energy War. The only way that they are able to watch movies is by renting tapes from smugglers at a high price.
哈里是罗伯特最好的朋友，他就像是罗伯特的兄长。我能感受到罗伯特对他强烈的依赖……

《紫雨》…哈里最喜欢的就是《紫雨》了。我们约好的，总有一天要亲眼见到莱斯利•迪恩本人，要让他给我们签名……
Purple Rain... Harry's favorite movie is Purple Rain. We promised, one day we would meet the real Lesley Dean and get an autograph from him...
…现实点吧，罗伯。我们活在一个没有希望的世界里，什么星际旅行、银河之星，那些名词都和我们无关。

我不想让你接触那些东西，就是因为……

你根本就不明白，什么才是美好的事物！你们没有一个人明白，只有他……

…无比乐观，无比坚强的哈里，却在这个年纪遭受了意外，结束了生命。
...Harry, so optimistic, ever strong, but also so ill-fated... to have his life cut short by an accident at his age...
失去挚友的罗伯特濒临崩溃，他对自己生命中的一切都感到愤怒、不公、绝望。他开始寻找方式逃避…他找到了「我」。

Having lost his best friend, Robert was on the verge of collapse. He felt anger and rage towards everything around him. Just injustice and despair. So, he began to search for a way to escape, in doing so... He found "me."

罗伯特的嘴角微微上翘，似乎在尽力向镜头递交一个令人满意的笑容；但那双深邃空洞的眼眸轻易地出卖了他——他沈溺了。
Robert's mouth is slightly upturned at the corners, as if he is trying his hardest to give a satisfactory smile to the person behind the camera, but his empty eyes betray him... He is drowning.

He began a journey of losing himself, trying to find the Lesley Dean that exists in his ideals. What he never realized was... Though he thought he had been fighting back all this time, he was really just running away.

Running away from the shadow that kept him trapped... Running away from the truth that his best friend had died. He thought that if he only found me and fulfilled their dream, then the dark shadow of their past would disappear.
逝去的挚友从始至终都在纠缠着他。他以为只要找到了我，实现了他们儿时的梦想，往日的影子就会消散。
His lost friend has been haunting him this whole time. He thought that if he only found me and fulfilled their dream, then the dark shadow of their past would disappear.
他把自己封锁在只有「莱斯利•迪恩」的世界里，不去面对真正的痛苦源头。

摁下电视机开关按钮的一瞬间，莱斯利•迪恩慵懒的嗓音戛然而止，余响散逸至周身的虚空之中。沉默笼罩了这片心灵空间，此时的静谧亦是一种聒噪。

看来姬莲小姐也曾是一位疯狂的影迷，甚至在「我」离开之后还维持着那份狂热。不知道她有没有意识到，这份病态的热爱已经开始摧残她的生活了。

But, they are all a part of me. I cannot shy away from their existence. I hope that everyone's imperfections can be understood... After all, if we live under a magnifying glass every day, sooner or later we will be incinerated by the rays of the sun.
莱斯利•迪恩是完美的。他没有缺陷，他……
Lesley Dean is perfect. He has no flaws, and he...

But I did come to understand one thing: Those slanderous voices outside had not been a personal attack on me for a long time. They gradually evolved into a vicious cycle of perpetual opposition... A battle that was destined to never have a victor.

任何诋毁莱斯利•迪恩的人都是我的敌人。他们是恶棍，他们……
Anyone who slanders the name of Lesley Dean is my enemy. They are villains, and they...
我深爱着他。我深爱着他。我深爱着他。
I love him deeply. I love him. I love him so much.

没有人应该过那种生活…还是尝试着去拿回那些本就属于你的东西吧，姬莲小姐。
No one should live a life like this... You should work to try and reclaim the things in life that are truly yours, Ms. Jillian.
我愿意为他放弃一切。我的财产，我的生活，我……
I would give anything for him. My money, my life, my...
他是属于我的…他是属于我的…他是属于我的……

我想我们找到源头了，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}。
I think we have found the source, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}.
我感受到了，打她心底喷涌出来的那股欲念…是强烈的、令人畏惧的占有欲。
I can sense it, a powerful desire that came pouring from the base of her heart... It's powerful, a terrifying desire for possession...
那股欲念已经在她身上扎根太深，单靠我一人没法应付。
The roots of this desire have grown too deep. I will not be able to handle this alone.

{F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}, will you take action? The negative memes affecting Ms. Jillian have grown so powerful that we will only be able to dispel them with an even greater power.
