你想象着桂乃芬街头直播卖艺的模样，以哈努兄弟的二头身材轻松做出了一套丝滑的倒立、回旋、空翻小连招——十分！
Picturing how Guinaifen does her street performances, you easily pull off a handstand, a pirouette, and a somersault with Brother Hanu's short body. Ten out of ten!
精彩，真精彩！小兄弟，没想到你居然这么有本事！
Amazing! Spectacular! I'm blown away by your talent, buddy!
…很显然，她完全没能理解你想要传达的意思。试试别的法子吧……
...Obviously, you two have got your wires crossed. Let's try another way...
Act like you are playing Celestial Jade.
你盘起短小的双腿坐在地上，开始模仿起青雀聚精会神地打帝垣琼玉时的动作…摸牌、码牌、胡牌……
You sit cross-legged on the floor and imitate Qingque's focused face when playing Celestial Jade... You draw a tile, arrange your tiles, and win the game...
你、你居然也是帝垣琼玉牌手？！可惜现在就只有我们两个，等找到机会，我们一定要凑齐一桌打牌！
Y—You're a Celestial Jade player too!? It's a shame there are only two of us here. Let's get two more players to play with us next time!
…很显然，她完全没能理解你想要传达的意思。试试别的法子吧……
...Obviously, you two have got your wires crossed. Let's try another way...
你放弃了——无论你怎么做，都无法让青雀意识到你就是她的{F#好姐妹}{M#好兄弟}{NICKNAME}。你必须想别的办法把她营救出去……
You gave up. No matter what you did, you failed to make Qingque realize you were her companion, {NICKNAME}. You need to come up with another way to get her out.
一个念头突然从你脑中闪过——还记得之前来找你续房的奇怪二人组吗？机甲牛仔波提欧和纯美骑士银枝？
A thought suddenly flashes through your mind. Still remember that strange duo who requested your service to extend their stay before? Boothill the cyborg cowboy and Argenti the Knight of Beauty?
那两个人此刻或许正在梦境中展开调查…或许他们能来客串下救火队员？
Those two might be conducting an investigation in the Dreamscape right now... They can probably help out.
事态紧急，但你没法在变身的情况下掏出手机联系他们。一是因为哈努兄弟的手实在太小，二是因为我们根本没做相关的动画。

The situation's pressing, but you can't take out your phone to contact them when you're in Brother Hanu's body. It's partly because Brother Hanu's hands are too small, and partly because the dev team didn't make the animation for that part.
焦虑地等待了一阵之后，波提欧和银枝来到了你的面前……
After waiting anxiously for a while, Boothill and Argenti arrive...
挚友——我们收到了你的求救消息，然后便以骑士之速赶来了。
My friend, we got your call for help and rushed over here at the speed of a knight.
骑士之速是什么玩意？巡海游侠才是速度的象征！
Speed of a knight? The Galaxy Rangers are the fastest!
…等会儿，我跟你争这个干嘛？{NICKNAME}，你说你找到那个「组织」了？在哪？
...Hold on. Why am I even competing with you over this? {NICKNAME}, you said you found that "organization." Where is it?
…宝了个贝的，哪来的这么多皮皮西人？这场面我可没见过。
...The fork. I've never seen so many Pepeshi in the same place before.
啊，这是多么…多么令人费解的景象。即便博爱如伊德莉拉，恐怕也不会将目光投向此处吧……
Ah, what a perplexing sight. I'm afraid not even the altruistic Idrila would cast her gaze upon this place...
等会儿，所以{NICKNAME}的意思是…这群皮皮西就是我们在找的那帮恶棍？
Wait, so what {NICKNAME} means is... these Pepeshi are the thugs we're looking for?
我验过了，这就是个邪恶组织。
I've verified it — this is an evil organization.
他们把我的朋友抓走了！
让我再瞅一眼…「邪恶组织经常倾巢出动，无差别地袭击街上的行人——主要犯罪方式包括：用钝器敲击膝盖、强迫下跪、偷走鞋子和帽子……」

Let me take another look at them... "Cults often act in groups and attack pedestrians indiscriminately. The crimes they mainly commit include hitting people's knees with blunt objects, forcing them to kneel, and stealing their shoes and hats..."
这么说来，波提欧兄弟的帽子刚才也是被一个皮皮西人抢走的。
By the way, Boothill's hat was stolen by a Pepeshi just now too.
真没想到啊，这群小东西！一个个看着人模人样的，背后竟然一点人事都不干！
I can't believe it! These little rascals! They seem decent but are wicked deep down!
跟我走！今儿个我就要为民除害，给这帮危险分子留个教训！
Follow me! I'm going to do the world a favor by teaching these dangerous criminals a lesson!
喂喂喂，那边的小可爱们，看这儿看这儿！
Hey, you lil' fudgehead over there! Look here!
我去，这又是从哪冒出来的妖孽？！
Shoot, who's this monster that popped up out of nowhere!?
太…太可怕了！世间竟然存在着如此面目可憎的巨人，而且还是两个！矲主，宽恕他们……
Soooo... scary! It's unbelievable there exist such hideous giants in this world. And there are two of them! Master, please pardon them...
「面目可憎的巨人」？多么丑陋的称呼！我不能放任你们侮辱我的挚友和波提欧兄弟。
"Hideous giants"? What a repulsive title! I can't let you insult my friend and Boothill here.
从你嘴里说出来，倒也正常…
Why am I not surprised to hear this from you...
原来你是这样理解的吗？
Is that how you interpret it?
我宣布，你们到处祸害无辜路人的日子到头了！乖乖把人质交出来，然后给我滚出匹诺康尼——照着我说的做，保你们平安！
I declare that your days of bullying innocent people are now over! Release the hostage, then get out of Penacony. Your safety will be guaranteed if you do as I say!
嚯嚯，好嚣张的邪恶巨人……
Woah, what an aggressive and evil giant...
但别忘了，在矲主的祝福加持下，我们「四尺圣堂」可是战无不胜的！弟兄姐妹们，给我敲碎这些恶徒的膝盖！
Don't forget that we, the Four-Foot Hall, are invincible with the master's blessing! Everyone, crush the knees of these villains!
…宝了个贝的，他们还想来真的？
...Holy forkeroni. Do they really want to get physical?
小心，挚友！请站在我和波提欧兄弟的身后。
Be careful, my friend! Please stand behind Boothill and me.
狂热的「四尺圣堂」教徒们奋力跳起来敲打波提欧和银枝的膝盖……
The zealous followers of Four-Foot Hall jump with all their might and strike at Boothill and Argenti's knees...
…但是收效甚微，如同你在游戏中用普通系的技能攻击钢系的对手。
...But with little success. Imagine using a Normal-Type attack on a Steel-Type opponent in a game.
呜哇！疼疼疼，我的手好疼……
Ouch! It's so painful! My hands hurt...
为、为什么？！这些巨人，居然免疫了我们灌注了信仰的攻击？
Wh—What's going on!? How come these giants are immune to our faith-infused attacks?
看来，纯美骑士的信念在你们之上。
Looks like the belief of the Knights of Beauty reigns supreme over yours.
「四尺神王」已然发话…祂令我们不要慌张，要以理解与敬畏之姿面对我们的敌人。
The Four-Foot Aeon has spoken... They urged us not to panic, but to face our enemies with understanding and respect.
污秽的巨人族啊，你们因何要打破这「四尺圣堂」的宁静？你们受何种殃孽驱使，要将苦难传播给这世上的人？
You filthy giants, why must you disrupt the peace of the Four-Foot Hall? What kind of vile belief compels you to spread misery to the people of this world?
说话一套一套的，看来你就是管事的了？
Given your eloquence, you must be the one in charge here, right?
我可不想跟你们这帮小可爱废话！我给你们一分钟的时间，把人质交出来，否则后果自负！
I don't want to waste my breath arguing with you little forkers! Hand over the hostage in one minute, or you'll suffer for it!
无可救药的恶徒，背负原罪的邪恶巨人……
我本想向「四尺神王」祈祷，请求祂对你们的宽恕…但无奈你们已经病入膏肓，无药可医。
I wanted to pray to the Four-Foot Aeon and ask for their forgiveness for you, but you are beyond redemption.
既然如此，那便只能以雷霆手段显我「四尺圣堂」的慈悲心肠了……
If so, I have no choice but to adopt a more aggressive measure to manifest the kindness of the Four-Foot Hall...
<size=28>Close the door and release the Dreamjolt Troupe!</size>
哎哟喂，没想到这帮家伙还带了真家伙！
Woah, I didn't see this coming!
波提欧兄弟——有机会与你并肩作战、铲除奸邪，我倍感荣幸！
Boothill, I'm truly honored to stand by your side in this fight against evil!
In the end, we still have to resort to violence...
望着楼下群魔乱舞的皮皮西信徒们，你突然陷入了沉思……
As you look down at the crowd of Pepeshi cultists below, you find yourself lost in thought...
身为匹诺康尼的大救星，遐迩闻名的银河球棒侠，你真的没法独自解决眼前这个*小麻烦*吗？
As the savior of Penacony and the renowned Galactic Baseballer, surely you can handle this small issue on your own, right?
说不定他们藏了什么秘密武器。
Perhaps they are concealing some secret weapons.
好好好，你说的都对，谨慎{F#小姐}{M#先生}。
Alright, alright. You're totally right about that, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} Cautious.
I'm not that stupid to take on twenty of them alone...
越是到了关键时刻越需要理性的思考。干得漂亮，{NICKNAME}。
The more critical the moment, the more important it is to think rationally. Good job, {NICKNAME}.
组成三巨头再上不好吗？
Wouldn't it be awesome to team up as a trio before diving into battle?
看来你深谙取胜之匙——没错，在这个时代，组成银河战舰才是赢家正道。
You have grasped the key to victory. That's right, the key to winning in this era is to combine yourselves into a cosmic battleship before crushing your opponents.
现在，你要做的就是等待。
Now, all that's left is to wait.
怎、怎么会这样？矲主的神通力，在理应外强中干的巨人族面前居然显得不堪一击……
H—How could this happen? The all-mighty master seems so powerless against those giants, who are supposed to be weak despite their size...
没道理啊，这…这根本就说不通，矲主大人明明应该是「四尺神王」的令使，世间所有袖珍族的英明领袖……
This... doesn't make sense. The master is the Emanator of the Four-Foot Aeon and a capable leader of all diminutive races in the world.
…什么神王啊领袖的，你们都被这家伙忽悠瘸了吧？
...Aeon? Leader? I guess you guys have been taken for a ride by this dude.
呵，顺带一提，我刚才的提议还没过期。再给你们四十秒，赶紧把人质交出来！然后滚出我的视线，不然就等着挨枪子儿吧！
Heh, by the way, my offer just now still stands. I'll give you another <unbreak>40</unbreak> seconds to release the hostage and get out of my sight. Otherwise, I'll let you taste my bullets!
唔…此、此乃我等修行路上的小小障碍，不要让这几个卑劣的恶徒阻拦了你们开悟的道路！
Um... Th—This is just a small hurdle on our path to cultivation. Don't let these despicable thugs impede your enlightenment!
只、只要能再多收一些会费…没错，只要「四尺圣堂」的经费再充足一些，打败这些巨人族就根本不在话下！
I—I just need to raise the membership fee... That's right. As long as the Four-Foot Hall has sufficient funds, we'll surely be able to finish off these giants!
看到了吧？他只是想骗钱。
Hear that? He's just after your money.
谁、谁让你提奥帝叔叔了！快闭嘴！
Wh—Why did you mention Uncle Oti! Zip it!
这…这是真的吗，矲主大人？「四尺圣堂」真的只是你为了敛财打的幌子吗？
Is... Is that true, master? Is the Four-Foot Hall just your scheme to scam our money?
还不打算动起来啊？时间不多咯！
Still not moving? There isn't much time left for you!
把小命搭在这儿可太不值了，先跑为敬！
It's not worth it to risk my life here. Let me run while I still can!
什么「四尺神子」，原来根本就是个冒牌的令使…退会，我要退会！
What "Four-Foot Follower"? He's just a fake emanator... I want a refund for my membership!
一群信仰不坚定的假信徒！跑吧，尽管跑，你们休想从我这儿拿回一分钱的会费——休想！
A bunch of weak-willed fake followers! Run all you want, you will never get a dime from me. Never!
早知道那个有牌瘾的女人是个不祥之兆…这、这回就算你们赢了，下次再遇见我可别想全身而退！你们都给我记住了！
I knew that girl with Celestial Jade addiction was a bad omen... Even though you win this time, don't think you will have it easy again next time we cross paths! Keep that in mind!
罗伊罗伊飞速逃离了你们的视线，你对着历代无名客发誓，他绝对是你见过的步频最快的皮皮西人……
Royroy flees at lightning speed and disappears. You swear to your Nameless predecessors that he is definitely the fastest Pepeshi you have ever seen...
{F#好姐妹}{M#好兄弟}！我就知道，你肯定会来救我的！
My friend! I knew you would come to my rescue!
刚才你们痛扁那个恶棍教主的过程，我全都看见了——那边的两位不愧是你找来的帮手！看他们这身行头就知道，肯定是专业人士。
I saw the whole thing when you guys were teaching that evil cult leader a lesson. The two helpers of yours are really something! I can tell they are pros just by looking at their attire.
Boothill and Argenti, this is Qingque.
It's my pleasure to meet you, Miss Qingque.
哟，看样子这位小妹还是仙舟人？你好啊。
Huh, you from the Xianzhou, miss? Hello there!
青雀——这是波提欧和银枝。
Qingque, this is Boothill and Argenti.
It's my pleasure to meet you, Miss Qingque.
哟，看样子这位小妹还是仙舟人？你好啊。
Huh, you from the Xianzhou, miss? Hello there!
真是太感谢你们啦。回想一下，我之前可真是蠢得离谱…那条邀请信息明显有猫腻，我怎么就没看出来呢？果然是被小便宜给蒙蔽了双眼。
I owe you guys a big one! Looking back, I realize I was really foolish... That invitation message was so shady. Why didn't I notice it? I was totally blinded by greed.
如此说来，波提欧兄弟——轻易放那个所谓的「矲主」离开，是否会成为隐患？伊德莉拉在上，我绝不想放任一个邪恶组织的头子在外逍遥…他甚至可能找到机会卷土重来。

Speaking of which, could Boothill's going easy on that "master" become an unseen misfortune? With Idrila's blessing, it's against my wish to let an evil leader go unpunished... He might even make a comeback when the opportunity arises.
放一万个心吧，银枝兄弟！那家伙的名字和面相我都已经记住了。在星海的这一片混，被巡海游侠惦记上的人，就别想着能睡上安稳觉了！
Relax, Argenti! I've got his name and face locked in my memory. Anyone who's on the radar of a Galaxy Ranger can never sleep well at night as long as they are in this part of the starry skies!
哈…这趟匹诺康尼之旅可太刺激了。早知道会遭这罪，我还不如留在司里摸摸鱼、打打牌呢……
Ha, this trip to Penacony has been quite a ride. If I'd known I would have gone through this ordeal, I would have just stayed back home and slacked off...
对了，{NICKNAME}，要不要一起拍个照片？咱们这神奇的四人组合，可以算得上是稀世罕见了吧？
How about we take a photo together, {NICKNAME}? The universe might never see another group more peculiar than us!
绝好的主意，青雀女士。我的匹诺康尼之旅也已接近尾声，此前也正为没能带走配得上「纯美」的纪念之物而感到烦恼。
That's a brilliant idea, Miss Qingque. As my journey on Penacony is coming to an end, I've had a hard time finding a souvenir worthy of the Beauty.
…拍照？行，但是记得拍完了别到大街上招摇，我的大头照可还在公司的通缉令上呢！
...Photo? No problem, but just don't show it around in public. My photo is still on the IPC's wanted posters!
Have you no sense of decency!?
Can you guys bear the responsibility!?
一定要来泰科铵巡演啊！
Please come to Taikiyan for your tour!
Hee-hee, the tip is quite accurate...
I must take more photos this time...
"...You want me to make a pancake with carp?"
（糟了，青雀不会要出事吧…得加快速度！）
(Oh no, did something bad happen to Qingque? I have to move faster!)
啊，一位面生的朋友…想必你也是来投入「四尺圣堂」的怀抱的吧？
Ah, a friend with an unfamiliar face... I assume you've come to seek the embrace of the Four-Foot Hall, haven't you?
呵呵…我不得不承认，朋友——你很有性格。
Heh... I must admit, my friend, you possess quite a distinct character.
无妨，你可以多花些时间观察、思考。很快你就会发现，「四尺圣堂」是一片洁净的乐土，是每个彷徨灵魂追求的归宿。
But no worries, take your time to observe and contemplate. Soon enough, you will realize that the Four-Foot Hall is a true promised land, a place where all wondering souls can find solace.
你会逐渐理解我们的使命和其重要性，进而成为「四尺神子」的一员。我，罗伊罗伊，作为「四尺之神」的令使，会引领所有人走上救赎的命途，反抗巨人族的压迫。

Eventually, you will understand the significance of our mission and become a Four-Foot Follower. As an Emanator of the Four-Foot Aeon, I, Royroy, will guide you on the path of salvation against the oppression of the giants.
四下看看吧，朋友！给自己一点时间，给心灵开一扇窗，让信仰的光辉沁润你疲惫的灵魂……
Feel free to look around, my friend! Allow yourself some time, open the window to your heart, and let your weary soul bask in the light of faith...
皮皮西人的口气如此热情真挚，毫无表演的痕迹——一时间，你觉得他或许真的笃信着自己的布道。
This Pepeshi's words sound warm and sincere, devoid of any pretense... For a moment, you wonder if he genuinely believes in his sermon.
为了防止被洗脑，你最好还是离他远点……
To avoid being influenced, it would be wise to keep your distance from him...
…干嘛？没看见我在打牌啊？一边凉快——
...Stop disturbing me! Can't you see I'm in the middle of a game? Just get out of...
——哎哟，原来是{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}！真不好意思，我刚才打牌打得入神了，没注意到是您。
...Ooooh! It's you, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}! I'm so sorry! I was so absorbed in the game that I didn't realize it was you.
那个，呃，您不会…不会是来叫我回去上班的吧？您看，我现在手气正旺，这么宝贵的运势，想必像您这样善解人意的{F#女士}{M#先生}一定不会忍心把它割断吧……

You... I mean... you're not here to get me back to work, right? Look, I've got a winning streak going on here, and I'm sure a thoughtful and caring {F#lady}{M#gentleman} like you wouldn't want to interrupt it...
我不会，但说不定老奥帝会。
I wouldn't, but maybe Old Oti would.
那就让前台一直空着吧。
Sure, let's just leave the reception desk unattended.
好到值得为它丢了工作？
Is it worth losing your job?
哎、哎哟，我就说句玩笑话，您别当真啊！大堂不可一日无主，现在前台的投诉热线说不定已经被打爆了……
H—hey! I was just messing around! Don't take it so seriously! We can't leave the lobby unattended. I bet the complaint line at the reception desk is blowing up...
我这就收拾收拾，准备回现实去……
Well, I'll pack up and return to reality...
喂喂喂！你走了，我们怎么办？
Hey! Hold on! What are we supposed to do if you leave?
就是就是！没听过那个经典段子吗？「三缺一，狗东西；鸽牌局，遭雷劈」！
Exactly! You know the saying, right? "Bounce from the game, bad luck be your fate!"
…装什么装，你不也是两个系统时之前才学会打牌的吗？那段子也是你现搜的吧，别想靠这个唬住我！
...Who are you trying to fool? You only learned this game a couple of system hours ago! And you just looked up that line, didn't you? Don't try to bluff me with that!
帝垣琼玉在匹诺康尼很火？
Is Celestial Jade popular in Penacony?
不能说是非常火爆，但也算得上闻所未闻——多亏了那位从仙舟远道而来的少女棋士，是她教会了我们如此有趣的游戏！
It's not like it's all the rage, but it's definitely something novel! Thanks to that young lady who came all the way from the Xianzhou! She introduced us to this fun game!
啊，说来也巧，我刚入梦不久就遇到了一位从仙舟远道而来的少女棋士，她极力向我推荐「帝垣琼玉」，在座的几位也一下就被这游戏给吸引住了。

Oh, it was just pure luck! Right after I dived into the Dreamscape, I met a young lady proficient in the game from the distant Xianzhou. She highly recommended this game called "Celestial Jade," and we got hooked right away.
我不管，我还没打够。你如果要走，那就把{F#她}{M#他}留下来陪我们打牌！
I don't care! I'm not done having fun yet! If you're leaving, ask {F#her}{M#him} to stay and play with us!
呃…{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，您觉得呢？这牌桌三缺一的滋味确实不好受啊，您如此善解人意……

I bid you farewell, General Huaiyan.

天呐！彦卿师父不会想把剑送给云璃师父吧？

You're such the humorist, Yunli. This was the sword I won as the ringmaster. I was just thinking that as you were leaving, you would not see it for a while. I brought it so you could touch it one last time and ease your regrets.
我天，彦卿真的爱剑如命！
Wow, Yanqing really does love that sword more than his life!
我给云璃师父翻译翻译：「欸嘿，这是我的剑，不给」。
Let me translate for you, Master Yunli: "Nuh-uh, this is my sword, and you can't have it."
啧…这小子，有我当年的风范。
Tsk... This boy, he's just like me at this age.
彦…卿…小…弟，你这算是伤口上撒盐吧？！啊？！
You... Yanqing! You just wanted to rub salt in my wounds! Huh?
听好了，等你休养好了，记得带着剑来朱明找我。到时候我会给你打一柄好剑作为赔礼…不过嘛，规矩你懂的，你得与我以剑相会，堂堂正正地赢下它。怎么样？不许不来！

You listen to me. Once you've finished resting, bring that sword to the Zhuming and find me. I will forge a good sword as apology... However, you know the rules. You must meet me with steel and win the sword fair and square. Got that? It's a promise!
经此一役，彦卿心头也有了远游增广见闻的打算。既然云璃姑娘邀请，那么我们一言为定。
Recent events have inspired me to travel afar and expand my knowledge of this life. As you so kindly invited me, Yunli, it's a promise.
就在朱明仙舟客人将行之际，灵砂也正巧来到港口。
Lingsha happens to arrive at the harbor just as the Zhuming guests are about to leave.
不久之后，朱明的客人就登上星槎离开了港口，灵砂大人也回到了丹鼎司。
And just like that, the Zhuming guests boarded their starskiff and left the port, and Lingsha returned to the Alchemy Commission.
一艘星槎静静地停靠过来，从舱门里走出来的正是你们熟悉的符玄太卜。
A starskiff silently pulls to a stop as the familiar figure of Master Diviner Fu Xuan emerges from the hatch.
本座专注于卜算种种事端因果，却没有算到回到仙舟，竟然有如此多的人夹道迎接。果然，这罗浮仙舟还是不能少了本座呀。

I have been devoted to divining the cause and effect outcomes of so many things, yet I never divined that there would be so many people here to meet me on my return to the Xianzhou. I see the Xianzhou Luofu really just can't go on without me.
符太卜，我们在这等你很久了。
Diviner Fu, we have been waiting a long time.
哼，有劳各位迎接，本座回来了。
Hmm, thank you for the warm welcome. I have returned.
Diviner Fu, what brings you back here?
啊？所以，你们在这里站着，跟本座，嗯…一点关系都没有吗？
Huh? So, you all standing here has... absolutely nothing to do with me?
这个粉毛矮个子是谁呀？
Who's this sassy, lost, short pink-haired girl?
哈？本座可不能当作没听见。
Huh? I cannot pretend I didn't hear that.
彦卿解释了仙舟贵客的送行经过，以及完全没想到符玄大人此时回来的「事实」。
Yanqing explained about seeing off the Xianzhou guests and the "reality" that they had no idea that Fu Xuan was returning.
事情的大致经过，本座已经了解了。虽然这是巧合，但是你们出现在这里也是不争的事实。不如我们各退一步…「各退一步」这词有点不合适，就当你们在迎接本座凯旋吧。

I understand what has happened. Although this was merely a coincidence, it is still a fact that you are all here now. How about you meet me halfway... "Meet me halfway" is a strange expression for this, but why don't we pretend you were awaiting my triumphant return?
话说彦卿就算了，你们在罗浮上待了这么久，就没意识到本座不在罗浮吗？
Actually, Yanqing, forget it. You have all been on the Luofu for all this time, and you didn't even notice that I wasn't here?
我注意到了，太卜司空落落的。
I noticed, the Divination Commission has been so empty and lonely.
很好，看来你是一个真正关心罗浮的人。
Very good. I see you truly care about the Luofu.
要是有符玄大人哪有这么多事！
If you were here, we would never have had so many issues!
正是，要是本座在这里，哪里会出这么多岔子！
Precisely. There's no way so many things would go wrong with me around!
完全没有注意到，以为你还在…
I didn't notice at all. I thought you were still here...
你听见了吗？刚才有什么东西碎裂开的声音…那是本座为罗浮仙舟操劳的心。
Did you hear that? It's a sound of something smashing to pieces... That was my heart thinking about working on the Xianzhou Luofu again.
要不是我在玉阙仙舟应对各种质询，景元他…算了，这件事不提也罢。
If I didn't have so many inquiries to deal with on the Xianzhou Yuque, then Jing Yuan would... Forget it, it's not important.
符玄大人累了吧，我这里还有苏打豆汁儿，给您接风洗尘！
You must be tired, Master Diviner Fu. I have some mung bean soda. Please take one cup as a welcome back gift!
谢谢，心意我领了。不过我对饮品还是有些挑剔，正常罗浮人应该是没人喝苏打豆汁儿的，待会本座请你品一下星芋啵啵，你自会明白。

Thank you. That is very kind. However, I am quite picky when it comes to drinks. Almost no regular Luofu citizen actually drinks mung bean soda. I'll take you to try some startaro bubble tea and you'll understand.
想打听下太卜大人的玉阙见闻。
What did you learn about the Yuque?
本座主要是辅助爻光将军，提供建木灾变的始末信息，以及弄清楚重犯镜流所言真假…说实话，基本没有什么休息时间，也谈不上见闻了。

I was mainly supporting General Yao Guang with providing details about the Ambrosial Arbor disaster and discerning the truth from the lies in Jingliu's confession... Honestly, I had no time to rest or learn anything new.
至于成果嘛，虽然你们贵为仙舟盟友，但此时此刻并非是揭露的最佳时机，本座还需要进一步与景元商讨…你们只需静候佳音就好。
As for the results, although you are all precious Xianzhou allies, this is not the best time to reveal all. I still need to discuss things with Jing Yuan so... You just await my good news.
呼雷越狱之事，太卜大人已知？
Did you hear about Hoolay's escape from prison, Master Diviner?
这件事沸沸扬扬的，本座自然是知道的。不过就像是仙舟民众一样，得知整件事都处在神策府、十王司的控制之中，结果上算得是振奋人心。

News about his escape has spread like wildfire. Of course, I am aware. Although, much like the citizens of the Xianzhou, I had nothing but joy when I learned that the entire matter was under the control of the Seat of Divine Foresight and the Ten-Lords Commission.
返程的路途中，本座大致卜算了一下事由经过，还得说幸好有你们，星穹列车的客人，罗浮仙舟又渡过了一劫。

I divined a rough idea of how things unfolded on my return journey and I must say: We are so fortunate to have you. Our guests from the Astral Express have saved the Xianzhou Luofu from disaster once more.
太卜大人要回来早告诉我们嘛！
You should have told us you were coming back!
本座也不是一个喜欢兴师动众的人，不过是工作出差回来，用不着这么多人夹道迎接。
I do not like fusses. This was simply a work trip, and there was no need for a welcome party.
不过，我倒是提前联系了青雀，让她来星槎海接我…哼，我看了看，她也不在这里，该回太卜司拿青雀是问了。

Although, I did contact Qingque in advance and tell her to come and meet me at Starskiff Haven... Hmph, I see she's nowhere to be seen. Looks like it's time to head back to the Divination Commission and see exactly what excuse she has this time.
You brought this on yourself, Qingque.
没关系，正好彦卿打算向列车组送别，正好也是太卜大人的接风洗尘。咱们也一起拍张合照，这才是算完整。
It's okay! Yanqing was planning to say their farewells to the Crew, so he could be your welcoming party, too! We have to take a group picture together first though!
嗯，三月小姐的提议不错，就这样办吧。
Not a bad suggestion at all, Miss March. Let's do that.
列车组往返罗浮多次，即便我们是作为神策府邀请的客人，送别之事倒也不必太过郑重。今日小别，以后仙舟联盟若有事相商，请随时联系我们的列车长。

The Crew visits the Luofu all the time. Even if we are guests of the Seat of Divine Foresight, there's no need to go to all the effort of a formal send off. We'll say a goodbye for now, but if the Xianzhou alliance has anything further to discuss in the future, please don't hesitate to contact our conductor.
毕竟星穹列车与仙舟联盟已是盟友。
After all, the Astral Express is now in alliance with the Xianzhou Alliance.
不错，即便是跨越迢迢星海，远道而来的贵客，想要回到罗浮仙舟相见，也并非总是难事。我相信以后还有机会能与各位老师再次相见，讨教一番。

That's right. Though you may be our guests from far across the starry skies, it will not be difficult for us to meet again should you wish to return to the Xianzhou Luofu. I am certain that we will have a chance to meet again, and I can learn from you all once more.
…说实话，彦卿也有搭乘列车四处巡游磨砺自己的打算。不知老师们意下如何？
...Honestly, I also intend to board the Express and set off on my own adventure of self-improvement. I wonder what you would all say to that?
我们肯定是欢迎的呀！对了，姬子姐姐和杨叔，今天不是也要回来吗？我们还可以找他们商量商量……
You're more than welcome, of course! Oh yeah, weren't Himeko and Mr. Yang saying that they wanted to come along today, too? We could find them to discuss it further...
眼下彦卿还在养伤，也没做好出行准备，不急于此时。
I am still recovering from my wounds, so I am not yet ready to depart. This matter can wait for now.
看来是等不到列车家长组了？
Looks like our Express family aren't going to make it in time?
就不耽误各位时间了，解散！
Well, we don't want to keep you waiting around. Let's head out!
嗯，今日临舟饯别就到此为止吧，感谢罗浮仙舟的殷勤招待，丹恒代表列车组谢过了。
Indeed. Let's leave the farewell party here for today. On behalf of the Crew, I would like to thank the Xianzhou Luofu for your kind hospitality.
列车组的各位，一路顺风。
与此同时，港口的另一边。
At that moment, on the other side of the port.
即便演武仪典结束了，罗浮仙舟还是这么热闹啊…对了，小三月他们呢？
I can't believe the Xianzhou Luofu is still so busy even after the Wardance is over... Oh yeah, where are March and the others?
丹恒说他们已经在港口上等待着了，估计就在这附近吧？
Dan Heng said that they were waiting in the port. I imagine they must be nearby?
恭喜符玄大人在玉阙仙舟的出差工作中的出色表现和勇敢拼搏！特此，热烈庆祝罗浮仙舟太卜司唯一的光——太卜大人、暨罗浮仙舟神策将军候补，符玄大人凯旋回归！

Congratulations to Lady Fu for your outstanding performance and courageous efforts on the Xianzhou Yuque! I would hereby like to celebrate the triumphant return of Master Fu Xuan, known as the only light in the Xianzhou Luofu Divination Commission and the Divine Foresight's candidate!
…小姑娘，你看清楚了，我们可不是符玄…大人？
...Miss. Open your eyes. We are not... Master Fu Xuan?
诶？杨先生，旁边的，难道是姬子小姐？
Huh? Mr. Yang? And could that be.... Miss Himeko?
Then where is the Master Diviner?
我们也不知道，你们家太卜大人是这个时候到这里吗？
How would we know? When did your Master Diviner even get here?
You don't mean... I missed her!?
The Yaoqing guests will be arriving soon.
（要是做好了准备，就和彦卿一起等待接下来的客人吧……）
(If you are ready, await the next group of guests with Yanqing.)
The Zhuming guests will be arriving soon.
We're all waiting for you, hurry up!
We've left a spot for you!
三月小姐，你真是太客气了，哈哈哈哈！
You are too kind, Miss March, hahaha!
我们在罗浮仙舟相识数日，已然是过命的交情。我明白各位临行送别时不舍的心意，不过有句话是这样说的——
Though we have known each other for only a number of days, we are already friends for life. I am just as reluctant to part as you all are, but there is a phrase I once heard...
如果没有离别，我们又如何珍惜相聚的时刻？如果没有离别，我们又如何感受重逢的喜悦。三月小姐，请你不要伤感，离别只会串联起我们相遇时种种疏忽的细节……

If we were to never part, how would we treasure our time together? If there were no farewell, how could we experience the joy of a reunion? Miss March, please do not be sad, as our parting will only connect the dots between the details we missed when we met.
刚才咱也在犹豫要不要提醒一下……
We were hesitating whether to tell you or not...
我猜三月没有考虑这么多感想…
I imagine March hadn't thought that much about all this...
我确实也没有那么多感受，不过椒丘大夫说得太好了！说的就是我。
I hadn't, and you're right. But you're absolutely right, Master Jiaoqiu. That's exactly how I feel.
…顺带一提，我们其实是在这个方向。椒丘大夫，你在对着空气说话……
...I should also probably mention, I'm actually over here. You've been talking to thin air, Master Jiaoqiu...
椒丘大夫，你说的真是太好了！
You expressed it perfectly, Master Jiaoqiu!
没错…顺带一提，我们其实是在这个方向。椒丘大夫，你在对着空气说话……
That's right... Though I should also probably mention, I'm actually over here. You've been talking to thin air, Master Jiaoqiu...
啊，是这样吗？啊哈哈哈，不好意思。
Ah, over here? Ahaha, I'm sorry.
我这不是还没习惯嘛，虽然眼睛不方便，但在下的耳朵可灵敏了！可以听声辨位。
I'm still not used to this yet. Though my eyes may not be of any use, my ears are extremely sensitive! I can pinpoint location through sound!
…好像还是有点不太对，不过，就这样吧。{NICKNAME}快说点什么，冷场了！
...I think you're still a little off but... Well, that's good enough. {NICKNAME}, say something quickly. There's an awkward silence!
演武仪典期间都在做些什么呢？
What were you doing during the Wardance?
在下自然是在养伤嘛。多亏了灵砂司鼎，衔药龙女的精湛医术，咱们也算是恢复得差不多了，接下来要做的，不过是「谨遵医嘱」四个字。
I was having my wounds treated, of course! Thanks to the Healer Lady, Cauldron Master Lingsha, we are returning to proper form. All we've been told to do now is "listen to doctor's orders."
我得空去看了彦卿的守擂赛，打得不错。更难得的是对对手的敬意。
I managed to get time to go and see Yanqing's ringmaster match. You did very well. Your respect for your adversary was particularly commendable, too.
有去参加演武仪典的比赛吗？
Did you take part in the Wardance competition?
我的身份实在不适合参加这样的比赛，至于这边的两位嘛……
My identity makes it improper for me to take part in these kinds of competitions, but these two on the other hand...
别问我，我就是个医士，就算是眼睛方便的时候，我也不会凑这个热闹，你问问貊泽。
Don't ask me. I'm just a healer. You wouldn't catch me getting involved in that kind of thing even when my eyes were working. Ask Moze.
我喜欢暗中观察，伺机出手。不过很遗憾，演武仪典的赛制不会给我这么多时间。
I prefer to watch from the shadows and wait for my moment to strike. Unfortunately, the Wardance competition would not give me the time for this.
要不貊泽你再多聊两句？
Moze, how about you chat a little longer?
我还以为你们已经知道了，我是会把天聊死的。
I think you're all well aware that I'm a conversation killer.
唉，为了大家好，我们还是换一个话题吧。
*sigh* For everyone's well-being, we'd better change the topic.
这次罗浮仙舟之行，感受如何？
How do you feel about your journey to the Xianzhou Luofu?
罗浮之行的目的已经达成，虽然呼雷一事出乎预料…但好在一切解决的法子尚且圆满。
Our objective upon the Luofu has been completed. Although the situation with Hoolay got a little out of hand... Everything was wrapped up nicely in the end.
非要说有什么遗憾的话……是我没有尽到身为上司的职责，庇护下属的周全。
If I had to share my regrets... It would be that I was not able to fulfill my duty as a leader and protect the safety of my subordinates.
唉，将军，请不要再给人加深曜青人爱把天聊死的印象了。临行之际，说些快活的话题吧。
Ah, general, please don't reinforce the Yaoqing stereotype of being conversation killers... Let's talk about something happy before we leave.
你们难道在等我发言吗？我没有感想。走吧，星槎快到了。
You're not waiting for me to say something, are you? I have no thoughts on the matter. Let's go. The starskiff will be here soon.
等等，我还有两句话要和彦卿小弟说。
Wait, I would like to say a final word to young Yanqing.
你在竞锋舰上向呼雷刺出的制胜一剑已臻于妙境，确实不俗。
The finishing blow you landed on Hoolay on the Skysplitter was masterful, truly remarkable.
不过与敌交锋，还有更多可打磨淬炼的余地。在曜青仙舟，这样的机会遍地都是。若是你有朝一日想飞出罗浮，瞧瞧更广阔的天空，就来曜青仙舟找我吧！

Although, there is still room for improvement when it comes to your technique in battle. The Xianzhou Yaoqing offers so many opportunities for this, so if you one day have the urge to leave the Luofu and see a broader horizon, come and find me on the Xianzhou Yaoqing!
我…明白了。未来若有机会，请将军一定要不吝赐教。
I... I understand. If I have an opportunity in the future, I will make sure not to miss out on your personal instruction, general.
好了，诸位，时间不早了，该是我们暂时告别的时候了。
Alright everyone, time has passed us by. It is time for us to bid farewell for now.
拍张合照再走吧！机巧鸟已经准备好了！
Let's take a group picture! I've got a cycrane ready!
嘻嘻，来得早不如来得巧，妾身一到就赶上一场好戏。
Hehe, looks like I made it just in time for a show.
灵砂大人，丹鼎司不能少了你。
Miss Lingsha, the Alchemy Commission cannot go on without you!
呵呵，妾身也是与各位一样，为朱明仙舟的客人送行的。毕竟我在朱明仙舟学艺多年，受炎庭君照料，妾身也早已算得是半个朱明人了。

Hehe, I am here to bid farewell to our Zhuming guests as you are. As I've spent so many years studying on the Xianzhou Zhuming and been under the care of Ardens Regia, I am basically a half-native Zhuming person at this point.
全靠灵砂姐姐，远道而来的游客、参与行动的云骑，还有三月都在丹鼎司得到了及时的照顾和治疗，能处理好如此突发事件，除了咱们灵砂姐姐还有谁？

It's all thanks to Miss Lingsha. The guests from afar, the Cloud Knights who participated in the operation, and March receiving timely care and treatment at the Alchemy Commission — who else but Miss Lingsha could've handled all these harrowing incidents?
哪里哪里，这本是丹鼎司分内之事。
Not at all. This is all simply the work of the Alchemy Commission.
将药王秘传、持明龙师盘根错节的势力一一摒除后，再造罗浮丹鼎司的重任就要落在你的肩上了。灵砂，咱们就此别过。
After eliminating the deeply rooted Disciples of Sanctus Medicus and the Vidyadhara Preceptors, it will fall on you to rebuild the Alchemy Commission. Lingsha, it is time for us to say farewell.
怀炎将军，云璃妹妹一路上小心。也请二位替我向炎庭君问好，灵砂在罗浮仙舟绝不会浪费朱明所学所闻。
Safe journeys, General Huaiyan and Miss Yunli. I hope that you shall send my regards to Ardens Regia. I will not let all that I learned on the Xianzhou Zhuming go to waste on the Xianzhou Luofu.
Well then, it is time for me to be on my way...
等等！我们拍张合照再走吧！还有，我这里准备好的苏打豆汁儿也请一起带走……
Wait! Let's take a group picture! Oh, and I have mung bean soda here for you all to take with you...
不过那柄宝剑，彦卿把它带了过来，想在这临别时刻……
But I brought the awesome blade over to use in this moment of farewell...
听说你有麻烦事要拜托我？
Heard you've got some problems you'd like a hand with?
与其说是我的麻烦事，不如说说是这位小师傅的…正好铖杰师傅也在这里，要不你自己讲讲？
It's not so much a problem for me, as it is for this guy... Since Master Chengjie is here now, maybe he can talk about it himself?
我只是一个出不了师的小学徒，我还没资格授徒带队呢。您可别再叫我「师傅」了。
I'm just a young apprentice who cannot graduate, so I'm not qualified yet to lead any team. Please don't call me "Master."
这样啊，我也只是叫着方便，杰哥你不要介意。
I'm just saying it for convenience's sake. Don't worry about it, Chengjie.
哎，这位大英雄我记得，公输师傅说你和他携手并肩铲除了困扰司里的妖～魔～鬼～怪～
Ah, I remember you. You are the great hero Master Gongshu mentioned. He said you helped him fight off all the monnn~stersss~ in the commission.
真羡慕你啊，我什么都做不到，我就只是一个在工造司的混日子的废物…遇到危险也只顾着自己逃命，贪生怕死，一点工造司的匠～人～风～骨～都没有……

I really envy you. I can't do anything. I'm just a piece of trash wasting my days away at the Artisanship Commission... Every time I come across something dangerous, I flee in fear. I'm such a chicken, and I've got no sense of ar~ti~san~ship~...
Why are you so self-pitying all of a sudden?
我不是突然这么消极的，自从发现弄丢了老师的手稿之后，我就一直很消极。
It's not sudden at all. I've been depressed ever since I found out that I lost my master's manuscript.
Is that what Master Gongshu told you?
公输师傅没有明说，他的心里肯定也是这么想的。
Master Gongshu didn't say anything to me, but I know he's thinking it deep down.
要是我有匠～人～风～骨～我肯定就不会弄丢老师的手稿。
If I were a true~ ar~ti~san~, then there's no way I could've lost my master's manuscript.
Fear of death is pretty normal.
对呀对呀，对正常人来说，还有比贪生怕死更正确的事吗？
Yep. Like, seriously, what's more normal than being afraid to die?
…可是我只顾着贪生怕死，却把老师的手稿弄丢了，真是千不该万不该啊。
...But I was doing just that, and still lost my master's manuscript. It is absolutely unforgivable.
那可是恩师生前留下的遗作，整个银河上下独一无二。
The manuscript is my master's legacy work of his lifetime, and it's the only copy in the whole cosmos.
唉，老师的手稿本应该在仙舟历史中留下浓墨重彩的一笔…我却只顾着逃出生天，没能将手稿带出来，我真是，千～古～罪～人～
*sigh* My master's manuscript should have gone down in Xianzhou's history... but I was too busy saving my own skin and didn't take it out with me. I really am utt~er~ly~ use~less~
这么重要的东西不备份？
Why didn't you make a copy of something so important?
你这么一说，我更加内疚了！
哎，这要换作是我，太卜司的文件没有保存或者备份，我根本都不敢睡觉。
Well, if I were in his shoes and didn't save or back up any of the Divination Commission's files, I wouldn't even dare to sleep.
青雀小姐所言极是，可是丹鼎司从来不卖后悔药，就算我现在想备份也晚了。
What you said is true, but it's too late for regrets. It's impossible to make a copy of it now.
这手稿真的有这么重要吗？

我才疏学浅，一直以来我都觉得自己还没有足够的资历去面对这份手稿。
I am not very learned, and I've always felt intimidated and under-qualified to face this manuscript.
这份遗作手稿，是莱恩先生的梦想，我本想自己有一天能够亲手实现…可是，现在我连这样的机会都没有了。
That manuscript is Master Ryan's magnum opus. I thought that one day I'd be able to actualize its visions myself... But now I won't even get the chance to try.
去把手稿找回来不就解决了？
Just find that manuscript, and you'll be fine, right?
可是，这工造司里到处都是不受控制的机巧、建木催生的孽物，我…我不敢……
But the Artisanship Commission is filled with uncontrolled ingenia, and abominations awakened by the Ambrosial Arbor... I dare not...
所以这件事是打算交给我？
So you'd like me to take over from here?
太好了，{NICKNAME}，你真的愿意帮我找回手稿吗？
That's great, {NICKNAME}. Are you really willing to help me find the lost manuscript?
…这就是青雀叫我来的原因吗？

嗯…我可没算到事情会有这样的发展。
Hmmm... I didn't expect things to turn out like this.
哎呀，这个时候就别管我了，你就帮帮铖杰找回手稿嘛。
Argh, don't mind me right now. Just help Chengjie find that manuscript.

你说的对，丢了就丢了嘛。
You're right. What's lost is lost.
但是！{NICKNAME}击败了丰饶孽物，夺回了造化洪炉，是工造司的大英雄。帮铖杰找回手稿这么一件小事，你肯定是不会拒绝的吧？

But! {NICKNAME} has fought off the Abominations of Abundance before, recovered the Creation Furnace, and became a hero at the Artisanship Commission. Helping Chengjie find that manuscript should be a piece of cake that you'd never refuse, right?
…青雀小姐，这些要求这是不是道德绑架呢？
...Miss Qingque, are we pushing it too far?
只是让合适的人做合适的事情罢了，你要是没有云骑军保护就自己回去，那也太危险了。

I agree, but only on one condition.
Don't even think about slacking off this time.

青雀小姐，那我也拜托你了！
哎，我原本的偷懒计划泡空了。好吧好吧，不过关于手稿，你有什么线索吗？那什么设计稿，你懂，都长得一模一样。
Well, so much for my lazy day plans. Anyways, got any leads on the manuscript? Those manuscript thingies all seem identical to me.
我师傅的梦想是造出谁都没见过的星槎。手稿上如果有「星槎设计」、「龙骨结构」、「星槎引擎」之类的词语，应该就没有错了。
My master's dream was to create a starskiff that nobody's ever seen before. There should be words like "Starskiff designs," "keel structure," "Starskiff engine" on his manuscript.
…你要是说得再复杂些，我们也听不懂，这些就够了。走吧，{NICKNAME}。
That's enough for us. If you keep using more of these fancy words, we ain't gonna understand anything. Let's just head out, {NICKNAME}.
莱恩老师身故以后，他留下的设计图都被工造司入库封存了，应该就放在格物院那儿。
After Master Ryan passed, his manuscripts were packed away by the Artisanship Commission. It should be placed in the Sapientia Academe.
During his lifetime? Do you mean Master Gongshu is dead?
遗作？公输师傅啊啊我来晚了…
Legacy work? What happened to Master Gongshu?
唉，老师的手稿本应该在仙舟历史中留下浓墨重彩的一笔…我却只顾着逃出生天，没能将手稿带出来，我真是，千～古～罪～人～
*sigh* My master's manuscript should have gone down in Xianzhou's history... but I was too busy saving my own skin and didn't take it out with me. I really am utt~er~ly~ use~less~
{F#姐}{M#哥}，先别忙着嚎了。过世的是莱恩先生，是我最早加入工造司时带着我研究的匠人老师，不是现在的公输师傅。

{F#Miss}{M#Sir}, please get hold of yourself. The one who passed away is Master Ryan, a craftsman who used to be my mentor when I first joined the Artisanship Commission. It's not my current teacher, Master Gongshu.
师傅的手稿可就拜托你们了，一定要平安地带出来呀。
Please, bring Mr. Ryan's manuscript back in one piece. I leave it in your capable hands.

你进去找吧，我帮你看着入口。

我进去找，你来看着入口。
I'll go in and find the manuscript. You keep watch at the door.
你真是太体贴了。不过，我也没有本事帮你看门。

…还是我进去找找，你在这里守着吧。
...How about I go in and look for it. You keep watch out here.
太好了，你负责九成的区域，我负责一成，出发！
Great. You take care of ninety percent of the area, and I'll take the rest. Go!
好一段时间的翻箱倒柜竟没有触动警报，无数乏人问津的文档被找了出来。
After a long period of rummaging around, the alarm was not triggered, and countless dusty old documents were unearthed.
它们活像是被猫咪把玩后兴味索然地踢进沙发底下的玩具，一辈子也没个见天日的机会。
They're like toys that have been kicked under the sofa by some uninterested cat, with no chance of seeing the light of day.
除了各种各样的手稿之外，还有一封<color=#dbc291ff>星际和平公司设计师入职邀请函</color>，从日期上看，距离现在已经有<color=#dbc291ff>一百二十多年</color>了。

In addition to all the manuscripts lying about, there's an envelope titled <color=#dbc291ff>IPC Designer Invite</color>. Judging by the date, it's already <color=#dbc291ff>over <unbreak>120</unbreak> years old</color>.
这黑灯瞎火的，为了图省事，我把所有像是设计稿的文件全部拿出来了。要不我们在这里挑一下，看看到底是哪一份是莱恩的手稿吧？
It was pitch black in there, so to save trouble, I pulled out everything that looked like a design manuscript. Why don't we sift through these here and see which one of them is Mr. Ryan's?
You have to help me look for it.
不过你明知道我这人工作态度不太积极，就稍微体贴一下我嘛。怎么感觉你反倒是被太卜大人附身了……

你心里有我。那我就歇着啦。

有什么不懂的你可以问，不过我也不太熟他们工造司的文档编号就是了。

I often hear from mates that "messing with a craftsman's toolbox is like choking off a craftsman's neck." Once we find the right manuscript, we'll have to put the rest back promptly — otherwise, the Artisanship Commission folks will come after me.
我早就看出你是一个富有同理心的人了，我们赶紧开工吧。
I can already tell that you're an empathetic person, so let's get to work.
不就是找不到东西而已，至于吗？

没想到你竟然如此不在意，真希望你有勇气当着工匠们的面大声说出来。

我们还是做个好人吧…总之，先赶紧开工吧。

这是一份设计手稿，手稿上解释了「匣里流光」的工作原理。似乎这样的能量武器与一种叫做「岁阳」的妖物有关，设计案署名是公输师傅。

铖杰说啦！莱恩的愿望是造出星槎，{NICKNAME}，你再想想？

这是一份设计手稿，手稿上详细记录了金人的外观设计。未署名的匠人对审美有所坚持，在设计稿上愤然写下「蠢货们根本什么都不懂，只知道说我的金人丑」。

This is a blueprint for the aurumatons' exterior design, meticulously documented by an anonymous craftsman who seemed to have an unwavering commitment to aesthetics. This craftsman scrawled in frustration upon this manuscript: "Those fools know nothing of beauty! All they do is besmirch my gorgeous aurumatons".
这上面写的不是星槎，是「金人」。这俩字，很好认的吧？再找找。

这是一份设计手稿，手稿上陈列了星槎的结构设计。设计案提到了一种轻型龙骨的培育模式，设计者提到这样的星槎转弯半径小、速度快、航程远优于市面上的其他星槎。

This is a manuscript about the design of a type of starskiff, showcasing its structural finesse. The blueprint boasts a cultivation method for a lightweight keel that promises tighter turns, faster speeds, and much longer voyages, far outstripping any other vessel on the market.
看来就是这一份，把它交给我吧。
This looks like the one. Give it to me.
这是一份活动设计案，提到了名为「枘凿六合」的空间接合装置。活动设计方考虑到这些魔方状的器械无人问津，决定狠下心来将魔方突兀地放置在洞天的各个角落。

This is an event proposal that mentioned a spatial fusion device called "Hexanexus." The organizers realized that these Rubik's Cube-like contraptions were not getting any attention, so they decided to take matters into their own hands and awkwardly place them in every nook and cranny of the venue.
「总有人会出于好奇解开它们的，迄今为止的一切努力都不算是白费！」
"There's bound to be someone who is curious enough to try to solve these. All our efforts will not be in vain!"
哇，{F#大姐}{M#大哥}，注意看，这份手稿是个什么秘密组织的东西。肯定不太对……
Whoa, look closer! This manuscript looks like something straight out of a secret society. It's definitely not this...
这份手稿，就先由我拿着了，毕竟要是我空手回去，那我不就成了你的挂件了嘛。
I'll keep this manuscript for the time being. After all, I'll be outshined by you if I go back empty-handed.
你说得对，还是让他自己看看吧。

它和这份星槎手稿放在一起，总感觉有些关联，我还是带上一起吧。
It was placed alongside this starskiff manuscript. They seem to have a connection, so let's take it with us.
不过，这份「星际和平公司的设计师入职邀请函」看上去也很重要，应该是和这份星槎手稿放在一起的，要不要也带过去呢？
However, this "IPC Designer Invite" seems pretty important too. I suppose it's kept in the same place as this starskiff manuscript. We should probably take it with us?
让我来告诉你一个职场的技巧吧，不管是不是上司想要的，只要有，就先带上。太卜大人说要什么，没带来的就是没有，有的我都带来了，就不用来回跑腿了。

Anyways, lemme tell you a pro tip for the workplace: If it exists, just bring it, even if your boss didn't explicitly ask for it. If the master diviner wants something and I don't have it on me, then I'll just say it doesn't exist, and everything that does exist is already with me. This way, I'll never have to run back for things.
要是铖杰说「啊，我突然想起那份邀请函也很重要」，你要怎么办，我反正不会再回来了，这多累呀。

…不过，这种东西他如果不问的话，就直接交给他也不太合适，我就先放在你那里吧。
...But if he doesn't ask about this, it's really not appropriate to just hand it over to him, so I'll leave it with you for now.
Come on, you gotta learn to work smarter.
Suddenly, I don't wanna work on the job anymore.
我其实也每天都这么想…但是工作不能不干。于是我的思维降级，从「如何不上班」改成了「如何偷懒」，你应该多学学我。
That's how I feel every day actually... But work has to get done. That's why I downgraded my mantra from "How to avoid work" to "How to slack off at work." You should learn from my work philosophy.
不好，有怪物靠近了，{NICKNAME}小心！
Uh-oh, there're monsters nearby. Be careful, {NICKNAME}!
...D—Darn it. I've got some bad news.
就在刚才，铖杰想要的星槎设计稿变成了「损坏的星槎设计稿」…我们该怎么办？
The starskiff design manuscript that Chengjie wanted is damaged... What should we do?
Just be honest and tell him the truth.
坏了，这下我成了「仙舟历史的千古罪人」了…走吧，我们去谢罪去……

你就说早就被怪物给破坏了。

有道理，全都怪这些怪物，就算我们不来找，它们也会把手稿破坏的。
That's a good point. We can just blame it all on monsters. Even if we don't find it, they would have been all damaged by monsters.
好，我们就这样告诉铖杰。
Good, that's what we'll tell Chengjie.
干脆假装我们什么也没找到。

你的意思是说，连这份「损坏的星槎设计稿」也不交给他…这不太好吧？

都怪我让你瞻前顾后考虑太多了，我们还是如实转告给他吧，这样最好。

你们回来了，怎么样找到了我师傅的星槎设计稿了吗？

青雀尽量将取回手稿的过程描述得惊险无比，铖杰听完之后也大概了解了事情经过。
Qingque tries to be as dramatic as possible while describing how the manuscript was retrieved. Chengjie seems to have a good idea of the situation after listening to everything.

Thank you. At least you managed to bring back the remaining parts of the manuscript. But I should be blamed for this. If I had been more brave and taken the manuscript with me as I fled...
呜呜，我太怂了，我怎么是个这么窝囊的人。口口声声说为了老师的手稿、老师的梦想，我却只是坐在原地等你们帮我取回来……
Oh, I'm such a wimp. How can I be such a good-for-nothing? I keep saying I'm all about my master's manuscript and his dream, but all I did was sit here, waiting for you guys to do it for me.
连他的手稿都保护不了，我还算什么工造司的工匠。
I can't even protect a manuscript. What kind of Artisanship Commission craftsman am I?
No need to beat yourself up.
雁过留声，人过留名。莱恩老师，他、他的工匠生涯里就只留下了这份手稿，我却……
Master Ryan's mighty name reverberates down through the ages. All he left in his career as a craftsman was this manuscript, and yet I...
这和你做不做工匠没有关系吧。

不，我只要拿起工具，就会想到师傅教授了我这些技艺，只要回想这些技艺，就会想到我弄丢了他最后的手稿…我、我做不下去的。

But every time I pick up my tools, I can only think of my master teaching me these artisan skills. And as soon as I think of these skills, I'll remember that I lost his final manuscript. I—I can't go on like this.
不对，这不是你们的错。师傅的手稿损坏完完全全就是我自己的问题，不怪别人。

({NICKNAME}, we can't let him be depressed like this. Say something, or I'll start feeling guilty.)
（你也说点儿什么吧，我要开始感到愧疚了。）
(Say something, or I'll start feeling guilty.)
你来完成手稿中残缺的部分吧。
You should complete the missing parts of the manuscript.

No! Asking me to fill my master's shoes would be like asking a toddler to duplicate the most famous art piece in the world.
唉，我要是工作时心情低落，就会选个开阔的地方散散心。
*sigh* If I'm in low spirits at work, I'll simply pick out a wide open space to take a wee stroll.
这样吧，我们先把手稿的事情放一边，去星槎海转换一下心情如何？

先别想手稿了，换下心情如何？

Then let's head out! Destination: Starskiff Haven.
这工造司我也待不下去了，无处可去的我，去哪儿都一样。
I can't stay at the Artisanship Commission anymore. I'm homeless, and it doesn't matter where I go.
铖杰你别再垂头丧气了，你看看这里，有美食小吃，可以去不夜侯饮茶，可以逛逛宣夜大街，可解压了。怎么样，你想去哪里？
Chengjie, don't be so crestfallen. Look, there's food and drink, there's the Sleepless Earl for tea, and there's Starwatcher Avenue for shopping. So, where do you wanna go?
去哪里都可以，青雀小姐你们说了算。
We can go wherever. Miss Qingque, you call the shots.
{NICKNAME}, what do you want to do?
走吧，我们去小吃摊上看看有没有什么好吃的。

我们去不夜侯喝点儿茶吧！
Let's go to the Sleepless Earl and order a pot of tea!
我也有点想来一杯仙人快乐茶了，走吧走吧。

我认识两个说相声的人！
Oh, oh, I know a comedy duo who does crosstalk!
太好了！我其实经常窝在家里看表演相声的幻戏，可有意思了。

哪里都可以，你们说了算。
