对——准确的说，是我个人的修炼计划。
Yes — more accurately, my personal training plan.
嗯？那倒没什么关系，这是我个人的修炼计划。
Hm? Not really. It's my personal training plan.
我想请你们两位加入我，共同见证卢卡——磐岩镇的搏击冠军——下一步的成长！
I want you to join me in witnessing the next steps in the development of Luka, the Boulder Town fighting champion!
喂喂，你给我等一会儿！奥列格头儿只是让我们来替你加油…你倒好，一拍脑袋就想拉我们当陪练？
Whoa, whoa, hold your horses. Chief Oleg wanted us to come and cheer for you, he didn't say anything about becoming your sparring partners.
哈哈哈，你的表情真是完全藏不住。师傅都跟我说了，下层区的局势最近相对稳定，「地火」的日子都变清闲了。
Hahaha, you can't hide anything on that face of yours. Oleg already told me that things in the Underworld are pretty peaceful now, and even Wildfire is running out of things to do.
而且，你看{NICKNAME}的眼神，{F#她}{M#他}肯定很感兴趣，对吧？
Besides, look at {NICKNAME}! You want in, right?
I do have plenty of time...
主角的宿命就是当工具人…
...That might be the weirdest thing you've ever said.
就是你不会拒绝的意思，对吧？我果然没看错！
So that's a yes, right? I knew it!
哎…总是自说自话，拿你没办法。行吧，既然{NICKNAME}答应了，那这趟也算我一个。
*sigh* There's no stopping you once you've made up your mind. Fine. Since {NICKNAME} agreed, count me in too.
好，那就这么定了！这次修炼的地点就选在史瓦罗的地盘——你们之前干的大事我都有耳闻，你俩对那边的环境应该熟悉得很吧？
Great! That's settled then! The training is on Svarog's turf. I heard about your achievements — you probably know that place like the back of your hand, right?
等你准备好了就告诉我一声，咱们一起出发！
Just lemme know when you're ready and we can head over together!
怎么样，{NICKNAME}？准备好陪我走一遭特训之旅了吗？
How about it, {NICKNAME}? Are you ready to head out for the special training?
这就准备好了？那我们出发！
That was fast! Let's do it!
Keep up, Seele! Don't fall behind!
...I don't need you to remind me. Let's go.
I might need some more prep time...
嗐，别紧张！我保证，这一趟对你来说绝对轻松又愉快。
Ha, don't stress! I promise this trip will be relaxing and fun.
不着急，那等你准备好了再来找我吧。
Take your time. Come back when you're ready.
呵，总算醒了！你这一躺就是一整天，可把我们给吓坏了。
Ha, you're finally awake! You've been out for the whole day. We were really worried!
别担心，希儿，他只是体力不支晕过去了。看得出来，史瓦罗这次刻意没下狠手。
Don't worry, Seele. Like I said, it was just the exhaustion. Svarog was deliberately holding back.
希儿…{NICKNAME}…还有…娜塔大姐头？我这是…在诊所里？
Seele... {NICKNAME}... and... Nat? I'm in... the clinic?
…不然呢？难道我们就把你晾在史瓦罗的老家不管了？
...Where else? You think we'd leave you on Svarog's turf?
哈…谢谢你们，我感觉好多了。真不好意思，娜塔…浪费你的精力了。
Ha... thank you all. I feel much better now. Sorry, Nat... I must have wasted your time.
别说傻话，卢卡。不管你是出于什么用心，下次都别再干这种傻事了。
Don't be ridiculous, Luka. Still, whatever your motivation was, I hope you can find a different outlet for it.
…我可没娜塔这么好说话，这事不能就这么过去了。趁这功夫，你赶紧解释一下，之前到底是哪根筋搭错了？
...I'm not gonna let you off the hook that easy — there's more to this story. You need to explain what the heck got into you today.
都说了史瓦罗是机器人…就算他再怎么会计算，也很难把下手轻重控制得正正好好吧？
Like I said, he's a robot... No matter how good his calculations are, he's not designed to pull punches.
你晕过去的唯一好处，就是我们不用再听你喊一遍了……
The one good thing about you losing is that we didn't have to hear it again.
为什么非要和史瓦罗打不可？
Why did you insist on fighting Svarog?
这也怪我…我就该直接拒绝你的。我从一开始就有种不好的预感。
That's on me too... I should've refused him straightaway. I had a bad feeling from the start.
哈哈…这么较真，是你的风格。我都说了，这就是我的试炼计…咳咳、咳！
Hahaha... you're always so serious. I've said it before — this is my train— *coughing*
…别乱动，你还没完全恢复好。希儿，你也别逼得太紧了…卢卡现在需要休息。
...Slow down — you haven't completely recovered. Seele, don't pressure him... let him rest.
谢谢你，娜塔——不过我已经恢复得差不多了。
Thanks, Nat — but I'm almost recovered.
我现在…还有点事得去办。嘿……
I have... some things to do... Ah...
Hey, where do you think you're—
哥们儿也许只是中二病犯了。
Bro is just being a bit of a weeb.
I don't get the whole thing, either.
他可能有什么不能说的原因。
...Well whatever they are, they're not good enough.
要是他打一开始就没打算把事挑明白，那为啥还非要拉上咱俩？不行，这也太奇怪了——我得跟着他，看看那家伙到底在打什么主意。
If he never intended to explain anything to us, why did he drag us along? No, this is too weird — I'm gonna follow him and see what he's up to.
…我实在放不下这个心。卢卡那家伙，以前从来不会这样。
...I can't just let it go. Luka didn't use to be like this.
{NICKNAME}，你最近好像不忙？要是需要帮手，我随时联系你。
...You're not too busy these days, right? I'll give you a shout if I need help.
当然。你最近好像不忙？要是需要帮手，我随时联系你。
Of course. You're not too busy these days, right? I'll give you a shout if I need help.
卢卡那家伙，以前从来不会这样…这个心我实在放不下。
Luka didn't use to be like this... I can't just let it go.
你去吧，希儿。别太着急了…我可不想看到你们吵架。
If you must, Seele. Try not to worry... I don't want to see you two fighting.
…{NICKNAME}，既然他们两个都走了，我有一事相求。
...{NICKNAME}, now that they've left, I have a favor to ask you.
据我了解，卢卡那孩子虽然有时会热情过了头…但他绝对不是个莽撞的人。他这次的行为…确实有些反常。
It's easy for Luka to get ahead of himself sometimes... but I've never seen him this headstrong. It does make me wonder...
你能替我去找奥列格问问卢卡的近况吗？我毕竟没有亲自经历，不了解事情的全貌。
Could you ask Oleg how Luka's been recently? I haven't seen much of him lately — it's hard for me to get the full picture.
I was planning on doing just that.
那太好了。不管发生了什么，我都希望你们能好好相处，不要被一些琐事影响了彼此间的关系。回见，{NICKNAME}。
Thank you. Regardless of what's really going on, I hope none of you let small things get in the way of your friendship. See you, {NICKNAME}.
麻烦你去向奥列格打听一下情况了，{NICKNAME}。
Please go ask Oleg about this, {NICKNAME}
希望你们能好好相处，不要被一些琐事影响了彼此间的关系。
Don't let small things get in the way of your friendship.
关于卢卡，有些事想问你。
I wanna ask you some things about Luka.
…哦？我徒弟？你们后来又发生什么了吗？
...Oh? My student? Did something happen recently?
我正纳闷呢，怎么冠军赛结束这么久他还没来找我——来，快给我讲讲。
I was wondering why he didn't come and see me after the championship match ended. Come, tell me about it.
把和希儿、卢卡一同经历的事情转述给了奥列格……
You tell Oleg about everything that happened with Luka and Seele...
嗯…听你这么一说，确实有不少奇怪的地方，完全不像他的作风……
Mm... that does sound a little strange. Luka usually doesn't push himself so far...
…我说，别看卢卡那小子一幅愣头青的模样，他心里其实装得下很多东西。他跟你说过那只机械手的来历吗，{NICKNAME}？
...Huh, he may be a tough guy on the surface, but he's got his secrets. Did he tell you about the origins of his mechanical arm?
和史瓦罗对决之前提了两句。
He mentioned something before he fought Svarog.
噢，那他应该没给你们详细讲述当时的情况。
Ah, then he probably didn't describe the scene in detail.
噢，那不如让我来给你讲讲吧。
Well, let me tell you about it.
那大概是…六年，不对，七年之前？当时我带着一帮弟兄在隔壁熔锤镇巡逻，正好路过一个不起眼的工匠铺子。
That was... six? Seven years ago? I was patrolling with some comrades in the neighboring town of Moltammerville — we passed an ordinary mechanics shop.
看店的是个一脸严肃的男人，估摸比我小几岁，但头发胡子全白了。他身边坐着个红毛小子，在一旁有气无力地干着杂活，眼睛里一点儿神都没有。

There was a serious-looking fella looking after the shop. He was probably a few years younger than me, but his hair and beard were white as snow. There was a young lad doing odd jobs — he looked pretty exhausted.
…不重要的细节我就省去了。总之，后来我说服了店主，让那个红毛小子停下他不喜欢干的工匠活，跟我学些技能。
Anyway, I convinced the shopkeeper to let him come with me.
卢卡这小子，学得很快。一开始，我也搞不清楚他喜不喜欢我教他的东西——搏击，兵器，战略之类的——他也不怎么吭声，只是闷着头学。
Luka was a fast learner. At first, I couldn't figure out if he liked what I was teaching him — fighting, weapons, strategy, etc. He didn't talk a lot — just kept his head down.
后来，大概是我收他为徒一年多以后吧…在一次熔锤镇的保卫战里，卢卡为了从裂界手里救下几个镇民，被弄废了一只手臂。
Then... about a year after I took him in, Luka lost one of his arms while rescuing townsfolk from the Fragmentum in Moltammerville.
…那次他差点就没挺过来，连着昏厥了两三天。我在他病床前守着，心里火急火燎的，又内疚又着急。结果，你猜…他醒来以后第一句话是什么？
...He almost didn't make it — he was unconscious for two or three days. I sat next to his bed, anxious and guilty. Guess what he said to me after he woke up?
——他说那话的时候全身缠满绷带，血肉模糊的…但那是他第一次冲我露出笑脸，那表情我现在闭上眼还能瞧见。
He had bandages all over his body — most of his wounds hadn't healed yet... But, it was the first time he'd ever smiled at me. I still remember that expression.
And the moral of the story is...?
噢，抱歉，我每次讲这故事都有点儿忘乎所以，哈哈哈。
Oh, sorry, I get a little carried away when I tell this story, hahaha.
Guess that kind of sums him up, huh...
Can't tell from looking at him, right?
我想说的就是，卢卡那小子把身边人的命看得比自己重要，从小就是这样。
What I'm trying to say is: Luka views other people's lives as more important than his own. That's how he's always been.
所以从他嘴里说出「都是为了自我修炼」这种话…多半是糊弄人的。他心里肯定瞒着什么事没跟你们说。
So when he says stuff like "this is for training" — that's probably a lie. He's hiding something from you alright.
年轻人的事，我也不想多掺和了。我有信心，你跟希儿绝对有办法搞清楚。
Anyway, I'm too old to be getting involved in this stuff. I'm sure you and Seele can sort this by yourselves.
不过，你们得答应我件事，别让那小子太下不来台，行吗？毕竟他是磐岩镇的搏击冠军，孩子们的偶像——这光辉形象还得想办法维持下去啊，哈哈哈。
One thing I will ask — please try not to embarrass him too much, okay? He's the fighting champion of Boulder Town, after all — an idol for all the children. He needs to keep up that image, haha.
欸，你来了！快，他走得不急，现在出发应该还能赶上。
Oh, you're here! Come on — he wasn't in a hurry so we should be able to catch up easy enough.
…哎呀，可别墨迹太久，时间不等人！
...That is, unless you're planning a big delay!
怎么了？快去俱乐部吧，不然比赛就该结束了。
Huh? Hurry and run to the Club now. Otherwise, the fight'll be over when you get there.
卢卡那小子的对手一般都撑不了几个回合，哈哈哈哈。
Luka's opponents usually don't last long, hahaha. Go!
我事先就有种不好的预感…卢卡这家伙，果然想一出是一出。
I have a bad feeling about this... Luka always does things on the spur of the moment.
…可能是因为刚从擂台上下来，兴奋劲还没过？不过卢卡做事一向风风火火，我早就习惯了。
...Maybe he's on a victory high? Or maybe not. Either way, it's classic Luka.
…是热情过度了吧？不过卢卡做事一向风风火火，我早就习惯了。
...Too passionate. Either way, it's classic Luka — I'm used to it by now.
别看他现在这样，要是真上了前线，我愿意把性命托付给他。光是「地火」一个组织里，欠他一条命的人就不止几十个…更别提下层区的平民了。
Still, when it comes to fighting on the front lines, you can put your life in his hands. There's a dozen of us in Wildfire who are still in his debt... not to mention ordinary Underworlders.
…话是这么说，真不知道这次他又想出了什么鬼点子。只能走一步看一步了。
...That's a story for another day. I have no idea what he's up to this time, we'll just have to wait and see.
卢卡那家伙，怎么总是悄咪咪地跑回镇上？
Why does Luka always come sneaking back into town like this?
我很久没见过那家伙了…希望他这段时间有所成长。
I haven't seen him for a while... I hope he's grown up a bit since then.
史瓦罗的地盘，咱们到了。接下来去哪？
This is Svarog's turf. Where to now?
别着急，跟着我就行了。先去找一个叫卡西迪的机械师吧，我之前已经跟他打过招呼了。走，这边！
Don't worry, just follow me. We need to find a mechanic called Cassidy first — I've hit him up before. This way!
卢卡！可算来了，我等你半天了……
Luka! You're finally here. I've been waiting for you for ages...
放松点，哥们！我答应你的事一定说到做到，犯不着紧张成这样。
Relax, bro! I'm a man of my word. No need to stress out.
这两位是…哎哟，这不是希儿小姐吗？！我这点鸡毛蒜皮的小事居然惊动了「地火」的两位干部……
And these two are... Oh, Miss Seele!? To think that two senior Wildfire members are concerned with my trivial problems...
噢，{F#她们}{M#他们}俩是顺路来帮忙的，别介意！你把遇上的事给我们讲明白了就行。
They just came along to help. Don't mind them! Just tell us exactly what happened.
那、那我就说了，你们别笑话我…我是个业余机械师，平时没事就喜欢收集些废件，自己搞些拼装机器人的小活，也算是乐在其中了。
O—Okay... this may sound strange but — I'm an amateur mechanic. I like collecting scrap in my free time, doing odd jobs like putting robots together... that sort of thing.
可就在前几天，我最满意的两个机器人伙伴突然不见了！我平时出去都会把它们留在帐篷里，这聚落周围也都是熟人，以前从来没出过类似的事……

But a few days ago, two of my robots suddenly disappeared! They were my pride and joy. I usually leave them in the tent when I head out — everyone in the settlement knows each other. This has never happened before...
我怀疑是有人盯上了我的机器伙伴，趁我不在偷偷把它们带走了——虽然我不知道那家伙是怎么做到的，难道是篡改了系统？不可能啊……
Someone must have set their sights on my robots and stolen them while I was gone — I just don't know how they managed it. Did they change the programming? But that's not possible...
也许它们只是搭伙去散步了。
Maybe they just went out for a walk together.
怎、怎么可能？！您别开玩笑了，看不出来我是真的很痛心吗……
H—Hey, stop kidding around! Can't you tell I have a serious problem on my hands...?
呃…没别的意思，我单纯觉得这聚落里的人没那个本事。
*sigh* It's not impossible, I just don't think there's anyone in the settlement capable of something like that.
原来如此！丢了两台机器人，是吧？那你手上有什么线索没？或者只是合理的猜想也行。我们想帮忙调查，总得找个入手点吧？
I see, two robots... Do you have any clues? Any reasonable guesses? We need to have an opening to start the investigation.
呃…非要说的话，有一件事我到现在都想不太明白。
Not really... but here's the most mysterious part of all this:
我那两部失窃的机器里有一台无人机，我给它起名叫「小飞」。我给「小飞」装了报警器，没权限的人只要一靠近它就会嗡嗡叫个没完——那音量，保证整个聚落的人都能听见。

One of the machines they stole was a drone — I call it Little Fay. Little Fay has an alarm that buzzes non-stop as soon as any unauthorized people get close. It's guaranteed to wake up the entire settlement.
但是机器人失窃的时候，我压根没听见「小飞」的报警声…这事我到现在都想不明白。
But I didn't hear Little Fay's alarm at all... I still can't figure out how that happened.
不可能！我走之前「小飞」还好好的，肯定不可能突然出问题。
No way! Little Fay was shipshape — not a hitch nor glitch in sight.
也许聚落里真有机器人高手。
Maybe there's a true robotics master in the settlement.
不…不可能！{F#姐们}{M#哥们}，这你得信我，我对住在这附近的人可是再熟不过了。
T—Trust me! I know the people here — it's extremely unlikely.
嗯，原本应该发出警报的无人机突然成了哑炮…值得留意。还有别的补充吗？
Hmm, a drone that was supposed to sound an alarm suddenly went silent... Worth remembering. Anything else?
我想想…哦，还有一个细节，不知道能不能派上用场——
Let me think... Oh, there is one other thing, but I don't know if it's useful...
我给「小飞」装了个追踪仪，只要它离「大奔」——哦，「大奔」是另外那台机器人的名字——只要它俩之间距离过远，「小飞」就会开启自动寻路，飞到「大奔」身边。

Little Fay also has a tracker. If it gets too far from Big Ben — oh, Big Ben is the name of the other robot — if there's too much distance between them, Little Fay will automatically start routing and fly to Big Ben's location.
…就这些了，我试过自己去找线索，但根本不知道该从哪下手。果然，专业的事还是得留给专业的人做……
...That's all I suppose. I tried to find clues myself, but I don't know where to start. This job needs real professionals...
嗯，嗯…行，我明白了！放心吧哥们，我们保证帮你把机器人找回来。
Mm-hmm... Cool, we've got this! Don't worry, bro. We promise we'll find your robots!
...Hey, how can you be so sure?
别担心，卡西迪，你的事就交给「地火」吧。你就在这儿好好歇着，别被坏心情毁了一整天！
Don't worry, Cassidy — Wildfire's on the case. You just rest up here, and don't let this ruin your day!
…喂，刚才那是啥情况？你就那么确定咱们能帮他找到东西？
What was that all about? You're <unbreak>100%</unbreak> certain we're gonna find those robots for him?
别着急，希儿！你先听听我的推论。
Slow down, Seele! Listen to my analysis first.
想趁人不注意偷走两台机器人可是个大工程，何况其中一台还装了报警器。所以，我猜咱们的小贼朋友压根没把「小飞」带走。
It's a big job to steal two robots without anyone noticing, especially when one of them has an alarm. I'm guessing that our thief friend never even took Little Fay.
那家伙肯定知道「小飞」装了报警系统，所以干脆决定先用暴力手段把它弄坏。
I think the thief knew that Little Fay had an alarm, so they decided to break it.
但他又怕卡西迪能把「小飞」修好，然后用追踪功能寻找「大奔」…所以他把损坏的无人机丢到了某个地方，自己带着「大奔」跑路了。
But they also knew that Cassidy could fix Little Fay, and use its tracker function to find Big Ben... The thief must have tossed the broken drone somewhere and only made off with Big Ben.
…欸，你们怎么愣住了？倒是发表下看法啊。
...Hey, why are you both looking at me like that? Say something.
Whoa, hold up! That sounds sus. You didn't do it, did you?
哈哈哈，看来你挺认同我的推断，是吧？
Hahaha, so you agree with my reasoning, right?
当真？要是有什么漏洞，你们可得及时指出来啊。
Seriously? You've gotta tell me if there are holes in my logic.
我感觉…卢卡的推论还挺合理的。前提是窃贼确实只有一个人。
I think... Luka's analysis makes sense, provided there was only one thief.
没想到，原来你不止四肢发达啊。
So, you do have a brain somewhere in all that muscle.
哈哈哈，三肢发达才准确。既然你们都同意我的推断，那干脆就顺着这个思路找起来吧。
Hahaha, I'm not just biceps and steel, y'know. Well, if you all agree with what I said, let's go prove it.
这地方最不缺的就是被四处乱丢的无人机。动嘴不如动腿，走吧！
Missing drones are a bit of a regular occurrence down here. Come on, move those legs!

Scanning for signal from Big Ben...
你们仔细听！这肯定就是卡西迪之前说的追踪系统。

检索失败。「大奔」与本机距离过远。需要开启追踪功能。

居然还真有追踪功能…看看它到底灵不灵光吧。

喂，它要飞走了！快跟上去！

红色的系带…地、地火？！你们来这儿干嘛？我…呃，我过得挺好的，不用你们帮忙！你、你们赶紧走吧，去管别人的闲事！

哼，每天净想着不劳而获，没事就干些小偷小摸的勾当…过得能不好吗？
Hmph, shying away from honest work, indulging in petty crime — of course you're "doing just fine."
哈，这我就得反驳你一句了，希儿！你看他身边那台「大奔」，这水平怎么也不止小偷小摸了吧？

等、等会儿，你们怎么知道这机器人的名字？难道你们是——
H—Hold on a second. Who told you the name of this robot? Don't tell me it's—
——你猜对了，就是卡西迪让我们来的！把你偷走的东西交出来，不然就等着见识冠军的拳头吧！
That's right. Cassidy sent us here! Hand over what you stole, or be prepared to face the fist of a champion!
…去你们的吧！事已至此，我也豁出去了！反正要是这事传出去，我也别想在这附近混了…老子今天就跟你们拼了！
...F—Fist of a champion, huh? Hmph, I've come this far — I won't be able to show my face around here if news gets out... Do your worst!
死不悔改啊，这家伙——那就不用再跟他废话了，卢卡！
Going all the way, huh? Enough talk then — Luka, let's get him!
哈，这下想到一块去了！来吧，今天必须让你尝点苦头！

…我错了！大哥大姐们，我知道错了！你们放我一马吧！

哈哈哈，这就认输了？刚才的气势跑哪去了？

真不知道该怎么感谢你们，卢卡，希儿，还有…外来者{F#姐妹}{M#兄弟}！这下我的生活终于能回归正轨了……
I don't know how I can ever thank you... Luka, Seele, and... {F#miss}{M#mister} outsider! My life can finally get back on track now...
怎么样，我没说大话吧？「地火」的干部向来说到做到。

我从来没怀疑过你，卢卡兄弟！欠你的这个人情我会一直记得…不介意的话，现在我想去给小飞和大奔做一次系统彻查。

行啊，你快去吧！咱们回头见。

…咳，这都是他自己一拍脑门想出的主意。同不同意都看你，史瓦罗。

If weapons and gun barrels are unused for prolonged periods of time, the risk of rust damages increases. Periodic use will reduce such risk and extend the life of these components.

...Never mind. I get the feeling I'm wasting my breath.
去找史瓦罗的事，你跟头儿打过招呼了？
Have you talked to Oleg about going to see Svarog?
哈哈哈，你就想问这个？我也不是什么事都跟师傅说的。
Hahaha, that's all you wanna ask? I don't necessarily tell master Oleg everything, you know.
*sigh* Never mind. Just don't go overboard.
哈哈哈，我真看不出来你是支持哪边的！
Hahaha, I really can't tell whose side you're on!
投降吧，你不是我们的对手！
Give it up! You're no match for us!
有点骨气——那就再吃我两拳！
You've got guts... Time to end this!
还差一点！那家伙要撑不住了。
Nearly there! It's not gonna last much longer.
Ha! I'll deal the final blow!
哈，终于有个能抗住这一拳的对手了！
Ha! Finally, an opponent that can take the punches head-on!
有力的一击——但击不穿我的防御。
A powerful strike — but not enough to break my defenses.
不愧是史瓦罗大佬——那再尝尝这招如何！
That's why they call you Boss Svarog! How about this!?
...Red contestant down! Ten, nine, eight, seven...
…怎么可能，离结束还早着呢！再来！
...No way. I'm a long way from tapping out! Let's go!
…怎么可能，离结束还早着呢！再来！
...No way. I'm a long way from tapping out! Let's go!
你让我印象深刻，「地火」的卢卡。
You make a strong impression, Luka of Wildfire.
{NICKNAME}，走，我们跟上去。记得压低声音……
嘘！别出声，你差点害我们暴露了！
Shh! Be quiet! You almost exposed us!
唔，你们偷偷摸摸的，到底在干嘛呀？
Umm, why are you sneaking around like this?
再不快点就要跟丢了…虎克，你赶紧回镇上去，别在这儿晃悠了。
We're gonna lose him if we don't hurry... Hook, run back to town — stop hanging around here.
…虎克知道啦，刚才卢卡哥哥也是这么说的！
*sigh* Okayyyy... That's what Luka said too.
希望你们两个能找到宝贝！
I hope you two find the treasure!
I... For some reason, I feel like...
...Yeah. I don't have a reason. It's just a feeling.
可咱们跟了这一路…要是不打开看看，就白折腾一场了。
Then again, we followed him for ages... It'll be a waste if we don't see what's inside.
费了这么多力，必须打开看看。
We've come this far — let's open it up.
我来开吧，不知道里面到底装的什么——
I wonder what's in there. Here, let me open it...
看着像是小孩子的字迹，还有涂鸦…{NICKNAME}，你也来看看。
It looks like a kid's handwriting, and some scribbled art... {NICKNAME}, have a look.
我叫玛吉，和你一样来自熔锤镇，是你的忠实拳迷！虽然我从小身体不好，但还是梦想着有一天能跟你一样，成为擂台上的大明星！
My name is Margie, and I'm from Moltammerville too. I'm a big fan of yours! I've been sick since I was a baby, but I still dream of becoming a big star in the cage one day — just like you!
虽然有些难为情，但我还是想托爸爸把这个小本本送给你……
It's a bit embarrassing, but I wanted my Dad to give you this notebook...
…因为我想让卢卡哥哥知道，我会一直以你为目标努力！而且，我还想把自己的愿望偷偷跟你分享…哪怕只是我的幻想！
...I wanted to tell you that you've inspired me to keep working hard and achieve my goal, even if it's hard to reach!
等我成为和哥哥一样厉害的拳手，我一定要尽力帮助下层区的大家。
When I become a fighter as awesome as you, I'm gonna do my best to help people in the Underworld.
我想带着小伙伴一起，帮人们解决烦恼，看着他们露出可爱的笑脸。
I wanna team up with my friends and help everyone together so they can smile again.
听着他们感激的话，然后喊出我的决胜台词——
I'll listen to their thanks and then yell out my winning slogan:
「熔锤镇出身的勇士，无敌的磐岩冠军——」
"The Moltammerville warrior, the peerless Boulder Champion..."
然后，我还想把骚扰大家的坏人全都赶走——
Then, I wanna chase away all the bad things hurting everyone...
和小伙伴们一起，把那些吓人的怪物收拾得干干净净！
...I'll go with my friends and clear out all the scary monsters!
帮助下层变得安全，然后喊出我的决胜台词——
I'll make the Underworld safe, then yell out my other winning slogan:
「熔锤出身的勇士，无敌的磐岩冠军——」
"The Moltammerville warrior, the peerless Boulder Champion..."
最后…我还想给下层区的大家争取更好的生活！
Lastly... I wanna make life better for the Underworld!
妈妈说，有个叫史瓦罗的家伙一直拦着我们，不准我们回上层区看看……
Mom said there's someone called Svarog who keeps stopping us from going back to the Overworld...
所以，我要去挑战那个大机器人，让他知道我这个拳王的厉害！
So I'm gonna challenge that big robot and show him what I can do as a champion fighter!
「可是，史瓦罗太强大了，我们肯定没有胜算！」小伙伴们听说以后，心里都敲起了退堂鼓。
"But Svarog is too strong! We'll never win!" My friends are gonna all wanna back out when they hear about this.
玛吉知道，必须给大家做出榜样，我要挺身而出，一个人去找史瓦罗较量。
But I know I have to be an example for everyone. I need to stick my neck out and go challenge Svarog on my own.
「咚！哐！嘭！」那场面真是激烈！最后我们打成了平手，谁都没法战胜对方。
"Bam! Crack! Boom!" It's gonna be such an epic fight! And then we'll reach a draw. Neither of us will be able to win.
不过，史瓦罗承认了玛吉的实力，也愿意听我讲讲下层区大家的事情。
But Svarog will acknowledge my strength and be willing to listen to the Underworlders.
结果皆大欢喜！小伙伴们鼓起了掌，受苦的人们也得到了解放。
So, it'll be a happy ending! My friends will clap, and all the people suffering will be free.
不过…这些都还只是玛吉的梦想，不知要过多久才能实现……
But... all that is just my dream. I dunno how long it's gonna be till it becomes reality...
我现在躺在病床上，但我一点都不害怕！因为有卢卡哥哥在，你的每一句鼓励我都记得清清楚楚。
I'm lying in bed sick right now, but as long as Mister Luka is around I won't be scared! I remember everything you said to encourage me.
我想，在成为被大家仰慕的冠军之前，我最先要战胜的就是这些病痛。
Before becoming a champion, I wanna defeat this illness first.
然后，我就要重新学会站立，行走，锻炼…直到实现所有这些愿望！
Then, I need to learn how to stand, walk, and exercise again... until I achieve all my dreams!
我希望…我相信，卢卡哥哥一定会支持我到最后的，对吗？
I hope... No, I believe Mister Luka will support me till the end, right?
卢卡，那家伙…还真是幼稚啊。
Luka... I think I get it now.
{NICKNAME}，我想…我想咱们还是忘了这事吧。你觉得呢？
{NICKNAME}, maybe we should... forget about all this. What do you say?
嗯…也许再过一段时间，我们可以找他聊聊。
Mm... Maybe one day we can talk about it with him... but let's give him some time.
I kinda wanna talk to him about it.
嗯…我也是。但还是再等一段时间吧。
Mm... Me too... but maybe we should give him some time.
今天我们就先回镇上吧，{NICKNAME}。
Let's head back to town for today, {NICKNAME}.
Seele? {NICKNAME}? What are you guys doing here?
等等，那是…虎克？！她在这儿干嘛？
Wait, that's... Hook!? What's she doing here?
指使卢卡的一定就是虎克！
So Hook was the mastermind behind all of this!
…我都听不出你是不是在开玩笑了。
卢卡应该会劝她回镇上去吧？毕竟那家伙很在意小孩子的安全。
Luka should tell her to go back to town — he's always worrying after the kids' safety.
…咱们都跟到这儿了，可不能让这小鬼把事情搞砸！
...We've come this far, we can't let this kid ruin everything!
(The sound of howling in the Fragmentum)
(The sound of tools clanking to the ground)
Hey, that's too close! Step back a bit!
不太对劲…喂，咱们先躲一下！
This doesn't feel right... Hey, let's hide for a bit!
好险…还好没跟丢。快，追上去！
Phew... thank goodness we didn't lose him. Quick, let's keep up the chase!
他刚才…好像放下了什么东西？
被跟踪目标发现了，行动失败…再尝试一次吧。
You were discovered by the target... maybe give it another try.
跟丢目标了，行动失败…再尝试一次吧。
You lost track of the target... maybe give it another try.
您有一条跨星际通讯信息，请及时查收。
You have an interstellar message. Please check it promptly.
列车刚刚收到了一条从罗浮仙舟发来的消息，从摘要来看，似乎会和接下来的行程计划有冲突。
Just got a message from the Xianzhou Luofu. Looks like it'll conflict with our original schedule.
许久不见了，星穹列车的朋友们，不知各位的开拓之旅是否顺利？
It's been a while, my friends on the Astral Express. How's your trailblazing expedition going?
近日罗浮仙舟即将举行庆礼「星天演武」仪典。诸位曾帮助罗浮弭平灾厄，是仙舟联盟的好朋友。在此景元代表神策府诚邀诸位莅临观礼，请诸位务必拨冗赏光。

Soon, the Xianzhou Luofu will be holding the Luminary Wardance. Those who have aided the Luofu in overcoming the crisis are cherished allies of the Xianzhou, thus, on behalf of the Seat of Divine Foresight, I'm extending an invitation to attend the ceremony. Your presence would be greatly appreciated.
还真是热闹啊，才从家族的「谐乐大典」中抽身，这么快就有了新的邀请。
Well, things are getting lively. We've barely recovered from The Family's Charmony Festival, and we're already being invited to another special event.
Trailblazing is all about having fun.
这么一想，咱们「开拓之旅」就要变成了到处吃吃喝喝玩玩的「快落之旅」。
Why not think about it this way. Our trailblazing expeditions are turning into "blast expeditions," where we eat, drink, and play wherever we go.
是啊，吃吃喝喝玩玩，一路快速堕落的「快落」。
Yeah, wherever we go, we eat, play, and have a blast!
对「盛会」都有心理创伤了。
I'm still recovering from the trauma caused by the last "festivity."
还有还有，连赶两场「盛会」活动，是不是显得有些不务正业了？列车的正事该是恢复星图和航路数据，顺带做些严肃的科考工作吧？
But wait, won't it look unprofessional if we attend two ceremonies in a row? Aren't we supposed to be focused on restoring astral charts and doing some serious scientific exploration?
那就让三月留下维护列车？
So, we should leave March behind to take care of the Express?
我、我可没说不想去。我是很喜欢凑热闹的啦…只是希望下一个凑热闹的地方不要再冒出个什么星期五、星期六来跟我们作对。
H—Hey! That's not what I meant! I'm all for some fun... I just hope there won't be any surprise party crashers like Friday or Saturday.
罗浮仙舟才度过了危机，举办演武仪典也是在对外彰显自己和平安全的状态。
The Xianzhou Luofu has recently overcome a crisis. By holding the Wardance, they're demonstrating to everyone that they've returned to a state of peace and safety.
去匹诺康尼之前大家也是这么说的！「在『家族』的保护下不会有任何危险～」
But that's what everyone said before we went to Penacony! "You'll be totally safe under The Family's protection!"
倒也不必杯弓蛇影。演武仪典不似「谐乐大典」那样隐藏了诸多秘密。它只是为纪念帝弓与云骑对抗丰饶孽物，拯救仙舟的壮举而设的节庆罢了。

No need to worry. The Wardance is not like the Charmony Festival with all its hidden secrets. It's just a festival to honor the Reignbow Arbiter and the Cloud Knights who fought against the Abominations of Abundance and protected the Xianzhou ships.
典礼前后除去星槎巡航的演出外，不过是些比武斗剑的竞赛。和我们去看过的泰科铵机动球没什么区别。
Aside from starskiff performances, it's mostly martial contests, nothing too different from the Taikiyan Roboball contest we've seen before.
姬子，你觉得如何？按照列车目前的状况，我们接受了黑天鹅女士的提议，应该安排一次去翁法罗斯的「开拓之旅」，补充燃料。
What do you think, Himeko? Since we've accepted Miss Black Swan's proposal, we should probably head to Amphoreus for refueling.
时间倒也不算紧迫。这次「开拓之旅」情况特殊，在去往下一站前，列车也应做好补给、支援方面的准备。
Mm, there's certainly no rush. This trailblazing expedition is quite unique, and the Express needs to be fully stocked and prepared before moving on to the next stop.
正巧有黑塔女士牵线，我本打算在启程前为天才俱乐部#81阮•梅女士从「金伦加深域」带回一具古兽遗骸，做些人情交换。不过这么一算，至少需要几周时间才能返航。

With Madam Herta's help, I was planning to deliver some Leviathan fossils from Calenga Abyss to Ruan Mei, member #81 of the Genius Society. It could earn us some favors before we set off. However, it may take a few weeks.
喔，那就是…去不成罗浮啦。
Ah, so that means... we're not going to the Luofu.
小三月，维系关系，这就是成年人生活所必须支付的小小代价。既然罗浮仙舟发出了邀请，那么作为朋友，星穹列车也理当赴约。
Being an adult means maintaining relationships, whether we like it or not, March. Since we've been invited, it's only right for the Astral Express to attend the ceremony.
我打算这么安排：帕姆会将所有人先送往罗浮。之后，我和瓦尔特先生则继续前往完成与阮•梅的约定。{NICKNAME}、三月和丹恒三人则可以作为列车观礼的代表出席仪典。

So, here's the plan: Pom-Pom will take everyone to the Xianzhou Luofu. Mr. Yang and I will meet up with Ruan Mei and fulfill our promise. Meanwhile, {NICKNAME}, March, and Dan Heng will represent the Express and attend the Wardance.
What do you two think, {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng?
Sounds great. Let's split into groups!
看起来大家都没什么异议。
I want to play with Leviathan fossils, too!
姬子姐和杨叔可是去正经搞科研呢！古兽化石哪有看演武斗剑好玩？
Himeko and Mr. Yang will be busy with serious research. Besides, fossils can't compete with martial contests when it comes to fun, right?
再说了，就属你在罗浮朋友多，你不去我都不知道该去哪玩！你得带路啊。
Plus, you're the only one with so many friends on the Luofu. I'll be lost if you don't come along! You've got to lead the way.
既然各位乘客已经达成一致了，那我们就准备跃迁前往仙舟「罗浮」了帕。
Now that everyone's on board with the plan, it's time to warp to the Xianzhou Luofu.
「金伦加深域」…她想从那儿找到什么呢？目前所有关于古兽的研究只是证明了我们对这种生命一无所知……
Calenga Abyss... what does she expect to find there? Current research on Leviathan merely proves how little we know about such life forms...
一无所知，这才是天才会出手的领域。科学要做的就是从无知的帷幕上挑破一个孔……
That's why geniuses are interested in that field. Science is all about uncovering the unknown...
两个成年人的交谈中充斥着复杂的术语，从「假定型天体生物化学」到「跨维度演化论」，车厢中充满了沉闷费解的空气。

The conversation between the two adults brims with complex jargon, from "Assumptive Astrobiological Chemistry" to "Trans-dimensional Evolutionary Theory," filling the carriage with an air of dense perplexity.
Have a safe trip, you two.
{NICKNAME}，别太想我们喔。要是看到什么有趣的古兽化石，我会带上几块作为伴手礼送给你的。
Don't miss us too much, {NICKNAME}. If I stumble upon some cool Leviathan fossils, I'll bring a few back as souvenirs for you.
姬子姐真是懂人心啊。嘻嘻，在古兽化石和演武仪典之间，还是后者听起来比较有意思。
Himeko really knows how to convince people. Hehe, between Leviathan fossils and the Wardance, the latter definitely sounds more fun.
对了…丹恒，这次去罗浮，你会跟我们一块儿下车走走的吧？
By the way, Dan Heng... this time, you'll be taking a stroll with us on the Luofu, right?
放你和{NICKNAME}两个在罗浮上乱逛？我可不放心。
Just let you and {NICKNAME} wander around aimlessly on the Luofu by yourselves? I don't think so.
而且瓦尔特先生说的没错，建木灾异刚刚平息，无论是长生种还是短生种都对灾难心有余悸。景元选在此时举办演武仪典，显然是为了对外彰显罗浮的安定。

Plus, Mr. Yang is right. The Ambrosial Arbor Crisis just ended, and both the long-life and short-life species are still feeling uneasy. And that's why Jing Yuan wants to organize the Wardance, to show that the Xianzhou Luofu is stable and safe.
既然他发出邀请，于情于理，我都应该去看看老朋友。
Since he has extended an invitation, it's only right that I visit my old friend.
舒适的沙发，每次跃迁你都会坐在上面静静等候失重瞬间的来临。
The cozy sofa, your chosen sanctuary during each warp, where you calmly await the fleeting thrill of weightlessness.
星穹列车即将发车前往罗浮仙舟，请各位乘客坐稳扶好！
Buckle up, everyone! The Astral Express is about to depart for the Xianzhou Luofu!
故地重游，本姑娘内心真是颇有一番感慨……
Coming back to this place brings back so many memories, you know...
下面请听三月七诗朗诵…
So, here's something for all of you, a poem by March 7th...
也没有到要为此情此景吟诗的地步啦！只是想到上一回抵达仙舟时的波折和惊悚……
Hey, I'm not actually gonna recite a poem! I was just thinking about all the twists and turns we went through when we first arrived on the Xianzhou...
What memories? Care to spill the details?
也不是什么了不得的诗情画意啦，只是想到上一回抵达仙舟时的波折和惊悚……
Well, it's nothing too poetic. I was just thinking about all the twists and turns we went through when we first arrived at the Xianzhou ship...
这一回咱们既没有被人半胁迫半诱骗，也不是为了追捕什么通缉犯，更不是从卸货码头登陆，如此一帆风顺……
This time, we're not being forced or enticed, or chasing after wanted criminals. And we didn't have to sneak in through the cargo dock. This trip has been incredibly smooth...
如此容易满足，我们好可怜啊…
We're so easily pleased. I actually feel sorry for us...
没办法，这就是无名客的宿命吧。
Such is the fate of us Nameless, I suppose.
Oh, come on, don't jinx us...
我这是美好的祝愿，你这才叫乌鸦嘴吧！
Haha, I'm just hoping for the best! You're the one jinxing us!
星槎海有这么热闹吗？今天人真是格外多啊！都快听不清彼此说话了！
Is the Starskiff Haven always this crowded? There are so many people here! I can barely hear anything!
彦卿说，将军派他来接咱们，可他人在哪儿呢？
Yanqing said General Jing Yuan sent him to welcome us, but where is he?
我们去织机前面等他吧。那是码头上最显眼的地标。
Let's wait for him in front of the loom. It's the most prominent landmark on the dock.
Hey, you guys! Hold on a moment!
那两个人是不是在叫我们啊？看打扮…像是匹诺康尼人？
Did they just call us? Look at their outfits... they're from Penacony, right?
不知你们几位是不是熟悉罗浮仙舟的情况？
Are you familiar with the Xianzhou Luofu?
略知一二。请问有什么事吗？
We know a little bit about it. What do you need?
我们俩来自匹诺康尼，也许你听说过这个地方？这次来到仙舟，是为了采集一些有趣的梦境素材。
We're from Penacony, maybe you've heard of it? We came to this ship to gather interesting materials for making dream bubbles.
巧了，我们刚从那儿离开。
We just left there. Talk about coincidence.
那就太好了，你们知道在这「罗浮」之上，有什么值得一去的景点吗？
That's great! Do you know any must-see attractions on the Luofu?
You've come to the right people!
那是！我们仨可是仙舟通！
Why don't you ask the locals?
我们问了啊！但本地人都回答说：「罗浮的景点有啥好去的，都没意思！」
We did! But the locals were all like, "Come on, there's nothing worth seeing on the Luofu! It's so boring here!"
也可以理解。如果有人问我：「匹诺康尼都有什么值得去的景点呢？」我恐怕也会一时语塞。
Can't blame them. If someone asked me, "What's there to see on Penacony?" I'd probably struggle to answer too.
所以这种事还是要问其他游客啦！
That's why we're asking fellow tourists!
这段时间来的游客，多半会去参观演武仪典。我们几个就是为此而来的啊。
Most of the tourists around at the moment are here to attend the Wardance, and that's why we're here too.
我当然知道演武仪典的。但这仪典的擂台不是还没开放吗？
Yeah, we know about that ceremony, but isn't the fighting ring still closed?
我听说这一次的演武擂台，是拿罗浮退役的巨型斗舰改装而成的。
I've heard the ring was actually converted from a huge decommissioned Luofu fighter jet.
So, it's even larger than a regular starskiff?
那还用说！这可是巨型斗舰，肯定比民用的星槎大多了！
No doubt about it! It's a massive fighter jet! It's got to be larger than a civilian starskiff!
So, it's even bigger than the Radiant Feldspar?
那多半是「晖长石号」更大吧！
The Radiant Feldspar is bigger, I guess!
不过咱现在只能等到几周后演武仪典开幕，才有机会登舰了。在此之前，我们俩也不能耽误工作——所以才问你们，有什么比较值得一去的景点？

But for now, all we can do is wait until the Wardance starts in a few weeks before we can board it. We've still got work to do, so we can't just sit around waiting for it to start, that's why we're asking you about some must-see attractions.
我们希望能找到那种，在匹诺康尼的日常梦境中难得一见的特殊体验。我们的客户最喜欢这种梦泡了。
We're looking for unique experiences that you won't find on Penacony. Our clients love these kinds of dream bubbles the most.
{NICKNAME}，这里你最熟，快给他们出出主意吧～
You're the expert here, {NICKNAME}. Give them some suggestions!
这是个不错的主意。金人巷的人间烟火气，在「盛会之星」上难得一见。
Hmm, good idea. The everyday vibe of the Aurum Alley is a rare find on the Planet of Festivities.
人间烟火气啊…确实，现在我们这些客户啊，尝遍了惊险刺激的梦境。也许反而是这类接地气的内容能让他们找回感动。
Everyday vibe... Yeah, our clients have had their fair share of adrenaline-pumping Dreamscapes. Maybe something down-to-earth would touch their hearts.
感谢三位的指点，我们这就去金人巷采风。也许过两天，我们会在那里再度相遇。
Thanks for the suggestion. We'll head to the Aurum Alley to gather materials. Maybe we'll run into each other there in a couple of days.
对对对，去绥园！那里可是罗浮著名的灵异圣地，到处都飘着些调皮的小鬼火，可有意思了！
Oh, yeah! Fyxestroll Garden! It's famous for supernatural stuff, with those mischievous heliobi floating around! It's pretty fascinating!
灵异？我不太喜欢恐怖题材…不过，我们的客户一定会喜欢。
Supernatural? I don't really like scary things... but our clients will love it.
听起来确实有点意思。那我们就去你们说的「绥园」啦～之后咱也许能在绥园再见！
It does sound interesting. Let's go check out Fyxestroll Garden! Maybe we'll bump into each other there!
这倒是个好主意。梦境中尽是些恒常不变的人造景观，但这鳞渊境却是「自然」侵蚀「人造」而缔造的独特风景。
That's indeed a good idea. While the Dreamscape on Penacony is all artificial, Scalegorge Waterscape is a celebration of nature's resurgence. It has some remarkable scenery.
这个好，我最喜欢自然风光了。那我们就先去鳞渊境吧。
Awesome. I love being out there in nature. Let's go to Scalegorge Waterscape first.
我有点担心，自然风光相关的梦泡会不会有些过时…不过无妨，我们去看看吧。
I'm a bit worried that nature-themed dream bubbles might be outdated... but hey, let's go check it out anyway.
再见，也许这几天我们会在鳞渊境再相遇。
See you later. Maybe we'll run into each other there in a few days.
Why not climb to the top of the Ambrosial Arbor?
喂！不要乱给别人出这种会被抓起来的馊主意啦！
Hey! That's a terrible idea! You'll get them arrested!
哈哈…你真有意思。还是给我们提供些更靠谱的建议吧。
Haha... you're just joking, right? How about giving us some more practical suggestions?
…等一下。这个主意未必是个馊主意。富贵险中求啊！走吧，我们去爬树！
...Wait a sec. Maybe it's not such a terrible idea after all? No risk, no reward! Come on, let's go climb that tree!
Slow down a bit. Wait for me.
喂！别走的那么快！喂…至少出了事别把我们供出来啊！唉，他们不会惹出什么事端吧…真令人不安。
Hey, wait! Just think about what you're doing! And... don't mention our names if something goes wrong! Ugh, I hope they don't get into trouble... This is nerve-wracking.
你们看，彦卿似乎已经到了。
真的诶！我们赶紧去找他汇合吧！
Really! Let's go catch up with him!
Hey, everyone! It's been a while!
虽然感觉距离咱们上次离开也没过多久，但彦卿你是不是……
Doesn't feel like it's been that long since we last saw you, but Yanqing, are you...?
都说只要一不留神，小娃娃会突然长成熟人也认不出的样子来。彦卿，你是不是…长高了一点儿？
They say kids grow up really fast. Yanqing, are you a little bit taller than before?
我们才离开了几个月时间。
We've only been away for a few months.
Oh, you've come along, too, Mr. Dan Heng.
让各位久等了。演武仪典在即，星槎海又是罗浮的交通枢纽，我光是从人群中找人就花了不少时间。
Sorry for the delay. With the upcoming Wardance, and the Starskiff Haven being so busy, things are a little hectic.
真的吗？将军一直还担心我个子长不高呢。我一直劝他安心。
Really? The General is always worried I won't grow much taller, but I keep telling him not to worry about it.
让各位久等了。演武仪典在即，星槎海又是罗浮的交通枢纽，我光是从人群中找人就花了不少时间。
Sorry for the delay. With the upcoming Wardance, and the Starskiff Haven being so busy, things are a little hectic.
抱歉，连续几站的冒险让我养成了警惕的习惯，每个地方第一个出现迎接我们的人，都要当心。
Sorry, but after our previous adventures, I've become suspicious of whoever greets us first.
Do you have to be suspicious around me, too?
要知道，上一次来仙舟，第一个迎接我们的可是……
You know, the last time we came to the Xianzhou, the first person who greeted us was...
I get it. Better safe than sorry.
说真的，这是我第一次在罗浮上见到这么热闹的景象。
Seriously, I've never seen the Luofu so lively before.
我原本还有些担心，建木危机刚刚过去，举行演武仪典是否有些仓促。但看看现在的星槎海，将军选择的时机是恰当的。
I was a bit worried that holding the Wardance right after the Ambrosial Arbor crisis might be too soon, but seeing the bustling Starskiff Haven, I understand why General Jing Yuan chose this timing.
嗯，这些往来行人里不仅有其他洞天的居民，还有像三位这样远道而来的客人。
Yep, there's people from other delves and travelers like you three who've come from afar.
演武仪典召开在即，星槎海的客流吞吐连上了几个台阶。云骑的安全工作也比过去忙上了好几倍。
With the Wardance coming up, there's a huge number of visitors pouring into the Starskiff Haven. The Cloud Knights are working hard to keep the security tight.
将军说了，想要让罗浮从灾后重整旗鼓，恰恰需要这场演武仪典。
The General said this ceremony would help the Xianzhou Luofu recover from the crisis.
彰显武德、安稳民心、提振士气，还能借仪典之机邀请友邦客人来访，促成贸易与和平。
It's a way to showcase our martial spirit, reassure people, boost morale, and attract visitors from other planets to promote trade and peace.
说起来，联盟对本次仪典还挺重视的，「朱明」和「曜青」两座仙舟都派遣使者来贺了！
By the way, the Xianzhou Alliance places great importance on this ceremony, too. The Xianzhou ships the Zhuming and the Yaoqing have both sent messengers to offer their blessings!
是啊，不知{NICKNAME}是否听过它「千星锻炉」的名头，云骑军的军器技术十之五六都由它提供。
Yeah, I wonder if you've heard of it, {NICKNAME}. It's known as the "Starforge" and is responsible for providing more than half of the Cloud Knights' armaments.
朱明仙舟一直以能工巧匠著称，听说朱明的怀炎将军自己就是工匠中的翘楚。啊…要是能有幸得到他亲手锻造的宝剑，我怕是做梦都要笑醒了。
The Xianzhou Zhuming boasts skilled craftsmasters, and General Huaiyan is a top-notch craftsman himself. Ah... if only I could get a sword forged by him! I'd be on cloud nine.
嗯，曜青仙舟是联盟巡猎孽物的锋镝，常年在外征战四方。虽说同属联盟，但我对那里知道的也不算多。

Yeah, the Xianzhou Yaoqing is a major force in hunting down abominations and is always engaged in conflicts across the cosmos. Although it's a member of the Xianzhou Alliance, I don't know much about it.
只听天舶司的驭空大人说，曜青发来的战报上回回「大捷」，令人印象深刻。
But Madam Yukong from the Sky-Faring Commission mentioned that the Yaoqing always sends back reports of great victories, which is quite impressive.
听说曜青的飞霄将军年纪轻轻，却勇冠三军。云骑军里同僚们将她传得神乎其神，说她一身西瓜般的腱子肉，一拳下去便能轰碎十来头孽物…也不知是真是假。

I heard General Feixiao of the Yaoqing is a young and dauntless lady. My peers say that she's like a goddess of war, capable of crushing dozens of abominations with a single punch... I wonder if it's true.
…还真想见识见识她的身手啊。
...If only I could witness her prowess with my own eyes.
对了彦卿，下一步咱们该去哪？
By the way, Yanqing, where are we headed next?
啊，你瞧我光杵在这儿拉拉杂杂说了一大堆。将军唤我接各位去司辰宫小坐，他也很久没见各位了，想听你们聊聊列车的近况呢。
Ah, I'm sorry for talking your ear off. The General wants to catch up with you at the Palace of Astrum. He's been eager to hear about how the Express has been doing.
一谈到自己感兴趣的事物，这小大人就露出了孩子气的一面，嘿嘿。
Hehe, it's funny how he tries to act all mature, but whenever it comes to something he's interested in, you can really see his childish side.
要这么说来，你们俩还挺像的。
Well, you're pretty much the same in that regard.
各单位迅速集结！注意保护人群。
All units, assemble quickly! Get ready to protect the crowd!
刚刚还说街上的安全工作不容闪失，怎么就有事情发生了。抱歉各位，我得先去探探情况。
I just mentioned security, and now all of a sudden something's gone wrong. Excuse me, I need to go check out the situation.
It's like whatever you fear will happen, happens.
你和三月一样言出法随。
You're just as jinxed as March.
Hey, what's that supposed to mean!?
事出突然，要耽搁几位一会儿工夫了。容我探问一下刚才到底是什么情况。
I'm sorry, but I'm afraid we'll have to put our plans on hold for now. I need to find out what's going on.
谁是负责这支队伍的长官？我需要个解释。
Who's in charge here? I need some answers.
是我…抱歉，我们一时看守失察，都是我的责任。
It's my fault... we let our guard down for a moment. I take full responsibility.
来，说说吧，演武仪典召开在即，罗浮的一切以安全稳定为上。为什么在星槎海会出现步离囚犯？
With the Wardance approaching, safety should be a top priority. Now, tell me, how did borisin prisoners end up in Starskiff Haven?
按照流程，危险重犯应当收押在星槎中，全程不落地送往幽囚狱。是谁允许押解犯人的船停靠在客运码头的！

According to the protocol, borisin prisoners should be held on a starskiff and taken directly to The Shackling Prison under strict supervision without ever touching the ground. Who allowed a prisoner transport ship to dock at the passenger terminal?
怪不得这位队长，是朱明使节舰太过热心了。
Please don't blame this captain. This incident involves the Zhuming's diplomatic vessel.
在下路君，巡防卫队的值守武官。多谢彦卿骁卫出手相助。事起仓促，绝非这位队长的过错。
I'm Lujun, an officer of the patrol defense squad. Thank you for your help, Lieutenant Yanqing. The situation unfolded rapidly, and it shouldn't be held against the captain.
公司途径罗浮中转的运输船在即将抵达之际遭到了步离人的袭击。朱明的使节舰出手相助，击溃了这股步离劫匪并收押在船舱里。

Here's what happened. An IPC transport ship was attacked by the borisin just before arriving, and the Zhuming's diplomatic vessel came to the rescue. They fought off the borisin pirates and imprisoned them on their ship.
在罗浮航行的宙域，公司的舰船，被步离人打劫，而朱明的使节救了他们？这案情听起来真复杂……
So, an IPC ship was attacked by the borisin near the Luofu, and the Zhuming envoys saved them? This sounds complicated...
属下也是百思不得其解。朱明的使节舰按规矩，停靠在客船码头，将这群犯人移交罗浮这边。
Honestly, it gives me a headache too. The Zhuming diplomatic ship, adhering to standard procedure, docked at the passenger terminal to hand these criminals over to the Luofu.
您也知道，这些日子来，数不清的外客涌入罗浮，星槎航道压力陡增。还没等来押解的星槎与航道管制，步离人狂徒便狗急跳墙了。于是有了方才您看到的一幕。

You know, with all the outsiders flooding onto the Luofu, the starskiff lanes are under immense pressure. The borisin desperadoes decided to put up a fight before the prisoner transport starskiff could get there, and that's what you just witnessed.
我们会尽快将这些人犯送往幽囚狱的。
We'll make sure these prisoners are sent to The Shackling Prison as soon as possible.
如此看来，确实有事急从权之处。我会将此事呈报给地衡司的治安厅，让他们配合善后。
I see, it's an unusual situation indeed. I'll report it to the Security Department of the Realm-Keeping Commission and ask for their cooperation in handling the aftermath.
（也许该听听当事人打算如何善后处理，也方便神策府了解情况，）
(Maybe I should gather more details from others so that the Seat of Divine Foresight can have a better understanding of the situation.)
我和弟兄们会尽快将这群劫匪送进幽囚狱，善后工作也在进行，彦卿骁卫请勿担心。
We'll see to it that these criminals are sent to The Shackling Prison as soon as possible. The cleanup operation is already underway, Lieutenant Yanqing, so there's no need to worry about anything.
有劳了。你是…巡防卫队的武官？看起来似乎面生的很……
Thanks. By the way, you're... an officer of the patrol defense squad, right? I don't remember meeting you before...
哪儿的话，将军侍卫又怎么会记得我这样的小小角色。在下刚刚随出征部队返抵罗浮，因为仪典召开前的安全工作，被临时调派至此。
Well, I'm just a junior officer. I recently returned to the Luofu from the front lines and was temporarily assigned here for security duty before the ceremony.
仙舟的朋友，你们虽然救了我们，我们是很感激。但连我们带货物也一块扣押，这是不是就有些不像话了？
While we appreciate your rescue, my Xianzhou friends, don't you think it's a bit too much to detain us and our cargo?
我们收到命令，在查清袭击事件前因后果之前，必须暂时扣押贵方的货物进行检查。
Sorry, but we've been ordered to detain you and your cargo for inspection until we figure out the source of the attack.
只要事后各方手续勘验完成，我们会连人带货一起放行的。
Once we're done with the formalities, we'll let you and your cargo go.
这批货物压根就不是运往罗浮的，还是公司的专利科技，你们凭什么「检查」啊？
But this shipment isn't even meant for the Luofu! And it's IPC's patented technology. Who do you think you are to conduct an "inspection?"
按照流程，任何抵达罗浮的货物都必须经过检查。
According to the protocol, all cargo arriving on the Luofu must go through inspection.
我们也不算入港啊！我们是遭遇了步离人的袭击，才不得不来罗浮的港口避难啊！
But we didn't officially enter your dock at all! We just sought refuge in your dock because we were attacked by the borisin!
看起来，他们会争论很久。像这样吵不出个结果的纠纷，咱们还是不要卷入为妙。
Looks like this argument could go on forever. Let's not get involved in a heated dispute that won't lead to a resolution.
云骑军安抚了人群，随即散去，长街再度恢复了平静。
The Cloud Knights calm the crowd, then dispersed, and the street was restored to its peaceful state.
彦卿，你真是越来越有大人的模样了。
You look much maturer now, Yanqing.
三月小姐，你就别损我啦。演武仪典前仙舟的安全就像一根紧绷的弦，看似平静，但只要稍稍一拨就有余波动荡不休。

Please don't tease me, Miss March. The situation on the Xianzhou before the Wardance is like a calm lake that can be disturbed by even the smallest pebble — capable of generating far-reaching ripples with even the slightest disturbance.
咱们刚才收拾的那些…呃，那些家伙到底是什么来头啊？
What are those people... I mean, those "monsters" we just dealt with?
这些狼首怪物，唤作步离人，是与仙舟长久为敌的丰饶孽物。
Those werewolf monsters are known as "borisin." They are Abominations of Abundance, and we've been fighting them for a very long time.
没错。这些狼首怪物，唤作步离人，是与仙舟长久为敌的丰饶孽物。
Yeah, those werewolf monsters are known as "borisin." They are Abominations of Abundance, and we've been fighting them for a very long time.
长久以来，步离人势力众多，血腥掠夺和奴役着众多世界，其祸害比起寰宇虫灾也不遑多让。三十年前，联盟还曾和他们大战一场。

The borisin have been a powerful force for a long time, plundering and enslaving many worlds. The threat they pose is just as terrible as the Swarm Disaster, and the Alliance even had a fierce war with them three decades ago.
这些年里，他们的活动渐渐不再像往日那般猖獗了。谁能想到……
Their presence has faded over the years, but who would have thought...
按刚才那个武官所说，他们是在靠近罗浮的宙域袭击了公司的舰船？如此明目张胆的袭击，真是古怪。
According to that officer, they attacked an IPC ship near the Xianzhou Luofu. Such a brazen attack seems quite unusual to me.
我也觉得奇怪，看起来公司和他们结仇不小啊。
Yeah, that's what I find strange, too. It seems like the IPC and the borisin have some serious grudges.
闲话不提，该办正事了，将军要我接各位去司辰宫。
Well, enough with the chitchat. The general wants me to take you to the Palace of Astrum.
彦卿本想再和你们几位多聊聊天，唉，但有些事时时刻刻都让人放心不下……
I'd love to chitchat a little longer, but there are some things that can't be left unchecked...
「放心不下」？莫非是追捕步离人…需要咱们帮忙吗？
Hmm? Is it a serious matter? Maybe you'll... need our help in hunting down the borisin?
不用不用，一点小事罢了。
Thank you, but it's no big deal.
那个…刚刚出现的那个姑娘…把我的剑顺走了。我打算去地衡司报个失物案，看看能不能找回……
By the way... that young lady who just appeared... she took my sword. I'm thinking of filing a lost property report at the Realm-Keeping Commission to see if I can get it back...
哈哈哈哈，人家应该也不是故意的啦！
Hahaha, I doubt she did it on purpose!
云骑出了事也要报警吗？
So when Cloud Knights get into trouble, they have to call the emergency services too?
也许人家就没走远，不再找找吗?
Perhaps she's around here somewhere? Shouldn't we take a look?
报案吧，场面肯定很精彩…
You go file the report, and I go fetch the popcorn. It's gonna be quite the show...
求你别说了，是我一时失察。
Don't remind me. I just zoned out for a moment, that's all.
快走吧，咱们别让将军久等了。
Alright, let's not keep the general waiting.
别担心，有这样身手的女孩不多见，应该没那么难找。
Don't worry. There aren't many people out there with that kind of talent. It shouldn't be too hard to find her.
会带来麻烦的家伙还真不少啊……
There sure are a lot of troublemakers around...
将军，我将列车的客人接来了。不知道将军见客，彦卿来的不是时候。
General, I've brought our guests from the Express. I'm sorry for my bad timing. I didn't know you were meeting a guest, General.
无妨，你来得正是时候。星穹列车的诸位，好久不见！
Don't worry. You're just in time. It's been a while, my friends from the Astral Express!
有朋远来，自然一切都好。
All is well when you have friends coming from afar.
我在匹诺康尼梦到你了。
I dreamed about you on Penacony.
喔？我入故人梦，明我长相忆。能在诸位的美梦之中有一席之地，荣幸之至。
Oh? Well It's an honor to be in your dreams, my friend.
想，怎么能不想呢？数人世相逢，百年欢笑，能得几回又？
Sure, how couldn't I have? It's not often we find such moments to reunite and enjoy one another's presence.
丹恒，{NICKNAME}到底什么时候和将军混得这么熟了？两人说起话来谈笑风生的。
Since when did {NICKNAME} and General Jing Yuan become such good buddies, Dan Heng? They seem to be having a great time.
在我们不知道的时候，一定发生了不少事。最好是这样……
A lot must have happened without our knowledge. At least I hope that's the case...
容我向诸位引介，这位是仙舟「朱明」的天将，烛渊将军，怀炎。
Allow me to introduce you to General Huaiyan. He's the Arbiter-General of the Xianzhou Zhuming, known as the Flaming Heart.
哈哈。不必如此正式，老朽此行便衣简从，与来观礼的游客并无区别。
Hehe, no need to be so formal. I'm just a tourist here, no different from other tourists who've come to attend the ceremony.
炎老不仅是帝弓的将军，亦是工造司的百冶；戎马倥偬之外，更擅长百般工巧。如此人瑞，在天将中亦是独一无二。

Elder Huaiyan is not only one of the Arbiter-Generals but also the Furnace Master of the Artisanship Commission. Besides his martial skills, he excels in forging various weapons. Such talents are unique, even among the Arbiter-Generals.
将军也好、百冶也罢，都不过是应时加身的名头。老朽早已卸任数次，只是如今局势变化，元帅再度征召，我不得不走马上任。

Be it Arbiter-General or Furnace Master, these are merely titles given to me long ago. I've retired several times already, but with the current change in circumstances, the Marshal has called me back to duty, and I had no choice but to answer the call.
说到底也怪我，活得实在是太久了些，难免遭人非议。
Well, in the end, I'm to blame. Living such a long life naturally brings its share of disapproval.
It's an honor to meet you, General Huaiyan.
It's my honor to meet you, General Huaiyan...
诸位不必客气。今日我与你们一样，是罗浮的客人。
No need to be all formal. Today I'm just a guest on the Luofu, the same as all of you.
景元，这三位就是你之前提到的，助你弭平建木灾异的救星咯？
So, these three are the ones you mentioned, Jing Yuan? The heroes who helped you with the Ambrosial Arbor Crisis?
正是。丹恒，三月七，还有{NICKNAME}…若无这几位朋友力挽狂澜，罗浮怕不能轻松渡过此劫。
Indeed. There's Dan Heng, March 7th, and {NICKNAME}... Without their help, I'm afraid the Luofu might not have easily overcome this crisis.
饮月君的后世重回罗浮观礼演武仪典，若有机会，老朽想同你喝上一杯。
So, the Imbibitor Lunae's reincarnation has returned to the Luofu and will attend the Wardance. I'd love to have a drink with you should the chance presents itself.
You're more than welcome, General Huaiyan.
我的弟子，彦卿。只因年纪尚浅，晚辈让他待在身边充任侍卫，希望能让他多受历练。这次演武仪典，他会代表罗浮云骑守擂竞锋，接受四方挑战。

Yanqing, my apprentice. He remains by my side as my retainer due to his youth, which I hope will season him with experience. He will stand for the Luofu's Cloud Knights in the upcoming Wardance, ready to take on all kinds of challenges.
好、好、好！老朽今日能一次得见这么多青年俊彦，真是不枉此行。
Great, great! It's a real treat to see so many talented young people around here today.
哦对了，上了年纪便容易忘事…旁边这位是我的徒孙，云璃……
Oh, I almost forgot... This is my apprentice, Yunli...
It's an honor to meet you, General Huaiyan.
It's an honor to meet you, General Huaiyan.
嚯嚯，你们认得啊，看来不用介绍了！
Oh, you two already know each other? Guess we don't need any introductions then!
真是踏破铁鞋无觅处，我本以为要费上不少工夫才能找到这位姑娘。
What a coincidence! I was afraid I'd have trouble finding this girl.
喔？老朽的好奇心都被吊起来了…快说说，你们俩怎么就互相认得了？
Oh? Now you've piqued my curiosity... Tell me, how did you two become acquainted?
这位姑娘在星槎海出手帮助镇伏逃跑的步离人囚犯，彦卿先在此谢过。但你离开时…也顺手带走了我的飞剑。
She helped me capture the escaped borisin prisoners at the Starskiff Haven. Allow me to express my gratitude for you, but when you left... you took my Flying Sword with you.
飞剑？…喔，我还在想怎么行囊里凭空多出一把短剑，原来是你的。
Your Flying Sword?... Oh, so that's why I found a dagger in my bag. Turns out it's yours.
正是。既然有缘再会，希望你能……
Yes, it is. Now that we've met again, I hope...
你是想要回这把剑吧？可以，但不能是以这种方式。我们朱明的规矩，在战场上失去的剑，要在战场上拿回来。
You want your sword back, right? Well, you can't just take it back. On the Zhuming, when you lose your sword on the battlefield, you have to reclaim it on the battlefield.
这把小剑便是如此。它飞在空中，本该射向那名逃窜的步离人。可惜剑主心性纷扰，反倒让它像只折翼的飞鸢，失了准头。

As for this little sword, it was supposed to strike that escaped borisin prisoner, but unfortunately its owner's agitated state caused it to fly off like a kite with a broken string, and it missed its target.
况且，若不是我伸手接过这剑，助它命中目标，那步离人早已逃之夭夭了。
By the way, if I hadn't caught it and helped it hit its mark, that borisin prisoner would have gotten away.
云璃姑娘，你二话不说带走了我的剑，怎么还能若无其事地拒绝物归原主？
Hold on a sec, Yunli. You took my sword without even asking, and now you're refusing to give it back?
你若能大大方方、堂堂正正地从我手上夺回自己的剑，云璃心服口服。可你没有，你竟想着大事化小，当着大庭广众随随便便让我还剑……

If you just stepped up and took your sword back from me fair and square, I would have totally respected you. But nope, you tried to play it down, expecting me to just hand it back to you like it's nothing, in front of everyone...
恕我直言，你对助我等杀敌护身的剑器毫无尊重，配不上这柄剑。
With all due respect, you don't honor your sword, so you don't deserve it.
姑娘，难道没人教过你「不告而取是为贼」吗？如果非要用剑说话…可以，就咱们俩，现在一对一……
Hasn't anyone told you that taking without asking is stealing? If you want to settle this with swords... Fine, let's have a one-on-one duel right now...
嗯，这才对。你可得小心了，我不像步离人那般好对付。
Well, that's more like it. Just be careful, because I'm not as easy to handle as the borisin.
你也住嘴吧，赶快向彦卿弟弟赔罪！
You too. Be quiet and apologize to Yanqing!
Hey, whose side are you on, Grandpa?
爷爷…呃，爷爷哪头都不站！
I... um... I don't take sides!
小小误会，「赔罪」言重了。耳闻朱明仙舟剑术与匠艺位于巅峰者有「焰轮八叶」的美名传世，今日见到名列其间的云璃小姐…确有火一般的风姿心性。

It's a small misunderstanding, and an apology would be too much. I've heard about the Zhuming's incredible swordplay and craftsmanship, most notably the legendary Flamewheel Octet. Seeing Miss Yunli, who is among those ranks today... Well I must say, she definitely has that fiery edge.
…什么美名。总有好事之人热爱编撰虚名，为云骑乱立山头。云璃只是个孩子，面薄怕生，行事无礼之处还望各位见谅。

...Such grandiose names. Some folks love to spin these fancy titles, trying to set the Cloud Knights apart. Yunli is still just a young girl, a bit awkward and hot-tempered. So please forgive her if she's being rude.
诸位，我和炎老还有些事要商量。眼下让彦卿招待几位客人与云璃小姐先去客栈入住。
Well, everyone, Elder Huaiyan and I have some business to discuss. For now, Yanqing, why don't you entertain our guests and take Miss Yunli to the inn?
之后我会另选时机与各位畅谈。好好答谢星穹列车当初救助罗浮于水火之中的恩情。
I'll find another chance to talk with you all. I'd like to express my gratitude to the Astral Express for helping the Luofu during the crisis.
真是客气，您都谢了好多回了。
That's so kind of you. I mean you've already thanked us so many times.
怪老朽来得不是时候，三位客人见谅。
Please forgive me for coming at an inconvenient time.
丫头，去吧，借这个机会好好和彦卿解开误会。
Alright, Yunli. Take this opportunity to clear things up with Yanqing.
是是是，冤家宜解不宜结。不过，我打算先不去客栈…我要见见灵砂姐姐。她刚到罗浮，正需要人帮忙安顿呢。
Yeah, yeah, it's better to make friends than enemies, but I won't be heading to the inn just yet... I want to visit Lingsha. She just arrived in the Luofu and could use some help settling in.
彦卿，安顿了客人后，替我再跑一趟工造司。我听闻公司舰船遇袭被扣押一事。青镞送来了消息，说公司的人正在抗议，想取回船上的货物。

Yanqing, once you've helped our guests get settled, go to the Artisanship Commission for me. I've heard about the attack and the detainment of the IPC ship. Qingzu sent word that the IPC members are protesting and wish to have their cargo back.
你代表我去安抚他们一下吧，不可太强硬，只要表达罗浮仙舟无意侵犯他们的权利就是。
See if you can calm them down. Don't get aggressive. Just make it clear that the Xianzhou Luofu has no intention of violating their rights.
这一趟出行没白来。和朱明一比，罗浮真是热闹多了。
This trip is totally worth it. Compared to the Zhuming, the Luofu is so much livelier.
可惜论剑艺，罗浮的剑士似乎不太行……
But it's a shame the Luofu swordmasters don't seem that great...
Glad to meet you, Miss Yunli.
你好，你是来挑战演武仪典的选手？
Glad to meet you, too. Are you here to participate in the Wardance?
I'm just a tourist attending the ceremony.
原来不是选手么？我明明瞧你也是个练家子。
So, you're not a participant? You look like you know your way around a fight.
不过没关系，你也可以报名参加，云骑所设的擂台向来是不禁外人挑战的。
Well, you can still sign up. The Cloud Knights' ring is always open to outsiders.
演武仪典外人也能参加？
Can outsiders participate in the Wardance as well?
那是自然。为了彰显武德，云骑所设的擂台向来是不禁外人挑战的。
Of course. To honor martial arts, the Cloud Knights' ring is always open to outsiders.
若是能胜过仙舟所选的守擂人，不仅能赢得赏金和奖品，还能扬名立万。
If you can defeat the ringmaster selected by the Xianzhou, you'll not only win rewards and prizes but also be making a name for yourself.
What's the "Flamewheel Octet" the general spoke of?
那是外人对我那些在朱明云骑军和工造司里的师兄师姐们的称呼。
That's how outsiders refer to my peers in the Zhuming Cloud Knights and the Artisanship Commission.
我和这些人都拜在爷爷的名下学习匠艺和剑术。所以外人才会有如此称呼吧？
We all train under Grandpa's guidance, learning the art of craftsmanship and swordplay. That's how we got that title, I guess.
你可别在爷爷面前提这个。爷爷说啦，浮名伤人，徒然惹来挑战和争端。朱明剑士只以全军克捷为荣，不以一己胜利为喜。

Just don't mention it in front of Grandpa. He always says that empty titles bring pointless challenges and conflicts. We Zhuming swordmasters pride ourselves on the success of the group over the individual.
我还有自己的事呢。再说了，彦卿小弟好像不太乐意。
I have some things to do. Besides, little Yanqing doesn't seem too happy about me tagging along.
He shouldn't have said you "stole" his sword.
可你确实带走了他的剑…
But you did take his sword...
你说的不错。明明是凭本事「拿」走，说是抢也罢了，他怎么能将我和小偷小摸混为一谈？
You're right. I "took" it with my skills, so I guess you can say I'm a robber or something. How dare he imply I'm a thief. Totally different!
再说了，这柄剑如今有些畏惧它的主人。我倒要反问他，自诩惜剑如命，竟连自己掌中之剑如今是何状态都不认得。
Besides, the sword seems scared of its own master. I'd like to ask him – you claim to cherish your sword as your life, yet you don't even recognize the state it's in right now?
我原本也无意留下他的剑，想着趁这次机会把剑还他，不过眼下我改主意了。
I didn't intend to keep his sword. I was planning to take this chance to return it to him, but now I've changed my mind.
我见飞剑可怜，等会打算去做个养护。在那之前，除非他学会说「请，你好，谢谢，对不起」，我才会考虑把剑还给他。
I'll give that poor flying sword some proper maintenance. I won't consider returning the sword unless he learns how to say "please," "hello," "thank you," and "sorry."
So he can forget about it for now!
你挠了挠头，忍不住为彦卿即将到来的苦难头皮发麻。就在你分神的片刻，少女已自顾自不知去向。

You scratch your head, feeling a tingling sensation on your scalp at the thought of the impending troubles Yanqing will face. While you're distracted, the young girl has already wandered off on her own, her whereabouts unknown.
丹恒啊，我还以为仙舟的将军个个都跟景元一样……
Hey, Dan Heng, I thought all the Xianzhou generals were like Jing Yuan...
但这位怀炎将军，却这么…呃，这么瘦瘦小小，一副迎风就倒的模样。这个干巴巴的老爷爷，真是帝弓天将吗？
But that General Huaiyan, he looks... so thin and scraggy, as if even a light breeze would knock him over. Is that old man really an Arbiter-General?
每座仙舟在联盟内各有所司，各有所长。帝弓的将军们也并非各个都擅于冲锋陷阵。你刚才听见景元的介绍了，怀炎先生曾是朱明的巧匠之首。

Each Xianzhou ship has its own division and specialty within the Alliance, not all of the Arbiter-Generals are good at leading the charge. You heard what Jing Yuan said, right? General Huaiyan was once the head of all the skilled craftsmen on the Zhuming.
There appears to be more than meets the eye.
{NICKNAME}，你没感到奇怪吗？仙舟人会衰老吗？我在仙舟上可是很少见到老人，就算瞧见也是些异邦人。
Don't you find it strange, {NICKNAME}? Do Xianzhou people age? I rarely see any old people on the Xianzhou ship, and when I do, they're usually travelers.
但…这位怀炎将军看起来却像一个普普通通的老爷爷。他真的是仙舟将军吗？
But... General Huaiyan looks like an ordinary old grandpa. Is he really a Xianzhou general?
他为什么看起来如此衰老？
Why does he look so old?
你发现了盲点，好奇怪啊…仙舟人会衰老吗？我在仙舟上可是很少见到老人，就算瞧见也是些异邦人。
Yeah, you've noticed that too. It's really weird... Do the Xianzhou people age? I rarely see any old people on the Xianzhou ship, and when I do, they're usually travelers.
但…这位怀炎将军看起来却像一个普普通通的老爷爷。他真的是仙舟将军吗？
But... General Huaiyan looks like an ordinary old grandpa. Is he really a Xianzhou general?
也许他是机器人也说不定。
就像黑塔女士那样？唔，有道理。不管怎么看仙舟人，有一副老爷爷的外貌就很奇怪。
Like Madam Herta? Hmmm, that would make sense. Anyway, it's really weird for a Xianzhou native to look so old.
好问题，他就在这边，不如你亲自问他？
Good question. He's right there, so why don't you ask him yourself?
不要，我还想多活一阵子。
Nah, I'd like to live a little longer.
走吧，将军让彦卿招待我们，显然是有要事讨论。咱们就别呆在这儿耽误时间了。
We should leave. General Jing Yuan asked Yanqing to entertain us, so obviously, he has important matters to discuss. Let's not waste any time here.
方才彦卿出言无状，让您见笑了。
哪里哪里，被云璃那丫头如此挤兑，就算是木人也有三分火气呢。你把弟子教得很好。呵呵，若换成老朽年轻的时候，只怕要当场翻脸一剑砍去。
Not at all. Taunted by Yunli like that, even a training dummy would be angry. You've taught your apprentice well. If it were me in my younger days, I'm afraid I'd have drawn my sword and fought.
彦卿小朋友已经能为你分忧解难。反倒是云璃，始终是孩子心性，对剑以外的事情一概不感兴趣。老朽此番带云璃来参加演武仪典，也是想让这孩子见见世面。

Yanqing can understand your concerns. On the other hand, Yunli is still a naive girl who's only interested in swordplay. Honestly, I brought her here to participate in the Wardance because I want to broaden her horizons.
这是青镞姐刚才发过来的案呈，让我看看……
This is the report Qingzu just sent me. Let me take a look...
将军还真是给了我一个大难题，要说服公司。
Looks like the general has given me a tough challenge. He wants me to try and help put the IPC's mind at ease.
这算是将军对你的考验吗？
Is this some kind of test from the general?
也谈不上「考验」吧。除了战术与武艺之外，云骑士官偶尔也得解决一些外交纠纷。
Well, it's not exactly a "test." As Cloud Knight officers, we not only learn the art of war and martial arts but also occasionally have to handle diplomatic disputes.
只是…用语言交流，终归不如战场上用武器沟通那么简单。尤其是要面对公司的人，他们说起话来总是一套一套的，最让人头疼了。

It's just, you know... Talking things out isn't as straightforward as duking it out with weapons on the battlefield. This is especially true when you're up against the IPC, with their non-stop corporate babble.
不操心这些了，我带各位去客栈吧？
Well, let's not worry about that for now. Shall I take you to the inn?
After watching Yanqing and the others leave...
罗浮的演武仪典能得到您大驾光临，自然是罗浮的荣幸。
It is the Luofu's honor to have you in attendance at the Wardance.
只是，区区一个演武仪典，却能劳动「朱明」和「曜青」的两位天将同时到来，恐怕也不仅仅是为了观礼吧？炎老这次前来，元帅可有什么吩咐？

Yet, the fact that a simple martial arts ceremony has attracted esteemed generals from the Zhuming and the Yaoqing implies intentions beyond mere spectating. Might there be any specific instructions from the Marshal?
景元，你多心啦。我说过，这次前来除了让孩子见见世面，老朽对罗浮的状况并无说三道四的想法。
You're overthinking it, Jing Yuan. As I said, I'm here to broaden my granddaughter's horizons. I have no ulterior motives.
但那位曜青将军有什么打算，同样也不是老夫能说三道四的。
However, I have no clue what the Yaoqing Arbiter-General has in mind.
还记得吗？在你履任之初，我曾告诉过你，「帝弓天将的战场不仅在仙舟之外」。上阵折冲，对内斡旋…将军这个名头所承载的重量要远胜于它的字面意思。

Do you remember when you accepted this position? I told you that an Arbiter-General's battlefield goes beyond the physical one. You'll need to lead and manage everything on the Xianzhou... The title of Arbiter-General holds a weight far greater than its literal meaning.
那么多年过去了，你始终做得很好。但对仙舟人来说，活得太久是一种诅咒。这意味着生命中犯下的每一次错误都在暗处虎视眈眈，终有一日追上你，吞没你。

So many years have passed, and you've done well. However, longevity for the Xianzhou people can be a curse. Living too long means that every mistake you made will lurk in the shadows, and one day, they'll eventually catch up to you.
{RUBY_B#建木灾异始末}罗浮上发生的一切{RUBY_E#}，元帅皆已知悉。而曜青的天击将军……
The Marshal knows {RUBY_B#The ins and outs of the Ambrosial Arbor Disaster}everything that has happened on the Luofu{RUBY_E#}. As for the Merlin's Claw of the Yaoqing...
不过怪了，她怎么还没来？都说曜青的天击将军一贯动如雷霆，先声夺人，今天这么迟到可不是她的作风啊。
Speaking of which, why hasn't she arrived yet? They say the Merlin's Claw strikes like lightning. Being late isn't her style.
怀炎将军此言差矣，敝上一早就到了。只是两位想必也有所耳闻，她的性情向来不受拘束。
That's not true, General Huaiyan. She's been here a while, but I'm sure you've heard of her unbridled nature.
她一下星槎就跑了个没影，说有事要办，拦都拦不住。
As soon as she disembarked from the starskiff, she mentioned having something to attend to and simply disappeared.
想必两位就是仙舟「曜青」的使者了。
You must be the messengers from the Xianzhou Yaoqing, I assume.
天击将军帐下幕僚，椒丘、貊泽，拜见两位天将。
We are Jiaoqiu and Moze, retainers of the Merlin's Claw. It's an honor to meet you in person, Arbiter-Generals.
有意思，客人到访不径直来见主人，反倒是派人传信。这又是唱的哪一出？你说说，她有什么比来这儿更重要的事情啊？
Now, this is interesting. A guest who doesn't come to visit but sends a message instead. What does she mean? Tell me, what could be more important to her than coming here?
敝上听说，罗浮之上鳞渊境中最近多了一处奇景，十分壮观，想来是赏景去了。
Master heard about a spectacular view in Scalegorge Waterscape. I believe she went there to enjoy it.
好个「奇景」。我来给你翻译翻译，景元，这小子是在阴阳怪气你呢。
A "spectacular" view? Hah! Did you hear that, Jing Yuan? This person is being sarcastic.
怀炎将军言重了，在下不过是据实传达罢了。我家将军考虑到让两位久等不妥，先遣我们二人前来……
Please do not misunderstand me, General Huaiyan. I was simply stating the truth. Master thought it would be inappropriate to keep you waiting, so she sent us here...
待她赏景结束，便会亲自到访，向两位致歉。
Once she's finished with admiring the scenery, she'll personally come and apologize to the both of you.
In the meantime, outside the Palace of Astrum...
糟糕，忘了让云璃把剑还我了……
Drat, I forgot to ask Yunli to return my sword...
I'll go get it back for you.
不必麻烦了。朱明的人一时半刻也不会离开罗浮，之后见面再讨要也不迟。
No need to bother. The Zhuming envoys won't be leaving the Luofu anytime soon. I'll ask for it later when we meet again.
这把剑怕是要不回来了！
I don't think you'll ever get your sword back!
那可不行！每把剑都是彦卿的宝贝！
Unacceptable! Every sword is precious to me!
若不是将军阻拦就凭那女孩大言不惭的口气，我一定要让她好好领教一番我的剑法…
If it weren't for the general's interference, I would have taught that shameless girl a lesson in swordplay...
说起来，不知是不是错觉，我总觉得今天的将军有些…唔，有些拘谨？是因为那位怀炎老先生的到访吗？
By the way, I don't know if it's just me, but the general seemed a little... hmmm, reserved? Could it be because of Elder Huaiyan's visit?
你并没有多心。进司辰宫开始，我才意识到你所说的朱明仙舟的使者竟是朱明的将军本人。那么，曜青仙舟的使者，想必也就是那位天击将军了？

No, you're not. When I entered the Palace of Astrum, I realized that the messenger from the Xianzhou Zhuming was actually the Arbiter-General himself. So, the messenger from the Xianzhou Yaoqing must be the Merlin's Claw herself, I presume?
这就是整件事情不寻常的地方了。
That's what makes this entire thing so unusual.
这到底有什么不寻常的地方嘛？他们不就是像列车组那样收到了来自景元的邀请？
What's so unusual about it? They simply received an invitation from Jing Yuan, just like the Crew, right?
演武仪典不过是一场小小的节庆，能让其他仙舟的两位天将同时来到这儿，只怕另有原因。
The Wardance is just a small festival, and now we have two Arbiter-Generals from other Xianzhou ships here. I'm afraid they're here for something more.
他们是为了罗浮建木灾异一事前来问责的吧。
Maybe they've come to hold Jing Yuan accountable for the Ambrosial Arbor Crisis?
问责？不至于吧。药王秘传的坏家伙和反物质军团入侵罗浮大搞破坏，罗浮不是受害者吗？哪有受害者被问责的道理啊？
Hold him accountable? Come on, didn't the Luofu fall victim to the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus and the Antimatter Legion? Why would they blame the victim?
丹枢的叛乱、幻胧的计划…在联盟其他天将眼中只是一面之词。只有一样铁证被留了下来，遗患无穷。

Dan Shu's rebellion and Phantylia's scheming are merely one side of the story to the other Arbiter-Generals of the Alliance. Only a single piece of incontrovertible evidence remains, creating an endless source of potential complications.
罗浮仙舟压制许久的寿瘟祸迹再度重生，是不争的事实。但究竟是反物质军团的阴谋策动，还是罗浮内部起了叛心，连景元本人也涉入其中？

Yes, it's undeniable that the plaguemark, which was subdued by the Xianzhou Luofu, has resurfaced. But was it really a conspiracy instigated by the Antimatter Legion, or does it indicate a traitorous intent from within the Luofu, implicating Jing Yuan himself?
猜疑的火一旦点燃，就很难被熄灭了。
Once the spark of suspicion is kindled, it proves hard to extinguish.
我们倒是能为景元作证。
We can vouch for Jing Yuan, though.
将军邀请我们前来演武仪典观礼，想必也有这一层考虑。
The general must have had that in mind when he invited us to attend the Wardance.
难怪咱们被叫回来观礼。
No wonder we were called back for the ceremony.
我真傻，真的。原以为能有一场说走就走，快快乐乐的旅行。现在看来，到哪儿星穹列车都脱不开是非啊。
What was I thinking, seriously. Here I was looking forward to a carefree and enjoyable trip, but it seems wherever we go, drama is just around the corner.
可恶，我一开始竟还真以为天将们只是前来观礼，还满心欢喜呢……
Aww... I was so excited. I thought those Arbiter-Generals were just here to see the ceremony...
如此想来，我听说这一次随朱明使节舰而来的还有一位丹士，据说会出任罗浮丹鼎司的新任司鼎。
By the way, I heard that an alchemist from the Zhuming diplomatic ship has arrived, and rumors say that she's to be the new Cauldron Master of the Alchemy Commission on the Luofu.
朱明派来的人，担任罗浮的司鼎？倒是有先例，只是这时机……
An alchemist from the Zhuming serving as the Cauldron Master on the Luofu? While it's not unheard of, the timing itself...
听丹恒先生一说，彦卿才察觉到这背后涌动的暗流。
Thanks to your words, Mr. Dan Heng, now I finally see the underlying tensions.
将军此时正承担着莫大的压力。可我竟全然不察将军的苦恼…真是幼稚！
The general is under tremendous pressure right now, but I was completely oblivious to his troubles... How naive of me!
你也别这么想嘛！大人们的事本来就该大人们来操心。何况眼下你能为你家将军做些什么呢？
Come on! Don't think like that! Leave the adult matters to the adults. Even if you wanted to do something for the general, it's not like you can do anything.
呃，我是不是又说错话了。
Uh, did I say something wrong again?
You're a real master of conversation!
三月小姐说的没错，彦卿本事低微，眼下还不能为将军分忧。
Miss March is right. I don't have the skills to share the general's burdens at the moment.
…但我可以尽力做好将军交代的每一件事。我们走吧，在将三位的住宿安排妥当后，我还要去工造司处理公司的抗议。
...Still, I'll do my best to follow his instructions. Let's go. Once I've taken you to your accommodations, I need to go to the Artisanship Commission to handle the IPC's protest.
看他这心事重重的样子，我还真有点放心不下…我们陪你一起去工造司吧！
He looks like he has a lot on his mind. We can't just let him go alone... Why don't we accompany you to the Artisanship Commission?
这…不妥吧。三位愿意帮忙，我很感激，但公司职员格外难缠…我担心反倒让列车惹上麻烦……
This... is too much trouble. While I appreciate your kindness, dealing with the IPC workers could be tricky... I'm afraid this will cause trouble for the Express...
你放心好了！对付公司的人，我们列车组可相当有经验！「石心十人」你听过吧？我们和其中好几个都打过交道！对吧，{NICKNAME}？
No worries! We're pretty experienced in dealing with the IPC! You've heard of the Ten Stonehearts, right? We've dealt with quite a few of them, right, {NICKNAME}?
Brag all you want, but don't drag me into this.
谁乱吹牛了！几个公司职员，难道比砂金还厉害？不能够吧～
Hey, who's bragging? Anyway, this time it's just a few ordinary IPC workers. Surely you don't think they'll be even trickier than Aventurine, do you?
You're a real master of conversation!
就是就是…呃，你这话听着不像好话。
Yeah, exactly... Uhm, are you being sarcastic?
Stop, stop! I don't want to end up in an IPC lawsuit.
你怎么越来越胆小了？你砸坏人家大铁人的时候也没见你怕吃官司。
What's with you turning into a scaredy-cat? I didn't see you worrying about lawsuits when you wrecked that giant mech.
好吧，既然老师们有意帮忙，那我也不再推辞。去工造司会会他们吧。
Well, since you're willing to help, I won't decline your kindness. Let's head to the Artisanship Commission and meet them.
各位！我瞧见你们了。这边！
There you are! Everyone, this way!
Let's just get down to business first.
炎老，舟车劳顿，真是辛苦您了。
It's been a long journey, Elder Huaiyan. Thank you for your presence.
哎，不辛苦，倒是劳你拨冗迎接了。
Heh, don't mention it. Thank you for taking the time to welcome me.
Deliver the prisoners to The Shackling Prison.
How dare you detain our ship? Who do you think you are?
为何会在这儿出现步离人？
（这阴阳怪气的声音实在耳熟…似乎在<color=#dbc291ff>金人巷</color>里听到过？）
(That toxic voice sounds familiar... Haven't I heard it before in <color=#dbc291ff>Aurum Alley</color>?)
我也不是没和你们天舶司打过交道，你们那刁难人的行事作风我早就习惯了。
You know what? This isn't my first time dealing with the Sky-Faring Commission, I can handle your unreasonable ways.
但现在你们直接明抢公司的货物，这是不是有点过分了？
But straight-up snatching IPC cargo, isn't that going a bit too far?
都说了很多次了，只要开箱完成安全检查，我们自然会放行。你是耳朵出了问题，还是脑袋不利索。
Just as I've said it many times already. Once we've inspected the cargo and completed the security check, you can be on your way. Is there something wrong with your ears, or is it just your brain?
我听得很清楚，也想得很明白！我的话说得更直白：没戏！
I'm hearing you loud and clear! I'm thinking clear! And my answer is crystal clear: Not a chance!
再扣着我的货物不放，我一纸诉状直接告到你们将军那里去！
Keep detaining my cargo, and I'll file a complaint directly with your general!
你们叫多少人来都不可能说服我！嗯？！怎么是你啊？！
Don't think you can possibly convince me! Uh huh!? Why are you here!?
Skott, what are you doing here!?
我还想问你呢！怎么又遇见你了！
I was gonna ask you the same thing! Why do I keep running into you!?
Did I just hear a dog barking?
混蛋！你说谁是狗？怎么…又是你啊？！
You jerk! Who are you calling a "dog?" Wait... wh—why are you here!?
你这家伙是赖在仙舟不走了是吧？真是祸不单行啊，遇上你准没好事……
You're staying on the Xianzhou, are you? What terrible luck. Wherever you go, disasters aren't far behind...
这不是星穹列车的客人吗？怎么和彦卿一起来工造司了？
Aren't you the guests from the Astral Express? What brings you and Yanqing to the Artisanship Commission?
听说你们遇到了点麻烦。
他们遇到了点麻烦？哼，是我！我遇到了麻烦！
They're in trouble? No, it's me! I'm the one in trouble!
陪彦卿解决公司的麻烦。
I'm here to help Yanqing sort out the trouble caused by the IPC.
公司的麻烦？该说是天舶司给我们造成的麻烦才对！
Trouble caused by the IPC? I'd say it's caused by the Sky-Faring Commission!
看来这位公司员工是{NICKNAME}老师的旧识…也不知这算是好事还是坏事。
Looks like you've met this IPC worker before, {NICKNAME}... I'm not sure if that's a good or bad thing.
夕葵姐姐，我被派来解决公司的抗议，眼下到底是什么情况？
I was sent here to deal with the IPC protest, Miss Xikui. What's going on here?
如你所知，朱明使节舰救下了这艘被步离人袭击的公司运输船，然后知会云骑军辇道卫，将它带回港口完成修复与检查。

As you know, this IPC transport ship was attacked by the borisin and rescued by the Zhuming's diplomatic ship. Then the Cloud Knights were instructed to bring it back to the dock for repairs and inspections.
这位，就是运输船的负责人，斯科特先生。
And this is Mr. Skott, the person in charge of this transport ship.
原来你就是斯科特啊！我听{NICKNAME}提起过你诶～你不是被赶出罗浮了吗？怎么又回来了？
So, you're Skott! I've heard {NICKNAME} mention you! Weren't you kicked off the Luofu before? Why did you come back?
你以为我想回来吗！我原本以为只是进港维修一番，就能离开这晦气的地方。谁知道一进港就冲上来几个云骑，把货舱里的货物都抢走了！

Like I wanted to come back! I thought I'd just dock at the harbor for repairs and leave this forsaken place for good. Little did I know, as soon as the ship entered the harbor, a bunch of Cloud Knights showed up and snatched all our cargo from the hold!
什么叫「抢走」？说了多少遍，这是安全检查。
What do you mean by "snatched"? I've told you a million times. It's a security check.
那怎么又拉到工造司来了？还找来个獐头鼠目的匠人，这不明摆着要偷学公司的专利技术吗？
Then why did you bring the cargo to the Artisanship Commission? You even brought in some shady craftsman. It's obvious that you're trying to steal the IPC's patented technology!
我说这位…远道而来的客人，第一，天舶司检查到你们的货物中存在疑似危险武器的物品，所以才要求我来进行确认检查。第二，我到底哪里獐头鼠目了？！

Listen here... Firstly, the Sky-Faring Commission detected dangerous items that could possibly be weapons in your cargo hold, that's why they called me here to double-check. Secondly, where the heck did you get the idea that I'm a "shady craftsman"!?
我就纳闷了，就算是危险武器，关你们屁事啊，又不是运往罗浮？我们修好船就走，不会在这儿卸货的。
Even if there are dangerous items, what do they have to do with you? It's not even being shipped to the Luofu. We'll just fix the ship and be on our way, we won't unload our cargo here.
但你们要在港口停留数日，才能修复引擎再次启航。我们怎么可能让未经检查的危险品在罗浮港口停留数日呢？
But you'll have to stay in the port for several days before your ship is repaired and you can take off again. How can we just leave unchecked items sitting here?
我明白了…安全检查应该不需要拆解货物吧？
I understand... but we don't need to disassemble the cargo if it's just a security check, right?
本来不需要。我们原本只做了些进一步的扫描检测。但，扫描结果却发现货箱中存放的不只有机械结构，还有一些…近似生物组织的特征。
In most cases, we don't. However, our scans discovered that the cargo doesn't only contain machinery but also some... substance that resembles biological tissue.
生物组织？这箱子里装着活物？
Biological tissue? Does this crate contain living things?
具体的结论恐怕要等丹鼎司的人来确认。不管怎样，按照条例，我们都要启封其中一个货品进一步检查。但这位公司专员却用专利保密的理由一再阻挠。

I'm afraid we'll need to wait for the Alchemy Commission for further confirmation. In any case, according to our regulations, we need to unseal one of the crates for further examination, but this IPC specialist has been hindering us on the grounds of patent secrecy.
联盟对生物制品的管理条例非常严格。如果不进一步检查，天舶司是无论如何都不可能放行的。
The Alliance's regulations on biological products are very strict. Without further inspection, there is no way for the Sky-Faring Commission to release the cargo.
好啊，谁想动这批货物，我斯科特就和谁拼命！不管我们运的东西是生物还是机械，都和你们没有关系！我要投诉天舶司的处理程序！

Oh, really? Fine! If anyone lays a finger on that shipment, they'll have me to deal with! It doesn't matter if it's mechanical or biological, it's none of your business! I'm filing a complaint against the Sky-Faring Commission's ridiculous regulations!
看来这位斯科特先生非常顽固，不是很容易说服。唉…彦卿实在不希望和公司闹到撕破脸的地步……
This Mr. Skott seems stubborn and difficult to persuade. Honestly... I really don't want to have a vicious confrontation with the IPC...
我倒是有说服斯科特的经验…
Well, I know a thing or two about convincing Skott...
交给我吧！我是谈判专家！
Leave it to me! I'm an expert negotiator!
我听说过{NICKNAME}之前帮助金人巷的事情。当时公司方面的代表，就是这位斯科特先生吧？既然你有对付他的经验…看来这次也得麻烦{NICKNAME}老师了。
I heard how you helped Aurum Alley, {NICKNAME}. The IPC representative back then was Mr. Skott, right? Since you've dealt with him before... it looks like I'll have to rely on you again, {NICKNAME}.
你们在那里嘀嘀咕咕什么呢？快点把货物还给我们！
What are you guys whispering about over there? Just hurry up and give us back our cargo!
（我记得这家伙的性格<color=#dbc291ff>属于典型的吃硬不吃软，但姑且还算是遵守规则。</color>利用他的性格特点来对付他吧。）
(As I recall, this guy <color=#dbc291ff>won't listen to reason and can only be persuaded with intimidation. But he does seem to follow rules to some extent.</color> Let's use that against him.)
既然你们搬出安全规章，那咱们就来谈谈法律。按照《仙舟联盟-星际和平公司贸易共识宣言》第四款之规定，联盟和公司绝不能侵犯对方的知识产权。

Speaking of regulations, we have our own laws and regulations too. According to Article 4 of the Xianzhou Alliance-IPC Trade Consensus, the Alliance and IPC shall never infringe on each other's intellectual property rights.
Make proposals from the legal perspective.
联盟可以和你签署保密协议，这样就不用担心他们窥探了吧？
The Alliance can sign a non-disclosure agreement with you. That way, you won't have to worry about any infringements, right?
我们可以按照公司的规矩，签署一份双方都能接受的保密协议。
We can sign a mutually acceptable non-disclosure agreement in accordance with the IPC's rules.
话…话是这么说，可谁知道你们会不会遵守！
Well, th—that makes sense, but... how can we trust you to honor the terms?
Use Yanqing's identity to intimidate him.
之前在金人巷你面对的是民间商会，你可以抬出公司来吓唬他们。
Back in Aurum Alley, you were dealing with civilian merchants, where you could use the IPC's name to scare them.
但眼前这位云骑骁卫代表了罗浮将军的意志，不会被你几句话唬住。
But this time, the Cloud Knight lieutenant standing before you represents the will of Luofu's general and won't be intimidated by your words.
当然，我相信我们双方都希望事情能和平解决。
Of course, I'm sure we both want a peaceful resolution.
说得不错，我当然希望事情能顺利解决，但眼下这不是被僵化的手续卡住了脖子吗？
Yeah, that's true. Of course, I want things to be resolved peacefully, but aren't we getting stuck in rigid formalities here?
Start by making him feel uncomfortable.
没想到还能和你再相见，斯科特先生～我还挺怀念咱们在金人巷的对手戏～也许这就是我们之间的缘分吧。
I didn't expect to see you again, Mr. Skott! We had such fun in Aurum Alley last time. It seems our paths are destined to cross once more.
…少套近乎！要不是我打不过你，非给你两拳不可！你们到底解决不解决问题？还是想让这小丑在这儿继续丢人现眼？
...Stop pretending we're friends! If I could actually beat you, I'd punch you in the face! So, are you guys going to resolve this problem? Or are you just going to let this clown put on a show here?
丹恒，我都想假装不认识{F#她}{M#他}了。
Let's just pretend we don't know {F#her}{M#him}, Dan Heng.
Remind him of his embarrassing past.
给诸位介绍一下，这位是我的老朋友斯科特。他多才多艺，尤其擅长模仿动物朋友。
Hey, everyone! Meet my old friend, Skott. He's very talented, especially at imitating animals.
住…住口！谈事就谈事，你翻那些旧账有意思吗？
S-stop it! Let's focus on the business at hand. What's the point in dragging up the past?
哇！好厉害～能教教我吗？你都擅长模仿什么动物呀？
Whoa, you're amazing! Can you teach me? Which animals can you imitate?
且不谈知识产权保密，光是这些博识学会制造的测试原型机的造价就高到你们无法想象！要是有什么闪失，用尽你们漫长余生打工也赔不起！

Even if we set aside the secrecy of intellectual property, these prototypes built by the Intelligentsia Guild are incredibly valuable, beyond your wildest imagination! If anything goes wrong, you won't be able to pay for it even with your lives!
The Sky-Faring Commission can pay compensation.
斯科特先生能否核算出一个具体金额呢？在检修过后要是有所损坏，列车…呃，不对，是天舶司方面是愿意照价赔偿的。
Can you give us an exact amount, Mr. Skott? If there's any damage after the inspection, the Express... um, I mean, the Sky-Faring Commission will compensate you.
天舶司…当然…可以赔偿。前提是要能明确出具相关的损坏报告。
The Sky-Faring Commission... Yeah, they will compensate you... provided a detailed report of the damage is submitted.
我不怀疑天舶司的财力…但是！这也不是钱的事儿！
I don't doubt the financial strength of the Sky-Faring Commission... However! This is not just about money!
向他保证你们会小心行事
Assure him that you will proceed with caution.
你可别小瞧仙舟的技术。检查过程就算是把货物拆成零件，工造司的人也能给你拼回去。
Don't underestimate Xianzhou technology. Even if they need to dismantle your cargo, the Artisanship Commission can easily put it back together.
你当然可以把仙舟的本事吹上天，说到底你不过是他们请来的说客罢了。
Yeah, go ahead and brag about their skills. After all, you're just a negotiator they hired.
但我不一样，作为公司的成员，我的船队接受了这次运输订单，我就必须对这里的每一件货物的完好负责到底。
But I'm different. I'm an IPC member, and my fleet has accepted this transportation order. Naturally, I need to be responsible for the integrity of every piece of cargo.
笑话，我拿走过黑塔的奇物，打死过阮•梅的试验品，我赔过一分钱了吗？你两张嘴皮子一碰，就敢来问我要钱？
Hah! I've taken Herta's curios, and even destroyed Ruan Mei's experimental subjects, but have I ever paid a penny for them? And now you think you can just come and ask me for compensation?
听好了{F#小姑娘}{M#小子}，少拿天才俱乐部的关系来压我。公司和那群高高在上的天才们是各取所需的关系，不是上下级。
Listen up, brat. Don't think that your fancy connection to the Genius Society scares me. The IPC and those geniuses are working together. We're not taking orders from them.
与其讲道理不如直接发疯
Just skip the reasoning part and resort to good old violence.
对了，我要是抡起球棒一砸，你就不得不请人来核计损失索赔吧？这样一来，岂不就省去了安全检查？
I've got a brilliant idea! I'll just smash everything with my bat, and then you can hire someone to assess the damage. That way, your cargo won't need any inspection, right?
冷静，{NICKNAME}。将军希望能妥善处理此事。
Calm down, {NICKNAME}. The general wants us to handle this peacefully.
这就是你想出来的解决方案？行啊，你干脆从我尸体上踏过去算了。
So, this is the great idea you came up with? Fine! Why don't you just step over my lifeless body?
另外，这艘运输舰上的货物归属于博识学会。你们要想检查，是不是至少也要召来一名博识学会的委托人在场？
