Besides, the cargo on this transport vessel belongs to the Intelligentsia Guild. If you want to inspect the cargo, shouldn't you at least call in a member of the Intelligentsia Guild to be present?
尝试按照仙舟的法条解决问题
Try to resolve this according to Xianzhou regulations.
按照属地原则，既然这批货物滞留在仙舟的港口，天舶司当然有权检查。
According to the principle of territoriality, since your vessel is stranded on the Xianzhou, the Sky-Faring Commission has the right to inspect it.
的确如此。据《仙舟律》港阜卷廿七条所载：「诸官、私物，一入港阜，当受搜检。拒之者以赃论。」

Indeed. According to Article 27 of the Xianzhou Legal Code: "All official and private goods, upon entering the port, shall be subject to inspection. Failure to submit to such inspection shall be deemed equivalent to the possession of unlawful items and shall be subject to legal ramifications."
啊？什么意思？…我这联觉信标怎么都翻译不出来？
Huh? My Synesthesia Beacon must not be working... because I have no idea what you just said.
简单来说，就是如果你执意要拒绝我们搜查货物，我们就不得不将它当做赃物收缴了。
Simply put, if you insist on hindering the inspection, we'll have to treat the cargo as unlawful items and confiscate it.
收缴？！你们…你们仙舟人怎么能这么不讲道理！
Confiscate it!? How... how can you Xianzhou people be so unreasonable!
斯科特先生，要是在庇尔波因特，入港的货物有安全隐患时，公司也会将它收容处置，没错吧？
If this were Pier Point, and incoming cargo posed a safety risk, the IPC would take it in for containment and disposal, correct?
呃…说的倒是没错，但、但公司偶尔也会允许一些例外。比如仙舟的舰船，公司向来是乐意网开一面的。
Umm... th—that's true, but the IPC s—sometimes makes exceptions. For example, they've always given special terms to Xianzhou vessels.
是时候把问题扩大化了！
It's time to escalate the issue!
东拉西扯，连博识学会的人都被你搬出来了。看来你是毫无解决问题的诚意啊。
You're pulling out all the stops, and you've even dragged members of the Intelligentsia Guild into this. Seems like you're not interested in resolving this at all.
斯科特先生，看在咱们打过交道的份上，我不妨给你透个底：你们的运输船被步离人袭击，这件事可大可小。
Since we've met each other before, Mr. Skott, let me share some information. Your transport ship was attacked by the borisin, and the Cloud Knights might see it as more than just a random attack.
呵呵呵，你当我是吓大的吗？可大怎么说，可小又怎么说？
Hehe, you think you can scare me with that? What exactly do you mean?
往小了说，列位是受步离人劫掠的被害者。但往大了说，为什么步离人要在通往罗浮的航线上袭击你们？莫非船员中有人勾结了步离人？

Sure, you might purely be innocent victims of a borisin attack, but think about it another way. Why would the borisin launch such an attack near the Luofu? Perhaps some of your crew members colluded with them?
也许需要详加审问全体船员，才能排除这个隐患？
We may need to interrogate every one of your crew to eliminate this potential risk?
…其实吧，学会委托人在场也不是必要条件，我这不是…希望相关的手续更合规齐全嘛。
...You know what? I don't think we really need a member from the Intelligentsia Guild present. I'm just hoping... that all the procedures will be thoroughly followed, you know?
尝试按照公司的法条解决问题
Try to resolve this according to IPC regulations.
既然博识学会将货物交付给公司运输，公司就理应对货物的安全负责？为什么要联系博识学会？

Since the Intelligentsia Guild entrusted the cargo to the IPC for transportation, it's the IPC's responsibility to ensure its safety, right? Why would you need a member of the Intelligentsia Guild to be present?
嘿嘿，这就是你不懂了～按照公司的《筑材物流部运输合同法》第<unbreak>17</unbreak>条之规定：「当货物已寄出且仍在途中时，除运输事务安全外一切风险责任由寄件方承担。」

Hehe, let me tell you something! As stated in Article 17 of the IPC's Building Material Logistics Department Transport Agreement Law: "Subsequent to the dispatch of goods and during their transit, all risks, save for those pertaining to the transportation safety, shall be the sole liability of the consignor."
哎！我们只负责保护货物的完整性，防止有心觊觎的人染指。比如…咳咳。
Well! We only protect the integrity of the goods and prevent anyone with ill intentions from getting their hands on them, for example...
至于货物本身是否会对目的地产生安全威胁，这个责我们可担不起。嘿嘿，触及到你们知识盲区了吧？法学难着呢！

As for whether the cargo itself poses a security threat to the destination, that's not our responsibility. It appears we have reached an area beyond your expertise, doesn't it? The complexities of legal studies are indeed challenging!
向他表明你广博的人脉
我和博识学会的拉帝奥教授亲如一家。有道是「上阵父子兵」，我出面是不是就算是博识学会出面了？
I'm pretty tight with Dr. Ratio from the Intelligentsia Guild, almost like family. Doesn't that make me practically a member of the Intelligentsia Guild too?
这都什么乱七八糟的？就算你和他有婚姻关系，你也代表不了学会啊！
What's all this nonsense? Even if you were married to him, you still couldn't represent the Intelligentsia Guild!
公司和仙舟都是法治社会，得遵守办事流程啊！我身为公司雇员，也必须遵守公司的条令律法。要是破例让你们检查，那真是把天给捅塌了啊。

We both need to follow the regulations, because that's how the IPC and the Xianzhou operate, right? As an IPC worker, I have to abide by its regulations. If I make an exception and allow you to inspect the cargo, it'll spell disaster for me.
The Xianzhou people are just following their own rules.
你有你的规矩，人家有人家的规矩。我们在人家的地盘上，是不是应该守人家的规矩？
Everyone has their own set of rules. Now that you're on their turf, shouldn't you follow their rules, too?
我当然知道自己站在仙舟的疆域上，但是违反了流程，我回去也是要受处分的啊！
Yeah, I get it. I know I'm on the Xianzhou, but if I violate the IPC regulations, I'll be in deep trouble when I get back!
Talk about his unpromising career prospects.
斯科特先生，也许在你看来，你是在捍卫自己身为公司雇员的底线，值得敬佩。可是你不明白，你同时也透支着公司在仙舟的形象。
I understand that you're trying to stick to the IPC regulations, and that's commendable, Mr. Skott. But what you fail to see is that this argument is tarnishing the IPC's reputation on the Xianzhou.
你与天舶司的冲突一旦激化，不仅会给自己带来更多商业上的不便，也会为你的职业前景带来许多无形的阻碍。
If this conflict with the Sky-Faring Commission escalates, it won't just make things difficult for your business, but it'll also have an impact on your career down the line.
当然，我…我无意与仙舟发生冲突。但就像我刚开始说的那样，我要求的自始至终只是取回货物，就此离开。是各位不肯放行啊。
Of course, I... I never wanted conflict with the Xianzhou. Like I said, all I wanted was to retrieve the cargo and be done with it, but they just refuse to let us go.
这样吧，兄弟，咱们也算是老相识了…你今天给我们行个方便，我们日后少不了你的好处。如何？
How about this, pal? We go way back... so, if you make things easy for us today, we'll make it worth your while. What do you say?
哪有这么明目张胆行贿的？我要是当着这么多公司兄弟的面，给你行了个方便，这不是等着风纪人员找我麻烦吗！
Are you seriously trying to bribe me right in front of everyone? If I show you any favoritism, the disciplinary officers will come down on me!
没事，也少不了弟兄们的份！
Don't worry! They'll get their cut too!
Swallow your pride and beg him.
求求你了、求求你了，我在朋友们面前夸下海口，说自己可以说服你…你要是不松口，我就没脸在他们面前混下去了！求求你不要这样狠心啊！
Please, help me! I mean it! I bragged to my friends that I could convince you... If you don't do me this favor, I'll be so embarrassed! Come on, don't be so cold-hearted!
金人巷的时候是我不对，我向你诚挚道歉，求求你大人不记小人过，给我一次洗心革面重新做人的机会吧！
I'm truly sorry for what I did in Aurum Alley. Please, just forgive me and give me an opportunity to fix things!
呵？想放低姿态来博取我的同情？我身为公司的专员，你觉得我的胸膛里还剩下一毫克的同情心吗？起开！
Huh? Attempting to play the humility card to gain my sympathy? I'm an IPC specialist. Do you honestly think I have even a shred of sympathy left in me? Just get lost already!
{NICKNAME}…咱们不必把姿态放这么低吧。
{NICKNAME}... do we really have to stoop this low?
你的诉求呢，我们已经了解了，但目前政策就是这样规定的，我们也没办法改变…不过呢，你的意见我们已经记录了，也会向上级领导反映，有结果会及时通知你的。

Alright, we understand your position, but rules are rules, and we can't bend them now... However, we'll note down your concerns and pass them on to management. We'll keep you updated on any developments.
哈——？说大声点，我听不太清。能不能再说一遍？
Huh...? Could you repeat that? I didn't quite hear you. Could you say it again?
你的逻辑太混乱了，我听都听不懂。你能不能先随便找只猴子，和它学学说话的艺术，再回来和我讲这些废话？
Your logic is too confusing for anyone to follow. Maybe you should learn the art of communication from a monkey before you continue spouting nonsense.
你们几个倒是挺能说会道的……
Well, you guys sure know how to argue your case...
哎！要执行安全检查也不是不可以。只是…得给我几天时间，毕竟事关重大，让我和公司总部沟通一番。
Fine! I'll allow you to do the security inspection. It's just that... I need some time to sort things out. This is a big deal. Let me talk to headquarters first.
斯科特先生这是想用「拖」字诀，等拖到舰船修好，天舶司就只能不经检查，放你们离开咯？
So, Mr. Skott, are you just stalling for time, and planning to leave the Xianzhou as soon as your ship is repaired to avoid the Sky-Faring Commission's inspection?
只要不违犯法律，公司的人当然可以自由来去。
Well, IPC staff are free to come and go, as long as they don't break any laws.
Yeah, you've got some insight there. Who are you again?
够了，我讨厌把同样的理由重复说上一百遍。
Alright, that's enough. I'm not going to repeat myself a hundred times.
原本以为各位是可以讲理的文明人，但现在看来，仙舟人还是不能理解何谓商业精神。
I thought you were reasonable and civilized, but now it seems you Xianzhou folks just don't understand the basics of business.
我们与博识学会签署过保密安全协议，一旦违约就要支付天价赔偿！就算把这个星区市场开拓部的员工的灵魂全数典当了也填不上这个窟窿。

We've signed a confidentiality and security agreement with the Intelligentsia Guild, and if we breach it, we'll have to pay a hefty sum! Even if we sold the souls of every employee in the Marketing Development Department on this planet, it still wouldn't be enough to cover the costs.
听好了，小子。我不介意把时间再拖上几日，反正引擎一旦修好，运输船就会离港，你们也就没有理由再进行检查了。
Listen up, kid. I don't mind delaying this transport for a few more days. Once the engines are repaired, our ship will leave immediately, and you won't have any reason to inspect the cargo.
我向诸位保证，云骑不会放任这艘舰船离开。
If that's the case, I can assure you the Cloud Knights won't let your ship leave.
那么，到时候会有无数博识学会、公司「市场开拓部」的抗诉接踵而来。你还年轻，你根本不明白自己一个草率的决定会引起如何狼狈的轩然大波。

Oh, really? Then you'll receive a ton of complaints from the Intelligentsia Guild and the IPC's Marketing Development Department. You're too young, I don't think you understand the chaos your rash decision will cause.
斯科特先生把话说到了这份上，我就当你认同了检查手续。来人啊……
Since you put it that way, Mr. Skott, I'll take it as your agreement to the inspection procedure. Now...
小子，你最好别太冲动。公司的规章赋予了我武装捍卫运输财产的权力。
Not so fast, you little brat. According to the IPC regulations, I have the right to arm myself and protect the property on my transport ship.
我原本以为各位是可以讲理的文明人，但看起来公司只想遵守自己的游戏规则。抱歉了，斯科特先生。
I thought you were reasonable and civilized, but now it seems the IPC just wants to play by its own rules. My apologies, Mr. Skott.
兄弟们，快拦住他！为了琥珀王！
Stop him, guys! For the Amber Lord!
都给我起来，不许倒下！你们这些废物，对得起公司的薪水吗？
Get up, all of you! Why is the IPC even paying you? You're a bunch of losers!
你应该感谢你口中那个「小子」手下留情。至少你手下这些人的伤还算有救。
Just be grateful that the "little brat" showed you mercy. At least your staff aren't seriously injured.
公司到底给了你们多大的底气，竟然对云骑动手…那可算得上「袭击执法人员」了。
How do you IPC cronies have the audacity to fight Cloud Knights...? You practically assaulted law enforcement officers.
怎么又来了一个？你是谁啊！
Another one? Who the heck are you!?
来迟了一步。不过好消息是，我来了。
I may be a bit late, but the good news is: I'm here now.
自我介绍一下，妾身是罗浮丹鼎司司鼎——灵砂。
Allow me to introduce myself. I'm Lingsha, Cauldron Master and Head of the Alchemy Commission on the Luofu.
嗯，她就是那位从朱明仙舟被派来此处的新任司鼎。
Yeah, she's the new Cauldron Master assigned here from the Xianzhou Zhuming.
工造司发来文书，说有含有不明生物样本的货物滞留此间，需要丹鼎司派人勘验。左右我闲着也是闲着，就亲自来咯～

I received a report from the Artisanship Commission about cargo containing samples of unknown organisms. It said they needed help from the Alchemy Commission. I had nothing better to do, so I came myself.
斯科特先生，您要是真不打算让我们查验，我们就不查了，无所谓的。
It's fine, Mr. Skott. If you really don't want your cargo to be inspected, it doesn't matter.
It doesn't matter? How can you say that?
怎么突然变得这么好说话了？既然你说不查了，那我也要将这个货箱一并带走，没有异议吧？
Why are you being so nice all of a sudden? Well, since you're not going to check it, I'll take this crate and be on my way. Is that okay with everyone?
异议？妾身能有什么异议？不仅是这个样品，运输船上那些货物，你们也都可以留着，我们不会检查的。
Yeah, sure. Why should I object? Not only this sample, but all the goods on the transport ship are yours to keep. Like I said, we won't inspect them.
这才像话嘛！能有这样通人性…我是说通达人情的态度，刚才也犯不着撕破脸。
Well, that's more like it! If only the young displayed a more... reasonable attitude, we could have sidestepped that altercation just now.
过几日引擎修复完毕，我们的船就会离去。
Our ship will leave in a few days once the engines are repaired.
船当然可以离去，但货却走不得。
Your ship can leave whenever you want, but I'm afraid I can't say the same for the cargo.
按照仙舟与公司所签署的进出口法规，一切生物制品，只有确认其对外界不会造成危害或失去生物活性，才能离开港口。

According to the import and export regulations signed between the Xianzhou and IPC, all biological shipments can only leave the port when they have confirmed to be of no threat, or when all biological activity expires.
不过，既然我们无法判定它是否会造成危害，那就只有等它自己失去生物活性了。按照现有的判例，我想想……
Since we can't determine if your shipment is safe for the environment, I guess we'll have to wait for its biological activity to expire. Let me check the previous cases...
通常只要四十七个星历年就够了。
Normally it'll only take around forty-seven star calendar years.
不至于这么惊讶吧？我看你也挺年轻的，中气也足，再活个几十年问题也不大的。对自己有点信心嘛！
Why so surprised? You're still young and full of energy. I'm pretty sure you'll live a few more decades. Have some confidence in yourself!
不愧是长生种，说起话来夹枪带棒的。你们可以不在乎时间观念，但每一分钟延误所造成的损失，我都要天舶司加倍赔偿！

Typical of a long-life species, your words are dripping with sarcasm. While you may not care about time, I do! I'll be demanding double compensation from the Sky-Faring Commission for every minute wasted!
看来斯科特先生很有信心，自己的职业和人生都能支撑到见证这场胜利的时刻。
Sure thing, Mr. Skott. You seem pretty confident that your career and life will last long enough to witness this victory unfold.
兄弟们，都让开吧，让他们查。
Step aside, guys. Let them do the inspection.
行了，事情已经够麻烦的了…让他们进行安全检查吧。大不了回去以后我亲自向那些学士们磕头道歉——我这颗脑袋不就是干这个用的吗？

Come on, we're already in enough trouble... Just let them do the security inspection. And if needed, I can always grovel before the Intelligentsia Guild later — I'm just using my head for what it's apparently good for, right?
和这个女人一比，也没那么讨人厌了。
Well, honestly, at least you're not as annoying as that woman.
你还是和过去一样讨厌。
But you're still as annoying as ever.
和这个女人一比，也没那么讨人厌了。
Well, honestly, at least you're not as annoying as that woman.
赶紧搜查吧！谁是你老兄！
At least you've wised up for once.
和这个女人一比，也没那么讨人厌了。
Well, honestly, at least you're not as annoying as that woman.
赶紧搜查吧！别得了便宜还卖乖！
Just get on with the inspection! Don't act all chummy with me now that you've got your way.
这位姐姐…还真是不简单啊！
This lady... is really something else!
你们就要把这种东西在罗浮的码头上放好几天？这也太危险了吧！
Were you seriously planning to leave this stuff unchecked at the dock for days? That's way too dangerous!
这…这真的不关我们的事！一定是你们刚才不小心触发了「货物」的防卫程序！
I... I had no idea about it! You must have accidentally triggered the cargo's defense program!
事已至此，还是不要推诿责任更好些。
I don't think trying to shift the blame is a wise choice.
我是真不知道这东西怎么就动起来了…我可以向琥珀王发誓！
But seriously, I don't know why that thing suddenly started moving...! I swear on the Amber Lord!
够了。夕葵小姐，麻烦你领几个云骑，先把这几位公司的客人护送到天舶司吧。
Enough. Miss Xikui, please escort our IPC guests to the Sky-Faring Commission.
明白了。请吧，斯科特先生。
I'm on it. Please follow me, Mr. Skott.
各位大人，初步查验了一番，确如同匠人担忧的那般，其中藏有生物组织。
Our preliminary inspection shows that there is indeed hidden biological tissues inside, just like the craftsman feared.
我甚至不确定这东西算是「机巧」还是「生物」。
I can't even tell if it's ingenium or biological in nature.
这东西的核心部分，是黑话里称为「湿件」的东西。说的通俗一些，这台机器是以某种生物的神经作为控制中枢驱动起来的。
The core of this device is what they call "wetware" in industry slang. To put it simply, this machine operates with a kind of biological nerve as its control center.
我要取走些样本，让丹士们分析分析，就能知道这生物组织的来源。
I'll take some samples for the alchemists to analyze and figure out where the biological tissue comes from.
博识学会为何会动用这么有悖人伦的技术？为了制造新的武器吗？
Why would the Intelligentsia Guild use such unethical technology? Perhaps they are trying to create a new weapon?
不管为了什么，这也许正是步离人会袭击这艘舰船的原因吧。
Whatever the reason is, it's probably why the borisin attacked the ship.
也难怪公司的人不愿意让咱们开箱查验。我会联系十王司，请判官前来权衡判断。
No wonder the IPC were trying to obstruct our inspection. I'll contact the Ten-Lords Commission and ask the judges to come and give their final verdict on this.
按照规矩，涉及危险生物的囚犯与武器都应当运往幽囚狱收容，再做进一步处理。毕竟那里是整个罗浮最安全的地方。
According to our rules, all prisoners and weapons involving dangerous creatures must be taken to The Shackling Prison for further sentencing. After all, it's the safest place on the Luofu.
匠人先生，请与云骑同去，向判官说明情况。
As for you, Mr. craftsman, please go with the Cloud Knights and explain the situation to the judge.
不一会儿，众人各自散去……
After a while, everyone disperses and goes their own way...
我来时预感到公司的人难缠，只是没想到他们如此难缠。多谢灵砂小姐帮助。
I had a feeling that the IPC members would cause trouble, but I didn't think they'd be this tricky. Thanks for your help, Miss Lingsha.
我还要感谢您的救命之恩呢，多亏您剑术高超，击倒了这个大家伙。
I should thank you for saving my life. Your sword skills were impressive, taking down that big guy.
妾身本以为将军的扈从都是昂藏武夫…没曾想，彦卿大人竟然如此……
I thought the General's retainers were all burly martial masters. I didn't expect Yanqing to be so...
没错，当得一句年少有为。
Yeah, exactly. He's young and talented.
至于这三位，想必就是来自星穹列车的客人吧？你们救罗浮于水火之中，好生令人钦佩呀。
As for you, you must be the guests from the Astral Express, right? Saving the Luofu from that crisis, it's so impressive.
Hehe, it wasn't a big deal, really...
时间还早，不妨就趁着这个机会，请各位去丹鼎司喝杯茶吧。正好，也让我听听诸位对于丹鼎司重建事宜的建议。
It's still early, so why don't we get some tea at the Alchemy Commission? We can discuss your suggestions for revitalizing the commission.
那彦卿就恭敬不如从命了。
I'd be happy to accept your invitation.
你们三位，也要一起来喔。
And you three are coming too, right?
我们会切断这些机器的动力，在此之前请不要靠得太近了。
Nothing to see here. These machines are to be shut down, keep your distance until then.
你们这些仙舟人到底讲不讲道理啊？
Can I really reason with you Xianzhou people?
呵呵，我算是明白了～用你们的话说，这叫「趁火打劫」，对吧？
Heh, I think I get it now. In your words, this is called "looting a burning house," right?
我现在就是在和你讲道理啊！
But I AM trying to reason with you here!
怎么还藏了这等惊喜…真是吓煞妾身了。
Well, how unexpected... that was a surprise~
在下射洪，是龙师涛然派来的信使。龙师听闻族胞升任司鼎，喜不自胜，本想亲自来道喜，可奈何身体状况不允许。
I'm Shehong, a messenger sent by Preceptor Taoran. He wanted to come and congratulate his kindred on becoming Cauldron Master personally, but health limitations hindered his visit.
因此今日，在下奉命前来，代主家拜谒新任司鼎灵砂大人。不知丹士长大人可否为在下通传一声？
So, I'm here to pay my respects to the Cauldron Master on his behalf. Could you let her know about my arrival, dear chief alchemist?
灵砂大人才刚到罗浮，生活还未安顿妥当，工作也尚未交接完成，实是繁忙，无暇见客。你请回吧。
Master Lingsha just arrived on the Luofu and is still settling in and getting her work in order. She's quite busy and unable to meet guests right now. Please understand.
那…这份薄礼，请您代为转交给灵砂大人吧。
Well then... Please pass this humble gift on to her.
龙师大人的「薄礼」想来相当贵重吧。我一个小小的丹士长，可不敢代为转交，若是中间出了纰漏，我可担待不起啊。
I'm pretty sure this "humble gift" from the Preceptor himself is quite valuable. As a mere chief alchemist, I am unable to deliver it. Should any mishap occur, I couldn't bear the consequences.
这样啊。那在下何时才能见到灵砂大人呢？
I see. So when will I be able to see Master Lingsha?
我也不知道。等灵砂大人方便接见时，一定会第一时间联系贵府的，请回吧。
I'm not sure. Whenever Master Lingsha feels it is appropriate, she will most certainly get in touch with you.
Then I shall wait with anticipation.
灵砂大人，您来了。容我提醒一句：在罗浮，龙师与丹鼎司之间关系紧密，这样避而不见，恐怕不符合一直以来的惯例……

There you are, Master Lingsha. Just a reminder, the Alchemy Commission on the Luofu has always had a close relationship with the Preceptors, so avoiding a meeting like this doesn't align with our long-standing practices...
「惯例」？快算了吧。说的就像罗浮丹鼎司「一直以来的惯例」是什么好东西似的。
Practices? Come on, you make it sound like the "long-standing practices" in this Alchemy Commission are something great.
司鼎大人所言极是。那…我就继续替您应付他们了。
You're right, Cauldron Master. In this case... I'll continue handling them on your behalf.
你知道我排了多少年的队，才得到请衔药龙女为我看诊的机会吗？到底是什么人插我的队？这合理吗？
Do you have any idea how many years I've waited just to see the Healer Lady? And now someone cuts in line? How is that fair?
您别生气…这次来看诊的，是一位远道而来的贵客。她实在没办法排上很多年的队，只能在您前面先行问诊了。
Please calm down... That person is an esteemed guest who has traveled from afar. She simply couldn't wait in line for years, so we had to let her see the Healer Lady before you.
但您放心，只要她看完诊，立刻就到您了。而且那位贵客说了，您此次诊费由她全部承担。
But don't worry. As soon as she's done, it'll be your turn. By the way, the esteemed guest said she'll cover your medical expenses as compensation.
那…那确实可以接受。你们这位「贵客」倒是个讲道理的好人，我也就不计较了。
Well... I guess that's acceptable. Your "esteemed guest" seems reasonable, so I'll just pretend nothing happened.
感谢您宽宏大量，请到这边稍事休息。
Thanks for understanding. Please have a rest over here.
{NICKNAME}！你回罗浮了啊！怎么也不提前在群里说一声！
Hey, {NICKNAME}! You're back! Why didn't you say anything in the group chat?
I'm on duty. Let's catch up later.
You look so pretty when you're serious.
别闹啊。岗哨神圣，不可侵犯。
Cut it out. I'm carrying out my sacred duty.
Why are you standing guard here?
为某个大人物站岗开道。别问了，严肃点，我要执勤。
Because of someone important. So, stop asking and be serious. I'm on duty right now.
Alright, I'll leave you to it then.
噗…我警告你，岗哨神圣啊！别跟我嘻嘻哈哈的，烦你了啊！
*laughs* ...Hey, I'm warning you, I'm carrying out my sacred duty! It'll be annoying if you keep cracking jokes like that!
如果你没别的事，就别在这附近闲逛了。等我过几天忙完了，叫上小桂子和藿藿，一起去金人巷吃个饭吧。好久没聚了。
Stop hanging around here and find something better to do. Once I'm done in a few days, call up Lil Gui and Huohuo, and let's grab a meal at Aurum Alley. It's been ages since we hung out.
岗哨神圣，不可侵犯！有什么事下了班再说！
Please do not hinder me from carrying out my sacred duty! We can discuss whatever you want after my shift!
这么多年过去，罗浮丹鼎司的景色依旧未曾变改。
All these years, and the view at the Alchemy Commission hasn't changed a bit.
古海恒常，潮来潮去，对于我们持明而言，没有比这更值得怀念的故土了。
The tides come and go, but the ancient sea remains the same. For us Vidyadhara, there's nothing more nostalgic than our homeland.
是啊，妾身自幼长于罗浮，在丹鼎司中听着这涛声与师长同侪潜心钻研丹方。
Yes, I grew up here, listening to the sound of waves while researching prescriptions with my mentors and peers at the Alchemy Commission.
可叹，世事无常又如此相似。我与丹恒先生一样，远游他乡。如今归来目睹旧时景色，心中难免有些感慨。

It's kind of sad, isn't it? Everything changes but somehow remains familiar. Just like you, Dan Heng, I traveled far from home, and now I've returned. Seeing the familiar scenery brings back a hint of nostalgia.
如果没有建木，这里的景色只怕会更好些。
The view here would be even better without the Ambrosial Arbor.
是吗？我倒是觉得建木点缀在那里，还挺壮观的。
Oh, really? I think that towering tree looks pretty impressive.
再壮观也是寿瘟祸迹。仙舟与孽物争斗数千年，看到建木重又升起，人人心底都难免隐然不安的。

Even if it's impressive, it's a plaguemark. The Xianzhou have been fighting abominations for thousands of years, and now that the Ambrosial Arbor has been reborn, it's only natural for everyone to feel uneasy.
种子一旦被埋下后，无论如何延阻其势，总会有发芽结果的时刻。
Well, once a seed is planted, no matter how long it takes, it'll eventually sprout and bear fruit.
以妾身的愚见，建木重生，恰如药王秘传再度出现，是不可避免的。这颗种子早在仙舟先民求取长生的时刻就已被埋下了。

In my humble opinion, the rebirth of the Ambrosial Arbor and the resurgence of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus were inevitable. The seed was already planted when the ancestors of the Xianzhou sought immortality.
怎么突然聊起了严肃话题…
Why such a serious topic all of a sudden...?
话不可以乱说啊，灵砂小姐。
We can't just make wild speculations about these things, Miss Lingsha.
I thought we were here to have some tea, but where's the tea?
是妾身鲁莽了，丹恒先生与彦卿骁卫是这次建木灾异的亲历者，故而有些事情想要与两位探讨一番。
My bad. Well, since you went through the entire Ambrosial Arbor Crisis firsthand, Dan Heng and Lieutenant Yanqing, I'd like to discuss something with you.
What would you like to discuss, Miss Lingsha?
妾身有幸得到联盟委派，要来清扫这丹鼎司中的积年尘垢。
I was lucky enough to be chosen by the Alliance to come in and clean up all the old grime in the Alchemy Commission.
不过这罗浮丹鼎司千疮百孔，早已到了积重难返的地步。我想要开一道「医治良方」，却不知两位有什么高见？

Honestly, the Alchemy Commission is riddled with problems and has reached a point where fixing it seems impossible. I'm looking to "remedy" this problem, but was wondering if you could provide any insights?
我虽然身为持明族人，但与身边的两位伙伴一样同是外人身份。灵砂小姐想要的「医方」，丹恒无法置喙。但是…有一句忠告，希望灵砂小姐听听。
Well, even though I'm a Vidyadharan like you, I'm an outsider just like my companions here. I can't really say much about a "remedy," but... I do have a piece of advice, Miss Lingsha.
长久以来，罗浮持明族与丹鼎司有着千丝万缕的合作，若灵砂小姐不能自外其间，想要改变丹鼎司的局面，恐怕很难。

The Vidyadhara and the Alchemy Commission on the Luofu have always been intricately connected. If you cannot distance yourself from these ties, Miss Lingsha, changing the situation within the Alchemy Commission may be quite challenging.
彦卿对政务懂得不多，只知道药王秘传在丹鼎司中经营多年。灵砂小姐要想革除其影响，可与将军商议对策。

I may not know about politics, but I do know that the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus have been operating within the Alchemy Commission for years. If you're determined to root them out, maybe you should discuss it with the general.
明白了，两位以真知灼见教我，灵砂在此谢过。
I see. Thank you for your valuable insights.
帝弓的光矢威力无伦，能斫断建木，却无法断去凡物延续自我的渴望。
While the Lux Arrow from the Reignbow possesses unparalleled power to sever the Ambrosial Arbor, it can't sever mortals' desire to prolong their existence.
就像云骑，虽然能将药王秘传的乱党余孽铲除，却不能抚平这丹鼎司的人心。
Just like how the Cloud Knights can eliminate the remnants of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus, but are unable to calm the hearts and minds of the people within the Alchemy Commission.
仙舟先民深知这一节，才会将守望建木玄根的职责付与持明族，但持明也不过是凡物。
Our Xianzhou forbears knew this well, and that's why they entrusted the duty of guarding the Roots of the Arbor to the Vidyadhara. However, the Vidyadhara are still only mortal beings.
早在三十年前，妾身的授业恩师，也是这罗浮丹鼎司的司鼎，已察觉了此间涌动的暗流，意欲正本清源。
Thirty years ago, my mentor served as Alchemy Commission's Cauldron Master. She recognized the emerging undercurrents and sought to cleanse the source of the disturbance.
可惜，她虽然精通医术，却并不懂人心，全然不知如何切除潜藏于丹鼎司深处的毒痈。最终，恩师遭人构陷驱逐，远放朱明仙舟。我也受此牵连，不得不离开罗浮。

Unfortunately, even though she was skilled in the art of healing, she didn't understand the human heart or how to eliminate the sickness lurking within the depths of the Alchemy Commission. In the end, she was framed and exiled to the Zhuming. I was also implicated and had to leave the Luofu.
而当时负责仲裁此事，允可放逐令的…正是景元将军本人。
And guess who arbitrated that case and handed down the sentence...? None other than General Jing Yuan himself.
你没听错。丹鼎司的局面糜烂至此，要为此负上责任的，除却药王乱党之外，还有神策将军。
You heard it right. The ones responsible for the corruption in the Alchemy Commission are not just the remnants of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus, but even the Divine Foresight himself.
哎呀，彦卿大人怎么脸色都变了？
Alas, why is your face turning pale, Yanqing?
安心吧，妾身明白「人在其位，身不由己」的道理，绝不会对将军心怀什么怨恨的。毕竟，对我们这个年纪的成年人来说呢，所谓「私人恩怨」，已经是一件很奢侈的事情了。

Don't worry about it. I understand that when someone holds a position of power, they may sometimes have to make tough decisions. I won't hold any personal grudges against him. Besides, at our age, holding personal grudges is a luxury we can't afford.
灵砂姐姐，你可回来啦！我等了好久！
Lingsha, you're back! I've been waiting ages for you!
云璃，怎么不在爷爷身边呆着，却跑来丹鼎司闲逛。
Yunli? Why aren't you with your grandpa? What brings you to the Alchemy Commission?
正好，趁此良机，我来给你介绍介绍，这位彦卿大人是……
Well, let me take this opportunity to introduce you to Yanqing...
你，这回你该把偷走的剑还我了吧！
You...! You stole my sword! Give it back!
我明白了，那就跳过介绍这一步吧。
I see. Let's skip the "introduction" part then.
怎么在什么地方都能遇到你，你不会是一直跟着我吧？
Why do I keep bumping into you? Are you stalking me or something?
哼，彦卿自然是有正事要忙，不像云璃姑娘这么闲，有空逛街，却没空还剑。
Of course not. Unlike you, Miss Yunli, I have important things to take care of. You, on the other hand, seem to have all the time in the world to wander around without returning my sword.
爷爷说过，物肖其主。我和你的剑谈过心了。它告诉我，你心事重重、闲愁万种，该出剑时迟不出剑，不出剑时也持不住剑……

Grandpa used to say that a sword reflects its master. I talked to your sword, and it told me that you've been distracted. You hesitate when you should strike, and you struggle to stay calm when your sword is unsheathed...
如今再瞧瞧你，我觉得这剑说的不假。不怪我夺走你的飞剑，是你的心思不在剑上。
Now that I see you again, I realize your sword was right. It wasn't me who took your sword. It was you who lost focus.
你以为我会相信你现编的胡话吗？我敬你是朱明来的客人，才一再忍让，你却毫不领情。难道朱明仙舟没有「拿了别人东西要还」的常识吗？

Do you really expect me to believe that nonsense? I've been taking it easy on you because you're a guest from the Zhuming, but you're not taking the hint. Don't people from the Zhuming know you're supposed to return what you've borrowed?
你看看这柄飞剑吧，就算我现在还给你，不消一时三刻，它也迟早被人夺了去。
Just look at this flying sword. Even if I give it back to you now, it'll just be taken away again in a few hours.
「云骑不可令武备脱手」的教条你听过吧？眼下我自然可以还给你，但是上了战场，可就不一样了。哎，这柄飞剑该有多可怜呐。

You know the Cloud Knight saying: "A Cloud Knight must never let slip their weapon," yes? Well, sure, I can give it back to you now, but on the battlefield, that's a whole different story. Poor flying sword.
你也不必归还了，因为我失去的剑，我会亲自把它夺回来！！
Fine, you don't have to give it back because I'll take it back myself!!
Maybe I should call the general...
到底该呼叫哪位将军啊？
But which general should I call?
你觉得这两位到底谁更厉害一点？别怪我，我是真心好奇。
Between these two, who do you think is tougher? Don't get me wrong, I'm just curious.
Oh, to be young and at the whim of impulse.
你觉得这两位到底谁更厉害一点？别怪我，我是真心好奇。
Between these two, who do you think is tougher? Don't get me wrong, I'm just curious.
做好准备把他们俩分开吧。
丹恒，你觉得这两位到底谁更厉害一点？别怪我，我是真心好奇。
Between these two, who do you think is tougher, Dan Heng? Don't get me wrong, I'm just curious.
做好准备把他们俩分开吧。
今天是我在丹鼎司履任的第一日，刀兵见红可不是个开门好彩头。
It is my first day at the Alchemy Commission — a brawl is definitely not how I imagined celebrating it.
好吧，灵砂姐姐不喜欢，我就不在这里动刀动剑。
Well, since you don't approve, I won't draw my sword here.
倒也不是这个意思。剑都拔出来了，不让比一比，你们俩谁也不会高兴不是？
I didn't mean it that way. Since you've already drawn your swords, you'd be disappointed if you didn't get to test one another, right?
我听司里的报告说，丹鼎司洞天周遭至今仍有孽物出没。想来是我的前任们在丹鼎司里留下不少烂账。你们若想比出胜负高下，何必要将刀剑往彼此身上招呼？

I've received reports that the delves near the Alchemy Commission are still infested with abominations. Seems like my predecessors left quite a mess. So, if you two want to determine who's better, why not focus on them instead of each other?
Clearing out some abominations? Meh, sounds boring.
斩杀孽物是云骑分内职责，不必灵砂小姐开口，彦卿会荡平这些孽物。
It's the Cloud Knights' duty to eliminate those abominations. You don't have to ask me twice, Miss Lingsha. I'll help you get rid of them.
就你会做人？只要灵砂姐姐需要，云璃当然乐意拔剑分忧。
Oh, you think you're the only one who knows how to behave? If Lingsha needs anything, I'll gladly draw my sword and help her out.
两位小朋友都成了贴心小棉袄，妾身好开心。那咱们走起来？
It's so heartwarming to see both of you being so sweet and caring. So then, shall we get going?
回来了？你们见过了景元，也到处逛了几个时辰，有何感想？
Back already? You've met with Jing Yuan and wandered around for a few hours. So, what do you think?
在我看来神策将军是想借演武仪典「示众以强」，证明罗浮在建木灾异之后的局势太平无恙，欣欣向荣……
It appears that the Divine Foresight is using this Wardance as a show of strength to convince everyone that the Luofu is prospering after the Ambrosial Arbor Crisis...
「不过」…接下来你要说「不过」了对吧？
But... I know you're going to say "But," right?
不过嘛，随演武仪典所涌入的人群可是不安和流言最大的传声筒。一着棋错，乱象迭起。
But, the influx of people attending the Wardance is like a breeding ground for disorder and rumors. One wrong move, and the Luofu could be in a world of chaos.
街上的云骑颇为警醒，可见那位将军还是明白这层道理的。至于别的，我瞧不出来。
The Cloud Knights on the streets remain vigilant, so at the very least General Jing Yuan is aware of this. As for other matters, I'm unable to say.
以后有这等面见将军的好差事，你还是饶了我吧。我一个随军医士怎么就要被推到台前，和两位将军谈笑风生了呢？
I'd prefer to be excused from future meetings with generals. I'm just a military healer, and now all of a sudden I'm thrust onto the center stage having cordial chats with two generals?
我的工作性质也不适合人前露面。
My work doesn't lend itself to being in the limelight, either.
别抱怨了，我看你们两个身上也没多几个窟窿眼嘛。
Just stop whining. At least you're in one piece, right?
在接触之前，我想先摒弃成见，观对方「所成之势」再下判断。这所成之势嘛，自然就是街上云骑的风貌，人们的风评，还有与他亲近之人的行止。

Before getting in touch with General Jing Yuan, I want to put aside my assumptions and see his "momentum." That includes the overall bearing of the Cloud Knights on the street, what people are saying, and how those close to him behave.
「军之强弱，非在其卒，实在其势。审势之成，乃明强弱。」将军所言，属下受益匪浅。
"The might of an army dwells not within its pawns, but within the force of its collective momentum. Recognizing this fact reveals the true measure of power." Thanks for enlightening me, General.
好好一句大白话，让你一翻译，我自己都听不懂了。总之，这是我打仗时的习惯，你们也给我习惯习惯吧。
A perfectly clear statement turned confusing thanks to your translation — you've made me lose where I was now. Anyway, this is how I operate in battle, so you might as well get used to it.
您这是把景元将军当作敌人审视了吗？
Are you treating General Jing Yuan as your enemy?
罗浮仙舟治军最久的将军，他的敌人，还会少吗？
The longest-serving general of the Xianzhou Luofu. Do you think he'd have only a few enemies?
对了，将军，你已经见过衔药龙女了吧？能否让我瞧瞧她开出的诊断处方？
By the way, General, you met the Healer Lady, yes? Could you show me the medicine she prescribed you?
对于我的情况，龙女也无法可施，只是让我「吃点好的」。
Well, the Healer Lady couldn't do anything about my condition. She just told me to "enjoy some tasty food."
…就算是名动一方的衔药龙女，也没法子么？
...So, not even the famed Healer Lady could help?
不必担心，我会完成当年的承诺，找到医好你的办法。眼下我已有了眉目。
Don't worry. I'll fulfill my promise and find a way to cure you. Actually, I've found some leads.
椒丘，生死之事，自有定数。
Well, life and death, Jiaoqiu, it's all predetermined.
自从军之日开始，我就立下誓愿，余生要成为仙舟的锋镝，射向丰饶孽物。
Upon starting my military career, I made a pledge that the rest of my life would be dedicated to being the Xianzhou's spearhead, hunting down the Abominations of Abundance till the end of my days.
只要能完成这一夙愿，往后究竟能活多久…我都不在乎。
As long as I can fulfill that deep-seated desire... I don't care how long I live.
你刚刚说我将景元视作敌人…不，我的敌人从来只有自己。
You asked if I view General Jing Yuan as my enemy... No, my real enemy has always been myself.
「吃点好的」，所以…晚上我们吃什么？
"Enjoy some tasty food" So... what's for dinner tonight?
你小子…到底会不会看气氛？
Geez... you really know how to read the room, don't you?
你们俩自个儿安排吧，我和一位多年没见的老战友有约了。
You guys figure it out for yourselves. I'm due to catch up with an old war friend I've not seen for quite a long time.
与此同时，彦卿与{NICKNAME}回到了长乐天。
Meanwhile, Yanqing and {NICKNAME} return to the Exalting Sanctum.
I'm here to pay my respects to the new Cauldron Master.
Cauldron Master Lingsha is busy with official business...
挂了那么多年号才轮到我！
I've been waiting for years for my turn!
And now someone cuts in line!?
Sorry, but it can't be helped...
Don't worry. Your turn will come soon. Please bear with me.
打从药王秘传覆灭后，他们豢养研究的孽物也被遗落在此，盘踞滋生。
Ever since the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus were eradicated, their experimental abominations have been festering here.
你们俩若想一较高下，妾身便做个裁判：以一刻为限，看谁在时限内斩除的孽物最多，更胜一筹。
If you want a contest, I'll be the referee. The one who kills the most abominations within fifteen minutes wins.
灵砂姐姐还是一如既往，教人打白工也说的这么冠冕堂皇……
Lingsha, as always, you're still an expert in making unpaid work sound so noble and grand...
小云璃，这也是为你们好。你俩有心比出胜负，但刀剑无眼，伤到谁都不好。
It's for your own good, little Yunli. While you desire to compete against each other, I don't want to see either of you getting hurt.
还是司鼎大人思虑周全。
That's really thoughtful of you, Cauldron Master.
怎么样？两位准备好了么？
我前任留下的烂账还真不少啊。
Looks like my predecessors left quite a mess.
重复一遍，以一刻为限，看谁在时限内斩除的孽物最多，便判谁的剑术更胜一筹。
Let me say it again: The one who kills the most abominations within fifteen minutes wins.
诸位拔剑时也小心些，切莫伤到了彼此。
Be careful when you draw your swords, and make sure you don't hurt each other.
灵砂姐姐，可以开始了吗？
你还是乖乖把剑还我，恭恭敬敬地向我道歉，然后哭着鼻子回去向爷爷诉苦吧。
Why don't you just give me back my sword, sincerely apologize, and then go cry your eyes out to your grandpa?
遇上我是你的运气。我对你那把又大又沉、锈迹斑斑的铁剑不感兴趣。我也没有夺人武器，顺手牵羊的爱好。
Consider yourself lucky that I'm not interested in your rusty sword, as I don't have the nasty habit of snatching other people's weapons.
不过是斩了些怪物就得意忘形。
All you did was chop down a few monsters. Don't get carried away with yourself.
哼，能不能夺走我手中这把剑，你倒是可以试试啊？
Heh, if you think you can just take this sword from my hand, go ahead and try.
你的剑招芜杂凌乱，一味图快。罗浮云骑的剑术也不过如此。
Your technique was all over the place, and you relied too much on speed. Is this really all the Cloud Knights of the Luofu can muster? So disappointing.
不过是斩了些怪物就得意忘形。
All you did was chop down a few monsters. Don't get carried away with yourself.
哦？那我给你个机会，打败我，或者干脆把你的剑全都交给我算了。
Oh? Well then I'll give you a chance. Defeat me, or hand over all your swords.
如果挑衅是你的目的，彦卿就奉陪到底！
If you're trying to pick a fight, just ask, because I'm ready for you!
两位小朋友，打得不错啊。
不过，你们俩一边只知闪躲，自以为身法灵动；另一边力大砖飞，总是妄想一击克敌…战术和技法都有缺漏。

However, both of you have shortcomings. One of you focuses on dodging and weaving, while the other relies on brute strength, trying to take down targets with a single strike... Both of your tactics and techniques are lacking.
我嘛，我只是一个来丹鼎司求医问药的病人，顺道路过的看客。
Me? I'm just a patient seeking medicine from the Alchemy Commission. A passerby, if you will.
原以为罗浮演武仪典召开在即，能在擂台上一饱眼福，却没想到还能在治病救人的丹鼎司里瞧见这么一场精彩的战斗。罗浮之上的怪事还真多啊。

I thought I'd see my fill of impressive fights during the Wardance — yet here I am, able to witness a remarkable fight at the Alchemy Commission, of all places. Well, the Luofu is never short of surprises.
不过我有个小小的建议，与其在外私斗，我更想看两位小朋友借着演武仪典的机会，上擂台堂堂正正地把对方打个半死，如此一来，什么仇怨都一笔勾销了。

However, I have a small suggestion for you. Why don't you settle this dispute fair and square in the Wardance's ring? That way, you can resolve your differences with a proper duel, and put your grudges behind you.
仇怨？你误会了，我和云璃…只是切磋罢了。
Grudges? No, not at all. Yunli and I... we were just sparring.
一个用飞剑，一个抡巨刃，说你们之间没些恩怨，我不信。
Sparring? You summoned your flying swords, and she swung her sword with full strength. No grudges between you? I don't believe it.
啊呀，飞霄大人，您怎么在这儿？龙女的看诊结束了吗？
Aha! What brings you here, Lady Feixiao? Have you finished your health consultation with the Dragon Lady?
飞…霄？莫非你就是爷爷时常提起的那位……
Fei... Feixiao? Grandpa always talks about you... Could it be that you are...
...The Merlin's Claw of the Xianzhou Yaoqing?
看来我在罗浮仙舟上也还挺有名的嘛。
Looks like I'm quite famous on the Xianzhou Luofu, too.
那是当然，「大捷将军」的名头，无人不知无人不晓。
Of course, everyone has heard of the Vanquishing General, known to all, and unbeknown to none.
「大捷将军」？这个称呼未免也太自恋了吧。不成不成！
Vanquishing General? Isn't that title a bit too narcissistic? I don't like it.
我听说罗浮有个「闭目将军」，所以我也给自己起了个同样谦逊的外号：「三无将军」——无虑，无悔，无敌。
I heard there's a Dozing General on the Luofu, so I came up with a humble nickname for myself: The "lacking general" — lacking in worries, regrets, and rivals.
这么称呼，是不是听起来好多了？
确实是个谦逊低调且不失威风的好名头。
Yeah, that's a befitting title that sounds both humble and impressive.
彦卿、云璃，既然切磋结束，是不是该有礼貌地感谢飞霄将军的指点，然后安静地握手言和了？
Now that the sparring session is over, Yanqing and Yunli, shouldn't you politely thank General Feixiao for her guidance and bury the hatchet?
…剑，还你，你可得把你的剑看好了，免得下次又被人夺去。还有，这次没分出胜负，下次我会让你输得心服口服的。
...Here's your sword. Keep it safe, or it might get taken away again. By the way, we haven't settled the score yet. I'll defeat you fair and square next time we fight.
她这算是道歉的态度吗？拿回了剑，彦卿也该回神策府复命了。飞霄将军，彦卿先行告退。
This is how she apologizes? Now that I finally got my sword back, I should report to the Seat of Divine Foresight. I'll take my leave, General Feixiao.
对了，灵砂小姐。若有闲暇，彦卿想请您来神策府一叙，与我家将军开诚布公聊一聊。相信今日你所说的「恩怨」，其中一定另有隐情……

Oh, by the way, Miss Lingsha, if you've got some free time, I'd like to invite you to the Seat of Divine Foresight for a chat with General Jing Yuan. I think there's more to those "personal grudges" you mentioned earlier...
多谢飞霄大人出手了。若是您再晚来些，我已准备点上迷香，麻翻他们两个了。
Thanks for stepping in, General Feixiao. Otherwise, I'd have had to knock them out with my incense.
不必客气，你请托的事，我办到啦。就当是抵了衔药龙女的诊金如何？
Not at all, just doing what you asked. How about we call it even as payment for the Healer Lady's consultation?
抱歉，就算贵为将军，也要埋单付钱吧？何况，丹鼎司的医馆从来明码标价，概不赊欠。更何况问诊龙女大人的队伍早已排到了几十年后啦。
Sorry, but even a general needs to pay their bills. We don't do credit here. And let's not forget, you'd have been waiting decades for a chance to see the Dragon Lady if it weren't for me.
那你把账单寄到神策府上好了，就说是我指点那两个小家伙的教学费用。毕竟方才为了分开他们，我差点动了真格。眼下让我找个地方透透气……

Well, you can always send the bill to the Seat of Divine Foresight and say it's for mentoring those kids. After all, it was quite the effort splitting them up, I nearly had to get tough. Now, if you'll excuse me, I need to find a spot and get some fresh air...
片刻之后，飞霄信步来到古海滨岸等待…
A moment later, Feixiao leisurely walks to the ancient seaside shore to wait...
剑都把握不住的家伙，居然有点本事。
I didn't expect someone who can't even hold onto his sword to actually have some skill.
I won't lose to you when it comes to swordplay.
挥舞大剑举重若轻，真不能小看了她。
She wields her sword with ease. I shouldn't underestimate her.
招数花哨多，又没怎么击中要害。你的剑被这么滥用，真是浪费了。
You've got style with those moves, but you're not striking where it counts. It's such a shame to see you misuse your sword like that.
Through the clouds, it cleaves a path, Hah!
To earth, it descends with might, eradicate!
刚才那个从天而降的就是曜青的云骑将军吗？她真的好帅！
Hey, was that the Yaoqing General who just dropped in out of nowhere? She's so awesome!
云璃挥舞这么大一把剑，她这么轻轻一击，就化解了云璃的攻势——
I mean, when Yunli swung that massive sword, she just casually blocked her attack with ease...
咳咳…当然了！作为云璃的对手，那位舞剑的少侠也是英气逼人，身法灵动！看得我都想拜他为师，学习仙舟剑术了！
Ahem, yeah... But to go up against Yunli is quite impressive, you know? That aura of heroism and grace. It almost makes me want to learn Xianzhou swordplay!
是啊，的确是位极有压迫感的将军。
I agree. General Feixiao is indeed impressive.
Uh... I was talking about Yanqing, actually.
Hmmm, that general is totally something else...
是啊，的确是位极有压迫感的将军。
I agree. General Feixiao is indeed impressive.
我其实希望你夸夸彦卿啊。
I was actually hoping you'd give Yanqing some praise!
Oh, yeah, Xianzhou swordplay is really good! Like really, really good!
Can't you put a little more enthusiasm into it?
谢谢三月小姐的安慰。演武仪典召开在即，彦卿侥幸有资格能代表云骑军出战。
Thanks for the kind words, Miss March. The Wardance is coming up, and I've been chosen to represent the Cloud Knights in the ceremony.
这些日子以来，我不知吃了多少次败仗，早就明白了「天外有天，人外有人」的道理。但今日见识了飞霄将军的身手，心中又开始惴惴不安了。
I've had my fair share of defeats lately, and even though I know there are always more skilled swordmasters out there, seeing General Feixiao's skills today has made me feel a bit uneasy again.
倒也不必妄自菲薄，毕竟演武仪典将军不会下场。只要牢记你当日以一人之力挑战我和刃时将生死置之度外的心境，便足以战胜大部分挑战者。

Don't underestimate yourself. After all, generals won't fight in the ring during the Wardance. Just remember the state of mind you had when you single-handedly took on me and Blade, putting life and death aside. With that mindset, you can prevail against most challengers.
我明白了，感谢丹恒老师的指点！今日之事算是告一段落，我家将军想请各位来神策府中小坐，说是有要事相商。

I see. Thanks for the advice, Master Dan Heng! By the way, now that today's events are over, General Jing Yuan wants to invite all of you to the Seat of Divine Foresight. He has something important to discuss.
想必是为了商讨如何应付曜青和朱明将军的到来。
I bet it's about how to deal with the generals from the Yaoqing and the Zhuming.
唉，彦卿不想这么早领略成年人勾心斗角的事情啊…只希望飞霄和怀炎二位将军能明察事实。演武仪典到来前，罗浮之上可不要再生波折了。
*sigh* I really don't want to get caught up in grown-up games so soon... I just hope Generals Feixiao and Huaiyan can see the truth. We don't need any more chaos on the Luofu before the Wardance.
早些时候在司辰宫，晚辈已向炎老介绍过星穹列车的客人了。不过那时人多耳杂，只能寒暄些琐事。现在，我将三位正式引荐给炎老。

Earlier at the Palace of Astrum, I introduced these guests from the Astral Express to you, Elder Huaiyan, but with all the people around, we only exchanged pleasantries. Now, I'd like to officially introduce them to you.
这三位甘冒奇险，随景元出入死地，驱逐了首恶幻胧，也揭破药王秘传的阴谋。个中细节，炎老有什么想知道的，尽可以提问。

These three braved great dangers, accompanying me to perilous places, defeating the chief culprit Phantylia, and uncovering the conspiracies of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus. If you wish to know more, please feel free to ask us.
关于建木重生始末，太卜符玄呈交联盟的一系列报告老朽都看过了。她本人也为此受召前往玉阙接受问话。联盟内部对此事疑虑重重……

Well, I skimmed through the reports about the Arbor's rebirth from the Master Diviner Fu Xuan. She's been summoned to the Yuque for questioning. There are a lot of doubts within the Alliance about this whole situation...
...But despite all that, I believe in you.
你自入行伍起，屡建奇功。「云上五骁」各自隐没后，尽管联盟内对你多有非议，但元帅依然力排众议，将罗浮托付于你。

Since you joined the ranks, you have repeatedly achieved remarkable feats. After the High-Cloud Quintet each went their separate ways, despite the many criticisms within the Alliance, the Marshal still stood firm against the dissenting voices, and entrusted the Luofu to you.
这些年来，你为联盟竭忠尽智。挫败塔拉萨的孽物，解去玉阙仙舟之围，摧毁丰饶民所唤来的妖星…历次大战中的种种，老朽依旧记得。

Over the years, you've served the Alliance with loyalty and wisdom. You've taken down abominations in Thalassa, rescued the Xianzhou Yuque from a siege, and destroyed the demonic planet summoned by the Denizens of Abundance... I still remember those battles vividly.
有些蠹虫怀疑你的忠诚，臆断你昏聩无智，他们乐见神策将军失策，是因为他们本性如此，身无建树，只渴望目睹他人的失败作为活下去的养料。

There are fools who doubt your loyalty. They're happy to see the Divine Foresight fail because it gives them some kind of sick satisfaction. They haven't achieved anything of their own, so they feed off the failures of others.
但老朽见证过太多失败了，我更愿意去相信，相信你的忠诚从未改变。
But I've seen enough failures in my time. And I want to believe that your loyalty has never wavered.
那么，这次受联盟派遣前来探问建木灾异始末的，只有曜青的飞霄将军了？
So, General Feixiao of the Yaoqing is the only one investigating the Ambrosial Arbor Crisis on behalf of the Alliance?
这位老爷子说话还真是…出人意表。
This old man's words... always catch me off guard.
元帅发出饬令，要我前往罗浮仙舟。但公文里也不过寥寥几个字：「观礼演武仪典，旁听飞霄问话」。
The Marshal ordered me to come to the Xianzhou Luofu, but the document only says: "Attend the Wardance and listen to Feixiao's questioning."
对元帅而言，她很清楚景元召开仪典的用意，也知晓他所面临的局势。她这么提，显然是认为二者并重。
The Marshal is well aware of Jing Yuan's purpose in holding the ceremony and understands the situation he is facing. She mentioned it because she believes both issues are important.
元帅的命令？需要回避吗？
Since it's the Marshal's orders, do we need to step aside?
各位是证人，无妨。在我看来，元帅很清楚景元召开仪典的用意，也知晓他所面临的局势。她这么说，显然是认为二者并重。

No need for that. You're all important witnesses. The Marshal is well aware of Jing Yuan's purpose in holding the ceremony and understands the situation he is facing. She mentioned it because she believes both issues are important.
炎老襟怀朗照，晚辈铭感五内。但是，元帅交付的饬令，当众说开，这…合适吗？
Thanks for your kindness and sincerity, Elder Huaiyan, but is it appropriate... to tell everyone here about the Marshal's orders?
你独自向我引介列车的证人，不正是想摸清我与飞霄各自的来意，以及我俩之间是否有所抵牾。老朽赤诚待人，年轻人也就别藏着掖着了。

By introducing the Express' witnesses to me alone, aren't you aiming to discern the intentions behind both my actions and Feixiao's, and whether there's any discord between us? Well, since I'm being open and honest with you, I encourage you young folk to do the same.
对建木灾异一事，老朽自始至终要做的只有旁听。真正要提出问题的，是飞霄将军。而我更关心的，则是演武仪典能否如期平安举行。
As for the Ambrosial Arbor Crisis, all I need to do is listen. General Feixiao will be the one asking the questions. To be honest, I'm more concerned about the timely start of the Wardance.
说起来，老朽这次抵达罗浮，为演武仪典带来了一份礼物。
Oh, by the way, I've prepared a gift for the Wardance.
Yes, it's this case right here.
这张匣子泛着钝光，以非木非金的材质制成。匣面上以高妙的技艺嵌入金属丝络，勾勒出莲花纹样。
This case gleams with a muted luster, crafted from a material neither wood nor metal. Its surface is masterfully woven with metallic threads, outlining an intricate pattern of lotus flowers.
演武仪典期间，大大小小比武与庆贺数不胜数。其中最重要的莫过于「守擂竞锋」。
There will be numerous contests and celebrations during the Wardance, and the main event will be the Ringmaster's Challenge.
东道主要派出技艺高超的战士守擂，应对四方挑战，以彰显仙舟武德之盛。当老朽听你提及星穹列车会前来观礼，本以为本次守擂之人会是罗浮龙尊……

The host will dispatch a skilled warrior to take on challengers from all over the cosmos, showcasing the excellent martial arts of the Xianzhou Luofu. When you mentioned that the Astral Express would be attending the ceremony, I thought the high elder of the Luofu would be the ringmaster...
炎老说笑了。衔药龙女年纪尚浅，又不通武事，怎能让她守擂？
You humor me, Elder Huaiyan. The Healer Lady is just a young lady who knows nothing about martial arts. How can I assign her as the ringmaster?
论说笑的本事，我还是不及你。
I'm no match to you when it comes to joking.
这匣子是干什么用的？怀炎将军怎么不把它打开啊？
What's this box for? Why don't you open it, General Huaiyan?
这是我为演武仪典的奖品准备的剑匣。其中暂时空空如也，但过不了几日，便有一柄宝剑即将抵达此处，收纳在其中。
This sword case is intended for the Wardance's award. It's empty now, but in a few days, a precious sword will be delivered and stored inside.
不是老朽自夸，此剑是朱明仙舟工造技艺的极致，曾流落异乡，创下种种英雄伟业。个中离奇，实难一语道尽。不过，送来宝剑的使团尚未驾临，我就先在这儿放个剑匣吧。

I don't mean to boast about our skills, but this sword represents the pinnacle of the Zhuming's craftsmanship. It has a legendary history, full of heroic tales from foreign lands, tales that are too detailed to be summarized in just a few words. Since the delegation delivering the sword hasn't arrived yet, I'll just leave the case here for now.
老朽一直在想…到底什么样的人才能配得上这柄剑呢？思前想后，不如就趁这次守擂竞锋，将它当作奖品送出吧！竞锋胜者想必英雄过人，与宝剑正相匹配。

I've been wondering... who would be worthy of such a sword? And then it hit me — I can award it to the champion of the Ringmaster's Challenge! The ceremony's champion is sure to be a perfect match for the sword.
而且我听说彦卿小兄弟剑术过人，他代表罗浮守擂，老朽觉得这件礼物真是再合适不过了。
Moreover, I hear that Yanqing is an excellent swordmaster, and that he will be representing the Luofu as the ringmaster, so it seems like a perfect gift for him.
炎老有此美意，景元就在此谢过了。
Thank you for your generosity, Elder Huaiyan.
爷爷，想送我剑就直说，何必绕这么大个弯子。
If you want to give me a sword, just say the word, Grandpa. No need to beat around the bush.
丫头，你倒是自信。可我看你却未必能赢过彦卿呀。
You've got confidence, my girl, but I don't think you can best Yanqing.
云璃姑娘有爱剑之心，彦卿是知道的。只可惜剑总会选择与它相配的主人。
I know you're all about swords, Miss Yunli. It's just a shame that it's the sword that ultimately chooses its rightful master.
有些人就算得到宝剑，难免要落入旁人之手。
Yeah, and even if someone gets their hands on such a precious sword, it'll probably end up in someone else's.
今日在丹鼎司的胜负还没分出，云璃小姐既然有兴趣，不如代表朱明仙舟上台一战？
The outcome of our duel at the Alchemy Commission is still up in the air. Since you're interested, why don't you represent the Xianzhou Zhuming and challenge me in the ring?
我正有此意！胜者花落谁家还不一定呢！也许是我，也许是别人，也许还是我，但总之…未必是他！
That's exactly what I had in mind! Nobody knows who's gonna come out on top! It could be me, could be someone else... It'll probably be me, but whatever happens... it won't be him!
It'll be either death or disaster when these two clash...
我不想说的太失礼…但是，这场连续剧看了那么久，我还真想瞧瞧，他们俩到底谁胜谁负。
Not to be rude or anything... We've been watching their drama. I'm dying to find out who beats who.
在客人面前都给我消停消停！老朽送出宝剑，是想为仪典增光添彩，不是想听你们彼此争吵，有伤盟谊。
Quiet down! We have other guests here! I've prepared this sword to add some excitement to the ceremony, not to have you two squabble. It's not a good look for the Alliance.
虽然你们俩都有不会输给对方的自信。但擂台之事总是一胜一负，难免伤了和气。老朽有个想法——
While you both seem confident that you'll win, you need to remember there can only be one winner and one loser in the ring, which could lead to hard feelings. Actually, I have an idea...
虽说胜者尚未揭晓，也未必就是你二人，但若想得到这彩头，我要你们联手教出一名学徒，让他登上演武仪典，至少赢下一场胜利。

We don't know who the winner will be, and it might not be either of you, but if you're eyeing that prize, you'll need to work together. I want you to take on an apprentice who will take part in the Wardance and win at least one match.
依老朽愚见，云骑剑士卓然于胜利之巅固然可喜；但能传下技艺，令其开枝散叶，嘉惠旁人，才更有价值。
In my humble opinion, while a Cloud Knight is commendable by securing victories, it's even more so to pass on your skills and spread the way of swordplay.
若是此人能以云骑剑术代表列车参加演武仪典，大展身手，老朽也会大感快慰！
I'd be greatly pleased if this apprentice could represent the Express in the Wardance by displaying their Cloud Knight flair and prowess.
炎老这想法着实有趣。传徒授艺，方显合作精神。如此一来，胜者有所斩获，败者也不至于空手而归。只是，他们二人该收谁为徒呢？

Well, Elder Huaiyan's idea is quite interesting. Imparting swordplay skills requires teamwork, and both the winner and the loser will learn a valuable lesson regardless of the outcome. The question is, whom should the two of them take as an apprentice?
方才我看这位三月小姐对你们俩擂台剑斗之事颇为上心。不如就由你们教导她剑术入门。
I noticed just now that Miss March seemed quite interested in the outcome of your sword fight, so I thought why not teach her the art of swordplay?
…哎？欸！老将军不会是认真的吧？
怎么突然把我给牵扯进来了？我也没练过剑啊！零基础啊！学得会吗！不会到最后耻辱地被逐出师门吧！

Why am I being dragged into this all of a sudden? I've never practiced swordplay before! I'm a total newbie! You really think I can learn it? You'll probably realize I have no hope and give up on me, and that'd be sooo embarrassing!
Why don't you choose Dan Heng?
Things are already complicated enough as they are, {NICKNAME}.
震鳞赫赫，击云掣电…以丹恒先生的身手，还需要别人指教吗？
He strikes like lightning... Does Mr. Dan Heng really need anyone's guidance?
倒是三月小姐…仍是块未开凿的璞玉。
As for Miss March... she's like a piece of jade in the rough, just waiting to be shaped.
这位小朋友的筋骨脉络倒是…颇为别致。你也对剑术有兴趣吗？
Your talent is quite... unique. Are you also interested in swordplay?
不过依老朽多年看人的眼光，阁下既无需钻研剑艺裨补实力…这世上只怕也没什么人能为你指点前路。
But you know, based on my years of judging people, you don't really need to dive into swordplay to boost your skills... and I doubt there's anyone out there who can really show you the way forward.
倒是三月小姐…仍是块未开凿的璞玉。
As for Miss March... she's like a piece of jade in the rough, just waiting to be shaped.
这可是个好机会？我记得你提过自己想学什么剑招来着？
Isn't this a perfect chance for you? I remember you mentioning that you wanted to learn some sword moves.
呃，好像是有这么回事。但这事情太突然了吧？
Yeah, I did say that, but this is all happening so quickly, don't you think?
三月小姐仍是块未开凿的璞玉，老朽也好奇，想借罗浮演武仪典的良机。
Miss March is like a piece of jade in the rough, just waiting to be shaped. The Wardance is the perfect opportunity to see what heights she can reach.
谢谢怀炎将军的厚爱。云璃和彦卿原本是要决一胜负，如今却要转头教我学剑，岂不是太耽误两位练剑备战的时间了？
I appreciate your kind words, General Huaiyan. But won't teaching me swordplay be a waste of Yanqing and Yunli's time? They should be preparing for the ceremony.
何况，听说剑士们都各有绝招呀，要是教我的时候不小心泄漏，大家知根知底，打起来岂不是破不了招？

Plus, I heard that each swordmaster has their own special moves. What if they let something slip while teaching me? If everyone knows each other's tactics, won't that mean everyone is stuck in a stalemate and unable to end their fights during the Wardance?
三月七你倒是个体贴人。放心吧，不勤修苦练个十来年还教不到绝招呢。你别害怕，以朱明剑术的厉害，只要跟我学上几招，包你受用无穷。

That's considerate of you, March 7th. But don't worry. It'll take you at least a decade of hard training before you can even start learning special moves. No need to freak out – a few Zhuming swordplay tricks will mean you'll be more than equipped.
看来三月是完全心动了啊。
Looks like March's curiosity has been piqued.
呵呵，要的就是知根知底。演武台上一招制敌，那多没劲啊！何况决定剑士生死的，可不是什么「绝招」，而是扎实的基本功。

Heh, the whole point is to know each other's moves. Defeating your opponent in just one move? How boring would that be! Plus, what really decides a swordsman's fate isn't some "special move" — it's the solid fundamentals.
这么说来，云璃小姐是应承了。彦卿，你觉得呢？
So, Miss Yunli has already agreed. What do you say, Yanqing?
将军…彦卿尚未出师，哪里来的资格传授他人剑术。
General... I haven't graduated yet. How can I be qualified to teach swordplay to others?
那就是认输咯？好啊，既然你连教人的自信都没有，不如我来替你守罗浮的擂台如何？
So, you're admitting your defeat, huh? If you're not even confident to teach, why don't you let me be the ringmaster instead?
彦卿，传徒授艺的过程也是在审视自己所学，加深对技艺的理解。你做了多年弟子，是时候该换换眼界了。
Yanqing, teaching an apprentice is also a way of honing your own skills and gaining insights. You've been an apprentice for years, it's about time you looked at swordplay from another perspective.
我明白啦，就依将军所说，我答应了！
I see, General. Then count me in!
既然彦卿也答应了，那么剩下的便只有三月小姐一个点头。
Now that Yanqing has agreed too, it all comes down to Miss March giving her nod.
三月，这件事归根结底要由你自己来决定。
It's up to you to make the final decision, March.
转职成为列车第一剑客吧。
Time for you to become the best swordmaster on the Express.
这样一来，我就不用担心你每次射中我屁股了。
At least that way, I won't have to worry about you accidentally shooting me in the butt all the time.
Hey, I've never missed my target!
这可不是一条简单的路啊。
It won't be a walk in the park, that's for sure.
唔，虽然咱也算得上聪明伶俐，但学剑，听起来辛苦的很。
Yeah, while I'm smart, learning swordplay sounds like a whole lot of work.
你学剑也好，这样我就不用担心你每次射中我屁股了。
It'll be great learning swordplay. That way, I won't have to worry about you accidentally shooting me in the butt all the time.
Hey, I've never missed my target!
It's all up to you, though.
那就这么定了！谢谢怀炎将军的厚爱。
Then I'm on board! Thank you for your kindness, General Huaiyan.
好哇！自明日开始，彦卿与云璃会每日教你云骑剑术的基本要旨。
Great! Starting tomorrow, Yanqing and Yunli will teach you the basics of the Cloud Knights' swordplay.
接下来我和云璃先走一步，去为三月小姐置办些练剑的行头，权当是拜师礼了～
Yunli and I will head out and purchase some sword practice equipment for Miss March. Think of it as a little initiation gift.
哈哈哈，您太客气了…等等，谁给谁准备拜师礼？
Ahaha, you're too kind... Wait, you're giving me a gift? Shouldn't it be the other way round?
怀炎笑而不语，随即带着云璃离开了神策府。
Huaiyan, smiling silently, soon departs Seat of Divine Foresight with Yunli in tow.
呃，讨论是不是跑题了？事情怎么会变成这样？
Uh... I think we strayed off topic. How did things even get to this point?
是啊，我将诸位带来神策府，是因为「将军有要事商讨」，怎么会…怎么会一眨眼的功夫，我和云璃就成了三月小姐的剑术师父？
Yeah, I brought you here because the general said he had some important matters to discuss. But how in the world... did Yunli and I suddenly become Miss March's swordplay mentors?
因为…怀炎先生希望我们在罗浮仙舟驻留一段时日。
Because... General Huaiyan wants us to stick around on the Luofu for some time.
可我们本就是来观礼的？
But aren't we here to attend the ceremony, anyway?
但在他看来，我们与那些随时会离开的游客并无区别。
But from his point of view, we're no different from all the other tourists who may leave at any time.
罗浮上呈联盟的报告中既然出现了列车的行动记录，他一定想眼见为实，看看我们是否真有报告提及的那般能耐，而不是虚应故事找来的借口。

Since the Crew's actions were mentioned in the Luofu's operations log that was given to the Alliance, he probably wants to see firsthand if we're as capable as the report claims, or if we're just some made-up excuse to save face.
演武仪典就是他的试金石。为此，他甚至将云璃也一块儿拉下了水。原本只是两个年轻人之间的竞技赌斗…现在却成了你俩联手教导三月七。

And he wants to see it for himself during the Wardance, which is why he even dragged Yunli into this. What began as a simple contest between two swordmasters... has now evolved into you two collaborating to mentor March.
炎老还是那个令所有人为之头疼的炎老啊。
Elder Huaiyan is still that tricky general who likes to give everyone a headache.
我要在此致歉。我邀请诸位返航观礼，是存了向两位将军出示人证的心思，但没能坦诚相告，是景元的不是。
My apologies. Truth be told, I invited all of you to the ceremony because I wished for you to act as my witnesses. I apologize for not disclosing this information earlier.
除去炎老之外，在之后的几周内，我还会邀请各位同飞霄将军见上一面，接受她的提问以解其疑惑，希望各位到时候有所准备。

In the coming weeks, I'll also invite all of you to a meeting with General Feixiao, where you may need to answer her questions and clear up any doubts she might have. So, please be prepared for the meeting.
No worries. Answering a few questions is no big deal.
将军不必介怀。无论如何，我都会留下作为列车的人证，接受询问。
Don't worry, General. No matter what happens, I'm prepared to stay here as the Express' witness, and answer any questions.
Perhaps we should just pack up and leave tonight?
咱们是做错什么了吗？咱们确确实实拯救了罗浮，为什么要像个逃犯一样走人呢？
Did we do something wrong? We really did save the Luofu, so why do you want to sneak off like we're fugitives?
{NICKNAME}，不必担忧。无论如何，我会留下作为列车的人证，接受询问。
Don't worry, {NICKNAME}. No matter what happens, I'll stay here as a witness and answer any questions she might have.
将军！彦卿能为将军分担的不多，但彦卿……
General! I know there isn't much I can do to share your burden, but...
彦卿一定会为罗浮守住演武仪典的擂台！
As the Luofu ringmaster, I won't let anyone defeat me in the Wardance!
Please, stay a little longer, Elder Huaiyan.
I've invited some guests from the Express.
啊…怀炎将军走了。我怎么觉得刚才的话题有些不对劲啊！
Ah... General Huaiyan's gone. Wait, why does something feel off about what we talked about!?
金人巷中，飞霄等来了她多年未见的战友。
In Aurum Alley, Feixiao meets with her old comrade-in-arms whom she hasn't seen for many years...
能让大名鼎鼎的天击将军等我这么久，可算是赚足了面子。好久没见了，飞霄将军。
The illustrious Merlin's Claw waiting for me, and for so long, too? It's quite an honor. It's been a while, General Feixiao.
驭空姐姐，自上次分别，咱们快有三十年没见了吧？
It's been thirty years since we last saw each other, right, Yukong?
是啊，三十年前，你是曜青「青丘军」的先锋，我是罗浮「垂虹卫」的飞行士。没想到，再次见面你已成了将军，而我已经放弃了飞翔…如此想来，真是恍如隔世啊。

Yes, back then, you were the vanguard at the Yaoqing's Verdant Knights, and I was a pilot of the Luofu's Rainbowfall Fleet. Who would have thought that upon meeting again, you'd be a general, and I'd have given up flying... Really does feel like a lifetime ago.
其实也不能说三十年没见，毕竟「黄钟」共鸣系统里天天播放着你大捷的战报，我也算是日日得见你所向披靡的英姿。…你的身体还好吗？

Well, I wouldn't say I haven't seen you in thirty years. After all, your great victories are announced through the Yellowbell Resonance System every day, so I'm well aware of your great feats... How's your health holding up?
状况还算稳定。不知你还记不记得，当年在战阵中救起我的那位军医？
Still stable, I suppose. Do you still remember the medic who saved me in battle?
那个名字古怪、脾气也很古怪的医士…叫什么来着？我只记得他名字里沾个葱姜蒜什么的…
That healer with the odd name and peculiar temperament... What was his name again? Was it Pichu? Or Kaqiu?...
椒丘。受曜青仙舟丹鼎司的派遣，他已是我的幕僚和随身医士。这些年他一直在想法子控制我的「病情」。这么多年过去了，我还活得好好的，他功不可没。

Jiaoqiu. He's been my retainer and personal healer, delegated by the Alchemy Commission from the Xianzhou Yaoqing. Over the years, he's dedicated himself to managing my "condition." It's thanks to him that I'm still in good health today.
以我的出身，能一路走到今天，我很满足了。
Given my background, I'm happy to have made it this far.
知道你一切平安，我就放心了。那么，这次你和怀炎老先生前来，想必是领了元帅的命令吧？
I'm relieved to know that you're safe and sound. Well then, since you and Elder Huaiyan are here, I imagine you must have received orders from the Marshal?
飞霄，看在朋友的面子上，能告诉我，联盟打算如何降罪于罗浮的将军吗？
As your friend, may I ask how the Alliance intends to punish the General of the Luofu?
建木重生，让那些惯于躲在后方的老家伙们感到了害怕…他们怕孽物再度卷土重来，像三十年前那般。
The Arbor's rebirth has frightened the elders who lurk behind the scenes... They fear the resurgence of abominations, much like what happened thirty years ago.
虽然罗浮呈上报告解释了来龙去脉。但烬灭军团的入侵是否真的存在，星核猎手以及星穹列车到底如何介入此事，其中却有众多细节缺失。

Although the report from the Luofu explained all the details, we don't know if the Ruin Legion really invaded, or how exactly the Stellaron Hunters and the Astral Express became involved. This puzzle has many missing pieces.
想必你也知道，消失多年的逃犯镜流再度出现了。这次她带来一个化外民和一具棺材，自称向元帅献上「与神相争的法子」。

As you know, the fugitive Jingliu, who mysteriously disappeared many years ago has resurfaced. This time, she has brought along an outworlder and a coffin, claiming to offer the Marshal "a method to fight against the Aeons."
罗浮的龙师也状告景元不顾盟谊，说他放任流徙在外的饮月龙尊重返罗浮，打开鳞渊境古海，干扰持明守望建木的责任。

The Luofu Preceptor has also leveled accusations against Jing Yuan for neglecting the Alliance's principles. She asserts that Jing Yuan enabled the exiled Imbibitor Lunae to reenter the Luofu, thereby unlocking the Lunarescent Depths within Scalegorge Waterscape, which in turn disrupted the Vidyadhara's dutiful watch over the Ambrosial Arbor.
这些都是我今天不得不踏入罗浮仙舟的原因。
It is for these reasons that I have come here to the Luofu today.
职责所在，我本来不必向外人解释这么多。但你我曾并肩作战，我不打算瞒你，也希望这些话你过耳就忘，可以吗？

Well, duty calls. Perhaps I shouldn't have mentioned all of this to an uninvolved person. But since we once fought together, I didn't want to keep you in the dark. Perhaps pretending you didn't hear any of this would be for the best.
我明白了，抱歉，是我失仪了。我也知道自己现在不该多嘴为景元将军辩护…但，你也了解我的性格。
I understand. I'm sorry, I was out of line. I know I shouldn't be defending General Jing Yuan right now... but, well, you know how I am.
罗浮自饮月之乱结束后，享有数百年的安定，这其中景元将军的擘画功不可没。
The Luofu has enjoyed centuries of stability since the end of the Sedition of Imbibitor Lunae, much of which can be attributed to General Jing Yuan's masterful strategizing.
可惜对长生种而言，只要活得够久，就总会迎来摧毁往日累积一切的失败——敌人等待的就是那一刻。
Unfortunately, for long-life species, enduring through the ages always culminates in a failure that undoes all previous achievements — a moment that our adversaries relish.
说的不错。所以这次我前来，还有另一个目的：探视「呼雷」。
That's true. And that's why I'm also here for another purpose — to visit Hoolay.
呼雷？你是说那个呼雷？那个步离人战首？从七百多年前就被拘禁在罗浮幽囚狱中的呼雷？
Hoolay? You mean that Hoolay? The borisin Warhead? The same Hoolay who has been imprisoned in the Shackling Prison for over seven centuries?
「狐人大敌」，「永世不赦」，「直至天地荒灭」之类的…我记不住那么多判词，就是那个家伙。
"The nemesis of the foxians, who will never be forgiven and shall be imprisoned until the end of the cosmos..." I can't quite remember the exact wording, but yes, the very same Hoolay.
但对呼雷的探视，从来是由曜青仙舟天舶司派出使节，百年一次。为何你要在这节骨眼上……
Usually only emissaries from the Xianzhou Yaoqing's Sky-Faring Commission visit him once every century. Why do you have to visit him now, of all times...?
狐人与仙舟盟誓共讨孽物，除了解放同胞，求的还有正义：那只狼牙恶兽应当永远被关在幽囚狱里，日日受罚。

The foxians and the Alliance made a pact to combat the abominations, aiming to achieve justice and free their kin. That werewolf monster is to be forever imprisoned in the dark recesses of The Shackling Prison, facing unending retribution.
以罗浮的状况，曜青内部颇为担心呼雷的关押情况。以往每隔百年一次的例行探视已经安不下老家伙们的心了。
Given the situation on the Luofu, those on the Yaoqing are concerned about Hoolay's imprisonment. I'm afraid that the routine visit every century is no longer sufficient to ease their concerns.
That's why I was sent here — to reassure them.
也不全是。至少，许多事情未必有你想的这么糟糕。你托我寻找的目标，已有了眉目。
Well, not everything. There might be a silver lining. By the way, I've found some clues about the thing you asked for.
青丘军按照你提供的航路，找到了「鸣火」商会的舰船残骸。很遗憾，里面没有货物，也没有任何幸存者。
The Verdant Knights followed the route you mentioned and discovered the wreckage of the Whistling Flames ship. Unfortunately, there were no survivors, and no cargo.
不过，在我们找到失事地点之前，就已经有人到过现场了。
However, someone had already been on the scene before we arrived.
是我们的人吗？还是公司的人？
Our people? Or someone from the IPC?
都不是。驭空，你知道{RUBY_B#天才俱乐部#81}阮•梅{RUBY_E#}吗？
No, neither. Yukong, have you heard of a person named {RUBY_B#Genius Society #81}Ruan Mei{RUBY_E#}?
公司派驻仙舟的商业代表之一。\n论性格是个欺软怕硬的家伙，长久在公司工作的经验让他懂得至少表面上要<color=#dbc291ff>遵守规矩</color>。

One of the representatives stationed on Xianzhou by the IPC.\nHe picks on the weak but fears the powerful. His experience in the IPC has taught him that he has to <color=#dbc291ff>abide by the rules</color>, at least on the surface.
来自仙舟「曜青」的云骑将军。\n受元帅之命前来「观礼」演武仪典。不过她此行真正的目标是观察罗浮在建木灾异之后的情况。\n这位将军予人的第一印象直爽而凌厉。想在<color=#dbc291ff>言语上欺瞒她</color>，也许并不是什么好主意。

The Cloud Knight General from the Xianzhou Yaoqing.\nShe came to "observe" the Wardance under the orders of the Marshal. However, the true purpose of her trip is to observe the situation on the Luofu after the Ambrosial Arbor crisis.\nThe first impression of this general is that she is straightforward and stern. Therefore, trying to <color=#dbc291ff>deceive her</color> is probably not a good idea.
公司派驻仙舟的商业代表之一。他虚伪地维持着公司文化自傲，但也压抑着对公司的不满与抱怨。\n斯科特耀武扬威的基础都是公司的<color=#dbc291ff>权威与福利</color>，小心不要让他<color=#dbc291ff>趁机仗势欺人</color>。

One of the representatives stationed on Xianzhou by the IPC. While he hypocritically remains proud of the IPC's corporate culture, he has also suppressed his dissatisfaction and resentment for the Corporation.\nThe basis of Skott's arrogance is the <color=#dbc291ff>authority and benefits</color> afforded by the IPC. Don't let him <color=#dbc291ff>take advantage of the situation and bully others</color>.
一日奔波，你们来到浥尘客栈安顿歇息……
After a day of running around, you finally arrive at Petrichor Inn for a well-deserved rest...
这一夜，你被面见将军的不安，以及演武仪典召开前的热闹人流搅扰得难以成眠。
This night, your restlessness from meeting the general and the bustling crowd before the Wardance keeps you from falling asleep.
奇怪，是我起晚了吗？三月和丹恒这是去了哪儿？
Hmm, did I oversleep? Where did March and Dan Heng go?
（三月七啊三月七，才刚学剑。就三心二意想要翘课了吗？）
(Oh come on, March 7th! Really now? You just got into swordplay training. Are you sick of it already? Is that why you want to skip practice?)
（不行，可不能教两位老师生气…）
(No, both my masters will be mad if I do that...)
There's quite a number of things to prepare...
务必完成末度大人的要求
Mok Tok's request must be seen to.
这附近似乎有什么味道？
你注意到鳞渊境的幽囚狱建造在古海之下，是不断向下延展的柱状结构。冥差们在这块屏幕前管理着不同囚室、不同囚犯的实时信息。

You notice the Scalegorge Waterscape's Shackling Prison was built at the bottom of the ancient sea, as a column structure that extends endlessly into the depths. Spiritfarers monitor and manage real-time information of prison cells and prisoners on this screen.
此处的玉兆散发着奇异的光辉，不知演算着何物。也许是囚室的状态，也许是各处的安全状况……
The jade abaci here glow with an unusual luminescence as they perform their calculations, possibly on the status of the prison cells or the security of each area.
向下望去，无数监狱囚室如同蜂巢般密密麻麻展开，没入视线不可及的黑暗。
Looking down, you see a honeycomb of densely-packed prison cells extending deep into the darkness beyond your view.
你暗暗猜测这里究竟能关押多少犯人？三千？三万？三十万……？也许这里只是幽囚狱系统小小的一角。
You hazard a guess on the number of prisoners they are capable of holding here... Three thousand? Thirty thousand? Three hundred thousand? Wait, this may not even be the entire Shackling Prison!
寒鸦拦住了你的去路。她身负要务，必须确保你一路所至之处由她决定。
Hanya blocks your way forward. She has been entrusted with the important task of ensuring that you only explore areas she deems safe.
巨大的威灵丑面凶恶地瞪视着你，仿佛在警告你行止戒慎。
Towering spirits with gruesome appearances glare menacingly at you, as if warning you to proceed with caution.
它们的目光交汇处，有一个黑黢黢的空洞，不知作何之用？
Their gazes converge at a pitch-black void, and you wonder what it's for.
形如撑天巨柱的「钥匙」贯入「锁孔」中，开启通往镇伏凶犯的幽狱之底。

When a "key" in the shape of a colossal sky-bearing column slots into the "keyhole," it unlocks the path to the Shackling Prison crypts, where criminals of high severity are held in subdued captivity.
这便是「断狱轮钥」，负责把守重刑犯的最终门关。
That was the Nether Key — the key that keeps felons locked away behind the ultimate gate.
一只机巧鸟，双眼幽光闪烁，它的脑袋不时颤动，看向空无一物的地方。
You see a cycrane twitching its head every so often, staring into space with a ghostly glint in its eyes.
它能看到什么肉眼不能见之物吗？你忍不住打了个寒颤。
Is there something that cannot be seen with the naked eye? You can't help but shudder at that thought.
你看向貊泽，他微微摇头，示意你现在实在不是个插科打诨的好时机。
You look at Moze, who shakes his head lightly at you. Guess this isn't really the time for jokes.
不知是否是幽囚狱的气氛过于沉肃压抑，教他连开口说话的兴致也欠奉。
Perhaps the stifling and somber mood of the Shackling Prison has gotten to him, that's why he's neither up for chatting nor humoring you.
你听从雪衣的吩咐靠近那只「小鸟」。当你向它伸出手时，它仿佛感应到了你的存在，将视线投向你。
You follow Xueyi's instructions and approach the bird. When you extend your hand in its direction, it turns to look at you, seemingly sensing your presence.
人类无法听见的唿哨声让这只幽狱的信使醒了过来。
A whistle inaudible to human ears awakens this particular messenger of the Shackling Prison.
造访「幽狱底层」，授权完成。
Visiting the Shackling Prison's crypts. Authorization complete.
巨大的金属残骸横陈在地，但不知为何你很清楚它并未完全死去。它的外壳下仿生组织正在不断修复。

Large pieces of metal scraps are strewn all over the floor. You can't put your finger on it, but you're certain that this thing is still alive. Bionic tissues are relentlessly regenerating beneath their exoskeleton.
肢体扭曲的步离遗骸，这头巨狼肢体似曾被牢牢捆锁。
These are the remains of a borisin. Judging from their twisted limbs, it is likely that this massive wolf once had their limbs restrained.
这名步离人似乎尚未来得及反应便被人从后方刺穿。你不清楚这究竟是曜青使者做的，还是判官的手笔。
Whoever impaled this borisin from behind probably caught them off guard. It could be a judge or a Yaoqing messenger.
力战倒下的武弁。她的武器不翼而飞，也许遗落在了监狱某处。
This warden fought to her death, and her weapon's nowhere to be seen. She must have lost it somewhere in the prison.
显然这名武弁在殉职前经历了一场激烈的战斗。你将她的面具重新盖回她的脸上，祈祷她的英灵能得享安息。
You can clearly tell that the warden was serving her duty in an intense battle when she died. You reset the mask over her face and pray for her heroic soul to rest in peace.
你察觉到这个身着云骑甲胄的死者似乎并非普通的狐人，他的身躯似乎经历过剧烈的变形——来不及缩回的鬣毛布满了脖颈。

The corpse in a Cloud Knight's armor catches your attention. They do not seem to be your average foxian, for one. This body looks like it underwent a drastic shapeshifting, one that failed to conceal the guard hairs around their neck.
死者前突的下颚利齿横生，与那些死去的步离人颇为神似。
Sharp fangs grew unchecked along the deceased's protruded lower jaw, bearing an uncanny resemblance to the other borisin corpses.
你渐渐明白步离人为何能不受阻碍地闯入幽狱底部。他们不仅伪装成了云骑，更伪装成了狐人的模样。
You begin to see why the borisin could easily infiltrate the lower levels of the Shackling Prison. They not only shapeshifted into the Cloud Knights, but into foxians too.
机巧鸟扑腾起来，它颤颤巍巍地飞离幽囚狱底部，一头扎进幽深的通道深处。
The cycrane flaps its wings and unsteadily flies out of the lower levels of the Shackling Prison, charging straight into the depths of the shadowy passage.
悬梯的机关似乎被捷足先登的劫狱者们早早破坏，无论如何摆弄都毫无动静。
None of the assembly methods or formations work. The hanging ladder's mechanism must have been destroyed by those prison raiders that got here first.
眼下你们只能靠自己的双腿追上那些犯人。
You'll have to run on your own two feet to catch up to those prisoners now.
这些入侵者拥有非凡的力量，他们无需持配武器，他们自己就是最危险的武器。
These intruders possess extraordinary strength. They wield no weapons, for they are the deadliest weapons themselves.
步离人巨大的身形充满压迫感。即便死去多时，这堆肉山仍仿佛能随时跃起扑杀猎物一般，令人颤栗。

The borisin's large stature easily lends them an intimidating quality that stays with them even after their demise. Looking at this pile of borisin corpses would send chills down anyone's spine, for it feels as though they can reanimate and pounce onto their prey any moment.
尽管幽囚狱的狱卒饱经训练，但在步离人恐怖的冲击之下，仍然死伤惨重。
The prison guards at the Shackling Prison may be well-trained, but they likewise suffered deaths and casualties in the face of the borisin's horrifying assault.
武弁们发誓为把守幽狱奉献生命。但目睹她们的牺牲，你仍希望她们能安然活着。
Although the wardens had taken an oath to defend the Shackling Prison to the death, you cannot help but wish they could treasure their lives after witnessing their sacrifice.
这具金人勾魂使似乎在一击之间被敌人击碎。如此惊人的力量，也许是呼雷的手臂。
This aurumaton spectral envoy appears to have been smashed to smithereens with only a single strike. Hoolay likely slammed his arm in to deliver this shockingly destructive force.
勾魂使金属的头颅中似乎仍然闪动着一丝火花，它在击毙数倍于己的敌人后终于丧失了还手之力，惨遭拆解。

Sparks continue to fizzle atop the spectral envoy's metal head. Despite having killed enemies that outnumber them, they were eventually left without the means to fight back before being wrecked to pieces.
We mustn't tarry. Onward with the pursuit.
经历短暂却致命的失联，被封锁幽囚狱重回掌控。尽管列车无名客一行并无大碍，但曜青来使中却有一人遭到劫持。

After a brief but devastating loss of communications, the locked-down Shackling Prison is once more under control. The Express' Nameless may have emerged unharmed, but one of the Yaoqing envoys has been taken hostage.
与此同时…长久镇于幽狱之底的步离人战首呼雷，已失去了踪迹。
Meanwhile, the borisin Warhead Hoolay, long confined to the depth of Shackling Prison, has vanished without a trace.
猎人与猎物，将在罗浮仙舟上展开追逐。
A pursuit between the hunter and the hunted will soon play out on the Xianzhou Luofu.
巨大的凶面漠然毫无响应，大门纹丝不动。
The intimidating countenance has no response whatsoever. The gate doesn't budge.
Why are you here too, Yanqing?
你该不会忘了昨天我们应承怀炎将军的事情吧？彦卿不敢怠慢，我特地起了个大早，来教授三月小姐剑术。
You haven't forgotten about our promise to General Huaiyan, have you? I woke up especially early, so I could start teaching Miss March swordplay.
哪有师父上门接徒弟的？
What kind of master waits on their apprentice's doorstep?
毕竟是应承了怀炎将军的要求，彦卿不敢怠慢。我特地起了个大早，来教授三月小姐剑术。
Well, it was a promise to General Huaiyan, after all. I woke up especially early, so I could start teaching Miss March swordplay.
March? Show some respect to your master.
It's an honor to learn from you, Master Yanqing!
看幻戏和小说里，仙舟拜师学艺可得送上师父大礼，跪拜叩首。糟糕，我可什么都没准备。

In all those immersias and novels I watched, when apprentices want to pay their respects to their masters, they usually bring fancy gifts, kneel, and bow. I'm really sorry, but I haven't prepared anything yet.
哎，彦卿师父，你怎么脸红啦？
Hey, why are you blushing, Master Yanqing?
第一次听到别人叫自己师父，彦卿得稍微…适应一下……
This is the first time someone has called me master... I need to... get used to it...
不过，有言在先，习剑是为了锻炼体魄、心智与力量，不是朝夕可达的游戏。
Let me make it clear: Swordplay training is about improving your body, mind, and strength. It's not a casual game you can master overnight.
我答应了怀炎将军，要让三月小姐学会云骑剑术，登上演武仪典，以及至少击败一位对手。我一定会竭尽所能施教，但要是你有违师长教训……
I promised General Huaiyan that I'd teach you Cloud Knight swordplay, so you can participate in the Wardance and defeat at least one opponent. I'll do my best, but if you break your master's rules...
现在后悔还来得及吗？都怪我一时冲动。
Is it too late for regrets? I'm already regretting my impulsive decision.
…说实话，我也不知该怎么办。毕竟我是第一天教人。那就拜托三月小姐规规矩矩，不许叫苦，也不准逃课。
...Honestly, I'm not sure what I'll do either, because I've never been a teacher before. So, Miss March, please behave and don't skip classes or complain.
彦卿师父，你得支棱起来，狠狠培养她。
You need to toughen up and train her properly, Master Yanqing. Don't go easy on her.
March is always a good girl!
本姑娘一言既出，星槎难追！既然答应了好好学，就从今天开始！
Fine. A promise is a promise. Since I promised to study hard, I'll do my best starting today!
好啊，要的就是这股精气神。
彦卿，三月就拜托你了，可别对她太客气了。
March is in your hands now, Yanqing. Don't be too easy on her.
丹恒，你的心真是比你平日里的笑话还冷。
Dan Heng, do you even have a heart? Did you lose it somewhere?
彦卿在司辰宫后花园处找了个僻静的地方，我们会在那儿一起为你上第一堂课。
I've found a quiet spot in the back garden of the Palace of Astrum for our first lesson together.
三月七朝你和丹恒挥了挥手，开始了她习剑之路的第一课……
March 7th waves to you and Dan Heng, embarking on the first lesson of her sword training journey...
第一天上课，就带着徒弟一起迟到，罗浮上的规矩怎么如此散漫？唉…真让为师寒心。
Seriously? It's the first day, and you two are already late? Why is everyone on the Luofu so laid-back? So disappointing.
啊，云璃师父已经到了。久等了！
Ah, Master Yunli you're already here. Sorry for keeping you waiting!
你该不会想一个人偷偷教她吧？太卑鄙啦！
Wait, were you trying to teach her in secret? That's sneaky!
让你见识见识，这就是罗浮人授徒传艺的周到礼数！哪怕是弟子，我也会将她亲自接来。
I'm just showing you what Luofu etiquette is all about. She might be my apprentice, but it's customary for the master to personally escort their apprentice to the place of learning.
作为东道主，我会传授三月小姐罗浮剑术的精华，然后让她在擂台上大获全胜。到时候，你就没法再对罗浮的剑法优劣评头论足了吧！
As the host, I'll be teaching Miss March the essence of Luofu swordplay, after which she'll emerge victorious in the Wardance ring. You won't be complaining about Luofu swordplay then!
一边待着去。我让你瞧瞧，朱明仙舟的剑士是如何宠爱弟子的。
Stand aside, rookie. Let me show you how we Zhuming swordmasters treat their apprentices.
三月七，快来啊，这是为师送给你的「反向拜师礼」，望你善加利用。
Quickly, over here, Miss March. This is a "reverse mentorship gift" from me to you. I hope you put it to good use.
这是…仙舟服饰？好漂亮呀！
What's this... Xianzhou clothing? It's so beautiful!
练剑需要身法步法配合，这套衣服剪裁贴身，便于活动。我还特意备了些小配饰，可是花了我不少心思。
Sword practice requires precise movements. This outfit is tailored to fit perfectly and allows for smooth movements. I even added some small accessories. I put a lot of thought into it.
瞧见了吗，你拿什么和我比？我会让三月七学到朱明剑术的要义，让她以我的剑胜出擂台，哼哼。
See? See? How can you compete with me? I'll teach March 7th the essence of Zhuming swordplay, so she can win the contest with my sword skills.
诶？彦卿师父也有礼物要送给我吗？
Huh? You have a gift for me too, Master Yanqing?
既然三月小姐来学剑，那总要有柄趁手的兵刃才行，就连夜置办了一套对剑。
Since you want to learn swordplay, Miss March, you'll need suitable weapons. So, I went out of my way to prepare a pair of swords overnight.
可惜时间仓促，来不及请匠人定制。我只好尽力选了模样好看，配重又适合初学者的武器。若是三月小姐不嫌弃，那就太好了。

Unfortunately, I didn't have time to ask the craftsman to customize the swords for you, but I did my best to choose ones that look nice and are suitable for a beginner. I hope you like them, Miss March.
Bet you didn't see that coming, did you, Yunli?
哼，真正的比试现在才刚刚开始。
Hmph, the real competition is just getting started.
这师拜得可真值啊！但我怎么觉得，事情开始有些往奇怪的苗头上发展了。
I'm so lucky to have two great masters! But why does it feel like things are getting a bit weird?
怎么样，师父们？这装扮还算合适吗？
So, what do you think, masters? Does this outfit suit me?
嗯嗯！不愧是我精挑细选的衣服，最适合你我这般的美少女剑士！
Perfect! I chose it carefully — it's perfect for beautiful young swordswomen like you and me!
闲话少叙，咱们开始上课吧。旁边这位是我请来的云骑教习，这第一堂课先和他过两招吧。
Alright, let's get started with the training. The person next to me is a Cloud Knight instructor I've brought in. For your first lesson, try exchanging a couple of moves with him.
哎？怎么这第一堂课就是实战训练？！会不会太激进了些？
Wait, we're having actual combat training for the first lesson!? Isn't that a bit too intense?
听说你练过射艺，有受训武事的底子，所以第一课当然要摸摸你的根基扎实不扎实。
Well, I heard you have some experience with archery and martial arts. The first thing we're going to do is see just how strong your fundamentals are.
来吧，上前一步，用你能想象到的最顺手的方式挥剑攻击！只有了解了你的肢体习惯，我们才知道该从哪儿开始，教你些什么。

Come on, step forward and strike with the sword in the most natural way you can think of! It's important for us to grasp your natural movements, so we can decide where to start and what you need to learn.
如果您准备好了，就请与在下对阵！
我准备好了…但你可得手下留情啊！
Yeah, I'm ready... but please go easy on me!
Then I apologize in advance, Miss March!
I need some more time to prepare myself...
罗浮剑术讲究剑走轻灵。
Luofu swordplay is all about being swift and agile in your movements.
别听彦卿的，大力出奇迹！
With a true heart and focused mind — here I come!
左青龙，右白虎，少吃碳水化合物！
Azure Dragon, White Tiger, eating less carbs!
Isn't this... a sword technique? Shouldn't I be saying something cool?
I'm starting to get the hang of it.
顺手起来啦！瞧好了这招！
没想到第一堂课的强度就这么高……
I didn't expect the first lesson to be so intense...
三月小姐的身手灵活，腰肢柔软，真是练习罗浮剑术的绝好苗子。
Miss March has quick hands and a flexible body. She's a perfect fit for practicing Luofu swordplay.
不过正手不精，反手乏力，挥剑时各种动作太过潦草…这也是初学者的通病了。无妨，只要习练朱明剑法，一切就会好起来的。
