However, she lacks strength, and her strikes were a bit unfocused... but don't worry, that's totally normal for beginners. Once she starts practicing Zhuming swordplay, she'll make heaps of progress.
我决定了，下一课，三月小姐从练习——
Given the situation, I believe Miss March should start by working on —
Seriously, do you actually know anything about swordplay or what?
我还想问你呢！双剑本就强调灵活应敌、左右相援，还有什么比步法更重要吗？
I could ask you the same thing! Dual swords require agility, so what's more important than footwork?
战阵强弱并不总靠长处，还要看短处。双剑的短处恰恰在于发力。双臂乏力，步法灵活又有什么用？这又不是跳舞。

Instead of focusing on her strengths, we should address her weaknesses. The drawback of wielding two swords is not generating enough force. What good is being quick on your feet if you don't have strength? It's not like we're dancing here.
但凡学有所成的剑士都懂得「扬长避短」。先发扬长处，再反哺短处，这才是正确的学习方式。
Skilled swordmasters know how to play to their strengths and work on their weaknesses. Start with what you're good at, then tackle your weaknesses. That's the right way to learn.
哼哼，小少爷真不愧是空想理论派啊！
空想？你自诩能听懂剑说话，这又算什么？空想社交派？
Theorist? You claim to be able to talk to swords, so what does that make you? A lunatic?
唉唉，怎么才第一节课，两位师父就吵起来了！你们快别吵了，步法和发力我早晚都是要学的，先学哪个不都一样嘛？
Hey, it's only my first lesson, and you're already arguing! Come on, calm down, masters! I'll have to improve both my footwork and strength anyway, so it doesn't matter which one comes first!
不一样！！！三月七，你听我的准没错！
But it does matter!!! Just listen to me, March 7th!
三月七的剑术训练，就这么开始了。
Thus begins the journey of March 7th's sword training.
Time marches on, and days turn to more...
姬子、杨叔、帕姆：见信如晤。我们在罗浮一切都好，请各位放心。你们的旅行还顺利吧？
Dear Himeko, Mr. Yang, and Pom-Pom, We're all good here on the Xianzhou Luofu, so no need to worry! By the way, how's your trip going?
最近这段日子，我因为某些机缘巧合，成了两位云骑剑士的弟子，跟随他们修习剑术。
As for me, I've somehow become the apprentice to two Cloud Knight swordmasters, and I've been honing my sword skills with their guidance.
两位师父十分严厉，使我深刻感受到了修习剑术之艰辛。
Both masters are super strict, giving me a real taste of how hard sword training can be.
我本想拉{NICKNAME}下水，{F#她}{M#他}不肯。我又想拉丹恒下水，彦卿师父不肯。
I tried to drag {NICKNAME} into this, but {F#she}{M#he} refused. Then I tried to rope Dan Heng in, but Master Yanqing wouldn't have it.
尽管如此，我却从未因艰辛而退缩。在短短几周的时间里，我的剑术突飞猛进。两位师父都夸我是世间少有的剑术奇才，争先恐后地用各自的方法教导我。

Still, I didn't let the difficulty get to me. In just a few weeks, my sword skills have improved a lot. Both my masters think I have unique talents in swordplay and are literally fighting each other to teach me their skills.
如今，在两位师父的悉心教导下，我的剑术已小有所成。等回到列车以后，我一定要给诸位露一小手，让你们对我刮目相看！
Thanks to their guidance, I've actually made some progress. When I get back to the Express, I'll definitely show off my skills and impress you all!
Looking forward to your reply. Yours, March 7th.
洞天昼夜流转，演武仪典召开的时间不知不觉悄然临近。
Days and nights fly by in the delve, as the Wardance fast approaches.
在两位师父的严厉督导下，三月七苦练不辍，几乎患上了网球肘。
Under the strict supervision of her two masters, March 7th trains tirelessly, almost developing tennis elbow.
On that day, after the sword training...
其中一位是之前咱们曾见过的彦卿小弟弟。另一位，则是朱明将军怀炎的徒孙女，云璃。
One of them is Yanqing, the boy we've all met before. The other is Yunli, the granddaughter of General Huaiyan from the Xianzhou Zhuming.
很好，今天就练到这儿吧。
Well done. Let's call it a day.
三月小姐的双剑技巧已经小有所成。即便是到了演武仪典之上与人争锋，也绝不逊色。
Miss March's sword skills are really coming along. She'll hold her own just fine in the Wardance.
莫非我有机会打败两位师父？
Maybe I have a chance of defeating my masters?
难道说…我有机会在演武台上打败两位师父？
Perhaps... I might have a shot at beating both masters in the ring?
想什么呢，你不过练了这么短的时间，怎么可能？
Get real, you've only been practicing for a short while. How could that possibly happen?
以三月小姐的天资，若再肯下个几十年的苦功，也不是没有可能击败云璃的。
With your talent, Miss March, if you dedicate a few more decades to training, you might eventually be able to defeat Yunli.
几十年啊…那时候我可都变成老婆婆了…不成不成。
Decades...? But I'll be an old lady by then... No, no.
那到时候就看我拿下一胜！
Just watch, I'll win a fight when the time comes!
到时候就看我在演武赛场上大显身手，拿下一胜，告慰两位！
Just you wait and see! I'll show off my skills in the ring and win a match. I'll make both of you proud!
没想到短短几周的光景，三月七竟然练得有模有样。我算是体会到爷爷当年教我剑法时，总是露出欣慰笑容的心情了。
Can you believe it? March 7th has actually become a pretty decent swordmaster in such a short time. Now I understand why grandpa always had a grin on his face while training me.
Are you sure he wasn't laughing at you?
嘿嘿～说来说去还是得归功于两位师父教得好！
It's all thanks to your amazing guidance, masters!
双剑小有所成，三月小姐要是想更进一步，也可以试试其他的仙舟剑器，增添手感。
Miss March, you're really getting the hang of wielding dual swords. If you're keen on advancing, trying out different Xianzhou blades could improve your touch.
唔，我想想…仙舟的剑器里，哪一种最厉害啊？单剑、重剑、还是飞剑？
Hmm, let me see... Which sword is the most powerful? Single sword? Greatsword? Or maybe a flying sword?
没有最厉害的剑，只有更厉害的剑士。你彦卿师父喜欢使唤多把飞剑，但你云璃师父只用一把剑，在丹鼎司里不还是把他揍得吱哇乱叫？

There's no such thing as the "most powerful" sword. It's all about the skill of the swordmaster. Yanqing wields several flying swords, while I only wield one, but remember how I kicked his butt at the Alchemy Commission?
第一，我压根没有吱哇乱叫！第二，你压根不是我的对手！第三，要不要现在试试谁能把谁揍得吱哇乱叫？
First, you didn't kick my butt! Second, you'll never kick my butt! Third, how about we settle this right now and see who kicks whose butt?
好啊！要是赢了你，你就乖乖退出演武仪典的擂台赛，如何？
Yeah, I'm up for that! And if I kick your butt, you'll drop out of the Wardance. Deal?
师父们怎么又吵起来了！我明明感到这些天你们的气氛融洽多了……
Why are you two arguing again? I thought things had been improving between you lately...
听说罗浮与朱明两位将军的高徒原本预定登上演武擂台一较高下，却不知因为什么缘故突然联手教起了徒弟来。这流言竟是真的。

There was talk that the leading disciples of the Luofu and Zhuming generals were supposed to face off in the Wardance, but for some reason, they suddenly teamed up to train an apprentice of their own. Turns out the rumors are true.
明日便是演武仪典举行的日子了，两位不各自砥砺锋芒，怎么还在这儿醉心教学？
Tomorrow is the big day of the Wardance. Shouldn't you two be focusing on honing your skills instead of teaching swordplay here?
啊，你是…那个…呃，那个…对了！曜青来的粉毛狐狸！
Ah, you're... um, you're... That's right! You're the pink-haired fox from the Yaoqing!
这位是曜青将军帐下的医士，椒丘先生。
This is Mr. Jiaoqiu, the healer working for the General of the Xianzhou Yaoqing.
What are you laughing at? You've got pink-hair, too!
不才椒丘，是曜青将军帐下的医士。
I'm Jiaoqiu, the healer working for the General of the Xianzhou Yaoqing.
我明白了，你是曜青派来参加演武仪典的选手，所以来这儿偷师？
Ah, got it. So, you're the participant attending the Wardance on behalf of the Yaoqing, and you were trying to sneak a peek at our training?
言重了，椒丘对武事一窍不通，只是被将军派来办些公务手续，无意打扰了两位的教学。见谅，我这就走。

Sorry for the misunderstanding. I don't know anything about martial arts. I'm just here on the general's orders to take care of some official business. I didn't mean to interrupt your training. I'll be on my way.
既然不懂剑术，那你刚才又在一旁笑个什么劲？
If you know nothing about martial arts, why were you smirking earlier?
鄙人只是对三月小姐「该学什么」的问题心有戚戚，忍不住凑了过来。
Well, my curiosity got the better of me I suppose. When I heard Miss March's pondering about what to learn, I couldn't help but wander over.
以鄙人的职业经验来看，剁刀、片刀、切刀、雕刀虽然同属刀具，但就像烹饪中的煎、炒、煮、炸一般，只是供人施展的技巧。如何使用，要考虑食材本身的特性。

From my professional experience, cleavers, slicers, chopping knives, and carving knives are all just tools, kind of like frying, sautéing, boiling, and deep-frying in cooking. They're just ways for people to show off their skills. How you use them really depends on the ingredients you're working with.
好比两位的剑法教学，若是顺着食材——我是说弟子的天性，以更适合的烹饪手法——我是说传授更适合她天性的技巧，才能令她事半功倍！

It's like your sword teaching methods. If you align your "ingredient" — in other words your apprentice's natural tendencies with the right "cooking method" — by which I mean the teaching method that best suits her, she'll make double the progress in half the time!
好比紫金茄要油炸、赤云椒要爆炒、黄石牛肉要焖煮。发掘食材——我是说弟子的天性，就是咱们的工作。

For example, Golden Eggplant tastes best when fried, Cloud Peppers when stir-fried, and Yellow Boulder Beef when simmered. It's all about discovering the nature of the ingredients... uh, I mean, apprentice.
这报菜名，都把我给说饿了。
All this talk about food is making me hungry.
你不是医士嘛，怎么谈起做菜来了。
Aren't you a healer? Why are you talking about food?
是比喻，我加了点比喻。鄙人所师从的医方派别名曰「染指派」，是曜青仙舟上独有的医术，偏爱以食疗济愈病患。所以做菜的事情，我也略懂一二。

Well, it's just a metaphor. The medicinal school I follow on the Xianzhou Yaoqing is called the Ranzhi School, that specializes in food therapy, so it's only natural that I know a thing or two about cooking.
所以说…你是将军的厨子？
咳，是医士！不想当医士的厨子算不上好的将军幕僚。算了，你就当我是个厨子吧。
I'm a healer! But anyway, a cook who isn't interested in health doesn't make for a good advisor. Fine, call me a cook if you want.
看你们的眼神，显然是误会我椒丘只是个妄议武学的孱弱文人。其实，我也不是对杀人技一窍不通的哦～毕竟「医道」本就是生杀一体之术。

Seeing the way you're looking at me, it's obvious you think I'm just some feeble academic who likes to blabber on about martial arts. But in reality, I know a thing or two about killing. After all, the art of healing inherently encompasses both life and death.
怎么突然跟小孩较起劲来了？
Why suddenly getting all serious with kids?
这人怎么跟小孩子较起劲来了。
Why is this guy suddenly getting all serious with kids?
看得出来，他真的是急了…
Seems like he just got offended...
成年人想从孩子手里找回场子…唉。
Seriously, trying to save face in front of kids? *sigh*
我手中这瓶药，你们可识得？
Do you recognize this bottle of medicine in my hand?
这叫「颠踬散」！是用域外奇花「押不芦」提炼浓缩而成的汤剂。
This is called "Tumbledust"! An extract from an exotic flower named "Yabruh."
哎，是毒药还是救命良药，端看医者用心如何。为病人做伐骨洗髓、开膛破腹的手术前，只消一滴，便能让人不知疼痛。但……
Well, it depends on how it's used. With just one drop, it's able to numb a patient's body during surgery, making them painless throughout the entire process. However...
若是剂量再多些，浓度再高些，便会放慢代谢，教人血流不凝，乃至五感尽失——虽是老病不侵的长生种服下了也不能免。
Increase the dose or the potency, and it'll slow the metabolism, making the blood thin and resulting in the loss of all senses. Even long-life species cannot escape its effects.
这东西可以救人，也可以杀人，派上的用场可比你们手中的刀剑多多了。
This thing can save lives or take them. It's more powerful than the swords in your hands.
彦卿还是更愿意将胜负放在剑锋之上，而不是…呃……
That may be so, but still I prefer settling things with a sword than... you know...
确实误会你了。你不是孱弱文人，你是无耻文人。
Looks like I did get you all wrong. You're not a feeble scholar, but a sinister and despicable one.
欸欸欸，怎么突然骂起人来了？我也不过是给大家普及医药知识，可不是要教唆各位投毒啊。
Hey, hey, why the insults all of a sudden? I'm just sharing some medical knowledge here, not persuading you to poison anyone.
椒丘先生一谈起毒药就满脸兴奋，也不知道算是正大光明还是阴险卑鄙……
Seems like you get real excited when talking about poison. I can't tell if that's an honorable thing or sinister...
假设现在有两个人，一个阴险卑鄙地站着，另一个光明正大地躺着。你们倒是说说看，那个躺着的有什么办法去控诉那个站着的「阴险卑鄙」呢？
Picture this: Two individuals, the one standing is full of malice, the other lying down is honorable and righteous. How can the one who's lying down label the one standing as "sinister?"
战阵之上，死生刹那，万念成空。「活下去」便是唯一的道理。
In the throes of combat, where life and death hinge on a singular moment, every idea fades into nothingness. The only thing that matters is "staying alive."
但凡能从战阵中活着回来，一切价值都会被重新定义。光明磊落也好，阴险卑鄙也罢，在我看来，都轻如鸿毛。
Surviving the battlefield reshapes all notions of worth. Be it integrity or treachery, in my eyes, their significance is negligible.
椒丘先生小看了我和云璃，我和她年纪虽小，也是上过战场的。
Perhaps you've underestimated Yunli and me, Mr. Jiaoqiu. We may be young, but we've seen our fair share of war.
失敬失敬。既然如此，你们也该知道演武仪典不过是争个赛场热闹，为何如此上心。
Well, well, then you should know that the Wardance is nothing more than a contest. So, why are you so focused on it?
被选为演武仪典的守擂者时，我也曾问过将军，云骑上阵杀敌是本分，为何还要在擂台上挥剑取悦观众？

When I was appointed as the ringmaster for the Wardance, I asked the general: "We Cloud Knights are supposed to charge into the fray and slay enemies. Why do we have to swing swords in a ring just to please an audience?"
将军回答我，「入阵出剑，登擂示剑；以一剑出鞘，敛百剑锋芒」。
And this is how the general replied: "To unsheathe your sword in a ring is no different than on the battlefield, as your sword reveals the might of all Cloud Knights."
演武仪典是个彰显武德，结交四方盟友的好机会。悬剑于仪典之上，出鞘而不伤，展示的不仅是剑，也是云骑的武德威仪。

The Wardance is the perfect chance to showcase martial virtue and forge alliances from all over the cosmos. When we unsheathe the sword without drawing blood, we not only display our might but also the martial virtue of the Cloud Knights.
这话说的倒是颇有见地，是鄙人见识短浅了。那么彦卿兄弟，我抵达罗浮许久，还无缘见识这次演武仪典的举办场地。

That's quite an insightful statement, Yanqing. Well, my apologies for being so short-sighted. I've been on the Luofu for quite some time, but I haven't had the chance to see the ceremony venue for myself yet.
如今听你侃侃而谈，心中倒是升起了几分好奇，不知你能否带我过去瞧瞧？
Hearing you speak so highly of it has piqued my curiosity. Would you mind showing me around?
椒丘先生想去观赏「竞锋舰」？好啊！云璃和三月小姐也一定没见过。这样吧，我带各位去见识见识。
You want to see the Skysplitter ship where the Wardance will be held? Let's go! I bet Yunli and Miss March haven't seen it either, right? Well then, I'll give you all a tour.
这段时间，我也算是一步步看着您越变越强了啊！再与我对练一番如何？
I've been watching your progress during this period! How about another spar?
来吧！看我这次怎么打败你！
Bring it on! Let's see how I beat you this time!
下次吧，我还有点别的事要办。
Maybe next time. I've got something else to do now.
没问题！朝九晚五，随时奉陪！
No problem! I'm ready whenever you need me.
走吧，我带各位去见识见识「竞锋舰」。
Let's go. I'll give you a tour of the Skysplitter.
彦卿知道一个地方视野很好，可以看得比较清楚。走吧。
I know a spot with a great view of the whole place. Follow me.
没想到来眺望竞锋舰的人还不少啊？
Looks like a lot of other visitors have also come to catch a glimpse of the Skysplitter.
你们看到了吗，远处那艘飞舰，就是这次演武仪典的比武赛场——「竞锋舰」。
Do you see that airship in the distance? That's the Skysplitter, the venue for the Wardance ceremony.
远远看来，倒也不算特别。
It doesn't look all that impressive from this distance.
这艘竞锋舰，是以罗浮退役舰船改造而成的。在演武仪典正式举行前，暂时还不准人们登陆。
The Skysplitter is actually a decommissioned Luofu military vessel. People aren't allowed on board until the Wardance officially commences.
但明日钟声响起，礼炮绽放，彦卿将代表仙舟「罗浮」云骑军，站上擂台，接受四方骁勇之士的挑战。

Tomorrow, when the bell rings and the ceremonial cannons roar, I'll be there representing the Cloud Knights of the Xianzhou Luofu, standing in the ring, ready to take on challengers from all over the cosmos.
彦卿自小就被将军带在身边，教授剑术与兵法。每日挥剑斩击一万次，刺击一万次，如是往复，如是往复……

Since I was a kid, I've been training in swordplay and the art of war under the General. Every day I'd swing my sword ten thousand times, and then thrust it ten thousand times, repeating the process over and over...
我明白，我和一般的孩子似乎不太一样。我从来没有羡慕过他们拥有的玩具和自由，也从没觉得一心练剑是什么枯燥、艰难的事情。
I understand that I'm not like other kids. I never envied the toys and freedom they all had. I never found sword practice boring or hard.
即便是登上战场，斩阵杀敌，在与那些恶形恶状的孽物交锋时，我也一无所惧。
Even in the thick of battle, facing down savage abominations, I never felt scared.
每天都能感觉自己在不断变强、变强、再变强一点…一次次将胜利握在手里，世界上没有比这更快乐的事情了。
Each day, I could feel myself getting stronger and stronger... and I racked up countless victories. It's the best feeling in the world.
但后来，我接了某人一剑。那一剑将我原本完满无缺的自信斩得粉碎。在那一剑到来的瞬间，我第一次感受到了害怕。这也许就是椒丘先生所说的「死生刹那，万念成空」吧。

But then, I faced a really tough opponent, and just one slash shattered my confidence into a thousand pieces. That's when I felt true fear for the first time. Maybe that's what Mr. Jiaoqiu meant by "life and death hinge on a singular moment, every idea fades into nothingness?"
那之后，彦卿不得不低下头去，将这些碎片一片片拾起、拼合，试图重新拼出过去那个快乐的自己。但无论怎么做，我似乎都无法再现往日的心境了。
After that, I had to pick up the pieces and try to put myself back together. But no matter how hard I tried, I couldn't seem to find my old, happy self again.
我时不时会问自己，我究竟为何而挥剑？如果注定要面对下一场失败，我又为何要继续挥剑？是为了找回胜利的快乐？为了回应将军的期待？还是为了留下云骑功勋？

I often ask myself, why do I wield my sword? If defeat is inevitable, why do I continue to fight? Is it to reclaim the joy of victory, to meet the general's expectations, or to secure my honor among the Cloud Knights?
将军能指教我剑术，却不能教我挥剑的理由。他对我说：挥剑的理由，必须由我自己寻得。为此，彦卿百般苦恼，辗转反侧。
While the general could teach me the art of swordplay, he couldn't teach me why I should keep on going. He said the reason must come from within myself. I've been struggling to find that reason.
但与椒丘先生这番畅谈，彦卿心中已有了答案。
But after talking with you, Mr. Jiaoqiu, I think I already have that reason in mind.
作为云骑的一员，将军的弟子，我背负了很多，而且注定要背负更多的东西。
As a member of the Cloud Knights and the general's apprentice, I've had a weight on my shoulders, and I know there's still more to shoulder.
但只有在我挥剑时，我能感觉到自己可以放下一切。我喜欢那个倾尽全力向前方阻碍挥出一剑，一往无前的我。
But when I wield my sword, it feels like I'm letting go of everything. I love the feeling of giving it my all, facing any obstacle in front of me, pressing forward.
我也正是为了这样的我而挥剑。
That's why I wield my sword.
彦卿啊彦卿，小小年纪就一把年纪了…说起来你今年到底多大了？
Oh, Yanqing, so young, yet so grown-up... By the way, how old are you exactly?
这和我几岁没关系。只要是练剑之人，自然会理解我的感受。
Age doesn't really matter. All swordmasters will understand how I feel.
唉…我明白，罗浮的孩子真是太苦了。那你有什么想说的，云璃小姐？
Hmm... I get it. Looks like all the kids on the Luofu live tough lives. So, how about you, Miss Yunli?
无论在哪个仙舟上，问女孩子的年龄都是不礼貌的。
It's not polite to ask a girl her age, no matter which Xianzhou ship you're on.
我问的不是年龄！我是问…你有没有彦卿兄弟这样的梦想？
I'm not asking your age! I'm asking if you have a dream like Yanqing has?
你不像个厨子，倒是更像主持人。
You don't talk like a cook, you sound more like a TV host or something.
...Need I repeat myself again? I'm a healer.
我…没有彦卿小弟这样的梦想。我之所以要挑战守擂竞锋，只不过是因为答应了爷爷，想赢下他赠给演武仪典的宝剑。

Well, I... I don't have a dream like Yanqing does. The only reason I'm participating in the Ringmaster's Challenge is because I made a promise to my grandfather. I wanna win the precious sword he's contributed to the Wardance.
你这个人啊，满脑子都是剑。
Sounds like that mind of yours is just filled with swords.
你脑袋里不也一样没别的吗！
I bet you've got nothing better on your mind!
我…父亲是朱明仙舟的匠师，只因他的一念愚蠢，许多人死在了他所造的魔剑之下。
My... father... was a craftsman on the Xianzhou Zhuming. Because of his foolishness, many innocent people fell victim to the cursed swords he forged.
我从小时候起就明白，许多人的手中根本不配持有任何武器。准许他们握剑，就是对无辜之人的残忍。
Since I was a kid, it's been clear to me that not everyone deserves to have a weapon in their hands. Giving them a sword is no different than being cruel to the innocent.
每当遇见有人德不配剑，便难免手心痒痒，想要从他手里夺下武器。这不是…彦卿小弟要为这次演武仪典守擂嘛。我好心上场，以免宝剑所托非人。

So, whenever I come across someone unworthy of a sword, I can't help but want to take it away from them. Given that Yanqing is the Wardance ringmaster, I'm stepping up to challenge him, to ensure the precious sword doesn't fall into the hands of an unworthy master.
什么叫所托非人啊，你给我讲讲清楚！
Hey! What do you mean by "an unworthy master"?
唉，明白了，朱明的孩子也很苦。
I see. It's not easy for kids on the Zhuming either.
有挥剑的理由，总强过茫然不知所措。我这一生救治过不少云骑，其中也不乏似二位这样出类拔萃的战士……

Well, it's better to have a reason for wielding a sword than to be lost and confused. I've saved countless Cloud Knights in my life, and there are plenty of exceptional warriors just like the two... of you...
怎么话说到一半，椒丘先生？
…只是想起了几位故人，一些旧事。
...Oh, nothing. I was just reminded of some old friends and old tales.
以我身为医士的专业眼光来看，两位的生命力充沛健旺，气息流转如猛火烈风。这场比斗…一定好看的很。

Judging from my professional perspective as a healer, both of you possess remarkable vitality, your energies flow like raging fires and mighty gales. The upcoming fight... will definitely be impressive.
好了，迴星港兜兜转转一遍，「竞锋舰」也瞧过了。是时候要和各位暂时道别了。
Well, we've seen the Skysplitter and toured the Stargazer Navalia. I guess it's time to say goodbye for now.
怎么，你要走了吗？你还没问我有没有梦想呢！我也练得很辛苦的！
What, you're leaving already? But you haven't asked me about my dreams! I've been working hard too, you know!
时候不早了，三月小姐。我和你们几位不同，我只是个受职务羁绊的成年人，我家将军交给我的事情可不会自动完成。
It's getting late, Miss March. Unlike you lot, I'm a grown-up bound by responsibilities and duties. The tasks entrusted to me by the general won't complete themselves.
对了，彦卿小兄弟，似「迴星港」这般自动运行的区域，平日里也会有咱们这么多人来闲逛吗？
By the way, Yanqing, is it normal to have so many people wandering around in an automated area like the Stargazer Navalia?
……其实，这儿本是不允许随便擅闯的地方。只是大家是客人，我才带各位来此看看。
...Actually, this is a restricted area, but since you're all guests, I made an exception so you could take a look around.
我明白了。那鄙人就先告辞了，祝二位明日擂场，各得所愿。
I understand. Well, I'll take my leave. I wish you both the best of luck in the ring tomorrow.
椒丘挥了挥手，随即离去。
真是的…我想了半天自己的梦想是什么，他居然不问了！
Seriously... I just spent so much time thinking about my dream, but he didn't even ask me!
竞锋舰看完了，该回去继续训练了吧？
Now that we're done with our tour of the Skysplitter, shall we continue with our training?
Why don't we take a day off?
怎么，你想躲起来一个人练剑？想得美。
What? You want to secretly practice swordplay by yourself? Dream on.
哼，临阵磨枪，一点儿用场也派不上。
Hmph, you know cramming before a fight never works out.
说来也怪，看到竞锋舰的轮廓，我突然有了信心。所以我打算养精蓄锐，等待明天。
For some reason, seeing the Skysplitter has boosted my confidence. So, I've decided to conserve my strength for tomorrow.
我带你们离开迴星港吧。
Alright, I'll take you out of the Stargazer Navalia.
…闭嘴吧赤牙，这里的船毕竟不是兽舰，我需要点时间搞定它。
...Oh, just shut up, Red Fang! This is not a beast ship, I need some time to take care of things.
你自愿披上了贱畜的皮，加入这次行动，为光荣的大业献身。现在你告诉我，你搞不定？你知道我们需要多少条船吗？
You willingly donned the skin of a lowly beast to join this mission, dedicating yourself to our glorious cause. And now you're telling me you can't handle it? Do you realize how many ships we need?
我在尽力，我在研究，这些都需要时间。
I'm doing my best, alright? It takes time to figure all this out.
明天礼炮一响，所有人的注意都会被吸引，不会有第二次机会——
When the guns go off tomorrow, all eyes will be on it. That'll be our only chance...
临时检查。为什么有无关的人在迴星港出没？还是几个小不点。
An impromptu inspection. Why are there outsiders loitering in Stargazer Navalia? And a bunch of kids at that!
小朋友，你们的父母难道没告诉过你，迴星港虽然是自动运转的设施，但这并不意味着你们几个能随随便便闯进来。
Hey, kids, didn't your parents ever tell you to stay away from the Stargazer Navalia? I know it's an automated facility, but it doesn't mean you can just break in and do what you want.
我这就带弟弟妹妹们走。
I'll take the little ones away right now.
啊，对不住，我这就把小不点们带走。
Ah, sorry, I'll take the little ones away right now.
首先，本小姐是成年人了。其次，我可不算随随便便闯进来的——
First of all, I'm an adult. Second, I didn't just break in...
是啦，叔叔，咱们是坐星槎呼一下飞过来的喔！
Yeah, we flew here on a starskiff! Like... woosh!
叔叔们没有责问你们的意思。但是，这儿不对一般居民们开放。
Well, I'm not trying to tell you off, but this place is off-limits to the public, you know?
姐姐，姐姐，咱们快走吧，接下来我要、我要去永狩原玩！
Big sis! Let's go! I want to play in Ever-Hunt Plains!
唉？永狩原？呃…好，好的。姐姐带你去永狩原。
Huh? Ever-Hunt Plains? Uh... yeah, sure! Big sis will take you there.
Xuu haa... You should have let me...
嘘，检修结束了，一切正常，我们该走了。
Shhh, the overhaul is done, and everything looks good. We should leave.
事情…似乎有点蹊跷。换个地方说话。
Something smells fishy... Let's talk somewhere else.
彦卿小弟，能不能把刚才的话再学一遍？
Could you repeat what you just said, Yanqing?
Big sis! Let's go! I want to play in Ever-Hunt Plains!
救命，你是永远读不懂气氛吗？刚才那三个人，很有问题。
Come on. Can't you read the room? Something is definitely off about the three people we just met.
傻瓜都看明白啦，我只是想再听你说一遍那个。
Yeah, anyone could see that. I just wanted to hear you say it again.
那只粉毛狐狸刚刚欲言又止，怕是早已瞧出了什么端倪。只是他人生地不熟，所以临走前了留了个话茬暗示咱们，没想到你却不搭理他。

That pink-haired fox tried to say something. I'm pretty sure he sensed something fishy. Since he's not familiar with this place, he just dropped us a hint, but you didn't seem to be paying attention at all.
I knew that from the beginning!
那个云骑…不认识彦卿师父？
That Cloud Knight... didn't recognize Master Yanqing?
刚才那个云骑，完全认不出彦卿师父…这确实很蹊跷。
That Cloud Knight didn't recognize Master Yanqing at all... That's really weird.
怎么，他在罗浮很有名吗？朱明云骑军千千万万，就算听过我的大名，也不见得认得出我的脸。
What, is he famous on the Luofu or something? Not even the Cloud Knights on the Zhuming, who all know my glorious name, might recognize my face.
他们似乎在捣鼓星槎制造线？
Looks like they were tampering with the starskiff production line, huh?
说是检修，但看起来他们似乎并不知道怎么摆弄那条星槎制造的流水线？
They said they were doing an overhaul, but it looked like they had no idea how to operate the starskiff production line, right?
这几个人一见到咱们就立刻「检修完毕」，转身就走，实在是可疑。
And it's suspicious how they suddenly finished their "overhaul" and walked away as soon as they laid eyes on us.
云骑，天舶司的人，还有匠人…种类倒是齐全，检修的理由也说得过去，只是刚才那人嘴里迸出了一句奇怪的语言。你们听见了吗？

A Cloud Knight, a member from the Sky-Faring Commission, and a craftsman... They're from various departments, and the reason for the overhaul seems legit, but one of them blurted out some weird language just now. Did you hear that?
我有种奇怪的直觉，如果咱们现在悄悄跟上去，一定能掀开这几个家伙的马脚。
I have a feeling that if we secretly tail them, we'll definitely catch these guys in the act.
跟上我，小心别让他们发现了。
Follow my lead, and be careful not to blow our cover.
三月小姐，你要往哪儿去啊？跟着他们！
Where are you going, Miss March? Follow them!
还要随时留意对方的行动。一有动静就躲起来。
And make sure to keep an eye on them. Hide out of sight as soon as there's any sign of activity.
三月小姐，别靠太近了，会被发现的！
Don't get too close, Miss March! They might spot you!
拍摄可疑人士密谋现场
Take a photo of the suspects plotting at the scene
以<unbreak>4.0</unbreak>倍率拍摄到清晰证据
Take a clear photo of the evidence using <unbreak>4.0</unbreak>× zoom.
只要离港，便有猎群的人接应…
Someone from the pack will be waiting for me once I leave the port...
末度大人已经准备妥当了…
Lord Mok Tok has already prepared everything...
以<unbreak>3.0</unbreak>倍率拍摄到清晰证据
Take a clear photo of the evidence using <unbreak>3.0</unbreak>× zoom.
The moment the suspicious foxian reaches out.
拍摄可疑人士密谋现场
Take a photo of the suspects plotting at the scene
应该宰了刚才那三只贱畜的。
We should have just killed those lowly beasts.
小崽子占不了多大地方。这儿到处都是箱子，随便往哪个里头一扔，不会有人发现的。
Those little brats won't take up much space. There are boxes all over this place. Just dump them into one and no one will notice.
少给我节外生枝，伽虏。任何一点意外都会干扰末度大人的计划。
Cut the theatrics, Grulok. Even the slightest slip-up could interfere with Lord Mok Tok's plans.
So, where are we heading next?
去查验货船，需要做的准备还有很多。还有，记得带走那几只箱子。
To check the freight skiffs. We've got a lot of preparations to do. Also, don't forget to take those crates with you.
武器、补给…我们必须做好充足的准备。不然咱们的头颅就只能交代在这儿了。
Weapons, supplies... we've got to be well-prepared. Otherwise, we're screwed.
这些人…是走私者吗？他们要做什么？
So, are they... smugglers? What exactly are they up to?
我不知道。但他们似乎准备带走那堆货箱。我有个主意，我们可以躲进那些箱子里，跟着他们。
I have no clue, but they seem to be moving those crates. I've got an idea. We can hide inside the crates and follow them.
趁着几人暂时离去，你如履薄冰地来到一个箱子旁，钻了进去。
Taking advantage of the temporary absence of the group, you cautiously approach a crate and crawl inside.
Ugh, it's so cramped in here...
你们听到箱子旁有脚步声不断来回。如果在此时有人打开货箱，一定能瞧见你们可笑的躲藏姿态。万幸，事情没有发生。

You hear footsteps pacing back and forth beside the crate. If someone were to open the crate at that moment, they would certainly catch you in your ridiculous hiding position. Fortunately, that doesn't happen.
箱底的悬浮机关被启动。你们感到它开始向着前方缓缓飘行。
The floating mechanism at the bottom of the crate is activated. You feel it begins to drift slowly forward.
趁着这几名可疑的「官方人员」暂时离去，你如履薄冰地来到一个箱子旁，试图钻进去。
Seizing the moment when the suspicious "official personnel" temporarily step away, you tread on thin ice to reach a crate, attempting to slip inside.
很遗憾，箱子里塞满了各色小巧的机关装置。
Unfortunately, the crate is crammed with an assortment of petite, intricate mechanism devices.
不行，进不去…得换个箱子。
Nope, won't fit... Better try another.
长如一个琥珀纪的闭气和沉默后，你们听到箱子落地声。
After what feels like an entire Amber Era of holding breath in silence, you heard the sound of the crate touching down.
货先放在这儿吧？接下来检查船只的问题。
Let's just put the cargo here for now, alright? Then we'll move on to inspect the ships.
末度大人说，一旦接应完成，弟兄们搭上货船离开这儿。
Lord Mok Tok said that as soon as we're done, we're to board the freight skiff and leave this place.
放心吧，我改写了舵航计划表。你们俩，跟我来。
Don't worry. I've changed the shipping schedule. You two, come with me.
我总觉得奇怪，贱畜的味道怎么哪儿都有。
Is it just me? I keep smelling that stench of lowly beasts everywhere we go.
离去的脚步声仿佛一个信号，让你们松了口气。
The departing footsteps sound like a signal, prompting you to breathe a sigh of relief.
看来他们打算利用迴星港的船只，带他们离开仙舟。
Looks like they're planning to escape on the skiffs in Stargazer Navalia.
口口声声计划计划，这些人到底是从哪儿来的？他们想在仙舟上干什么？
They're keep talking about their "plans," but where did they come from? And what do they want to do on the Xianzhou?
八成不是什么好事。他们不见了？咱们跟上去！
They're definitely up to something bad. Wait, they disappeared? Let's catch up to them!
Something doesn't smell right. There's a weird scent...
可惜，对手实在太警觉了。追踪失败，再来一次吧。
Alas, the opponent is too vigilant. The tracking fails. Time for another try.
那家伙发现我们了吗？快躲起来。
Did he spot us? Quickly, hide!
<size=36>别疑神疑鬼了！时间紧迫，快过来。</size>
<size=36>Don't be so paranoid! We're running out of time. Get over here!</size>
他们要离开了，快些跟上他们！
They're leaving. We should catch up to them, quickly!
Watch out! They're on high alert!
这些家伙怎么又折回来了？快退后！
Why are they coming back? Quickly, retreat!
我就觉得古怪，空气里总有贱畜的味道…
I knew something was off. There's always this stench of lowly beasts in the air...
果然，这三个小东西一直咬着我们不放。
Looks like those brats were following us the whole time.
我就觉得古怪，空气里总有贱畜的味道…
I knew something was off. There's always this stench of lowly beasts in the air...
果然，这三个小东西一直咬着我们不放。
Looks like those brats were following us the whole time.
这些家伙怎么又折回来了？快退后！
Why are they coming back? Quickly, retreat!
他们到底要干什么？这些人身着的全都是官方制服，但我敢打赌，这些家伙绝对不是天舶司、工造司或是云骑军的人…太可疑了。

What are they up to? They're all wearing official uniforms, but I'm pretty sure they're not members of the Sky-Faring Commission, the Artisanship Commission, or the Cloud Knights... This is way too suspicious.
不管他们是谁，把他们的行动都拍下来作为证据。要是有什么罪证，那可就抵赖不了了。
Never mind who they are, let's just film them. That way, if they do anything bad, we'll have solid evidence against them.
不管他们是谁，把他们的行动都拍下来作为证据。
Never mind who they are, let's just film them.
Why are you filming me? Shouldn't you be filming them?
瞧瞧，一艘货运星槎。至少够送走二十名弟兄。我还会联络其他成员，让他们准备更多。
Look at this, a freight starskiff with enough room to fit at least twenty of my men. I'll let the others know and have them prepare more starskiffs.
等脱离关口后，会有接应的兽舰。
Once we're past the checkpoint, there will be beast ships waiting for us.
末度大人已经准备妥当，我们的古老血脉能否重振，将在此一举……
Lord Mok Tok is ready. The revival of our ancient bloodline all hinges on this operation...
What did he just say?... Beast ships?
是那三个小崽子！我说过了，让你及时善后，你就是不听，白痴！
It's those brats! I told you to get rid of them, but you didn't listen, you idiot!
怎么可能！这些狐人…这些狐人为什么会变了模样？
How is this possible? How did these foxians... change their appearances like that!?
这些家伙根本不是狐人。他们只是露出了原形。这些家伙是货真价实的步离人，和我在公司那艘舰船上击败的劫匪是同一群害虫。
They're not foxians at all. They revealed their true form. They're borisin, just like the bandits I defeated on the IPC ship.
The borisin have infiltrated the Xianzhou...
这些步离人是怎么渗透进仙舟的？
How did the borisin manage to infiltrate the Xianzhou?
步离人怎么变成狐人的模样？
How did the borisin disguise themselves as foxians?
这些家伙到底施了什么障眼法？咱们刚才追踪他们时，他们看起来和一般的仙舟狐人毫无区别……
What kind of trick did they use? When we were tracking them earlier, they looked just like normal Xianzhou foxians...
这不是简单换上仙舟的服装，剃去须发的伪装。这几个步离人不知用了什么手法，将自己的模样变得与狐人毫无二致。
It's not just a simple disguise of wearing our clothing and shaving their whiskers. They're somehow able to alter their appearance to be indistinguishable from foxians.
他们还有着官方身份。天舶司、工造司、还有…云骑军？
They even have official IDs for the Sky-Faring Commission, the Artisanship Commission, and... even the Cloud Knights?
让我看看这个冒牌云骑的腰牌，或许能有些眉目。
Let me check this fake Cloud Knight's tag. Maybe it'll give us some clues.
路君？巡防卫队的值守武官？……等等！
Lujun? An officer of the patrol defense squad... Wait!
我曾经见过另一个名叫路君的值守武官，那是在几周之前，押送步离人犯的时候。
I encountered a patrol officer named Lujun before. It was a few weeks ago when we were transporting the borisin prisoners.
拥有伪造的官方身份，能堂而皇之地出入仙舟…糟糕，真是太糟糕了。
If they can forge official identities and move around the Xianzhou without raising suspicion... Oh no, this is bad.
更糟糕的是，如果我在列车上发现了一只蟑螂，那就意味着……
Even worse. If you find one cockroach on the Express, it usually means...
还有更多步离人潜伏在仙舟内。他们的阴谋恐怕不是窃取情报这般小打小闹的事情。
There are more borisin hiding on the Xianzhou. I bet their plan is much bigger than just stealing information.
必须尽快将这件事报告给神策府！
We've got to report this to the Seat of Divine Foresight!
Meanwhile, in the Seat of Divine Foresight...
百闻不如一见，星穹列车的客人。我是曜青仙舟的将军，飞霄。
I am glad to finally meet you in person, guests from the Astral Express. I'm Feixiao, the general of the Xianzhou Yaoqing.
我来为天击将军介绍一番。身着青衣的这位——
Let me introduce our guests to you. The one dressed in green...
走前边这位是饮月君的隔世之身，跟在他后面的是列车组最近吸纳的新成员，二位鼎鼎大名，我这对耳朵听得可清楚了。
He's the reincarnation of Imbibitor Lunae, and the person behind him is the newest member of the Crew. I've heard a lot about you.
除开罗浮报告中的记述，「曜青」天舶司也搜罗了不少关于二位的见闻。本人一直想会会你们，原因…想必景元将军也解释过了吧？

Outside the reports from the Luofu, the Sky-Faring Commission of the Yaoqing has also gathered plenty of information about both of you. I've been eager to meet you face to face, for reasons that... I'm sure General Jing Yuan has explained, right?
我们作为证人前来回答问题。
Yeah, we're here to answer your questions as witnesses.
不错，但不是堂前会审。只是想请两位聊聊，廓清些事实。
That's right, but don't worry, this isn't a trial. I just want to have a chat with you and get a better understanding of the facts.
将军没告诉我们你想做什么…
General Jing Yuan didn't tell us about your intentions at all...
喔？这倒不像我认识的神策将军啊。
He didn't? That doesn't sound like the Divine Foresight I know.
两位尽管据实回答，无需担心。
Don't worry. Just tell her the truth.
不就是为了建木重生的事？
You're here about the Ambrosial Arbor's resurrection, no?
Straight to the point. I like it.
景元将军在呈递的报告中，将建木灾异的祸首归罪于{RUBY_B#反物质军团}烬灭军团{RUBY_E#}，警示众天将应当关注烬灭祸祖的动向。

According to General Jing Yuan's report, the {RUBY_B#Antimatter Legion}Ruin Legion{RUBY_E#} is to blame for the Ambrosial Arbor crisis, and all Arbiter-Generals should pay attention to the Ruin Author's movements.
这些年来，「毁灭」的爪牙摧残了数之不尽的世界，联盟也有所防备，只是未曾想他们竟会与「丰饶」的残党联手。

Over the years, the Destruction's minions have wreaked havoc on countless worlds, and the Alliance has been keeping an eye on them. But no one expected them to join hands with the remnants of the Abundance.
这场建木灾异造成的损害远比预想中低，可以说是不幸中的万幸。但反过来看…也和烬灭军团所到之处荼毒生灵的风格大相径庭。

The damage caused by the Ambrosial Arbor crisis was far less severe than expected, which is good news for us. However... it was quite different from the Ruin Legion's usual style of destroying life wherever they go.
我自然相信神策将军与各位无名客的英勇事迹，但也不免对报告未能详述的一些细节感到好奇。借此机会，希望能与二位交流一番。
While I trust the bravery of the Divine Foresight and the Nameless, I'm curious about some details missing from the report. I'd like to take this chance to have an exchange with both of you.
有言在先，我所问的未必是我认为的。提问若有冒犯，还请不要见怪。
Let me be clear, the questions I'll ask might not reflect my actual thoughts. So, please don't take offense if any of my questions seem a bit harsh.
将军但问无妨。只是我们能回答的，也只是我们所知的；而您所问的…或许内心也早有答案。
Please go ahead, General. But keep in mind we can only answer based on what we know. And perhaps... you already have the answers to your questions in your heart.
You have a clever tongue. I like it.
（这天击将军说起话来竟也头头是道。眼下她来意不明，景元又希望我们据实回答…<color=#dbc291ff>也许只说知道的事实就好？</color>）
(The Merlin's Claw is quite articulate. Right now, her intentions are unknown, and Jing Yuan wants us to be honest... <color=#dbc291ff>Maybe I'll just stick to the facts we know?</color>)
我就开门见山了：起初，星穹列车受通缉重犯星核猎手的引导前来此地，试图解决星核危机。
Let's cut to the chase. Before the crisis struck, the Astral Express was guided here by a Stellaron Hunter, a wanted felon, in an attempt to resolve the Stellaron Crisis.
可凡在银河行走的，是个人都应听说过星核猎手的昭彰恶名。各位无名客为何如此相信他们的一面之词，莫非是有人沾亲带故？
However, everyone in the Cosmos knows of the Stellaron Hunters' reputation. So, why did you place so much trust in them? Could it be that some of you have a connection with them?
It all comes down to the Stellaron.
除罗浮外，宇宙中还有不少遭受星核侵蚀的世界。列车之前停靠的雅利洛-VI就是其中之一。
Apart from the Luofu, there are many other worlds suffering from Stellaron corrosion. For example, Jarilo-VI, the world that the Express stopped at before reaching the Luofu, was one of them.
对于列车而言，星核的存在会阻塞银轨，加剧跃迁风险。因此处理星核引起的麻烦，也是无名客的分内之事。
To the Express, Stellarons act as roadblocks on the silver rail and pose risks to the warping process. And that's why dealing with Stellaron issues is part of the duty of the Nameless.
唔，星核造成的那些问题我也有所耳闻，列车联结诸界，理应对此做出应对。银河破破烂烂，「开拓」缝缝补补。言之成理。

Ah, I've heard about those problems caused by Stellarons. The Express connects various worlds, so it makes sense for you to take care of this. The Cosmos is a mess, and the Trailblazers are just doing their best to fix it. I understand.
难道列车就不能做些善事？我们这一路上帮助过的世界都快数…倒也不至于数不清，但总之，有很多很多！
What's wrong with doing something good? Along the way, we've helped countless worlds... well, not literally countless, but you get the idea!
星核猎手警告我们，如果不前往仙舟，至少会有一半罗浮住民死于非命。
The Stellaron Hunters warned us that if we didn't hurry to the Xianzhou Luofu, half of its inhabitants would die.
有心行善，值得赞赏。云骑巡猎讨魔，也秉持向善之心。虽然总有人不明事理，多加非议，但我不会质疑各位无名客的动机。

Your good intentions are commendable, just like the Cloud Knights' determination to eliminate those abominations. Even though there are always people who remain skeptical, I won't question your motives.
猜测你和星核猎手的关系
Raise her suspicion about your relationship with Stellaron Hunters.
你说的不错，也许我确实和星核猎手有所关联……
You know what? Maybe I do have a connection with Stellaron Hunters...
看来你和星核猎手关系匪浅。但这群通缉犯形迹可疑，你这样诚实自白，我倒是欣赏，只是你得明白，这可是在往自己身上揽嫌疑喔？

Looks like you're quite close to the Stellaron Hunters. However, I must warn you that they are wanted felons. While I appreciate your honesty, being honest about this topic might make you look suspicious to some, you know?
据传，星核猎手的首领艾利欧拥有目视未来众多可能性的力量。
Rumor has it that Elio, the leader of the Stellaron Hunters, possesses the power to see into the future.
他预见仙舟和列车都将参与对抗纳努克的战争。而将我们引来解决罗浮的星核危机，正是为了实现这一预言。

He foresaw that the Xianzhou and the Express would have important roles to play in the war against Nanook. That's why we were lured here to the Luofu, to deal with the Stellaron crisis and fulfill the prophecy.
从报告来看，景元将军也相信了这一说辞。这倒令我好奇，为何你们对此并无质疑？
General Jing Yuan believes in this prophecy too, as mentioned in the report. I'm curious why you didn't question it at all?
难道是因为猎手中还有一位将军的{RUBY_B#刃}旧相识{RUBY_E#}？
Could it be because one of the Stellaron Hunters is actually {RUBY_B#Blade}an old acquaintance{RUBY_E#} of General Jing Yuan?
天击将军请慎言。对无名客的问话不应变成同僚间的猜疑。那名星核猎手也曾是老朽的弟子，你是否也要考验我的忠诚？
Please be cautious with your words, Merlin's Claw. Let's avoid sowing doubt among our comrades. That Stellaron Hunter used to be my disciple, so are you putting my loyalty in question, too?
炎老，我说的这些正是联盟内部对景元将军的非议。只是今日他们借我之口问了出来，要不您把我的样子想像成那几个老家伙的嘴脸？
I'm simply bringing up the doubts about General Jing Yuan that exist within the Alliance. Since I'm representing them, perhaps you can just imagine me as one of those old geezers?
接着，报告提及「药王秘传」魁首丹枢心怀不轨，与绝灭大君勾结，动用星核复苏了建木。

Let's move on to the next question. The report suggests that Dan Shu, the Master of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus, colluded with the Lord Ravager and used the power of the Stellaron to resurrect the Ambrosial Arbor.
可丹枢不过一介丹士长，竟如此手眼通天。她勾结外敌，召来星核也就罢了，古海建木可是持明一族的领地，她是如何绕过守卫的？

But here's the thing: Dan Shu was just a chief alchemist. Even if she colluded with our enemies and summoned the Stellaron, how did she manage to bypass the Vidyadhara guards around the Ambrosial Arbor?
The Preceptors of the Luofu seem suspicious.
还能为什么？显然是罗浮龙师监守自盗，抛弃了守望建木的责任，与药王秘传勾结。
The answer seems rather simple, doesn't it? The Preceptors of the Luofu abandoned their duty to guard the Ambrosial Arbor and colluded with the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus.
这倒也不是没可能。但为何不是景元将军将流放许久的丹恒先生带回了罗浮，丹恒分开古海，才致使建木失控重生。

That's a possibility, but there's another scenario to consider: General Jing Yuan brought back Mr. Dan Heng, who had been in exile for a long time. As a result, Dan Heng parted the Seas, eventually leading to the resurrection of the Ambrosial Arbor.
我原本没有擅入仙舟的打算，只是……
I never intended to trespass on the Xianzhou ship, but...
你既然没有擅入仙舟的打算，那为何在流放令终止前却重返仙舟？
If you had no intention to trespass, then why did you return to the Xianzhou ship before your exile was lifted?
是我担心伙伴的安危，不得不擅自行动。相关罪责，应当由丹恒一人承担。
I was concerned about the safety of my companions, so I had to act brazenly. I alone bear the blame.
丹恒先生不必紧张，若是真有罪责，这也不是你一人能担起的。
Please don't worry, Mr. Dan Heng. If someone must be held accountable, it won't fall solely on your shoulders.
我和丹枢有过一面之缘。她的挚友死于方壶的战争，她憎恨「巡猎」…在丹鼎司中准备多年，正是为了向仙舟复仇。

I personally met Dan Shu once. Her closest friend was killed during the war on the Fanghu, and she harbored deep hatred towards The Hunt. So she spent years making preparations in the Alchemy Commission, in order to take revenge on the Xianzhou.
复仇…这同样是一种「巡猎」。但这不意味着她就有能力将星核带入持明把守的鳞渊境。
Revenge... is also a form of The Hunt. However, that doesn't explain how she managed to bring the Stellaron into the Scalegorge Waterscape, which was guarded by the Vidyadhara.
这个问题应该由丹枢自己回答。
Well, you should ask Dan Shu herself for the answer.
可惜丹枢已死，就连尸骸也碎成了一捧飞灰。可追究的线索又少了一个。
Unfortunately, Dan Shu is dead, and even her corpse has crumbled into ash. That's one less clue we can pursue.
放逐饮月君，才有今日祸患
The exile of Imbibitor Lunae is what led to this calamity.
要不是罗浮放逐了丹恒，持明族群龙无首，化作一盘散沙，星核又怎会被神不知鬼不觉地放入建木玄根中？

If the Luofu hadn't exiled Dan Heng, leaving the Vidyadhara with no leader, they wouldn't have fallen into chaos, and there wouldn't have been the opportunity to bring the Stellaron to the Roots of the Arbor unnoticed.
饮月君被放逐，是他自取其咎。丹恒作为其转世之身，往罪早已一笔勾销。他为何要在流放令尚未解除时就冒险登上罗浮？
Imbibitor Lunae was exiled due to his own crimes. Now, Dan Heng, as his reincarnation, is free from his sins. However, why did he risk trespassing on the Xianzhou Luofu before his exile was lifted?
我担心伙伴安危，擅自行动，确有不是。但……
I was concerned about the safety of my companions, so I acted brazenly. I admit I was reckless at that time, but...
但你还是回来了。从结果来看，建木重生，罗浮需要一位龙尊再度编织封印，压抑祸迹。其中利害，也难免令人浮想联翩啊。

But you returned despite everything. Now let's consider the outcome: The Arbor was resurrected, and the Luofu required a high elder to repair the seal and suppress the plaguemark. It's hard not to think about the stakes involved, right?
这个问题不该由我们来回答。我们只是来解决星核危机的，丹枢的阴谋细节，无名客怎么会知道啊？
I don't believe we are in a position to answer this question. We Nameless came here to resolve the Stellaron crisis, and we cannot be expected to know the details of Dan Shu's conspiracy.
说的不错，这才是常人的反应。这个问题就放过二位吧。
You make a valid point. That's how innocent people should react. Let's skip this question for now.
报告宣称，绝灭大君幻胧是阴谋的策动者。
According to the report, Lord Ravager Phantylia is the mastermind behind the entire conspiracy.
在与你们一行同路时，她以天舶司某位接渡使的身份示人，而后又蒸发得无影无踪。这祸首倒是来去自由，拿来戴罪背锅也忒方便了。
She disguised herself as an amicassador of the Sky-Faring Commission and traveled with you, only to vanish without a trace later on. It seems too convenient to label her as a scapegoat.
太卜符玄目击了全过程
Fu Xuan, the Master Diviner, witnessed everything firsthand.
我们与罗浮的符太卜一起行动。她也见证了幻胧露出真面目。你该不会连自己人也不信吧？
Back then, we were working with Diviner Fu, and she also witnessed Phantylia's true form. You're not going to doubt one of your own people, are you?
太卜符玄是罗浮重臣，她的证词自然可以信任。但…即便是本人亲眼所见依然有被蒙蔽的可能。祸首来去自由，又离奇蒸发，当然让人心生疑惑。

Of course not, we can trust the testimony of Master Diviner Fu Xuan. However... even if she saw it with her own eyes, we can't completely rule out the possibility that she might have been deceived. After all, it's suspicious how the culprit just bizarrely vanished.
幻胧是曾和仙舟为敌的能量生命，「岁阳」的一员。这东西变化无常，难以捉摸。
Phantylia is one of the heliobi, the energy lifeforms that once fought against the Xianzhou. They're known for their unpredictable and elusive nature.
{NICKNAME}小朋友说的没错。这次建木重生，根须蔓延，还凿穿了罗浮的造化洪炉，误走了其中所封印的岁阳妖火。此事倒是可以作为旁证。

Just as {NICKNAME} said, when the Ambrosial Arbor resurrected, its roots broke through the Creation Furnace on the Luofu, accidentally releasing the heliobus fiendfire sealed inside. This can be used as circumstantial evidence.
炎老认可，我自然没有问题。
If Elder Huaiyan accepts the explanation, so do I.
Phantylia was eager to obtain the power of Ambrosial Arbor.
我跟随景元将军一同与幻胧交锋。她汲取了建木的力量，生成了一具难以消灭的肉体。也许打从一开始，她就是为此而来。

I was there, fighting Phantylia alongside General Jing Yuan, but she absorbed the power of the Ambrosial Arbor and gained an almost indestructible physical form. Perhaps that was her intention all along.
毁灭的卒子渴望一具肉身活下去？这倒是个未曾考虑的角度。有意思。
So, a pawn of the Destruction wanted a flesh-and-blood body to live in? Hmm, interesting. That's quite a new perspective.
我不知道该怎么回答将军的问题。
I'm not sure how to answer that question.
这名绝灭大君擅长操弄局势，布计令对手自灭。如今飞霄将军对罗浮内部的怀疑，恐怕也是——
The Lord Ravager is a master manipulator, adept at setting traps that lead her enemies to ruin. The current suspicions of General Feixiao towards the internal affairs on the Luofu are likely also...
照你的话讲，我是连问都不能问了。问就是内斗，这托词倒是和来无影去无踪的幻胧一样好用。
So, I'm not even allowed to ask questions? Asking questions is considered sowing discord now? Well, that's convenient for you, just like Phantylia vanishing without a trace.
请将军允许我们重新回答您的问题。
Could you please give us another chance? I'd like to answer that question again.
不妨事，但也要记得，辩驳亦如战场，越是犹豫，便越是远离胜利。
No problem, but remember that a debate is like a duel. The more you hesitate, the farther you are from victory.
你打定主意不对这个问题发表意见。
You've decided to withhold your opinion on this question.
飞霄微微一笑，也不动怒。
Feixiao offers a slight smile, displaying no anger.
你沉默地盯着天击将军，嘴角勾起一丝挑衅的笑意。
You silently fix your gaze on the Merlin's Claw, a trace of a provocative smile playing at the corners of your mouth.
飞霄微微一笑，也不动怒。
Feixiao offers a slight smile, displaying no anger.
很好，从各位的回答来看，这些问题都能有所解释。
Well, it seems that your answers have addressed all my questions.
看来关于无名客如何涉入这场建木灾异的细节…各位仍有一些无法自圆其说的地方啊。
Well, it appears that you are still unable to give explanations for several details about how the Nameless got involved in the Ambrosial Arbor crisis.
两位将军，我的问话就到此为止了。
Generals, I am finished with my questioning.
那么，飞霄将军觉得如何？报告中的诸多疑点，是否得到了解释？
So, what do you think, General Feixiao? Have the doubts in the report been cleared up?
两位无名客的回答倒是颇为坦诚，就算其中有些难以解释的细节，但以我的直觉看来，倒也没什么不妥。
The two Nameless have been honest in their answers. Even though there are some tricky details, my intuition tells me there is nothing wrong.
不过我方才所提到的三个问题，不仅仅是在向这两位无名客发问，也是在向景元将军传递某种声音——
However, the three questions I posed earlier were not just for the Nameless, but for you too, General Jing Yuan.
其一，药王秘传在罗浮内部不断壮大，六御却无所察觉，任其滋长，是为「失职」。
First, the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus grew uninterrupted on the Luofu, yet the Six Charioteers were not aware of it. That was a dereliction of duty.
其二，对星核猎手的说辞信之不疑，又将解决危机的重责交托外人，任其触及寿瘟祸迹，是为「失责」。
Second, you believed in the Stellaron Hunters' prophecy and entrusted outsiders to solve the crisis, even granting them access to the plaguemark. That was a dereliction of responsibility.
其三，于建木灾异之后，一意举行演武仪典，将罗浮再度置于寰宇焦点，是为「失智」。
Third, you insist on holding the Wardance right after the Ambrosial Arbor Crisis, putting the Luofu back in the spotlight. That is a dereliction of wisdom.
天击将军，这是你的意思…还是「十王」的意思？
Merlin's Claw, is this your line of thinking... or the Ten Lords'?
我想，打从进殿起我就说了，<color=#dbc291ff>我所问的未必是我认为的</color>。
From the moment I walked in, I made it clear that <color=#dbc291ff>the questions I'd ask might not reflect my actual thoughts</color>.
…药王秘传的势力盘根错节，潜谋已久。景元失察，确有疏失。
...The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus were deeply rooted and had been plotting for a long time. I admit it was my negligence for not noticing it earlier.
星核猎手的预言，我倒也未必全信。但在见招拆招之间，罗浮已从建木灾异中得以保全，可见艾利欧对未来的预言，亦有可观之处。

As for the Stellaron Hunters' prophecy, I didn't believe all of it, but in the end, the Luofu did survive the Ambrosial Arbor crisis. So, I think it's safe to say that Elio's prophecy about the future holds some merit.
至于演武仪典…景元岂会不知道开门揖盗的风险？不过风险亦是转机，罗浮这潭池水沉寂久了，也是时候该搅和搅和，让沉渣泛起，激浊扬清了。

And as for the Wardance... Do you think I'm unaware of the risks? However, risks can also be opportunities. The Luofu has lain low for too long. I believe it's time to stir up the dregs hidden in the depths and wash them away once and for all.
神策将军不愧是文化人，几句话赶得上一本仙舟成语大全了，我喜欢。
Just as I expected from our sophisticated Divine Foresight. You have a way with words. I like it.
但很遗憾，自报告上呈之日起，联盟内就充斥着流言和臆测。就连罗浮内部也有人参本上奏，指责将军疏怠职守，放任建木重生。

But unfortunately, ever since the report was submitted, the Alliance has been filled with rumors and speculation. Even within the Luofu, there are people accusing you of neglecting your duties, resulting in the Ambrosial Arbor's resurrection.
那么，飞霄将军又是怎么想的？
So, what are your thoughts on all of this, General Feixiao?
你我同为天将，自然都清楚坐这把交椅的难处。
As a fellow Arbiter-General, I fully understand the difficulties of this position.
在我看来，这些统统是蚊蝇无意义的嗡鸣。相隔星海，罗浮上所发生的事，唯有神策将军最清楚其危机和背后隐含的意义……
Personally, I think all these rumors are meaningless drivel. Across the sea of stars, the Divine Foresight knows better than anyone else what happened on the Luofu and the meaning behind it...
…正如曜青仙舟最近所遭遇的情况。
...Just as what happened on the Xianzhou Yaoqing recently.
You mean, the Xianzhou Yaoqing is also...?
青丘军的斥候回报，步离人又开始蠢蠢欲动了。原本一盘散沙的步离猎群，开始彼此攻伐，互相吞并，结成更大的猎群。在他们的背后，有个叫「蟒古思」的东西在指引他们。

The scouts of the Verdant Knights have sent back reports that borisin are making trouble again. The borisin packs that were once divided and scattered have started swallowing each other up, forming larger and larger packs. Moreover, there's an entity named "Mangas" behind it all.
斥候送来的情报说，那东西…不是步离人。那是一个自诩「长生主使者」的女人，「十二重面目，十二对獠牙，残酷如猛毒，变化如流沙」。步离人相信她将为他们带来重新崛起的机会。

According to the report, this entity... isn't actually a borisin. It's a woman claiming to be the Messenger of the Master of Immortality. She's described as having "twelve faces and twelve pairs of fangs, as cruel as poison and as elusive as quicksand." The borisin believe she'll give them a chance to rise again.
幸好此行是我前来，若是换做{RUBY_B#有无}尘冥将军{RUBY_E#}或是{RUBY_B#爻光}戎韬将军{RUBY_E#}，这场问话或许就不会这么友善了。
You're lucky that I'm the one who came this time. If it were {RUBY_B#Youwu}the Patina Justice{RUBY_E#} or {RUBY_B#Yao Guang}the Seer Strategist{RUBY_E#}, this conversation might not be so friendly.
我向来相信直觉，自然不会怀疑各位光明磊落的侠士。但眼下罗浮面对的质疑难关也确凿无疑。因此我打算确保最关键的一点，给联盟一个交代。

I've always had faith in my instincts, so I don't doubt your good intentions. But the Alliance has its fair share of questions and doubts about the Luofu. So, my plan is to come up with an acceptable answer to satisfy the Alliance.
What's in this plan, General Feixiao?
景元将军心知肚明。只是你不愿做这坏人，那便由我代劳——建木一事仍需要十王司一锤定音，压服众声。

General Jing Yuan, you already know what has to be done, but since you don't want to be the bad guy, I'll take care of it for you. You need the final word from the Ten-Lords Commission to quell any doubts.
为此，我要委屈两位无名客前往幽囚狱一趟。
And for that, I'll have to ask the two Nameless to visit the Shackling Prison.
不是扣留。我会申请十王司「问字部」的判官以业镜台为诸位留下一份详细证言，补上报告所缺，也是为了堵上联盟内抗议的嘴巴。

No, I'm not imprisoning you. While you're there, I'll ask a judge in the Ten-Lords Commission's Interrogation Division to record a detailed testimony with the Karmic Mirror from both of you. We'll fill in the gaps that weren't covered in the report and silence any protests within the Alliance.
好！年轻人心肠滚热，如此体贴，老朽感动得眼泪都掉下来了。
Your willingness to help is truly heartwarming, youngsters.
你担心我出尔反尔，将你们扣在幽囚狱里？那大可不必…我要是想做早就做了。一旦完成证言，诸位来去自由，礼遇如常。

Worried that I might go back on my word and keep you in The Shackling Prison? Relax, if I wanted to do that, you'd already be behind bars. Once you're done with your testimony, you're free to come and go as you please.
Will you let us come back...?
你担心我出尔反尔，将你们扣在幽囚狱里？那大可不必…我要是想做早就做了。一旦完成证言，诸位来去自由，礼遇如常。

Worried that I might go back on my word and keep you in The Shackling Prison? Relax, if I wanted to do that, you'd already be behind bars. Once you're done with your testimony, you're free to come and go as you please.
Then, as the Merlin's Claw requests...
此外，我来罗浮还有一桩要务。如果说十王司盖上大印的证言是为压服联盟高层里反对的声音。那么曜青仙舟狐人内部的声音要恳请景元将军听听。

Oh, there's one more thing. This testimony is for silencing the voices of opposition within the Alliance, but I would like to urge General Jing Yuan to listen to the pleas of the foxians on the Xianzhou Yaoqing.
天击将军是为「呼雷」而来？
So, you are here for Hoolay?
正是。我要带走关押在罗浮幽囚狱中的步离人巢父「呼雷」，移交曜青仙舟看管。步离人近日的动向足以证明他们将有大图谋。我们必须及早因应。

Exactly. Hoolay is locked up in the Luofu's Shackling Prison. Since he is the Brood Lord of the borisin, I want to transfer him onto the Xianzhou Yaoqing and imprison him there. The recent movements of the borisin suggest they're planning something big, so we must act preemptively.
呼雷是狐族世仇，由狐人镇压看守也合情合理。飞霄将军信任罗浮的处置，罗浮自然也对将军的处置报以信任。炎老认为如何？
It makes sense to have the foxians keep an eye on their arch-nemesis. Since you trust my judgment, I'll repay that trust. What do you think about all this, General Huaiyan?
老朽本来担心这是一场唇枪舌剑的会面。是我多心了！两位既然都做出决定，互解难题，那真是再好不过！
I was worried this would turn into a heated argument, but it seems like both of you are on the same page, solving each other's problems! I couldn't have asked for a better outcome!
移交呼雷一事，我会派遣下属椒丘、貊泽先行对其囚牢状况进行探视，以便后续展开押解。若无其他疑问，这就开始吧？
And as for Hoolay, I'll send my lieutenants Jiaoqiu and Moze to check on his condition in prison and ready him for transport. If there are no more questions, shall we get this started?
实在抱歉，{NICKNAME}。幽囚狱中的笔录不会占用你们太长时间。
I'm really sorry about all this, {NICKNAME}, but the testimony in the Shackling Prison won't take up much of your time.
我会召来接引者，带两位送往十王司问字部判官处，两位只需留下证言即可返回，不必担忧。
I'll call for a messenger to take you to the Interrogation Division. You just need to give your testimony and then you can head back. So, no need to worry.
化干戈为玉帛，确是好事。
Well, I'm glad we managed to talk this out.
飞霄打量了你一眼，尽管没有任何理由，你仍然感到她以看到对手的眼光对你上下打量。
Feixiao gives you a once-over, and despite lacking any apparent reason, you feel scrutinized, as if she were sizing up an opponent.
你相信星核猎手的预言？
Do you actually believe in the Stellaron Hunters' prophecy?
Yes, I do. That's why I'm here.
我不相信。所以我来了，为了证明他看到的命运不存在。
No, I don't. That's why I'm here, to prove that the prophecy is not real.
仙舟的穷观阵也能预卜未来…你相信它预言的未来吗？
The Xianzhou's Matrix of Prescience can also predict the future... Do you believe in its prophecies?
语言可以掩饰，但你说话时的目光，呼吸节奏，还有气息都在代你开口。
While words can be deceiving, your gaze, your breathing, and your scent... they reveal more than your words do.
比起别人说什么，我更相信自己的直觉。
I trust my intuition more than any words.
你果然像怀炎说的那般，是个特别的存在。
You're definitely a unique individual, just like Huaiyan said.
但愿你行在与帝弓为友的道路上。
I hope you'll walk alongside the Reignbow's path as a friend.
一段时间后，一艘星槎将你和丹恒载至一处看起来颇为熟悉的地方……
Some time later, a starskiff carries you and Dan Heng to a place that looks strikingly familiar...
奉景元将军呼召，我等开启入口，备妥文书，在此接引。问字部判官也已知晓两位来意。
As General Jing Yuan requested, everything is prepared for your arrival, and I am here to receive you. The judges at the Interrogation Division also know your purpose in coming.
幽囚狱…时隔多年，没想到再次回到了这里。
The Shackling Prison... I didn't expect to be back here after all these years.
若两位已经准备好了，我便打开狱门。
If you're ready, I'll open the gate for you.
This is the entrance to The Shackling Prison?
此处是幽囚狱众多临时便于出入的穴门之一。两位并非犯人，自不能循押解犯人的门入内。客人，请入内。
This is one of many entrances used for temporary access. Since you're not actual prisoners, it makes sense for you to use this entrance. Please come on in, dear guests.
等等，幽囚狱也在鳞渊境里？
Wait, is The Shackling Prison inside the Scalegorge Waterscape, too?
严格说来，幽囚狱同处于多个洞天之中，古海不过是与其交叠的一处。客人，请入内。
Well, technically, The Shackling Prison is spread out across multiple delves, and the ancient sea is just where they overlap. Please come on in, dear guests.
踏进去，里面便是幽囚狱？
Once I step through that door, I'll be inside the prison?
Exactly. Please come on in, dear guests.
这名武弁似乎十分清楚你是谁与你的来意。她侧身让路，示意你踏入幽囚狱的入口。
The warden seems to recognize you and understand your purpose of visit. She steps aside and motions for you to enter The Shackling Prison.
若两位已经准备好了，可随我前往幽囚狱。
If both of you are ready, please follow me to The Shackling Prison.
若两位已经准备好了，我便打开狱门。
If you're ready, I'll open the gate for you.
关押呼雷的牢笼之门，如有实质的虚空黑暗中透出令人胆寒的死寂气息。
In the suffocating, empty darkness, an air of deathly stillness lingered about the gates of the cage that once confined Hoolay, chilling all who gaze upon it to the marrow.
它本该是个稳妥的关押之处，可惜即便是这样的牢笼也没能困住恶兽。
The cage should have been virtually impossible to break out of, yet even it had failed to trap the savage beast for long.
罗浮的幽囚狱…与曜青截然不同，竟是被压在水下的。
The Shackling Prison on the Luofu... is completely different from the one on the Yaoqing. It's completely underwater.
不管是在天上还是水底，要逃出去都易如反掌。
Whether it's in the clouds or underwater, breaking free would still be a piece of cake for me.
小子，越狱的老毛病又犯了？别打量了，你现在已是自由之身。万一教判官们发现你有什么不轨企图，高低把你抓进去关个几百年。

You're still thinking about your old jailbreak tricks, huh? Forget it. You're free now. Just don't do anything stupid, or the judges will throw you back in there and lock you up for a few hundred years.
用不了几天，你就会再见到我的。
You'll see me again in just a few days.
押解呼雷返回曜青，此事不仅对曜青狐人关系重大，对将军也极为重要，留神了。
Taking Hoolay back to the Yaoqing means a lot to the foxians on the ship and to the General herself. So, stay alert.
两位，吾名唤雪衣，奉十王司锁字部通令在此候命。
Guests, my name is Xueyi, and I'm here on orders from the Incarceration Division of the Ten-Lords Commission.
椒丘、貊泽奉天击将军飞霄之命，前来引渡步离人重犯「呼雷」前往曜青。
We're Jiaoqiu and Moze. General Feixiao sent us to extradite the borisin criminal Hoolay to the Yaoqing.
此次前来是为探视其关押状况，为后续交接押送事宜预先准备。判官大人想必已收到了知会。
We're here to inspect the conditions of his imprisonment and make preparations for the handover and transportation. I assume you've been briefed, your honor.
探视的申请已有批复。吾将是此行的引路人。
Your visit request has been approved. I'll be your guide for this trip.
罪囚呼雷，乃丰饶孽物步离人之战首、巢父，狐人之大敌。其人需为先后两千一百二十三场侵略战争及其连带罪行负责。

Prisoner Hoolay, the Warhead and Brood Lord of the borisin Abominations of Abundance and the arch-nemesis of the foxians, is responsible for <unbreak>2,123</unbreak> wars of aggression and countless associated crimes.
以其凶残暴戾，所造杀孽不可胜纪，判入幽囚狱底，受无间剑树之刑直至天地荒灭，永无宽赦……
Due to his heinous acts, he has been imprisoned in the depths of The Shackling Prison and subjected to the punishment of the Forest of Swords until the end of time. He shall never be pardoned...
判官大人，这判书上的文字就不必念了吧。呼雷其人是我狐族的天敌宿仇，他干下的暴行，可是曜青父母拿来止小儿夜啼的素材，每一桩我都清清楚楚。咱们快进到下一步吧。

No need to repeat his crimes and sentence, your honor. He is the greatest enemy of us foxians. The stories of his atrocities are used to terrify our children. I'm well aware of every crime he's committed. Let's move on to the next step.
探视重犯，每条规矩都关乎汝等安危。
When it comes to visiting criminals, there are rules in place to ensure your safety.
就算两位曜青使者自幼耳闻呼雷的传说，但对他的所知依旧少得可怜。唯有十王司判官才清楚，幽囚狱底下关押的到底是一头什么样的孽物。

I know you've heard legends about Hoolay since you were children, but your knowledge about him is likely very limited. Only the judges of the Ten-Lords Commission truly know what kind of abomination is locked up at the bottom of The Shackling Prison.
自罗浮前任剑首镜流俘获呼雷以来，数百年过去了，幽囚狱从未允许呼雷进食给养。但即便馁饿至今，他依旧活着。这和记录在案的步离人生理完全不符。

It has been centuries since Jingliu, the former Sword Champion of the Luofu, captured Hoolay. And during all those years, we never provided him with any food. Yet he's somehow managed to stay alive. It defies all the documented physical characteristics of the borisin.
刑字部所造的无间剑树，本是对罪行累累的孽物施加痛苦业报的处决刑具。大部分步离人在受剑树刑后熬不过三日。但这妖物不同，剑片穿刺，即刻复原。受刑至今，他也依旧活着。

The Forest of Swords, forged by the Punishment Division, is a device of intense torment used to execute sinful abominations. Most borisin die within three days in the Forest, but Hoolay is different. Every time the blades pierce him, his body instantly heals. Despite the brutal punishment, he somehow manages to survive.
这头恶兽的种种妖异之处，便是所有规矩存在的意义。话说到这儿，两位明白了吗？
The complex rules are there because of his abnormal characteristics. Do you understand now?
是椒丘冒犯了…请大人继续。
I apologize for any offense caused... Please continue, your honor.
关于呼雷的探视禁忌事宜，吾已交付二位，<color=#dbc291ff>请认真阅读</color>。
I've given you the instructions regarding Hoolay's visitation. Please make sure you <color=#dbc291ff>read them carefully</color>.
还有，去往下一层之前，务必要吃下这丸丹药。
And please take this pellet before proceeding.
来历不明的药，我是不会吃的。
No, I'm not taking random medicine.
那汝等就无法进入底层探视。
Then you won't be allowed to visit Hoolay.
吃了吧。呼雷这厮和所有步离人一样，能释放名唤「狼毒」的信息素，唤起内心的恐惧。
Just swallow it already. Hoolay is like all borisin, he can release a pheromone called Lupitoxin that induces fear.
数千年前，我族受步离人长久奴役，无力反抗。不是因为狐人天然低他们一等，原因就在这个。判官大人的药可是为咱们俩的心理健康着想呢。
Thousands of years ago, we foxians were enslaved by the borisin, not because we were naturally weaker, but because of their Lupitoxin. This pill is for our own mental well-being.
我就知道你是个通情达理的人。药我们已咽下了，走吧。
I knew you were a reasonable person. Now that we've taken the medicine, let's proceed.
不，没事，也许是我的错觉…咱们走吧。
No, never mind, maybe I'm just imagining things... Let's keep moving.
判官尚未抵达，两位请稍作等待。
Her Honor hasn't arrived yet. Please wait a moment.
这里…还是和过去一样冷。
This place... it's still as cold as it used to be.
抱歉，记起了一些不快的回忆。
Sorry, I was just reminiscing about some unpleasant memories.
等完成证言，我们就离开仙舟。
Once we're done with the testimony, we'll leave immediately.
就算没法逃离过去，你有我们。
Even if you can't escape your past, we're always here for you.
谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。都是因为我的缘故，才会将你们卷入仙舟一系列事件中。你本不应该看到幽囚狱里的景色…真是抱歉。
Thank you, {NICKNAME}. It's all my fault that you were involved in the Xianzhou's problems. You shouldn't have to see the inside of The Shackling Prison... I'm so sorry.
要是有机会，我希望能以更好的方式带你们游历罗浮的景色。
I wish I could show you the real sights of the Luofu.
丹恒轻轻拍了拍你的手。
Dan Heng gently pats your hand.
为什么不在幽囚狱外问话？
Why can't they record our testimony outside The Shackling Prison?
在仙舟上的其他地方，也许六御更有权威。但在幽囚狱里，十王司的判官却是至高无上的。
The Six Charioteers might have more power over the rest of this Xianzhou ship, but here, in The Shackling Prison, it's the judges of the Ten-Lords Commission who call the shots.
判官折狱，会借助「业镜台」之类的复杂审讯系统。那东西会在每一次问答时，如同透镜般解读受审者身体的变化与信号，留下存证。
The judges will use a complicated interrogation device called the Karmic Mirror. It accurately tracks every physiological change during questioning and records it.
经由此处做出的审断，足以令其他仙舟的管理者信服…至少他们不会妄加推翻。这也是飞霄执意需要我们来此的缘故吧。

Therefore, the judgment made here will be sufficient to convince the other administrators of the Xianzhou... At least they won't attempt to challenge the conclusions. Perhaps that's why Feixiao insisted that we come here.
Since the judge isn't here yet, I'll just wander around a bit.
好，但是别乱跑，这儿不比别的地方。
Okay, but watch your step. This place is not like the others.
列车的客人，久等了。问字部判官寒鸦见过两位。
Welcome, dear guests from the Express. Judge Hanya of the Interrogation Division, we've met before.
寒鸦身为问字部判官，将会接手此次证言记录。
As one of the judges from the Interrogation Division, I'll be recording your testimony today.
判官就你们姐妹俩是吧？
Are you and your sister the only judges here?
怎么，{NICKNAME}不想见到我？也罢，我可以唤来擅用针灸的判官，精通斧锯的判官，又或是长于鞭索的判官来问话…多种选择，必有一款适合您。

Hmm? You don't want to see me, {NICKNAME}? Well, in that case, I can call in the judge who's an expert in acupuncture, or the one who's handy with axes and saws, or the one who knows all about whips and ropes... We've got plenty of options here, and we'll find one that suits your taste.
开个小玩笑。判官执勤轮流周转，{NICKNAME}只是刚巧碰上了我，可见我俩冥冥中有些缘分。
Just kidding. We judges work in shifts, and it just happens to be my shift, {NICKNAME}. Maybe we're destined to cross paths.
此前{RUBY_B#镇伏岁阳}绥园伏魔{RUBY_E#}一事，真是有劳您奔波了，容寒鸦再度致谢。
Please allow me to express my gratitude to you again for {RUBY_B#Subduing Heliobi}subduing the demons in the Fyxestroll Garden{RUBY_E#}.
看来在我和三月七不知不觉的时候，你已经在罗浮仙舟上颇有人缘了啊。
Looks like while March 7th and I were clueless, you already made many friends on the Xianzhou Luofu.
都是机缘巧合，机缘巧合。
It was all a lucky coincidence.
毕竟在家靠帕姆，出外靠朋友。
Pom-Pom takes care of us at home, and friends take care of us on the road. That's just how it goes.
虽说{NICKNAME}与我有一面之缘，但十王御下，不容徇私。前往「录事厅」留下证言以及之后的一切流程，请两位务必听我号令，不得擅自行动。

Even though {NICKNAME} and I have met before, we can't show any favoritism under the Ten Lords. So, please do as I command as we head to Scrivener Hall and beyond. Don't do anything without my permission.
此处不是阳世凡人久待之地。丹恒先生，{NICKNAME}，随我来。
This is not a place for ordinary mortals. {NICKNAME} and Mr. Dan Heng, please come with me.
Please lead the way, your honor.
待我启动机关，各位再向前走，务必小心脚下。
Please let me activate the mechanism before we all move forward, and please watch your steps.
这一路行去，各位一定要留神自己的落脚处。
Be very careful and watch your step as you make your way through.
幽囚狱内地势险怪，稍有不慎便会坠入深处。运气要是背些，只怕在救援赶到前，会被冻入幽邃坚冰里，又或是被焦炎烧成炭烬。

The terrain inside the Shackling Prison is treacherous. One wrong move, and you could end up plunging into the depths. And if you're really unlucky, you might be frozen solid or burned to a crisp before anyone can help you.
不过以两位的身手我想不必担心。
But with your skills, I don't think you need to worry about that.
So, are there really eighteen floors here?
{NICKNAME}说笑了，幽囚狱各处山重水复，层层相叠。还请来了持明的龙脉巧匠，用尽了洞天之术的奇巧。两位肉眼所见的只是幽囚狱的一部分。

You're funny, {NICKNAME}. This prison does contain many layers. We even brought in Vidyadhara Ichor Line craftsmen to introduce the ingenuity of delve enchantment. What you're seeing now is just one part of The Shackling Prison.
也许吧，从外观看，这座幽囚狱的许多建筑都留有持明的制式…也许在古早之前，持明确实参与营建了此处。
Perhaps. Judging from the appearance, much of the architecture in this prison has a Vidyadharan style... So perhaps they did have a hand in building this place back then.
要问此处到底有多少层？让两位见笑了，即便身为判官的我也不知道。
As for how many floors there are...? Well, not even us judges know for sure.
不过判官之间流传，有短生种犯人试图逃脱，却不慎坠下…当我们寻到他时，他已是个垂垂老者了……

But there's a legend among us judges that a short-life prisoner once tried to escape but ended up falling into the depths... and when we found him at the bottom, he was already an old man on the brink of death...
如此想来，他究竟是在下落中度过了一生的时间，还是被某些长生种犯人吸食精气变老？这就不得而知了。总之，两位可不要轻易尝试啊。
Did he spend his whole life falling? Or did some long-life prisoner drain his life essence? We'll never know. Anyway, please don't try anything like that.
Why keep the terrain so dangerous?
{NICKNAME}说笑了，幽囚狱各处山重水复，层层相叠。还请来了持明的龙脉巧匠，用尽了洞天之术的奇巧。两位肉眼所见的只是幽囚狱的一部分。

You're funny, {NICKNAME}. This prison does contain many layers. We even brought in Vidyadhara Ichor Line craftsmen to introduce the ingenuity of delve enchantment. What you're seeing now is just one part of The Shackling Prison.
也许吧，从外观看，这座幽囚狱的许多建筑都留有持明的制式…也许在古早之前，持明确实参与营建了此处。
Perhaps. Judging from the appearance, much of the architecture in this prison has a Vidyadharan style... So perhaps they did have a hand in building this place back then.
只不过幽囚狱的路既是为十王司人员所设的通道，也是为犯人所设的障碍。
Well, the paths here serve as both passageways for the Ten-Lords Commission and barriers for the prisoners.
此地关押的多是些大奸大恶，触犯仙舟律条的犯人。这班人中又以步离、慧骃、{RUBY_B#造翼者}羽夷{RUBY_E#}之类的丰饶孽物居多。这些丰饶民，说句不妥帖的，各个身怀绝技…谋划脱狱之事时有发生。

Most prisoners locked up here have committed serious crimes violating the Xianzhou Legal Code, and many of them are Denizens of Abundance like borisin, houyhnhnm, and {RUBY_B#featherines}wingweavers{RUBY_E#}. To be honest, these abominations... are pretty good at trying to break out.
只消能为他们逃离此处多增添一份困难，这些艰难道路对咱们十王司的人来说算得了什么。
So, as long as the treacherous terrain here makes it harder for them to escape, the Ten-Lords Commission doesn't have any complaints.
Go to the Grimfrost Hold Floor
要去录事厅，须经由此处悬梯，通过寒冰狱。
To reach Scrivener Hall, we must take this elevator and go through the Frozen Prison.
那里阴寒透体，请稍作忍耐。
Please brace yourself for the biting cold.
Go to the Transitory Hold floor
Go to the Pyroscape Hold floor
听闻阳世即将召开演武仪典。寒鸦犹记得自己小时候曾与姐姐观赏过其中一场剑斗。
I heard the Wardance is about to be held in the mortal world. I remember watching a sword duel at the Wardance with my sister when we were young.
为罗浮守擂的云骑剑士英武非凡，剑光如电。异邦的挑战者一头火发，一只手竟是镔铁铸成，拳锋如雷。两人相斗良久，难分胜负。

The Cloud Knight who was the Luofu's ringmaster was an amazing swordsman, and their sword flashed like lightning. The outworld challenger had fiery red hair and a hand made of steel which roared like thunder. They battled for a long time before a winner could be declared.
一眨眼，时间已经过去了这么久。寒鸦和姐姐都成了冥世之身，再不会为什么比赛激动雀跃了。
Time sure flies. Now, both my sister and I are residents of the netherworld, and we will never again feel the thrill of a competition.
{NICKNAME}，这一回演武仪典，星槎海的人流多吗？
Are there a lot of people in Starskiff Haven due to the Wardance, {NICKNAME}?
真好啊。可惜寒鸦公务繁忙，不能观赏赛事…以我如今的样貌，去了只怕也会吓到旁人。
Sounds amazing. It's a shame I'm too busy to attend... but even if I could, I'd probably just scare people off with my current appearance.
Aren't we going to take the elevator?
Sorry, I got a bit distracted there.
此处引来极境洞天北号峰的寒气。
This place is filled with the cold air from the Northern Peak of the Polar Delve.
饶是生命力顽强的长生种也抵受不住。
Even the toughest long-life species would have a hard time enduring this.
Ugh, what an eyesore. This place is packed with boxes and crates.
嗯？两位听见什么响动了吗？
Hmm? Did you hear something just now?
这些箱子…看起来有些眼熟。
These crates... they look oddly familiar.
前些日子冥差收到传唤，说是公司的运输船遭受了步离人袭击。随后一大群孽畜便被丢进了这里。
A few days ago, the spiritfarers received reports about an IPC transport ship that was attacked by borisin. Then, a bunch of those abominations were dumped into this place.
想来演武仪典召开，总有不轨之徒蠢蠢欲动。只是货物与劫匪一同被扔进监狱的事情，我倒是从没见过。
I had a feeling there would be trouble during the Wardance. But throwing both the pirates and the cargo in jail? That's a new one.
那些箱子里的机甲可不好惹。
The mechs in those crates are no joke.
公司似乎招惹了步离人…
Looks like the IPC has caught the attention of the borisin...
我听说啦，博识学会的人似乎造出了某种危险的东西。因果殿的卷宗中有不少关于这些智叟的记录，他们为了突破机巧技术的极限，总喜欢涉足禁忌研究。

I heard the Intelligentsia Guild crafted something dangerous. We have many records in the Hall of Karma about these wise ones. They love to tinker with forbidden technologies, always trying to push the limits of ingenia.
我见过箱中的机甲，造型与步离人颇为近似。真不知道这回他们打算做什么？
I caught a glimpse of the mechs in those crates, and they bear a striking resemblance to borisin. I wonder what they're planning this time?
Well, business first. Let's keep moving.
怎么回事？这些东西为何动起来了？
What's happening here? Why are these things moving on their own?
不对劲，守卫们毫无回应…
Something is wrong. The guards aren't responding...
这东西…发起狂来和步离人一样。
This thing... is going wild, just like a borisin.
Looks like we're on our own for this one.
这怎么可能，冥差们已经按照规程切断了箱子里机器的动力，还在箱子之外施加了封印。为何这些机甲还能行动？
But how is this even possible? The spiritfarers followed the protocols, cutting off power to the mechs and sealing the crates. How could these mechs still start moving?
和当时在工造司里的情况一样，这些货物仿佛失去了控制一般攻击在场所有人。
It's just like what happened in the Artisanship Commission before. These goods went haywire and attacked everyone in sight.
灵砂说机甲内有生物组织。
Lingsha mentioned there was some kind of biological tissue inside the mechs.
丹鼎司的人检查过机甲，这东西内部隐含着非同一般的结构。
The Alchemy Commission members examined them and found some unusual structures within.
冥差呢？为什么没人增援？
Where are the spiritfarers? Why hasn't anyone come to help us?
从刚才开始，似乎有某种东西在干扰幽囚狱内的通讯。
Something seems to be jamming communications within The Shackling Prison.
说不定正是这些机甲干的好事。
It's probably these mechs causing the trouble.
这样危险的东西出现在幽囚狱里，唯一的目的就是——
These things showing up in The Shackling Prison can only mean one thing...
而送来这些「货物」的人，显然希望仙舟严格的审核流程能将它的危险暴露在天舶司和云骑的眼前。他们想确保的是它一定会被送入幽囚狱。

And whoever delivered these "goods" clearly wanted them to go through the Xianzhou's strict inspection process, to show the Sky-Faring Commission and Cloud Knights how dangerous they were. They wanted these mechs to end up right here in The Shackling Prison.
如果在所有人无法察觉的时候，这些东西已经开始行动。那整座监狱现在的状况就非常危险了。
If these things already started taking action while nobody was paying attention, then the whole prison is in trouble, I'm afraid.
更危险的是，除两位之外，刚才还有一队来访者进入了幽囚狱深处——曜青仙舟的使者。
And to make things worse, another group of visitors just entered the depths of The Shackling Prison, the messengers from the Xianzhou Yaoqing.
他们探访的对象…也许就是这些狼形机甲被送入此地的目标。若是让镇压在底部的那头恶兽逃了出来…恐怕罗浮仙舟也将有大灾难！

And the prisoner they came to visit... might be the target whom these wolf-shaped mechs were delivered here for. If that vicious beast manages to break free... it will be a catastrophe for the Xianzhou Luofu!
片刻之前，雪衣已引领曜青使者来到幽狱之底。
A few moments prior, Xueyi leads the Yaoqing messengers to the bottom of the prison.
Have we arrived already, your honor?
Shouldn't there be a cage here?
犯尽十恶，大逆不道的罪人都被镇于幽狱之底，以单独的洞天囚禁。若无谕令，等闲不会开启。
The most notorious felons are locked away in solitary delves deep down in the prison. Those delves can't be opened without proper authorization.
「青鸟开道，冥灯照路」。助我点亮这些灯座，通往幽狱之底的前路自会显现。
"The blue bird paves the path, and the Stygian Lanterns illuminate it." Help me light up these lanterns, and the way to the bottom of the Shackling Prison will reveal itself.
点灯所需的图示吾已交给你了。看看吧。
I've given you the diagrams for lighting the lanterns. Please take a look.
两位，路已开启。一旦下到幽狱之底，绝不要轻举妄动。
The path is open. Once we descend to the bottom of the prison, please do not do anything reckless.
在这扇门后的洞天里，关押的便是狐人的大敌，呼雷。
Inside the delve behind this door is the greatest enemy of the foxians, Hoolay.
依循常例，曜青使节每百年一次抵达罗浮仙舟，确认这头孽物的关押事宜与其生死状况。
According to custom, envoys from the Yaoqing visit the Xianzhou Luofu once every century to check on this abomination's imprisonment and condition.
尽管十王司判处呼雷受无间剑树之刑，令其日日苦楚，万世不休。但吾很明白，曜青使者们最想看到的是呼雷咽气的死状……
Even though the Ten-Lords Commission sentenced Hoolay to the Forest of Swords, suffering every day for the rest of his life, I understand that the Yaoqing messengers want to see him dead...
可惜，这七百年来他们全都失望而归了，那是头杀不死的恶兽。
Unfortunately, for the past seven centuries, they've had to return disappointed, because this beast simply can't be killed.
世间至毒若能入药，换回一条无辜的生命，也或许能稍稍抵偿他所犯下的累累血罪了。
If we can use his toxin to create medicine and save an innocent life, it might help balance out some of the sins he has committed.
治愈将军的法子，会是你吗，呼雷？
Could you be the key to a cure for the General, Hoolay?
这一次，曜青的使节也将失望而归。但我和我的兄弟们就不同了……
And once again, the envoys of the Yaoqing will leave disappointed. However, I won't say the same for me and my brothers...
在下是「犀犬猎群」一介小小的策问官，你可以叫我…末度。
I'm just a humble counselor of the Rhinohound Pack. You can call me... Mok Tok.
武弁！底层遭到入侵，速速增援！
Wardens! Intruders on the lowest level! Send reinforcements!
在幽狱之底，没人能听见诸位的呼喊。
Nobody will hear you here, at the bottom of the Shackling Prison.
多谢你替我们打开了囚牢，判官。剩下的事情，交给我们就好。
Thank you for opening up the prison for us, your honor. We'll take it from here.
难怪我始终嗅到一股熟悉的兽臭味，原来这不是我的错觉啊。貊泽，动手！
No wonder I kept smelling that familiar stench. So, it wasn't just my imagination. Do your thing, Moze!
两位，绝不能让这些孽物靠近！
We mustn't let these abominations get any closer!
可恶，这些孽物人数太多了。
Detestable things, there are too many of them.
一旦进入幽囚狱，可用之「兵」到处都是。
Once we were inside The Shackling Prison, we found "soldiers" available for us everywhere.
当然，我绝不会留各位性命。
Of course, I'll still kill you all.
…至少这样省去了无谓的痛苦。
距离上次狩猎，{RUBY_B#究竟过去了多少年}青丘究竟旋转了多少次{RUBY_E#}？{RUBY_B#步离人的血裔}都蓝的崽子{RUBY_E#}！告诉我你的名字！
{RUBY_B#how many years}How many times{RUBY_E#} has Verdantia spun around since our last hunt? Ah, {RUBY_B#scions of borisin}Duran's whelp{RUBY_E#}! Tell me your name!
伟大的呼雷汗，狐人之敌，众生的猎者。我只是犀犬猎群中一个小小的策问官，也许曾是您血脉中产下的最微不足道的子嗣之一。我名{RUBY_B#Mok Tok}末度{RUBY_E#}。
O, Great Hoolay, nemesis of the foxians, and the hunter of all beings, I'm Mok Tok, a humble counselor of the Rhinohound Pack. I am only one insignificant heir spawned from your bloodline.
距离您上次率领我族驰骋星海的猎场，已经过去…至少七百年时间了。看到您依旧如过去般狡猾机敏，我无限欢欣。
It's been... at least seven centuries since you led our Pack through the hunting grounds of the stars. I'm thrilled to see that you are as cunning and skillful as ever.
七百年…七百年过去了，都蓝的崽子为什么长成了你这般模样？回答我，末度，为什么你长成了我们最可鄙的奴隶和敌人——狐人的模样？

Seven centuries... Seven centuries have passed, but why have Duran's whelps grown to look like this? Tell me, Mok Tok, why have you grown to resemble our most despicable slaves and enemies, the foxians?
我受命前来，将您从可憎的囚牢中释放。这是{RUBY_B#命运}Sain Jiyaa {RUBY_E#}注定如此。为此，我不得不服下魔药，披上{RUBY_B#狐人}贱畜{RUBY_E#}的{RUBY_B#形貌}皮{RUBY_E#}，用伪装来应对他们的虚伪。

I've been commanded to release you from this cursed prison. It is {RUBY_B#fate}Sain Jiyaa{RUBY_E#}'s will. That's why I had to take a magic pill, don the skin of {RUBY_B#foxian}a lowly beast{RUBY_E#}, and play along with their hypocrisy.
既然你有逃离的计划，那么说说，接下来该怎么做才能离开这艘大到没边的天船？
Since you have an escape plan, tell me, what's our next move to get off of this ridiculously large ship?
我和弟兄们会封死这座监狱的门关，把狱卒闷死在里面。这样我们能暂时得到喘息的时间。
My brothers and I will lock down this prison, trapping the prison guards inside. This will buy us some time.
那些和我一样伪装的弟兄们会为您的逃离准备船只。按照计划，我们总共有两个时辰离开这儿。
The rest of my crew, who are undercover like me, will secure the vessels for our escape. According to the plan, we only have four hours to get out of here.
原本我打算在明日执行营救您的计划，不过他们打算将您送往曜青仙舟关押，我必须趁此良机，将您解放出来。
Originally, I intended to carry out the plan tomorrow, but they're planning to transfer you to the Xianzhou Yaoqing now, so I seized this opportunity to set you free.
有勇无谋的计划，蠢货！就算有船，我们能逃出去的机会也比狐人逃过我爪子的机会要少得多！
What a reckless plan, you idiot! Even if we manage to get the ships, our chances of escaping are slimmer than a foxian slipping through my claws!
为了救回您，我们别无选择！派我前来的长生主的天使如此说过，「只有您的回归才能结束步离人漫长的分裂」。
But we have no other choice! The angel serving under the Master of Immortality sent me with a message, "Only your return will end the prolonged divisions among the borisin."
此行的所有兄弟都已做好了牺牲的准备——只要能让您离开这儿。
Every one of my crew is ready to lay down their lives if it means setting you free.
像你这样靠狡诈求生的弱者，居然在计划中表现出近乎愚蠢的勇悍。你会得偿所愿的…所有都蓝的崽子都会得偿所愿的。
A sneaky weakling like you is actually showing some reckless bravery with this plan. Fine, you'll get what you want... and all of Duran's whelps will too.
Well then, my Lord, we should leave now.
在离开前，把你们吃下的魔药给我一丸。
Before we go, give me one of those magic pills.
您…您居然要披上贱畜的皮？这有辱您伟大的身份……
My Lord... you seriously want to don the skin of a lowly beast? That would be a disgrace to your greatness, my Lord...
白痴，失去自由的伟大一文不值！一旦离开此地，我需要一张至少看起来不那么可疑的皮囊。
You idiot! Greatness means nothing without freedom! Once I get out, I'll need a disguise that won't raise any suspicion.
那个狐人奴隶，是献给我的食粮吗？
Is that foxian slave my meal?
不，他是曜青仙舟的使节。请您暂时忍耐爪牙，他还有作为人质的价值。带上他，咱们走！
No, he's an envoy from the Xianzhou Yaoqing. I plead you to endure him a bit, my Lord, as he's more valuable as a hostage. Take him, guys! Time to move out!
与此同时，{NICKNAME}、丹恒与寒鸦察觉到了狱中的情况业已失控……
At the same time, {NICKNAME}, Dan Heng, and Hanya realize that the situation in the prison is out of control...
寒鸦大人，各区域武弁正在重整队伍。那些机巧敌人正在到处游走，杀伤了不少同僚。
Madam Hanya, the wardens in all areas are regrouping. Those ingenium enemies are wandering around and causing heavy casualties.
不止如此，那些铁狼还破坏囚笼，放走了罪犯！我们已经向外求援了，但看起来所有的通讯都被阻绝了。
And to make things worse, those iron wolves broke open the cages and let the criminals out! We've called for backup, but it seems like all communication is jammed.
保存实力为先，优先镇伏落单的囚犯和劫狱者。奉十王敕，凡有脱狱、劫狱者，不禁杀伤。
Let's preserve our strength and first take down the isolated prisoners. By decree of the Ten Lords, all prison breakers and intruders shall be apprehended, dead or alive.
一刻之前，「断狱轮钥」的机关启动。想来是雪衣大人和曜青使节进入幽狱之底进行探视了。以眼下失联的情况来看，贼人的目标正是此处。

Just a short time ago, the Nether Key mechanism was activated. It was probably Madam Xueyi and the Yaoqing messengers, heading to the bottom of the prison. Given the situation, I'm afraid that area is exactly where our enemies are targeting.
绝不可让那头恶兽从牢笼中脱出！
We mustn't let that vile beast escape from its cage!
已清点尚能战斗的狱卒，即将开赴各层搜捕。
We've gathered all the prison guards who can still fight, and we'll split up and secure each floor.
那些劫狱者如此胆大妄为，一定为这次行动计划了许久。
Those intruders are quite bold. They must have been planning this for quite a while.
你说的不错。只是奇怪步离人从来更乐衷于暴力杀伤，制定如此精密周详的计划…不像他们一贯的风格。
Indeed, but borisin tend to favor direct and aggressive approaches. Crafting careful and precise plans like this... is simply not their style.
眼下情势危急，不是复盘审视的时候。两位，请先助我一臂之力！
Let's focus on the current situation right now. Please help me!
Looks like the testimony will have to wait, huh?
果然咱们所到之处没有太平。
Like I said, wherever we go, we always end up in trouble.
寒鸦小姐，最快前往幽狱之底的通路在什么地方？若不能在时间上争分夺秒，恐怕整个幽囚狱都会成为我们的敌人。
What's the fastest way to the bottom of this prison, Miss Hanya? If we don't get there quickly, we'll soon be outnumbered by all the enemies inside.
为今之计，只有使些取巧的办法了，诸位随我来。
We'll have to bend the rules. Please follow me.
奉十王敕，凡有脱狱、劫狱者，不禁杀伤！
By decree of the Ten Lords, all prison breakers and intruders shall be apprehended, dead or alive.
要想尽快抵达幽狱之底，必须借助某些工具。
We need a few tools if we want to reach the bottom quickly.
Follow me to the next floor.
道路断了？一定是有人更动了机关。
The path is cut off? Someone must have altered the mechanism.
无妨，稍加操作便能打通。
